###### 2.4.3.3.3.1.5 Beam handling When Cell Beam Update

###### 2.4.3.3.3.1.5.0-1 Beam handling When Cell Beam Update Beam measurement reset and beam selection (ID: 12585978)

**2.4.3.3.3.1.5.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12585979`)

Beam handling When Cell Beam Update
When a UE receives first valid beam report with ReportQuantity::ssb\_Index\_RSRP or ReportQuantity::cri\_RSRP for a serving cell after the cell's down tilt change recorded in [12582669: Handling of cell down tilt change](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_0nFmoTSEEfCKaNlcHOQWmg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), the measurement for beam shall be reset, and beam shall be selected according to [11112143: Beam change in case of SSB/refined beam set online update](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpTkc_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9). Also beam toggling shall be reset according to [11112172: Beam toggling recording for SSB/refined Beam](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpTkevvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.1.5.0-2 Beam handling When Cell Beam Update Beam probing stop and re-start (ID: 12592060)

**2.4.3.3.3.1.5.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12592061`)

Beam handling When Cell Beam Update
When a UE receives first valid beam report with ReportQuantity::ssb\_Index\_RSRP or ReportQuantity::cri\_RSRP for a serving cell after the cell's down tilt change recorded in [12582669: Handling of cell down tilt change](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_0nFmoTSEEfCKaNlcHOQWmg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), select a beam based on the report directly according to [12585978: Beam measurement reset and beam selection](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_WSZXcDX1EfCKaNlcHOQWmg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), stop the possible beam probing and rollback procedure and initialize the probing beam data. The beam probing and roll back can only start again till next beam change.

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2 Periodic code book SRS based beam management for UL

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.0-1 Periodic code book SRS based beam management for UL Configuration (ID: 11153915)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `13440930`)

Periodic code book SRS based beam management for UL
[Before CNI-157588-H]At reception of Cell setup message, 5G-L2-PS shall check if uplink SRS based beam management is enabled or not.

If *actUlSrsBm in* bfSetup structure (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_115\_replaced([10968891](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UaBKvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) of **PsCell\_CellSetupReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_61\_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is *true:  
[CNI-157588-H]  
Preconditions: The requirement applies only to the configuration where uplink SRS based beam management is enabled. Upon reception of PsCell\_CellSetupReq message the value of *actUlSrsBm in* bfSetup structure (see [10968891](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UaBKvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) shall be equal to \*True.  
[End CNI-157588-H]*****\***

5G-L2-PS shall apply periodic codebook SRS based uplink beam management for UEs which are configured with periodic SRS resources with usage as CODEBOOK[CNI-157588-H] (see [10975309](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VAeFfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) and [10976392](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VF9rfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))[End CNI-157588-H].

5G-L2-PS shall store corresponding *DftBeamSet [CNI-157588-H](see [10969071](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UaoOPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))[End CNI-157588-H] identified by* dftBeamSetId in *ulSrsBmConfig[CNI-157588-H] (see [10969099](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_87tzsPu3Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))[End CNI-157588-H], which includes the horizontal DFT beams according to* dftBeamWeightH, *numOfDftBeamForUlSrsBmH, and vertical DFT beams according to* dftBeamWeightV, *numOfDftBeamForUlSrsBmV.***\***\*

[Before CNI-157588-H]The 2D-DFT beams are Kronecker product of horizontal and vertical DFT beams. **NOTE: The DFT beams are used by UL beam selection algorithm (see 5G\_L2\_3589\_replaced([11154211](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-SvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).[End CNI-157588-H]**

[CB015122-A]  
If actSrsBmCalcInL1 is set to True (see [10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), then DFT beam selection algorithm is moved to 5G-L1-DU (see [11154028](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksqacvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). 5G-L2-PS shall store SRS beam parameters received from 5G-L1-DU in message UlData\_SrsBeamCalcUlReceiveRespPs (see [13456660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2u4hYC0NEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

Else  
    -[End CB015122-A] 5G-L2-PS shall  calculate correlations between each horizontal DFT beams and store to a lookup table. 5G-L2-PS shall also calculate correlations between each vertical DFT beams and store to a lookup table. **NOTE: The lookup tables are used to speed up the second-best DFT beam selection process by directly getting the correlation of two DFT beams from these tables (See 5G\_L2\_4042\_replaced([11154242](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24zlUPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**

- If *isDftBeamsetConf is True, the configured UL beam set is 2D-DFT beam, 5G-L2-PS shall store the start pattern id of 2D-DFT beams (*dftBeamStartPatternId). The pattern id of an 2D-DFT beam (*dftBeamPatternId) identified by corresponding* dftBeamIndexH, *dftBeamIndexV can be calculated as:  
        dftBeamPatternId =* dftBeamStartPatternId + *numOfDftBeamForUlSrsBmH \** dftBeamIndexV + *dftBeamIndexH.  
    - If* isDftBeamsetConf is False, the configured UL beam set is GoB beam, 5G-L2-PS shall store the mapping table (*dftGoBMapping) between the 2D-DFT beam and the pattern ID of GoB beam.****\****\*\*\*

[CB015122-A]  
end  
[End CB015122-A]

**NOTE 1: Parameters *dftBeamSetId, isDftBeamsetConf, dftGoBMapping are IEs of *ulSrsBmConfig in the*bfSetup structure.***\*\*

[Before CNI-157588-H]**NOTE 2: The *DftBeamSet is one element of *dftBeamSetList*in *bfSetup structure, which has unique* dftBeamSetId and dftBeamWeightH, *numOfDftBeamForUlSrsBmH,* dftBeamWeightV, \*numOfDftBeamForUlSrsBmV, dftBeamStartPatternId are the IEs of DftBeamSet[CNI-157588-H]******\****

**NOTE 2: The 2D-DFT beams are Kronecker product of horizontal and vertical DFT beams. The DFT beams are used by UL beam selection algorithm (see [11154211](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-SvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).[End CNI-157588-H].**

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.1 State machine and message flow

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.1.0-1 State machine and message flow Sequence Chart (ID: 11153932)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `13441605`)

State machine and message flow
[Before CB015122-A]

File: Periodic code book SRS based beam management for UL Sequence Chart.signalling

Folder:

<https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:f:/r/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Drawings%20and%20diagrams%20for%205G/User%20Plane/5G%20L2%20Entity%20Level/2%205G-L2-PS%20Component%20Requirements?csf=1&web=1&e=AMSgi0>

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a diagram illustrating a sequence of messages exchanged between different components in a 5G network, specifically focusing on "Periodic code book SRS based beam management for UL". The diagram shows three main participants: "5G UE", "5G-L1-UL", and "5G-L2-PS".
The sequence of messages is as follows:
1. **5G UE to 5G-L1-UL**: "Prach Preamble"
2. **5G-L1-UL to 5G UE**: "UIData\_PrachReceiveReq"
3. **5G UE to 5G-L1-UL**: "UIData\_PrachReceiveInd"
4. **5G-L1-UL to 5G UE**: "UIData\_PuschReceiveReq/UIData\_PucchReceiveReq"
5. **5G UE to 5G-L1-UL**: "UIData\_PuschReceiveRespPs/UIData\_PucchReceiveRespPs"
6. **5G-L1-UL to 5G UE**: "UIData\_SrsReceiveReq"
7. **5G UE to 5G-L1-UL**: "UIData\_SrsReceiveRespBmPs"
There is a dashed line indicating "(continued)" which suggests that the sequence continues.
8. **5G-L1-UL to 5G UE**: "UIData\_PuschReceiveReq/UIData\_PucchReceiveReq/UIData\_SrsReceiveReq"
Additionally, there are two text boxes with dotted borders connected to the message flow:
\* The first text box, connected to the message "UIData\_PuschReceiveRespPs/UIData\_PucchReceiveRespPs", states: "Beam ID is maintained by beam tracking and refinement".
\* The second text box, connected to the message "UIData\_SrsReceiveRespBmPs", states: "After continuously receives rrm Num OfCoMa valid CoMa reports, select UL beams according to SRS based beam management algorithm".[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2019.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

[CB015122-A]

The following chart describes only the high level DFT beam selection algorithm signaling. For detailed requirement description see [11153963](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwJ_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

File: Periodic codebook SRS based beam management for UL Sequence Chart.md

Folder: <https://nokia.sharepoint.com/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Forms/Tree_View.aspx?id=%2Fsites%2F5Gdoc%2FAS%5FTech%5FSpec%2FDrawings%20and%20diagrams%20for%205G%2FUser%20Plane%2F5G%20L2%20Entity%20Level%2F2%205G%2DL2%2DPS%20Component%20Requirements%2F2%2E4%20Algorithm%2F3%2EBeam%20Control&viewid=967508b3%2D8e81%2D461c%2Db99d%2D145065cf0c1c&csf=1&CID=87f01a38%2D2f2f%2D450d%2D8412%2Dc83251f47070&FolderCTID=0x012000F0A0A3BA325F7648AD307E6959BA7376>

[image-1][image\_desc]The image is a sequence diagram illustrating the "Periodic code book SRS based beam management for UL" in a 5G network. It depicts interactions between three entities: "5G UE", "5G-L1-UL", and "5G-L2-PS".
The diagram is divided into two main sections:
**1. Initial Configuration Phase:**
This section shows the initial setup and communication for SRS (Sounding Reference Signal) based beam management.
- "5G UE" sends a "Prach Preamble" to "5G-L1-UL".
- "5G-L1-UL" sends "UIData\_PrachReceiveReq" to "5G UE".
- "5G-L1-UL" sends "UIData\_PrachReceiveInd" to "5G UE".
- "5G-L1-UL" sends "UIData\_PuschReceiveReq / UIData\_PucchReceiveReq" to "5G-L2-PS".
- "5G-L1-UL" sends "UIData\_PuschReceiveRespPs / UIData\_PucchReceiveRespPs" to "5G-L2-PS".
- "5G-L1-UL" sends "UIData\_SrsReceiveReq" to "5G-L2-PS".
- "5G-L1-UL" sends "UIData\_SrsReceiveRespBmPs" to "5G-L2-PS".
- A note associated with the interaction between "5G-L1-UL" and "5G-L2-PS" states: "Beam ID is maintained by beam tracking and refinement".
Following this initial phase, there is a clear demarcation labeled "State after UE UL SRS BM initial configuration".
**2. Post-Configuration Phase (alt block):**
This section uses an "alt" (alternative) block to show two different scenarios based on the value of "actSrsBmCalcInL1".
**Scenario (10): When actSrsBmCalcInL1 is set to False**
- "5G-L1-UL" sends "UIData\_PuschReceiveReq / UIData\_PucchReceiveReq / UIData\_SrsReceiveReq" to "5G-L2-PS".
- A note associated with this interaction states: "After continuously receiving rrmNumOfCoMa valid CoMa reports, select UL beams according to 13444000".
**Scenario (11): When actSrsBmCalcInL1 is set to True**
- "5G-L1-UL" sends "UIData\_SrsReceiveReq / UIData\_SrsBeamCalcUIReceiveReq / UIData\_PuschReceiveReq" to "5G-L2-PS".
- "5G-L1-UL" sends "UIData\_SrsReceiveRespBmPs / UIData\_SrsBeamCalcUIReceiveRespPs" to "5G-L2-PS".
- A note associated with this interaction states: "Beam selection algorithm and state machine handling are performed according to 13443998".
The diagram visually represents the flow of control and data messages between the different network components during the SRS-based beam management process in a 5G uplink.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/Periodic codebook SRS based beam management for UL.png[/image\_path][/image-1]

The alternate scenario "(10) When actSrsBmCalcInL1 is set to False" is described in [13443998](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_M_RBECapEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).  
The alternate scenario "(10) When actSrsBmCalcInL1 is set to True" is described in [13444000](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_SOdp1yapEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).  
[End CB015122-A]

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.1.0-2 State machine and message flow Activity Diagram (ID: 11153947)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.1.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `13441647`)

State machine and message flow
[CB015122-A]The diagram does not apply to DFT beam selection algorithm proceeded by 5G-L1-DU, when actSrsBmCalcInL1 is set to False (see [10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).[End CB015122-A]

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a flowchart depicting a process. The flowchart starts with a green box containing text, followed by a series of blue rectangular boxes and diamond shapes connected by arrows, indicating the flow of the process.
The green box at the top left contains the following text:
"Model: Periodic L2C L1C based GDL beam mapping run
Version: 1.0, created for a GDL
Date: 2021-08-23
Author: H. Geberg"
The flowchart then proceeds with several parallel paths, each representing a state or action.
Path 1 (leftmost):
- "Receive U\_Data\_FileReceived"
- "State of SRU\_LL\_IMAGED"
- "receive a valid GDL report from L3"
- "State of SRU\_LL\_IMAGED"
- "Send pattern ID to L2 in"
- "LL\_Data\_FileReceived\_update\_FileReceived"

- "State of SRU\_LL\_IMAGED"
- "receive a valid GDL report from L3"
- "State of SRU\_LL\_IMAGED"

File: Periodic code book SRS based beam management for UL Activity Diagram.vsd

Folder: <https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:f:/r/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Drawings%20and%20diagrams%20for%205G/User%20Plane/5G%20L2%20Entity%20Level/2%205G-L2-PS%20Component%20Requirements?csf=1&web=1&e=moENin>

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.1.0-3 State machine and message flow Description of UL SRS BM initial configuration (ID: 11153963)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.1.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `13443992`)

State machine and message flow
1. 5G-L2-PS sends *UlData\_PrachReceiveReq* message with PRACH time and frequency positions.\*\*

1. The 5G-L1-UL sends the list of detected random access preambles to 5G-L2-PS in *UlData\_PrachReceiveInd message.*
2. 5G-L2-PS retrieves SS Block Index from PRACH time occasion and PRACH frequency occasion, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1955\_replaced([11111881](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpRIM_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and deduce beam ID from SS block index, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11982\_replaced([11111700](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpP6FfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
3. 5G-L2-PS sets state to **SRS\_UL\_BM\_AGED for this UE after random access procedure and periodic SRS resource is configured, see [11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_UqEvWPvMEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).[CB015122-A] If the parameter actSrsBmCalcInL1 is set to True (see [10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), then 5G-L2-PS shall indicate the UL BM state reset (see [11180897](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27P1V_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) in the next UlData\_SrsReceiveReq message that is sent to 5G-L1-DU.[End CB015122-A]**
4. 5G-L2-PS shall maintain beam by beam tracking and beam refinement in **SRS\_UL\_BM\_AGED state, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1987\_replaced([11112050](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpSWY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2017\_replaced([11112151](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpTkdfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**
5. 5G-L2-PS sends *UlData\_SrsReceiveReq(5G\_L1\_IF\_241\_replaced([11514379](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR3PZPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))* and receives**UlData\_SrsReceiveRespBmPs (5G\_L1\_IF\_257\_replaced([11514467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR32cvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) from 5G-L1-UL.**\*\*

[Before CB015122-A]

1. After 5G-L2-PS continuously receives *rrmNumOfCoMa valid CoMa reports from L1 via message* UlData\_SrsReceiveRespBmPs *(5G\_L1\_257\_replaced([11483775](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_fDtHvPvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), state is switched to SRS\_UL\_BM\_VALID, see 5G\_L2\_5341\_replaced([11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).*\*\*
2. After **rrmUlBeamSelectTimer(5G\_L2\_3886\_replaced([11153987](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwK_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) expires, or in case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing=true  with additional beam calculation is triggered(5G\_L2\_21708\_replaced([11155592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r__vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) 5G-L2-PS select UL beams according to beam selection algorithm defined in 5G\_L2\_3589\_replaced([11154211](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-SvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and switch state to** SRS\_UL\_BM\_CHGED, see 5G\_L2\_5337\_replaced([11154015](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXMPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). In case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing=true, execution of beam calculation condition shall be checked first(5G\_L2\_21704\_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).\*\*\*\*
3. When 5G-L2-PS receives a valid SU-MIMO report from 5G-L1-UL, switch state to **SRS\_UL\_BM\_VALID, see 5G\_L2\_5341\_replaced([11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**
4. When *rrmCoMaAgedTimer(5G\_L2\_3886\_replaced([11153987](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwK_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) expires in* *SRS\_UL\_BM\_VALID or* *SRS\_UL\_BM\_CHGED state, switch to* *SRS\_UL\_BM\_AGED, see 5G\_L2\_5339\_replaced([11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).***\***\*
5. 5G-L2-PS sends pattern ID to L1 in *UlData\_PuschReceiveReq/UlData\_SrsReceiveReq* *messages.*\*\*

[CB015122-A]The entity level description for the UL SRS BM state machine (see [11154035](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksqac_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) is defined in [13443998](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_M_RBECapEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) if actSrsBmCalcInL1 is True, and in [13444000](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_SQS10CapEfGxldjOZQLezQ) otherwise.

[End CB015122-A]

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.1.0-4 State machine and message flow State machine description for beam selection algorithm done in 5G-L2-PS (ID: 13444000)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.1.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `13444001`)

State machine and message flow
For system level state machine description, see [11154035](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksqac_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). For the UE attach and the initialization of SRS UL BM state machine see [11153963](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwJ_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

The beam selection algorithm is proceeded in 5G-L2-PS only when actSrsBmCalcInL1 is set to False (see [10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

1. When 5G-L2-PS, in the SRS\_UL\_BM\_AGED state (see [11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), continuously receives rrmNumOfCoMa valid CoMa reports from L1 via UlData\_SrsReceiveRespBmPs message (see [11154054](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksqadvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), state is switched to SRS\_UL\_BM\_VALID (see [11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).
2. After rrmUlBeamSelectTimer (see [11154691](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kss2v_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) expires,**or in case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing is True with additional beam calculation triggered (see [11155592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r__vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), 5G-L2-PS shall select UL beams according to [11154211](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-SvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) and switch state to SRS\_UL\_BM\_CHGED (see [11154015](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXMPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). In case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing is True, execution of beam calculation condition shall be checked first SRS\_UL\_BM\_VALID (see [11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).**
3. When 5G-L2-PS receives a valid SU-MIMO report from 5G-L1-UL, it shall switch state to SRS\_UL\_BM\_VALID (see [11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).
4. When rrmCoMaAgedTimer (see [11154145](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksrBhvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) expires in SRS\_UL\_BM\_VALID or SRS\_UL\_BM\_CHGED state, switch to SRS\_UL\_BM\_AGED.
5. 5G-L2-PS sends pattern ID to L1 in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq/UlData\_SrsReceiveReq **messages.**

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.1.0-5 State machine and message flow State machine description for beam selection algorithm done in 5G-L1-DU (ID: 13443998)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.1.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `13444081`)

State machine and message flow
For system level state machine description, see [11154035](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksqac_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). For the UE attach and the initialization of SRS UL BM state machine see [11153963](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwJ_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

The beam selection algorithm is executed in 5G-L1-DU only when actSrsBmCalcInL1 is set to True (see [10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

The 5G-L2-PS shall manage the SRS UL BM state machine for each UE as follows:

1. When in the SRS\_UL\_BM\_AGED state the algorithm described in [11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) shall be applied.
2. When the rrmUlBeamSelectTimer ([11154691](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kss2v_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) expires, the 5G-L2-PS shall send the UlData\_SrsBeamCalcUlReceiveReq message ([13456641](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BcHH0C0IEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) to 5G-L1-DU. The message shall be filled according to [13456643](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_LTFM8i0IEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). The 5G-L2-PS shall then restart the rrmUlBeamSelectTimer according to [11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) or [11154015](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXMPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).
3. While in the SRS\_UL\_BM\_VALID ([11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) or SRS\_UL\_BM\_CHGED ([11154015](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXMPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) state, upon receiving pattern IDs and beam-related parameters in the UlData\_SrsBeamCalcUlReceiveResp message ([13456660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2u4hYC0NEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) from 5G-L1-DU, the 5G-L2-PS shall use this data according to [13457584](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku-Hhi3DEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).
4. When the rrmCoMaAgedTimer ([11154145](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksrBhvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) expires while a UE is in the SRS\_UL\_BM\_VALID or SRS\_UL\_BM\_CHGED state, the 5G-L2-PS shall switch the UE's state to SRS\_UL\_BM\_AGED ([11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). See [11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) or [11154015](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXMPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) for more details.

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.1.0-6 State machine and message flow SRS_UL_BM_AGED state (ID: 11153981)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.1.0-6.0-3**  (ID: `13445900`)

State machine and message flow
[Before CNI-157588-H] The UL state machine starts in this state. After random access procedure or rrmCoMaAgedTimer(5G\_L2\_5339\_replaced([11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) expires, UE enters this state.

The following pseudo-code represents the basic rules of processing in the SRS\_UL\_BM\_AGED state:

UL beams shall be selected based on beam reports from UE(see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1987\_replaced([11112050](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpSWY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2017\_replaced([11112151](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpTkdfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

SRS\_UL\_BM\_AGED Entry Procedure:

Stop the rrmCoMaAgedTimer(see 5G\_L2\_5339\_replaced([11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

Stop the rrmUlBeamSelectTimer (see 5G\_L2\_5339\_replaced([11187586](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28CfgfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

Clear the rrmAvgCoMa (set to 0) (see 5G\_L2\_3946\_replaced([11154199](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-SPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

[CNI-157588-H]  
When the random access procedure for the UE is completed (see [11153963](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwJ_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) or when related rrmCoMaAgedTimer ([11154145](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksrBhvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) expires, then 5G-L2-PS shall set the UE state to SRS\_UL\_BM\_AGED.

5G-L2-PS shall select UL beams based on beam reports from UE (see [11112050](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpSWY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) and [11112151](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpTkdfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

Upon entering the SRS\_UL\_BM\_AGED state, 5G-L2-PS shall perform the following actions:

* Execute procedures listed under [11154054](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksqadvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).[End CNI-157588-H]
* [CB015122-A]If actSrsBmCalcInL1 is True (see [10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), then in the next UlData\_SrsReceiveReq message ([11180643](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27OAJ_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) sent for that UE, 5G-L2-PS shall set 'Bit 0' of the bmUeContextOperation in SRS\_BM\_resource struct([11180897](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27P1V_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) to 1. For all other UlData\_SrsReceiveReq messages sent for that UE, the 5G-L2-PS shall set this bit to 0.
* If actSrsBmCalcInL1 is False, then 5G-L2-PS shall[End CB015122-A] reset validCoMaCount to 0.
* Stop the 3rd/4th beam probing procedure if it is running (see [12584154](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9v-G2jS9EfCKaNlcHOQWmg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

[CNI-157588-H]While in the SRS\_UL\_BM\_AGED state, the following logic shall apply:[End CNI-157588-H]  
[CB015122-A]

* If actSrsBmCalcInL1 is set to True, then upon receiving isLongTermCoMaReadyUl (which is LSB0 in coMaStatus within the UlData\_SrsReceiveRespBmPs message ([11180961](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27QcYvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))) equal to 1, 5G-L2-PS shall switch UE’s state to SRS\_UL\_BM\_VALID ([11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).
* Else if actSrsBmCalcInL1 is set to False, then:[End CB015122-A]

If a valid CoMa is recevied (see [11154130](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-Q_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), then

Update rrmAvgCoMa  (see [11154199](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-SPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9));

validCoMaCount++;

If(validCoMaCount == rrmNumOfCoMa [CNI-157588-H]([11154054](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksqadvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))[End CNI-157588-H])

Switch to SRS\_UL\_BM\_VALID state;

Execute SRS\_UL\_BM\_VALID Entry Procedure ([11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

[Before CNI-157588-H]

Note:

rrmNumOfCoMa: Default value is 3

rrmUlBeamSelectTimer: It's R&D parameter, rdUlBeamSelectTimer, see 5G\_L2\_4693\_replaced([11187586](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28CfgfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). Default value is 100ms.

rrmCoMaAgedTimer: It's calculated from rrmCoMaAgedTimer and SRS periodicity, where rrmCoMaAgedTimer is R&D parameter, rdCovMatrixAgedCycle defined in 5G\_L2\_4692\_replaced([11187575](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28B4gPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) AND SRS periodicity is from periodicityAndOffset in SRS configuration ([11154174](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksrBi_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).  
[CNI-157588-H]Note: rrmCoMaAgedTimer is specified according to [11154145](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksrBhvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).[End CNI-157588-H]

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.1.0-7 State machine and message flow SRS_UL_BM_VALID state (ID: 11153992)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.1.0-7.0-5**  (ID: `13446094`)

State machine and message flow
[Before CNI-157588-H]The following pseudo-code represents the basic rules of processing in the SRS\_UL\_BM\_VALID state:

SRS\_UL\_BM\_VALID Entry Procedure:

start/restart rrmUlBeamSelectTimer;

**start/restart rrmCoMaAgedTimer;**

[CNI-157588-H]

The 5G-L2-PS shall perform actions based on the following triggers:

* When entering the SRS\_UL\_BM\_VALID state:
* Execute procedures listed under [11154089](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksqafPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).[End CNI-157588-H]
* [CB015122-A]if actSrsBmCalcInL1 is False ([10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), then[End CB015122-A] update hasValidCoMaUpdatedforUL status [Before CNI-157588-H]if it is necessary[CNI-157588-H]as described in[End CNI-157588-H] [11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).
* Execute **the UL beams selection algorithms defined in** [11154211](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-SvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). If one or more of current using UL beam is changed, the state shall be changed to SRS\_UL\_BM\_CHGED.
* When valid CoMa is received (see [11154130](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-Q_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)):
* Restart the rrmCoMaAgedTimer ([11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).
* [CB015122-A]If actSrsBmCalcInL1 is False, then[End CB015122-A] update rrmAvgCoMa ([11154199](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-SPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) and set hasValidCoMaUpdatedforUL to True [Before CNI-157588-H]if it is necessary[CNI-157588-H]as described in[End CNI-157588-H] [11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).
* When the rrmUlBeamSelectTimer expires, or [CB015122-A](when actSrsBmCalcInL1 is False and[End CB015122-A] an additional beam calculation is triggered ([11155592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r__vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)):
* Execute the UL beams selection algorithms defined in [11154211](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-SvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). If this results in a change to one or more UE UL beam pattern IDs, then 5G-L2-PS shall change the state to SRS\_UL\_BM\_CHGED (see [11154015](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXMPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).  
  [CNI-157588-H]Note: This note applies only to 5G-L2-PS configuration, where actSrsBmCalcInL1 is set to False.[End CNI-157588-H] In case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing=true, execution of beam calculation condition shall be checked first ([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). (If it is the first UL beams selection opportunity after cell's beam update recorded in [12582669](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_0nFmoTSEEfCKaNlcHOQWmg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9), skip this check and execute the UL beams selection algorithms directly without any check once DFT beam correlation calculation in [12584322](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BW15tjUoEfCKaNlcHOQWmg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) is done, according to [11154089](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksqafPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).
* Restart the rrmUlBeamSelectTimer.
* [CB015122-A]If actSrsBmCalcInL1 is False, then 5G-L2-PS shall[End CB015122-A] reset hasValidCoMaUpdatedforUL to False [Before CNI-157588-H]if it is necessary[CNI-157588-H]as described in[End CNI-157588-H] [11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).
* When rrmCoMaAgedTimer\*expires:
* Switch to SRS\_UL\_BM\_AGED state[Before CNI-157588-H].  
  Execute SRS\_UL\_BM\_AGED Entry Procedure, see[CNI-157588-H]and execute entry actions as defined in[End CNI-157588-H] [11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).\*

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.1.0-8 State machine and message flow SRS_UL_BM_CHGED state (ID: 11154015)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.1.0-8.0-5**  (ID: `13446351`)

State machine and message flow
[Before CNI-157588-H]The following pseudo-code represents the basic rules of processing in the SRS\_UL\_BM\_CHGED state:

[CNI-157588-H]

The 5G-L2-PS shall perform actions based on the following triggers:

[End CNI-157588-H]

* When valid CoMa is received (see [11154130](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-Q_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)):
* Restart the rrmCoMaAgedTimer[CNI-157588-H]([11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9));[End CNI-157588-H]
* **[CB015122-A]if *actSrsBmCalcInL1 is False, then 5G-L2-PS shall\**[End CB015122-A] update* rrmAvgCoMa ([11154199](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-SPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) and set hasValidCoMaUpdatedforUL to True [Before CNI-157588-H]if it is necessary[CNI-157588-H]as in[End CNI-157588-H] [11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).***\*\*\*
* When the rrmUlBeamSelectTimer expires, or ([CB015122-A]when actSrsBmCalcInL1 is False and[End CB015122-A] an additional beam calculation is triggered ([11155592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r__vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))):
* Execute the UL beams selection algorithms defined in [11154211](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-SvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). If this results in a change to one or more UE UL beam pattern IDs, then 5G-L2-PS shall remain in the SRS\_UL\_BM\_CHGED state.  
  [CNI-157588-H]Note: This note applies only to 5G-L2-PS configuration, where actSrsBmCalcInL1 is set to False.[End CNI-157588-H] In case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing set to True, execution of beam calculation condition shall be checked first ([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). If it is the first UL beams selection opportunity after cell's beam update recorded in [12582669](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_0nFmoTSEEfCKaNlcHOQWmg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9), skip this check and execute the UL beams selection algorithms directly without any check once DFT beam correlation calculation in [12584322](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BW15tjUoEfCKaNlcHOQWmg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) is done, according to [11154089](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksqafPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).
* Restart the rrmUlBeamSelectTimer.
* [CB015122-A]If actSrsBmCalcInL1 is False, then 5G-L2-PS shall[End CB015122-A] reset hasValidCoMaUpdatedforUL to False [Before CNI-157588-H]if it is necessary[CNI-157588-H]as in[End CNI-157588-H] [11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).
* When rrmCoMaAgedTimer\*expires:
* Switch to SRS\_UL\_BM\_AGED state[Before CNI-157588-H].  
  Execute SRS\_UL\_BM\_AGED Entry Procedure, see[CNI-157588-H]and execute entry actions as defined in[End CNI-157588-H] [11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).\*
* When a valid SU-MIMO report with an updated beam from PUSCH or SRS is received:
* Reset average rank/SINR according to [11155624](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kswhGPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).
* Switch to SRS\_UL\_BM\_VALID  state [Before CNI-157588-H]([11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))  
  Execute SRS\_UL\_BM\_VALID Entry Procedure, see 5G\_L2\_5341\_replaced([CNI-157588-H]and execute entry actions as defined in[End CNI-157588-H][11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).​​​​​​

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.2 SRS Covariance matrix

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.2.0-1 SRS Covariance matrix Process covariance matrices (ID: 11154046)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.2.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `13450843`)

SRS Covariance matrix
[CB015122-A] When actSrsBmCalcInL1 is set to True in PsCnfg\_AddressDistributionReq (see [10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), then 5G-L2-PS shall receive only the instantaneous CoMa validity indication in the isInstCoMaValidUl bit within the coMaStatus structure from UlData\_SrsReceiveRespBmPs (see [11180933](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27P1XfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). The detailed algorithm is handled by 5G-L1-DU as specified in [13327064](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_s48bENQ5EfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

Further part of the requirement applies only to the actSrsBmCalcInL1 set to False.[End CB015122-A]

After 5G-L2-PS receives covariance matrices from L1 via message UlData\_SrsReceiveRespBmPs (5G\_L1\_257\_replaced([11483775](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_fDtHvPvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), it shall process matrices according to below steps. See 5G\_L2\_3587\_replaced([11153925](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwIvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) about the state machine for BM.

Note: the calculation and maintenance of the covariance matrices shall be implemented in a separate thread or process to decouple it from the normal scheduler process

1. Read covariance matrices per subcell per subband per comb per cyclic shift and find context of related UE(s) according to subband information.

a. The size of covariance matrix is defined in 5G\_L2\_3950\_replaced([11154069](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXOfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

b. The number of covariance matrices per UE is defined in 5G\_L2\_3949\_replaced([11154082](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXO_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

2. Calculate Cov(H) and Cov(V) per UE (see 5G\_L2\_3948\_replaced([11154107](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXP_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

3. Validate Cov(H) and Cov(V) per UE (see 5G\_L2\_3947\_replaced([11154130](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-Q_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

4. If Cov(H) and Cov(V) are valid:

a.  Average them via the IIR filter defined in 5G\_L2\_3946\_replaced([11154199](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-SPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

b.  Store averaged Cov(H) and Cov(V) in UE’s context.

c.  Restart the timer rrmCoMaAgedTimer**(see 5G\_L2\_5339\_replaced([11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**

5. If Cov(H) or Cov(V) is invalid:

a.  Discard Cov(H) and Cov(V) of UE which are reported by L1.

b.  If the timer rrmCoMaAgedTimer**is not running, start this timer (see 5G\_L2\_5339\_replaced([11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**

Note 1: If NRBTS.actEcpri72e is set to True, the above step 2 and 3 shall be switched, 5G-L2-PS shall validate firslty, then calculate the Cov.

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.2.0-2 SRS Covariance matrix Size of covariance matrix (ID: 11154069)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.2.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `13450974`)

SRS Covariance matrix
[Before CNI-157588-H]The size of horizontal and vertical covariance matrix is decided according to layout of radio unit according to the below layout table:

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Number of TRXs | Number of columns (**rrmTrxColumn)** | Number of rows (**rrmTrxRow)** | First Feature |
| 16 | 4 | 2 | 5GC001086-C |
| 16 | 8 | 1 | 5GC001086-C |
| 32 | 8 | 2 | 5GC001086-C |
| 32 | 4 | 4 | 5GC001086-C |
| 64 | 8 | 4 | 5GC001086-A |

The horizontal covariance matrix is a square matrix in size of **rrmTrxColumn.**

The vertical covariance matrix is a square matrix in size of **rrmTrxRow.**

NOTE: Only the lower triangle of the covariance matrix is filled by L1. L2 shall restore values of full covariance matrix according to the rule of Cov(i, j) = Cov(j, i) for any j > i.

[CNI-157588-H]The size of covariance matrix is defined in [11154448](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kssPo_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).[End CNI-157588-H]

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.2.0-3 SRS Covariance matrix Covariance matrix per UE (ID: 11154082)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.2.0-3.0-4**  (ID: `13450980`)

SRS Covariance matrix
[Before CNI 157588-H]If periodic sub-band SRS for multiple UEs are scheduled in SRS slot, 5G-L1-UL will report multiple covariance matrices per polarization per sub-band per comb per cyclic shift per direction to 5G-L2-PS. The size of horizontal and vertical covariance matrices is defined in 5G\_L2\_3950\_replaced([11154069](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXOfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Based on UE’s capability, if UE is configured with single port SRS, 5G-L1-UL will report 4 covariance matrices to upper layer. If UE is configured with two-port SRS, 5G-L1-UL will report 8 covariance matrices. Reported covariance matrices per UE are listed in the below table. The table assumes transmissionComb = n2 and cyclicShift-n2 = 0 on SRS.

|  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **SRS configuration** | **SRS port** | **Cyclic shifts** | **Directions** | **Polarizations** | **Covariance matrix** |
| Single port | 1000 (p0) | CS0 | H | +45 | Cov(H, p0, +45) |
| CS0 | H | -45 | Cov(H, p0, -45) |  |  |
| CS0 | V | +45 | Cov(V, p0, +45) |  |  |
| CS0 | V | -45 | Cov(V, p0, -45) |  |  |
| Two ports | 1000 (p0) | CS0 | H | +45 | Cov(H, p0, +45) |
| CS0 | H | -45 | Cov(H, p0, -45) |  |  |
| CS0 | V | +45 | Cov(V, p0, +45) |  |  |
| CS0 | V | -45 | Cov(V, p0, -45) |  |  |
| 1001 (p1) | CS4 | H | +45 | Cov(H, p1, +45) |  |
| CS4 | H | -45 | Cov(H, p1, -45) |  |  |
| CS4 | V | +45 | Cov(V, p1, +45) |  |  |

If NRBTS.actEcpri72e is set to True, [End CNI 157588-H]  
Refer to [11154462](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kssPpfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.2.0-4 SRS Covariance matrix Combine covariance matrices per UE (ID: 11154107)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.2.0-4.0-4**  (ID: `13450981`)

SRS Covariance matrix
[Before CNI 157588-H]For each direction (H and V), covariance matrices from different polarizations and ports shall be combined into one covariance matrix by calculating average values of each element among them.

For eCPRI 7-2a (NRBTS.actEcpri72e is set to False)

If the number of SRS port is one:

Cov(H) = (Cov(H, p0, +45) + Cov(H, p0, -45)) / 2

Cov(V) = (Cov(V, p0, +45) + Cov(V, p0, -45)) / 2

If the number of SRS ports is two:

Cov(H) = (Cov(H, p0, +45) + Cov(H, p0, -45) + Cov(H, p1, +45) + Cov(H, p1, -45)) / 4

Cov(V) = (Cov(V, p0, +45) + Cov(V, p0, -45) + Cov(V, p1, +45) + Cov(V, p1, -45)) / 4

If NRBTS.actEcpri72e is set to True, calculate the average value according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2160\_replaced([11154462](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kssPpfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).  
[CNI 157588-H]

Refer to [11154462](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kssPpfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).  
[End CNI 157588-H]

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.2.0-5 SRS Covariance matrix Covariance matrix DTX detection (ID: 11154130)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.2.0-5.0-5**  (ID: `13450989`)

SRS Covariance matrix
[CB015122-A]

The requirement applies only to actSrsBmCalcInL1 set to False in PsCnfg\_AddressDistributionReq (see [10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).  
For actSrsBmCalcInL1 set to True, see [11154046](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXNfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) and [11155895](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksyWSvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

[End CB015122-A]

{ For eCPRI 7-2a (NRBTS.actEcpri72e is set to False)

5G-L2-PS shall validate covariance matrix Cov(H) and Cov(V) before averaging them in time domain. It includes below steps:

1. To calculate SRS power according to below equations:

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$rrmsSrsPower\_{relative} = 10log(\frac{Tr(R\_h) + Tr(R\_v)}{N\_h + N\_v})$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2054.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]  
[image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula written in a blurry, light-colored font against a dark background. The formula appears to be:
`rmsSr's Power_dbm = rmsSr's Power_relative + rxScalingFactorEc.prtDbm - gainCorrection / 10.0`[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2054.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]

where

- Tr(R) returns sum of diagonal elements in matrix R;

- Rh is the covariance matrix Cov(H), see 5G\_L2\_3948\_replaced([11154107](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXP_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

- Rv is the covariance matrix Cov(V), see 5G\_L2\_3948\_replaced([11154107](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXP_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

- Nh is the number of columns in the matrix Rh;

- Nv is the number of columns in the matrix Rv;

- rxScalingFactorEcpriDbm is the default RX power scaling over eCPRI interface, its value is -152;

- gainCorrection is the scaler indicated from L3 interface during the cell setup;

1. If the value of rrmSrsPowerdBm is higher than rrmSrsPowerThreshold for UL/srsPowerThresholdForDlBm **for DL , the covariance matrix is valid, otherwise it is not valid.**

Refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2165\_replaced([11154516](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kssPr_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),the rrmSrsPowerThreshold is implemented by message Pcell\_CellSetupReq -> srsPowerThresholdForUlBm,

the srsPowerThresholdForDlBm is implemented by message Pcell\_CellSetupReq -> srsPowerThresholdForDlBm.

}

{  For eCPRI 7-2e (5G\_L2\_18130\_replaced([11155228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2432wvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) ,

Due to the correct PowerScalingFactorSrs can't be got by L2PS because variable of GianofBeamModule is introduced.

Also the L1 can calculate and evaluate  the SRS CoMa status by itself. Then L2PS will validate the SRS CoMa status by the DTX indication through message SrsReceiveRespBmPs per SRS resource directly.

Related validation threshold will be send to L1 through msg SrsReceiveReq. srsPowerThreshold  for UL\_BM\_CoMa, srsPowerThresholdForDl for DL\_BM\_CoMa**.**

If NRBTS.actEcpri72e is set to True, 5G-L2-PS shall validate the covariance matrices as below.

**first L2PS needs  to distinguish this SRS is used for DL\_BM or UL\_BM, then retrive corresponding DTX (dtx or dtxDL) to validate inst\_CoMa, dtx for UL\_BM\_ CoMa, and dtxDL for DL\_ BM\_CoMa.**

for UL\_BM\_CoMa

If UlData\_SrsReceiveRespBmPs.dtx == DTX then

DTX.

Else

it is valid CoMa for UL\_BM

End if

for DL\_BM\_CoMa

If UlData\_SrsReceiveRespBmPs.dtxDL == DTX then

DTX.

Else

it is valid CoMa for  DL\_BM

End if

Next step , fill the valid CoMa for long term filter.

}

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.2.0-6 SRS Covariance matrix Filter CoMa per UE in time domain (ID: 11154199)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.2.0-6.0-2**  (ID: `13450997`)

SRS Covariance matrix
[Before CNI-157588-H]The Cov(H) and Cov(V) shall be filtered in time domain if they are valid (see 5G\_L2\_3947\_replaced([11154130](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-Q_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).  The IIR filter is define as below:

**rrmAvgCov = (1 - rrmCoMaFilterCoefficient) \* rrmAvgCov + rrmCoMaFilterCoefficient \* rrmInstCov**

where

* rrmAvgCov is the averaged covariance matrix with IIR filter;
* rrmInstCov is the instantaneous combined covariance matrix (Cov(H) and Cov(V)) which are combined in 5G\_L2\_3948\_replaced([11154107](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXP_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));
* rrmCoMaFilterCoefficient is the filter coefficient. It shall be calculated as the value of **(SRS periodicity/rrmUlBeamSelectTimer). The** rrmUlBeamSelectTimer is the timer duration (5G\_L2\_4693\_replaced([11187586](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28CfgfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), in unit of slot, for UL beam selection. The SRS periodicity is from the periodicityAndOffset in SRS configuration (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2147\_replaced([11154174](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksrBi_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).\*\*\*\*

NOTE: When rrmCoMaFilterCoefficient is less than 1.0, if the number of to-be-averaged CoMa is less than or equal to **rrmNumOfCoMa (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3886\_replaced([11167293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktpR4fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the rrmAvgCov shall be calculated as arithmetic average, if the number of to-be-averaged CoMa is higher than** rrmNumOfCoMa, the rrmAvgCov shall be calculated according to above IIR filter equation.\*\*\*\*

[CNI-157588-H]  
Refer to [11156001](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksy9UfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).  
[End CNI-157588-H]

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.3 Beam selection for 2RX or 4RX

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.3.0-1 Beam selection for 2RX or 4RX First best UL beam selection (ID: 11154217)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.3.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `13451127`)

Beam selection for 2RX or 4RX
[CB015122-A]The requirement applies only to actSrsBmCalcInL1 set to False in PsCnfg\_AddressDistributionReq (see [10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).  
For actSrsBmCalcInL1 set to True see [13457584](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku-Hhi3DEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) and for system level description see [11154691](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kss2v_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

[End CB015122-A]

When rrmUlBeamSelectTimer of a UE is expired, or in case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing is True with additional beam calculation is triggered ([11155592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r__vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**below steps should be executed to obtain the first best UL beam for the UE:**

For 8RX using combined HV CoMa algorithm: When rrmUlBeamSelectTimer of a UE is expired, below steps should be executed to obtain the first best UL beam for the UE.

1: restart the timer of rrmUlBeamSelectTimer.

2: find the first best horizontal and vertical DFT beams (hBest and vBest) according to 5G\_L2\_4043\_replaced([11154276](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24zlVfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

3: if the configured UL beam set is 2D-DFT beams, the first best UL beam is the Kronecker product of hBest and vBest, otherwise, the first best UL beam is the mapped UL beam of the found 2D-DFT beam.

4: Reset hasValidCoMaUpdatedforUL to initial value if it is necessary ,see 5G\_L2\_21704\_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note 1: rrmUlBeamSelectTimer:**it's a R&D parameter, rdUlBeamSelectTimer, see 5G\_L2\_4693\_replaced([11187586](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28CfgfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

Note 2: The mapping table is provided in PsCell\_CellSetupReq message, see 5G\_L2\_3586\_replaced([11153915](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwIPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note 3: In case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing is True, execution of beam calculation condition shall be checked first (5G\_L2\_21704\_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.3.0-2 Beam selection for 2RX or 4RX Second best UL beam selection (ID: 11154242)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.3.0-2.0-5**  (ID: `13451138`)

Beam selection for 2RX or 4RX
[CB015122-A]The requirement applies only to actSrsBmCalcInL1 set to False in PsCnfg\_AddressDistributionReq (see [10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). For actSrsBmCalcInL1 set to True, see [13457584](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku-Hhi3DEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) and [11154691](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kss2v_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).[End CB015122-A]

If the UL receiver type is 4RX **(5G\_L2\_16925\_replaced([11141685](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23qV0_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), two best UL beams are needed for a UE.**

For 8RX using combined HV CoMa algorithm: below steps should be executed to obtain the second best UL beam for the UE.

When rrmUlBeamSelectTimer of a UE is expired,**or additional beam calculation is triggered (refer 5G\_L2\_21708\_replaced([11155592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r__vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), below steps should be executed to get the second best UL beam for the UE after the first best UL beam for the UE has been got.**

1: find the second best horizontal and vertical DFT beams (hSecondBest and vSecondBest) according to 5G\_L2\_4044\_replaced([11154312](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24zlV_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

2: if the configured UL beam set is 2D-DFT beams, the second best UL beam is the Kronecker product of hSecondBest and vSecondBest, otherwise, the second best UL beam is the mapped UL beam of the found 2D-DFT beam.

Note 1: rrmUlBeamSelectTimer:**it's a R&D parameter, rdUlBeamSelectTimer, see 5G\_L2\_4693\_replaced([11187586](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28CfgfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

Note 2: The mapping table is provided in PsCell\_CellSetupReq message, see 5G\_L2\_3586\_replaced([11153915](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwIPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note 3: In case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing is True, execution of beam calculation condition shall be checked first (5G\_L2\_21704\_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.3.0-3 Beam selection for 2RX or 4RX Calculate the first best 2D-DFT UL beam (ID: 11154276)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.3.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `13451155`)

Beam selection for 2RX or 4RX
[CB015122-A]The requirement applies only to actSrsBmCalcInL1 set to False in PsCnfg\_AddressDistributionReq (see [10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).  
For actSrsBmCalcInL1 set to True, see [11154217](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-S_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).[End CB015122-A]

Below steps should be executed to find the best 2D-DFT UL beam.

1. Go through all the available horizontal DFT beams and find one DFT beam, hBest, which could maximize the following equation:

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is: $W\_{h,i}^H \* R\_{srs,h} \* W\_{h,i}$. The symbols used are 'W', 'h', 'i', 'H', 'R', 'srs', and '*'. The '*' symbol likely represents multiplication or a similar operation. The superscripts and subscripts indicate specific indices or parameters associated with the variables.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2068.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

where

- [image-1][image\_desc]The image contains the text "W h,i" in a blurry, colorful font.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2068.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1] **is the ith DFT beam in the set of horizontal DFT beams provided in PsCell\_CellSetupReq message, see 5G\_L2\_3586\_replaced([11153915](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwIPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

- [image-2][image\_desc]The image contains the text "R\_srs,h". The text is blurry and appears to be in a mathematical or scientific context.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2068.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2] **is the filtered horizontal SRS covariance matrix (see 5G\_L2\_3946\_replaced([11154199](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-SPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**

2. Go through all the available vertical DFT beams and find one DFT beam, vBest, which could maximize the following equation:

[image-3][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is: $W\_{v,j}^H \* R\_{srs,v} \* W\_{v,j}$. The symbols used are 'W', 'v', 'j', 'H', '*', 'R', 'srs'. The 'H' is a superscript to 'W'. The 'v,j' is a subscript to 'W' and 'v' is a subscript to 'R'. The '*' symbol represents multiplication.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2068.004.png[/image\_path][/image-3]

where

- [image-4][image\_desc]The image contains the text "w\_v,j" in a blurry, stylized font. The letters are a mix of blue, orange, and yellow, with a dark outline.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2068.005.png[/image\_path][/image-4] **is the jth DFT beam in the set of vertical DFT beams provided in PsCell\_CellSetupReq message, see 5G\_L2\_3586\_replaced([11153915](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwIPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

- [image-5][image\_desc]The image contains the text "R srs,v" in a stylized font. The letters are slightly blurred and have a colorful, iridescent effect. The "R" is larger and bolder than the other letters, which are smaller and appear as subscripts.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2068.006.png[/image\_path][/image-5] **is the filtered vertical SRS covariance matrix, see 5G\_L2\_3946\_replaced([11154199](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-SPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

1. The best 2D-DFT UL beam is the Kronecker product of DFT beams vBest and hBest.

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.3.0-4 Beam selection for 2RX or 4RX Calculate the second best 2D-DFT UL beam (ID: 11154312)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.3.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `13451160`)

Beam selection for 2RX or 4RX
[CB015122-A]The requirement applies only to actSrsBmCalcInL1 set to False in PsCnfg\_AddressDistributionReq (see [10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).  
For actSrsBmCalcInL1 set to True, see [11154217](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-S_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).[End CB015122-A]

Below steps should be executed to find the second best 2D-DFT UL beam.

1. Go through all the available combinations of horizontal and vertical DFT beams and find one beam pair (one horizontal DFT beam hSecondBest and one vertical DFT beam vSecondBest) which could maximize the following equation:

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is written as: $w\_k^H \* R\_{srs}' \* w\_k$. The symbols used are:
- $w\_k^H$: This represents the conjugate transpose of a vector $w\_k$.
- $\*$: This symbol typically denotes multiplication, either scalar or matrix multiplication depending on the context.
- $R\_{srs}'$: This represents a matrix, likely denoted as $R\_{srs}$ with a prime symbol, indicating a transpose or derivative. The subscript "srs" might refer to a specific type of matrix or operation.
- $w\_k$: This represents a vector.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2070.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

where

- [image-1][image\_desc]The image contains the text "Wk" in a stylized font. The letters are colored with a gradient of orange, yellow, and blue, giving them a metallic or iridescent appearance. The "W" is larger and more prominent, while the "k" is smaller and positioned to the right and slightly below the "W". The background is white, and the text is framed by a thick black border.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2070.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1] **is the kth 2D-DFT beam.**

- [image-2][image\_desc]The image contains a blurry, close-up view of the letters "R" and "srs" with a prime symbol above the "R". The letters are in a dark blue and orange color gradient.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2070.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2] **is the residual SRS covariance matrix calculated by below equations.**

[image-3][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in white text against a black background. The equation is:
$R'*{srs} = R*{srs} - \lambda\_{best} \* W\_{best} \* W\_{best}^H$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2070.004.png[/image\_path][/image-3]

In which

[image-4][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is for lambda\_best and is given by:
$$ \lambda\_{best} = \frac{(w\_{h,best}^H \* R\_{srs,h} \* w\_{h,best})}{(w\_{h,best}^H \* w\_{h,best})} \* \frac{(w\_{v,best}^H \* R\_{srs,v} \* w\_{v,best})}{(w\_{v,best}^H \* w\_{v,best})} $$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2070.005.png[/image\_path][/image-4], here [image-5][image\_desc]The image contains the text "W h,best" in a blurry, light-colored font against a white background. The text is positioned in the lower left quadrant of the image.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2070.006.png[/image\_path][/image-5] and [image-6][image\_desc]The image contains the text "w v,best" in a blurry, stylized font. The text is white with a slight yellow and blue tint, and it is set against a white background. The letters are slightly distorted and appear to be in a sans-serif font. The "w" is capitalized, and the "v" is a subscript. The word "best" is in lowercase.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2070.007.png[/image\_path][/image-6] are the best DFT beams in horizontal and vertical directions respectively.

[image-7][image\_desc]The image contains the text "W best" in a stylized font. The "W" is larger and appears to be in a blue and orange gradient, while "best" is smaller and in a yellow and orange gradient. The text is slightly blurry.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2070.008.png[/image\_path][/image-7] is the first best 2D-DFT UL beam and [image-8][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in white text against a white background. The equation is: $W\_{best} = W\_{v,best} \otimes W\_{h,best}$. The symbol $\otimes$ represents the Kronecker product.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2070.009.png[/image\_path][/image-8] regardless the configured UL beam set is 2D-DFT beams or not.

[image-9][image\_desc]The image contains the text "R\_srs,h" in a stylized font. The letters are in a dark color with a slight blur and a subtle gradient effect. The background is white.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2070.010.png[/image\_path][/image-9] **is the filtered horizontal SRS covariance matrix, see 5G\_L2\_3946\_replaced([11154199](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-SPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

[image-10][image\_desc]The image contains the text "R srs,v" in a stylized font. The "R" is larger and bolder than the rest of the text, and it is colored in shades of orange and yellow. The "srs,v" is smaller and appears to be in a lighter color, possibly white or light gray, with a slight blue outline. The text is set against a dark background, which is not clearly visible due to the focus on the text.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2070.011.png[/image\_path][/image-10] **is the filtered vertical SRS covariance matrix, see 5G\_L2\_3946\_replaced([11154199](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-SPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

[image-11][image\_desc]The image contains the text "Rsts" in a stylized font. The "R" is larger and appears to be in a different color or shade than the "sts" which is smaller and positioned below and to the right of the "R". The text is slightly blurry and has a chromatic aberration effect, with colors bleeding at the edges.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2070.012.png[/image\_path][/image-11] is the Kronecker product of [image-12][image\_desc]The image contains the text "R srs,v" in a stylized font. The letters are slightly blurred and have a colorful, iridescent effect. The "R" is larger and bolder than the other letters, which are smaller and appear as subscripts.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2070.013.png[/image\_path][/image-12] and [image-13][image\_desc]The image contains the text "R srs,h" in a blurry, stylized font. The letters are in a dark blue color with a slight orange glow around them. The background is white.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2070.014.png[/image\_path][/image-13].

2. The 2D-DFT beam (Kronecker product of vSecondBest**and hSecondBest) is a candidate of the second-best 2D-DFT beam.**

3. If the configured UL beam set is NOT 2D-DFT beams, find the UL beam from the candidate according to the mapping table provided in PsCell\_CellSetupReq message, see 5G\_L2\_3586\_replaced([11153915](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwIPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). If the UL beam is same as the first best UL beam, go to step 1 to find a new candidate.

4. Calculate correlation between the candidate and the first best 2D-DFT beam. If below inequality

[image-14][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical inequality. The inequality is:
$|w\_{v,i}^H \* w\_{v,vBest}| \* |w\_{h,j}^H \* w\_{h,hBest}| \geq (runmOfTrxInColumn \* runmOfTrxInRow) \* 0.182$
The text in the image is:
$|w\_{v,i}^H \* w\_{v,vBest}| \* |w\_{h,j}^H \* w\_{h,hBest}| \geq (runmOfTrxInColumn \* runmOfTrxInRow) \* 0.182$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2070.015.png[/image\_path][/image-14]

is met, then save this candidate as nonOptimalCandidate and go to step 1 to find a new candidate, otherwise, it’s the second best 2D-DFT beam. Here ruNumOfTrxInColumn and ruNumOfTrxInRow are provided in PsCell\_CellSetupReq message.

5. If no candidate can be found, use nonOptimalCandidate as the second-best 2D-DFT beam.

**Implementation tips:**

1. Since

[image-15][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$w\_k^H \* R'*{sys} \* w\_k = w\_k^H \* R*{sys} \* w\_k - \lambda\_{best} \* |w\_k^H \* w\_{best}|^2$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2070.016.png[/image\_path][/image-15]

[image-16][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in white text against a black background. The equation is:
$W\_k^H R\_{srs} \* w\_k = (W\_{u,k}^H R\_{v,srs} \* W\_{u,k}) \* (W\_{h,k}^H R\_{h,srs} \* W\_{h,k})$
The equation involves several variables with superscripts and subscripts, as well as multiplication symbols (\*). The variables appear to be vectors or matrices. The superscripts 'H' likely denote the conjugate transpose. The subscripts 'k', 'srs', 'u', 'v', and 'h' likely represent different indices or types of data.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2070.017.png[/image\_path][/image-16]

[image-17][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in white text against a black background. The equation is:
$W\_k^H \* W\_{best} = (W\_{u,k}^H \* W\_{v,best}) \* (W\_{h,k}^H \* W\_{h,best})$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2070.018.png[/image\_path][/image-17]

and the calculation of [image-18][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is written in a dark color on a white background. The expression is: $W\_{v,k}^H \* W\_{v,best}$. The first term is $W$ with a subscript $v,k$ and a superscript $H$. The second term is a multiplication symbol, represented by an asterisk. The third term is $W$ with a subscript $v,best$.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2070.019.png[/image\_path][/image-18] and [image-19][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is written in a small font and appears to be slightly blurry. It reads: $W\_{h,k}^H \* W\_{h,best}$. The symbol '*' likely represents multiplication.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2070.020.png[/image\_path][/image-19] could be done when receiving PsCell\_CellSetupReq message,  and the calculation of [image-20][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is: $W\_{v,k}^H \* R\_{v,srs} \* W\_{v,k}$. The expression consists of three terms multiplied together, indicated by asterisks. The first term is $W\_{v,k}^H$, which represents the conjugate transpose of $W\_{v,k}$. The second term is $R\_{v,srs}$, and the third term is $W\_{v,k}$.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2070.021.png[/image\_path][/image-20] and [image-21][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is: $W\_{h,k}^H \* R\_{h,srs} \* W\_{h,k}$. The expression consists of three terms multiplied together, indicated by asterisks. The first term is $W\_{h,k}^H$, where $W$ is a variable, $h$ and $k$ are subscripts, and $H$ is a superscript. The second term is $R\_{h,srs}$, where $R$ is a variable, and $h$ and $srs$ are subscripts. The third term is $W\_{h,k}$, which is the same as the first term without the superscript.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2070.022.png[/image\_path][/image-21] have already been done during the first best 2D-DFT UL beam's calculation, the calculation of [image-22][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is written as: $W\_k^H \* R\_{srs}' \* W\_k$. The symbols used are:
- $W\_k^H$: This represents the conjugate transpose of a vector or matrix $W\_k$.
- $*$: This symbol typically denotes multiplication, either scalar, vector, or matrix multiplication depending on the context.
- $R\_{srs}'$: This represents a matrix or vector denoted by $R\_{srs}$ with a prime symbol, which could indicate a transpose or derivative.
- $W\_k$: This represents a vector or matrix.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2070.023.png[/image\_path][/image-22] could directly reuse these already obtained results to reduce the computation complexity.
