###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.4 Beam selection for 8RX

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.4.1 Find best beams with combined HV CoMa

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.4.1.0-1 Find best beams with combined HV CoMa First best and second best UL beam selection (ID: 11154443)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.4.1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11154450`)

Find best beams with combined HV CoMa
It is the same as 5GC001086. Refer to 5G\_L2\_4046\_replaced([11154217](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-S_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_20248\_replaced([11154970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksuE3PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.4.1.0-2 Find best beams with combined HV CoMa Third best UL beam selection (ID: 11154456)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.4.1.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `12585830`)

Find best beams with combined HV CoMa
For third best UL beam selection refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_20360\_replaced([11154980](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksuE3vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[CB015692-A]

When 3rd/4th beam probing is enabled (see [12581649](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_INefIDJbEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ)) 5G-L2-PS shall additionally evaluate the probing preconditions (see [12581542](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_xh9NoDJTEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ)). Depending on the outcome, 5G-L2-PS shall:

* select the third best beam or,
* execute the beam probing procedure (see [12581542](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_xh9NoDJTEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ)).

[End CB015692-A]

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.4.1.0-3 Find best beams with combined HV CoMa Fourth best UL beam selection (ID: 11154467)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.4.1.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `12585863`)

Find best beams with combined HV CoMa
For fourth best UL beam selection refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_20359.

[CB015692-A]

When 3rd/4th beam probing is enabled (see [12581649](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_INefIDJbEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ)) 5G-L2-PS shall additionally evaluate the probing preconditions (see [12581542](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_xh9NoDJTEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ)). Depending on the outcome, 5G-L2-PS shall:

* select the fourth best beam or,
* execute the beam probing procedure (see [12581542](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_xh9NoDJTEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ)).

[End CB015692-A]

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.4.2 Find best beams with separated HV CoMa

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.4.2.0-1 Find best beams with separated HV CoMa Find first best horizontal and first best vertical beam (ID: 11154483)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.4.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11154486`)

Find best beams with separated HV CoMa
Calculate bestH and bestV. Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_20258\_replaced([11155149](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksur6PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.4.2.0-2 Find best beams with separated HV CoMa Find second best horizontal and second best vertical beam (ID: 11154492)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.4.2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11154498`)

Find best beams with separated HV CoMa
Calculate secondHIndex and secondVIndex. Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_20263\_replaced([11155183](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksur7PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_20266\_replaced([11155237](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksur7vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.4.2.0-3 Find best beams with separated HV CoMa Four UL beam selection (ID: 11154503)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.4.2.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `12586959`)

Find best beams with separated HV CoMa
Get four beams based on bestH/bestV and secondHIndex/secondVIndex. Calculate beam power of four beams then select four best beams according to power. Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_20269\_replaced([11155285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksur8PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[CB015692-A]

When 3rd/4th beam probing is enabled (see [12581649](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_INefIDJbEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ)) 5G-L2-PS shall evaluate the probing preconditions (see [12581542](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_xh9NoDJTEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ)). Depending on the outcome, 5G-L2-PS shall:

* select the 3rd and 4th best beams or,
* execute the beam probing procedure (see [12581542](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_xh9NoDJTEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ)).

[End CB015692-A]

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.5 Beam selection for 16RX

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.5.0-1 Beam selection for 16RX Overview (ID: 11154519)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.5.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11154531`)

Beam selection for 16RX
16Rx osDFT beam selection algorithm(combined or separated HV coma based beam selection) is decided by parameter rdosDFTBeamSelectionFor16RX (5G\_UP\_ALG\_27370\_replaced([11114136](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpiN8PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[CB010708-G]

Split panel beam selection algorithm(none or hybird split mode or UD split mode)  is decided by parameter rdUlSplitPanelModeFor16RX  (5G\_UP\_ALG\_29390\_replaced([11114144](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpiN8vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[End CB010708-G]

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.5.0-2 Beam selection for 16RX Calculate eight UL beams (ID: 11154537)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.5.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11154543`)

Beam selection for 16RX
Combined HV coma based beam selection refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_20247\_replaced([11154965](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksuE2_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Separated HV coma based beam selection refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_20257\_replaced([11155127](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksur5PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.5.0-3 Beam selection for 16RX Split panel beam selection (ID: 11154551)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.5.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11154557`)

Beam selection for 16RX
If rdUlSplitPanelModeFor16RX (5G\_UP\_ALG\_29390\_replaced([11114144](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpiN8vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))  is set to 0(none), eight beams shall be selected as 5G\_L2\_17768\_replaced([11154537](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240MbPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If rdUlSplitPanelModeFor16RX (5G\_UP\_ALG\_29390\_replaced([11114144](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpiN8vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))  is set to 1(hybrid split mode), fiive beams shall be selected as 5G\_L2\_17768\_replaced([11154537](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240MbPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and real used beams are decided as 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29246\_replaced([11155345](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksvS8vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If rdUlSplitPanelModeFor16RX (5G\_UP\_ALG\_29390\_replaced([11114144](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpiN8vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))  is set to 2(UD split mode), four beams shall be selected as 5G\_L2\_17768\_replaced([11154537](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240MbPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and real used beams are decided as 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29280\_replaced([11155374](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksvS9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.6 Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-1 Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX Overview (ID: 12581542)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12581541`)

Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX
When:

* The SRS BM UL beam probing for 3rd/4th beam is configured in the cell context, see [12581649: Configuration](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_INefIDJbEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ),
* Four beams are proposed according to SRS based BM algorithm, see [11154431: Beam selection for 8RX](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24zlWfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)
* Probing preconditions [11155448: Preconditions of Probing](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksvS-_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) and [11155522: Flowchart: NumberSlotsProbingDecision](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksv6BfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) are met,

5G-L2-PS shall execute the beam probing procedure for the given UE context, as specified in requirements:

* [11155488: Probing Procedure Step 1: Measurement of the changed 3 rd and/or 4 th UL beams](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksv6AfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)
* [11155507: Probing Procedure Step 2: Probing decision](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksv6A_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)
* [11155531: Flowchart: One Slot Probing](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksv6B_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)
* [11155543: Flowchart: Two Slots Probing](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksv6CfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)

The above specification is supplemented by additional requirements in the current section:

* [12581649: Configuration](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_INefIDJbEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ)
* [12584038: Beam probing state machine](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZKaxIDS7EfCKaNlcHOQWmg)
* [12584035: States definition](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_SotXoTS7EfCKaNlcHOQWmg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)
* [12584154: State transition table](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9v-G2jS9EfCKaNlcHOQWmg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)
* [12584163: Events impacting the state machine](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_qKhfUDS_EfCKaNlcHOQWmg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-2 Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX Configuration (ID: 12581649)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `13471990`)

Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX
When cell context is created or reconfigured then 5G-L2-PS shall determine the activation status of the SRS BM UL 3rd/4th beam probing based on:

* actProbingUlSrsBeams parameter (see [10969099: Fr1AggregatedSet structure content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UaoPPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), or [10971535: ulSrsBmReConfig structure content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Uoqq_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) and
* [11187586: rdUlBeamSelectTimer](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28CfgfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) value

[CB015692-B] Furthermore, when cell context is online reconfigured to disabled SRS BM UL 3rd/4th beam probing, then the 5G-L2-PS instance shall gracefully finish any ongoing probing procedures.[End CB015692-B]

See [11155438: Overview: Third and Fourth Beam probing of 8RX IRC receiver](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksvS-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) for details.

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-3 Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX Load Control (ID: 13479161)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `13479737`)

Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX
When 5G-L2-PS instance goes into overload state, and the severity metric load reaches or exceeds the threshold defined in rd8RxSrsUlBmBeamProbingDeactOlcUlPerCent (see [12627247](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_YuNJAzrLEfCYiuaHdt7wgQ)), then:

* the instance shall gracefully finish any ongoing probing procedures,
* any new probings shall be deactivated.

When 5G-L2-PS instance leaves the overload state, and the severity metric load goes below the threshold defined in rd8RxSrsUlBmBeamProbingDeactOlcUlPerCent (see [12627247](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_YuNJAzrLEfCYiuaHdt7wgQ)), then the instance shall activate the SRS BM UL 3rd/4th beam probing.

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-4 Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX Online beam update (ID: 13495019)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `13495020`)

Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX
After the reception of PsCell\_BeamConfigUpdateReq message (see [12536044](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_vGqq8B9PEfCQJ5daVHVkgg)) from 5G-CP-RT with online beam update parameters, the 5G-L2-PS instance shall:   
•    Do not trigger SRS beam probing procedure for the first beamset selected based on newly received beam configuration,  
•    Resume SRS beam probing procedure for subsequent beamsets,   
•    If any beam probing procedure is ongoing during the reception of new beamset at UL Scheduler (via internal message PsInternal\_UlSrsBeamSelectionInd, carrying per-UE structure UlSrsBeamSelectionUe, see [13493717](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1eYl8USSEfGEgIjkXOz74g)), then the 5G-L2-PS instance shall interrupt the ongoing SRS beam probing procedure through ResetProbing event, see [12584163](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_qKhfUDS_EfCKaNlcHOQWmg). Once probing is interrupted, see [11155438](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksvS-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-5 Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX Beam probing state machine (ID: 12584038)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `12584035`)

Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX
States definition

---

**2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-5.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12584146`)

Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX
5G-L2-PS shall maintain UE UL SRS 3rd/4th beam probing logical states:

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Beam Probing state | Description |
| ProbingNotStarted | The beam probing procedure has not started or has ended (procedure is not running) |
| OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschScheduling | One slot beam probing procedure started. Waiting for UE UL scheduling with probed beam (3rd or 4th) |
| OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedback | One slot probing, waiting for PUSCH feedback (UlData\_PuschReceiveResp) for probed beam (3rd or 4th) |
| TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschSchedulingAll | Two slot probing procedure started. Procedure waits for UE UL two consecutive scheduling decisions with probed beams (3rd, 4th) |
| TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedbackAll | Procedure waits for all PUSCH feedbacks (UlData\_PuschReceiveResp) for both probed beams (3rd and 4th) |

Note: The state names and enumeration shown above define the logical/procedural states and their expected behavior. The implementation may use different internal state names, a different number of internal states, or alternative structuring (e.g., substates/flags), provided the externally observable behavior and handling implied by these logical states is preserved.

---

**2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-5.0-2**  (ID: `12584154`)

Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX
State transition table

---

**2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-5.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12584155`)

Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX
5G-L2-PS shall follow the state transitions for UE SRS BM UL 3rd/4th beam probing state machine:

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Initial State | Event | Condition | End State |
| ProbingNotStarted | NewSrsBmUlBeamSelection | Probing preconditions not achieved | ProbingNotStarted |
| ProbingNotStarted | NewSrsBmUlBeamSelection | Probing preconditions achieved, one slot probing selected | OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschScheduling |
| ProbingNotStarted | NewSrsBmUlBeamSelection | Probing preconditions achieved, two slot probing selected | TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschSchedulingAll |
| OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschScheduling | PuschScheduling | UE PUSCH scheduled with probed beam Note: The probed beam can be used when UE is not in UL beam fallback state or UE is not MU MIMO paired | OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedback |
| OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedback | PuschFeedbackReceived | PUSCH feedback (UlData\_PuschReceiveResp) received for probed beam | ProbingNotStarted |
| TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschSchedulingAll | PuschScheduling | All (two) UE PUSCH scheduled with probed beams (first PUSCH with 3rd beam, second PUSCH with 4th beam) Note: The probed beam can be used when UE is not in UL beam fallback state or UE is not MU MIMO paired | TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedbackAll |
| TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschSchedulingAll | PuschFeedbackReceived |  | TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschSchedulingAll |
| TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedbackAll | PuschFeedbackReceived | All (two) PUSCH feedbacks (UlData\_PuschReceiveResp) received for probed beams | ProbingNotStarted |
| OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschScheduling, OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedback, TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschSchedulingAll, TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedbackAll | NewSrsBmUlBeamSelection | Probing preconditions not achieved | ProbingNotStarted |
| OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschScheduling, OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedback, TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschSchedulingAll, TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedbackAll | NewSrsBmUlBeamSelection | Probing preconditions achieved, one slot probing selected | OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschScheduling |
| OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschScheduling, OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedback, TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschSchedulingAll, TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedbackAll | NewSrsBmUlBeamSelection | Probing preconditions achieved, two slot probing selected | TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschSchedulingAll |
| OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschScheduling, OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedback, TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschSchedulingAll, TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedbackAll | SRSBmStateAged |  | ProbingNotStarted |

See [12584163](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_qKhfUDS_EfCKaNlcHOQWmg) for events description. See [12584035](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_SotXoTS7EfCKaNlcHOQWmg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for states description.

Note: There is no explicit timeout mechanism - the timeout is implicitly guaranteed by either NewSrsBmUlBeamSelection or SRSBmStateAged events, which are triggered based on SRS BM timers, see [11153925: State machine and message flow](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwIvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)

---

**2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-5.0-3**  (ID: `12584163`)

Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX
Events impacting the state machine

---

**2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-5.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `13495068`)

Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX
Definition of events impacting the state machine

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Event | Description |
| NewSrsBmUlBeamSelection | A new set of SRS based beams was selected from SRS UL BM. See [11154035: State Machine for Ul BM](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksqac_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). |
| PuschScheduling | UE UL transmission was successfully scheduled (DlData\_PdcchSendReq and UlData\_PuschReceiveReq will be send) |
| PuschFeedbackReceived | Response (UlData\_PuschReceiveResp) received for  UlData\_PuschReceiveReq containing the probed beam patternId |
| SRSBmStateAged | SRS BM state machine entered aged state and rrmExtendOdftTimer is not running (see [11154054: State of SRS\_UL\_BM\_AGED](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksqadvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |
| [CB015692-B] ResetProbing [End CB015692-B] | [CB015692-B] Generic event to interrupt the ongoing probing (if any), to set the SRS beams in the UE DB and to deactivate the state machine. Event used to handle online beam update, see [13495019](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_QT3zokeeEfGPgoB1AmbVPQ). [End CB015692-B] |

Note: The event identifiers listed below are logical triggers that impact the state machine. The source code may use different internal event names, merge/split events, or realize these triggers via different mechanisms (e.g., function calls, signals, timers, or flags), provided the behavior described is preserved.

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.7 Beam selection for beam management in L1 DU

###### 2.4.3.3.3.2.7.0-1 Beam selection for beam management in L1 DU Overview (ID: 13482897)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.7.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13457586`)

Beam selection for beam management in L1 DU
When actSrsBmCalcInL1 is set to True (see [11154217](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-S_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), and if 5G-L2-PS is in the SRS\_UL\_BM\_VALID ([11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) or SRS\_UL\_BM\_CHGED ([11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) state, then:

* When the rrmUlBeamSelectTimer expires (see [11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) or [11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), then 5G-L2-PS shall send UlData\_SrsBeamCalcUlReceiveReq ([13456641](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BcHH0C0IEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) to 5G-L1-DU and for all impacted UEs set related IEs according to [13456643](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_LTFM8i0IEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).
* When 5G-L2-PS receives UlData\_SrsBeamCalcUlReceiveResp ([13456597](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_QYo1sy0BEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) from 5G-L1-DU, then it shall store and use beam data for UE scheduling in subsequent UlData\_PuschReceiveReq ([11179052](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27DoHPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) and UlData\_SrsReceiveReq ([11180683](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27OALvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) messages and for MU-MIMO management ([11164814](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25vZe_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).
* Validation of instantenous CoMa is done according to [11154046](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXNfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.3 Periodic antenna switching SRS based beam management for DL

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.0-1 Periodic antenna switching SRS based beam management for DL Configuration (ID: 11154569)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11154576`)

Periodic antenna switching SRS based beam management for DL
[CNI-80481]At reception of Cell setup message, 5G-L2-PS shall check if downplink SRS based beam management is enabled or not.

If actDlSrsBm in bfSetup structure (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_115\_replaced([10968891](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UaBKvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) of PsCell\_CellSetupReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_61\_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is true:

5G-L2-PS shall apply periodic codebook SRS based downlink beam management for UEs which are configured with periodic SRS resources with usage as "AntennaSwitching" or "codebook" if rdfallbackCodebook is true.

5G-L2-PS shall store corresponding dftBeamSet  identified by dftBeamSetId  in dlSrsBmConfig, which includes the horizontal DFT beams according to dftBeamWeightH, numOfDftBeamForUlSrsBmH, and vertical DFT beams according to dftBeamWeightV, numOfDftBeamForUlSrsBmV. The 2D-DFT beams are Kronecker product of horizontal and vertical DFT beams.  NOTE: The DFT beams are used by DL beam selection algorithm (see 5G\_L2\_6564\_replaced([11154888](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242BlPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

5G-L2-PS shall calculate correlations between each horizontal DFT beams and store to a lookup table. 5G-L2-PS shall also calculate correlations between each vertical DFT beams and store to a lookup table. NOTE: The lookup tables are used to speed up the second-best DFT beam selection process by directly getting the correlation of two DFT beams from these tables (See 5G\_L2\_6663\_replaced([11154908](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242BmPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

5G-L2-PS shall store the start pattern id of 2D-DFT beams (dftBeamStartPatternId). The pattern id of an 2D-DFT beam (dftBeamPatternId) identified by corresponding dftBeamIndexH, dftBeamIndexV can be calculated as:

dftBeamPatternId = dftBeamStartPatternId + numOfDftBeamForUlSrsBmH \* dftBeamIndexV + dftBeamIndexH.

NOTE:

1. The parameters dftBeamSetId, isDftBeamsetConf are the IEs of ulSrsBmConfig in bfSetup structure.
2. The dftBeamSet  is one element of dftBeamSetList  in bfSetup structure, which has unique dftBeamSetId and includes dftBeamWeightH, numOfDftBeamForUlSrsBmH, dftBeamWeightV, numOfDftBeamForUlSrsBmV, dftBeamStartPatternId IEs.

[CNI-86083]3. The parameter srsTypeAllocForDlBm is the IEs of DlSrsBmConfig in bfSetup structure.[End CNI-86083][END CNI-80481]

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.1 State machine and message flow

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.1.0-1 State machine and message flow Activity Diagram (ID: 11154588)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11154607`)

State machine and message flow
File: <https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:u:/r/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Drawings%20and%20diagrams%20for%205G/User%20Plane/5G%20L2%20Entity%20Level/2%205G-L2-PS%20Component%20Requirements/Periodic%20antenna%20switching%20SRS%20based%20beam%20management%20for%20DL%20Activity%20Diagram.vsd?d=w0575019927524216bf5d0dabe465cb30&csf=1&web=1&e=ZpeHhh>

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a flowchart illustrating a process related to network management. The flowchart begins with a green box containing the title "Modifications to LTE RRC Layer 3 based DL-DRX management". Below this, there are several blue boxes representing different steps in the process, connected by arrows indicating the flow.
Here's a breakdown of the text extracted from the flowchart:
**Title Box:**
Modifications to LTE RRC Layer 3 based DL-DRX management
Version: 1.0, Updated: 2013-07-23
Author: Liu Kefeng
**Flowchart Steps:**
1. **Receive:**
UL-DRX-Config-Ind
2. **State of DL\_DRX\_State:**
DL\_DRX\_State = DL\_DRX\_State\_Idle
3. **If DL\_DRX\_State is DL\_DRX\_State\_Idle:**
\* If DL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is received,
\* DL\_DRX\_State = DL\_DRX\_State\_Configured
\* DL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is processed.
\* DL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is sent to L2
\* UL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is sent to L2
\* ArCoPCH and CoPCH V
4. **State of DL\_DRX\_State:**
DL\_DRX\_State = DL\_DRX\_State\_Configured
5. **If DL\_DRX\_State is DL\_DRX\_State\_Configured:**
\* If DL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is received,
\* DL\_DRX\_State = DL\_DRX\_State\_Configured
\* DL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is processed.
\* DL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is sent to L2
\* UL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is sent to L2
\* ArCoPCH and CoPCH V
6. **State of DL\_DRX\_State:**
DL\_DRX\_State = DL\_DRX\_State\_Configured
7. **If DL\_DRX\_State is DL\_DRX\_State\_Configured:**
\* If DL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is received,
\* DL\_DRX\_State = DL\_DRX\_State\_Configured
\* DL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is processed.
\* DL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is sent to L2
\* UL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is sent to L2
\* ArCoPCH and CoPCH V
8. **State of DL\_DRX\_State:**
DL\_DRX\_State = DL\_DRX\_State\_Configured
9. **If DL\_DRX\_State is DL\_DRX\_State\_Configured:**
\* If DL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is received,
\* DL\_DRX\_State = DL\_DRX\_State\_Configured
\* DL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is processed.
\* DL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is sent to L2
\* UL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is sent to L2
\* ArCoPCH and CoPCH V
10. **State of DL\_DRX\_State:**
DL\_DRX\_State = DL\_DRX\_State\_Configured
11. **If DL\_DRX\_State is DL\_DRX\_State\_Configured:**
\* If DL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is received,
\* DL\_DRX\_State = DL\_DRX\_State\_Configured
\* DL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is processed.
\* DL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is sent to L2
\* UL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is sent to L2
\* ArCoPCH and CoPCH V
12. **State of DL\_DRX\_State:**
DL\_DRX\_State = DL\_DRX\_State\_Configured
13. **If DL\_DRX\_State is DL\_DRX\_State\_Configured:**
\* If DL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is received,
\* DL\_DRX\_State = DL\_DRX\_State\_Configured
\* DL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is processed.
\* DL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is sent to L2
\* UL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is sent to L2
\* ArCoPCH and CoPCH V
14. **State of DL\_DRX\_State:**
DL\_DRX\_State = DL\_DRX\_State\_Configured
15. **If DL\_DRX\_State is DL\_DRX\_State\_Configured:**
\* If DL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is received,
\* DL\_DRX\_State = DL\_DRX\_State\_Configured
\* DL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is processed.
\* DL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is sent to L2
\* UL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is sent to L2
\* ArCoPCH and CoPCH V
16. **State of DL\_DRX\_State:**
DL\_DRX\_State = DL\_DRX\_State\_Configured
17. **If DL\_DRX\_State is DL\_DRX\_State\_Configured:**
