\* If DL\_DRX\_Config-Ind is received,
\* DL\_DRX\_State = DL[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2100.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

1. 5G-L2-PS sends UlData\_PrachReceiveReq message with PRACH time and frequency positions.
2. The 5G-L1-UL sends the list of detected random access preambles to 5G-L2-PS in UlData\_PrachReceiveInd message.
3. 5G-L2-PS retrieves SS Block Index from PRACH time occasion and PRACH frequency occasion, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1955\_replaced([11111881](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpRIM_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and deduce beam ID from SS block index, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11982\_replaced([11111700](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpP6FfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
4. 5G-L2-PS sets state to SRS\_DL\_BM\_AGED for this UE after random access procedure and periodic SRS resource is configured, see 5G\_L2\_5784\_replaced([11243343](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3BwF_PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
5. 5G-L2-PS shall maintain beam by beam tracking and beam refinement in SRS\_DL\_BM\_AGED state, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1987\_replaced([11112050](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpSWY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2017\_replaced([11112151](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpTkdfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
6. 5G-L2-PS sends UlData\_SrsReceiveReq(5G\_L1\_IF\_241\_replaced([11514379](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR3PZPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and receives  UlData\_SrsReceiveRespBmPs (5G\_L1\_IF\_257\_replaced([11514467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR32cvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) from 5G-L1-UL.
7. After 5G-L2-PS continuously receives rrmNumOfCoMa valid CoMa reports from L1 via message UlData\_SrsReceiveRespBmPs (5G\_L1\_257\_replaced([11483775](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_fDtHvPvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), state is switched to SRS\_DL\_BM\_VALID, see 5G\_L2\_xxxx.
8. After rrmDlBeamSelectTimer(5G\_L2\_xxxx) expires, [CB013710-A] or in case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing=true with addtional beam calculation is triggered (5G\_L2\_21708\_replaced([11155592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r__vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) ,[End CB013710-A] 5G-L2-PS select DL beams according to beam selection algorithm defined in 5G\_L2\_6301\_replaced([11154615](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240zePvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).  [CB013710-A]  In case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing=true, execution of beam calculation condition shall be checked first(5G\_L2\_21704\_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End CB013710-A]
9. When rrmCoMaAgedTimer(5G\_L2\_5339\_replaced([11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) expires in SRS\_DL\_BM\_VALID state, switch to SRS\_DL\_BM\_AGED, see 5G\_L2\_6301\_replaced([11154615](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240zePvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
10. 5G-L2-PS sends pattern ID to L1 in DlData\_PdschSendReq /DlData\_PdcchSendReq/DlData\_CsiRsSendReq messages.

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.1.0-2 State machine and message flow SRS_DL_BM_AGED state (ID: 11154615)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11154621`)

State machine and message flow
[CNI-80481]The DL state machine starts in this state. After random access procedure or rrmCoMaAgedTimer(5G\_L2\_5339\_replaced([11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) expires, UE enters this state.

The following pseudo-code represents the basic rules of processing in the SRS\_DL\_BM\_AGED state:

DL beams shall be selected based on beam reports from UE(see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1987\_replaced([11112050](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpSWY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2017\_replaced([11112151](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpTkdfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

SRS\_DL\_BM\_AGED Entry Procedure:

Stop the rrmCoMaAgedTimer(see 5G\_L2\_6301\_replaced([11154615](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240zePvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

Stop the rrmDlBeamSelectTimer (see 5G\_L2\_6301\_replaced([11154615](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240zePvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

Clear the rrmDlAvgCov (set to 0) (see 5G\_L2\_6572\_replaced([11154853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241akPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

Reset validCoMaCount to 0;

If (a valid CoMa is recevied, see 5G\_L2\_6571\_replaced([11154690](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241aiPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Update rrmDlAvgCov , see 5G\_L2\_6572\_replaced([11154853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241akPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

validCoMaCount++;

If(validCoMaCount == rrmNumOfCoMa)

Switch to SRS\_DL\_BM\_VALID state;

Execute SRS\_DL\_BM\_VALID Entry Procedure(see 5G\_L2\_5341\_replaced([11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

Note:

rrmNumOfCoMa: Default value is 3

rrmDlBeamSelectTimer: It's R&D parameter, rdDlBeamSelectTimer, see 5G\_L2\_5821\_replaced([11183859](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27nBt_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rrmCoMaAgedTimer: It's calculated from rrmCoMaAgedTimer and SRS periodicity, where rrmCoMaAgedTimer is R&D parameter, rdDlCoMaAgedCycle

defined in 5G\_L2\_5831\_replaced([11183845](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27matPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) AND SRS periodicity is from periodicityAndOffset in SRS configuration (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2147\_replaced([11154174](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksrBi_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).[END CNI-80481]

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.1.0-3 State machine and message flow SRS_DL_BM_VALID state (ID: 11154626)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.1.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `12629650`)

State machine and message flow
The following pseudo-code represents the basic rules of processing in the SRS\_DL\_BM\_VALID state:

**SRS\_DL\_BM\_VALID Entry Procedure:**

start/restart *rrmDlBeamSelectTimer**;*\*\*

**start/restart *rrmCoMaAgedTimer\*\*;***\*\*

**Update set/reset** hasValidCoMaUpdatedforDL status if it is necessary(5G\_L2\_21704\_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));\*\*\*\*

**Execute** the DL beams selection algorithms defined in 5G\_L2\_6564\_replaced([11154888](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242BlPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).\*\*\*\*

If (a valid CoMa is recevied, see 5G\_L2\_6571\_replaced([11154690](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241aiPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

update *rrmDlAvgCov (5G\_L2\_6572\_replaced([11154853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241akPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));*

restart the *rrmCoMaAgedTimer(5G\_L2\_6301\_replaced([11154615](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240zePvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));*

update hasValidCoMaUpdatedforDL to true if it is necessary  (5G\_L2\_21704\_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

If (*rrmDlBeamSelectTimer expires) or addtional beam calculation is triggered(5G\_L2\_21708\_replaced([11155592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r__vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))*

Execute the DL beams selection algorithms defined in 5G\_L2\_6564\_replaced([11154888](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242BlPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Restart the *rrmDlBeamSelectTimer**;*\*\*

**Reset  hasValidCoMaUpdatedforDL to false if it is necessary (5G\_L2\_21704\_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**

If (*rrmCoMaAgedTimer* expires)\*\*

Switch to **SRS\_DL\_BM\_AGED state;**

Execute **SRS\_DL\_BM\_AGED Entry Procedure, see 5G\_L2\_6301\_replaced([11154615](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240zePvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));**

Note: In case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing=true, execution of beam calculation condition shall be checked first(5G\_L2\_21704\_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [CB014005-A] (If it is the first DL beams selection opportunity after cell's beam update recorded in [12582669: Handling of cell down tilt change](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_0nFmoTSEEfCKaNlcHOQWmg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), skip this check and execute the DL beams selection algorithms directly once DFT beam correlation calculation in [12584322: Handling of DFT beam weight when cell down tilt change](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BW15tjUoEfCKaNlcHOQWmg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) is done, according to [11155701: State of SRS\_DL\_BM\_VALID](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksxIJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).[End CB014005-A]

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.2 SRS Covariance matrix

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-1 SRS Covariance matrix Process covariance matrices (ID: 11154651)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11154664`)

SRS Covariance matrix
When 5G-L2-PS receives covariance matrices from L1 via message UlData\_SrsReceiveRespBmPs (5G\_L1\_257\_replaced([11483775](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_fDtHvPvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), it shall process and store matrices according to the below steps. See 5G\_L2\_6301\_replaced([11154615](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240zePvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 6302 about the state machine for Dl BM.

The calculation and maintenance of the covariance matrices shall be implemented in a separate thread or process to decouple it from the normal scheduler process

1. Read covariance matrices of related UE(s) from L1 via message UlData\_SrsReceiveRespBmPs.

a.  The number of covariance matrices per UE is defined in 5G\_L2\_6567\_replaced([11154669](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241agvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

b.  The size of covariance matrix is defined in 5G\_L2\_6568\_replaced([11154679](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241ahvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

1. Calculate Cov(H) and Cov(V) per UE (see 5G\_L2\_6570\_replaced([11154821](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241ajvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
2. Validate Cov(H) and Cov(V) per UE (see 5G\_L2\_6568\_replaced([11154679](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241ahvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_L2\_6571\_replaced([11154690](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241aiPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
3. If all required SRS resources in set been received in one SRS period

If Cov(H) and Cov(V) are valid:

a. Average them via the IIR filter defined in 5G\_L2\_6572\_replaced([11154853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241akPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

b. Store averaged Cov(H) and Cov(V) in UE’s context.

Else:

a. Discard Cov(H) and Cov(V) of UE which are reported by L1 via message UlData\_SrsReceiveRespBmPs.

Note: If actEcpri72e is set to [Before CB009514-L] other value than ‘disabled’ [CB009514-L] TRUE [End CB009514-L], the above step 2 and 3 shall be switched, 5G-L2-PS shall validate per port firstly, then average the Cov over ports. actEcpri72e is NIDD parameter received in L2PS\_CellSetupReq.

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-2 SRS Covariance matrix Size of covariance matrix (ID: 11154669)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11154674`)

SRS Covariance matrix
[CNI-80481]The size of horizontal and vertical covariance matrix is decided in the same way as covariance matrix from codebook SRS, see 5G\_L2\_3950\_replaced([11154069](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXOfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-3 SRS Covariance matrix Covariance matrix per UE (ID: 11154679)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11154684`)

SRS Covariance matrix
[CNI-80481]see 5G\_L2\_3949\_replaced([11154082](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXO_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))[END CNI-80481]

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-4 SRS Covariance matrix Covariance matrix DTX detection (ID: 11154690)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-4.0-5**  (ID: `11154816`)

SRS Covariance matrix
For each direction (H and V), 5G-L2-PS shall validate covariance matrix from L1 via message UlData\_SrsReceiveRespBmPs (5G\_L1\_257\_replaced([11483775](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_fDtHvPvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) : Cov\_pi(H) and Cov\_pi(V) before averaging them per UE.

For eCPRI 7-2a (actEcpri72e is set to [Before CB009514-L] ‘disabled’ [CB009514-L] FALSE [End CB009514-L])

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is:
Cov\_pi(H) = Σ [Cov(H, polar\_x) / NumPolar]
where the summation is over polar\_x.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2120.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

[image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is:
Cov\_pi(V) = Σ [Cov(V, polar\_x) / NumPolar]
where the summation is over polar\_x.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2120.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]

Where [image-2][image\_desc]The image contains the mathematical expression "Cov(H, polar)". The text is slightly blurry.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2120.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2] is the received covariance matrixes for the SRS resource set, with [image-3][image\_desc]The image contains the word "polar" with a subscript "x". The text is blurry and appears to be in a light blue and yellow gradient.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2120.004.png[/image\_path][/image-3] indicates polarization x, See the defination in 5G\_L2\_6567\_replaced([11154669](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241agvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[image-4][image\_desc]The image contains the text "NumPolar" in a stylized font. The letters are a light color with a subtle gradient and a slight blur, giving them a soft appearance. The text is positioned horizontally against a white background.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2120.005.png[/image\_path][/image-4] is the number of polarizations for received covariance matrixes See the defination in 5G\_L2\_6567\_replaced([11154669](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241agvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

{  For eCPRI 7-2e(actEcpri72e is set to [Before CB009514-L] other value than ‘disabled’ [CB009514-L] TRUE [End CB009514-L]), L2-PS do not perform the average over polarization since it is already done in L1-radio }

The validation method is the same as 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2164\_replaced([11154500](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kssPq_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Note per port average or all port average does not need to change the DTX threshold.

If all the ports of the SRS resource set are DTX, then consider coveriance matrices for this UE is DTX this time.

Note1,  For eCPRI 7-2a (actEcpri72e is set to [Before CB009514-L] ‘disabled’ [CB009514-L] FALSE [End CB009514-L])  per resource DTX validation is used for covarinace matrix of DFT beam selection for CNP consideraiton.

Note2, when enableSbSrsVolatilityCheck or rdIncludeSrsVolatilityStatusMetric is set to true, subband SRS (Note  subband SRS means  WB BF SRS, because supporting SB SRS for SB BF , for habitual understanding  the rewording of  name is not done )  CoMa

correlation shall be calculated according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22742\_replaced([11157172](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks6SFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), then per port validation shall be executed in addition to per resource validation. The enableSbSrsVolatilityCheck is NIDD parameter received in L2PS\_CellSetupReq.

actEcpri72e is NIDD parameter received in L2PS\_CellSetupReq.

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-5 SRS Covariance matrix Combine covariance matrices per UE (ID: 11154821)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11154846`)

SRS Covariance matrix
[CNI-80481]After DTX validation, Cov\_pi(H) and Cov\_pi(V) shall be combined into one covariance matrix by calculating average values of each element among them.

Averaging is performed per SRS resource set.

[image-0][image\_desc]Cov(H) = Σ Cov(H, pi) / NumP[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2122.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

[image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
Cov(V) = $\sum\_{pi} \frac{Cov(V, pi)}{NumP}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2122.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]

Where [image-2][image\_desc]The image contains the mathematical expression "Cov(H, pt)". The text is in a light color against a white background, with a slight blur.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2122.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2] is the averaged covariance matrixes per port for the SRS resource set, with [image-3][image\_desc]The image contains the letters "pi" in a blurry, stylized font. The letters are a gradient of colors, with shades of orange, yellow, blue, and purple. The background is white, and the image is framed by a black border.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2122.004.png[/image\_path][/image-3] indicate port index i, defined in UlData\_SrsReceiveRespBmPs (5G\_L1\_257\_replaced([11483775](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_fDtHvPvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

[image-4][image\_desc]The image contains the text "NumP" in a blurry, stylized font. The letters are colored with a gradient of blue, yellow, and pink, giving them a somewhat iridescent appearance. The background is white, and the text is centered within the frame.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2122.005.png[/image\_path][/image-4] is the number ports for received covariance matrixes.

Note

1. if the UE has SRS resource shared between resource sets with antenna switching and codebook usage, the SRS covariance matrix calculated from the shared SRS resource shall be adopted in both Ul BM and Dl BM.
2. multiple SRS resources for one UE may be located at different slots.[END CNI-80481]

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-6 SRS Covariance matrix Filter CoMa per UE in time domain (ID: 11154853)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11154859`)

SRS Covariance matrix
[CNI-80481]The Cov(H) and Cov(V) shall be filtered in time domain if they are valid (see 5G\_L2\_6571\_replaced([11154690](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241aiPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The IIR filter is define as below:

rrmDlAvgCov = (1 - rrmDlCoMaFilterCoefficient) \* rrmDlAvgCov + rrmDlCoMaFilterCoefficient \* rrmDlInstCov

where

- rrmDlAvgCov is the averaged covariance matrix with IIR filter;

- rrmDlInstCov is the instantaneous combined covariance matrix (Cov(H) and Cov(V)) which are combined in 5G\_L2\_6570\_replaced([11154821](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241ajvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

- rrmDlCoMaFilterCoefficient is the filter coefficient. It shall be calculated as the value of (SRS         periodicity/rrmDlBeamSelectTimer). The rrmDlBeamSelectTimer is the timer duration,a R&D parameter (5G\_L2\_xxxx), in unit of slot, for beam selection. The SRS periodicity is from the periodicityAndOffset in SRS configuration (5G\_L2\_6298\_replaced([11154569](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240zcvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Note: the following condition shall be considered during the the above step:

If rrmDlCoMaFilterCoefficient < 1.0 or the number of to-be-averaged CoMa =< to rrmNumOfCoMa (see 5G\_L2\_6301\_replaced([11154615](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240zePvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

the rrmDlAvgCov shall be calculated as arithmetic average,

if the number of to-be-averaged CoMa  > rrmNumOfCoMa,

the rrmAvgCov shall be calculated according to above IIR filter equation.

High important note: one CoMa here refers to combined covariance matrix (Cov(H) and Cov(V)) which are combined in 5G\_L2\_6570\_replaced([11154821](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241ajvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).[END CNI-80481]

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-7 SRS Covariance matrix osDFT BF SRS Power calculation (ID: 11154865)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-7.0-2**  (ID: `12428560`)

SRS Covariance matrix
In eCPRI7-2a(5G\_L2\_18130\_replaced([11155228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2432wvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

The osDFT BF SRS power is estimated based on Filter CoMa. The Power estimation can refer 5G\_L2\_3947\_replaced([11154130](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-Q_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) step1.

In eCPRI7-2e(5G\_L2\_18130\_replaced([11155228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2432wvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

L1 will validate osDFT BF SRS's CoMa based on related threshold by itself (refer 5G\_L2\_3947\_replaced([11154130](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-Q_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),  5G\_L1\_15792\_replaced([11469665](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_fB2tlfvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),  also L1 will report related SRS power to L2 (refer 5G\_L1\_IF\_257\_replaced([11514467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR32cvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

L2-PS shall calculate the osDFT beam SRS's power based on below steps.(This is to align with eCPRI7-2a CoMa updating steps.)

Step1: Instant per port SRS power validation and calculation across two polarizations.

Validate the CoMa DTX result ( refer 5G\_L1\_IF\_257\_replaced([11514467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR32cvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), dtxdl for DL BM)

IF DTX = nonDTX, then CoMa is valid, it will be the input for  IIR filter (5G\_L2\_2947\_replaced([11160685](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25WX6vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

Then  SRS power's across Polarization averaging and validation shall be done  to align with L1's algorithem , refer 5G\_L1\_15792\_replaced([11469665](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_fB2tlfvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

IF  srsPowerdBm, +45 >= *srsPowerThresholdForDl* AND srsPowerdBm, -45 >= *srsPowerThresholdForDl :*\*\*

-  rrmInstsrsPower = (srsPower +45 +  srsPower -45)/2

ELSE

- rrmInstsrsPower = MAX (srsPower +45 ,  srsPower -45)

[CB010630-D]

in DL direction and

IF  srsPowerdBm, +45 >= srsPowerThresholdForUl  AND srsPowerdBm, -45 >=       srsPowerThresholdForUl :

-  rrmInstsrsPower= (srsPower +45 +  srsPower -45)/2

ELSE

- rrmInstsrsPower= MAX (srsPower +45 ,  srsPower -45)

in UL direction  shall be evaluated.

[End CB010630-D]

ELSE DTX = DTX, then CoMa is invalid, then L2 will discard this time's SRS power updating and it will not be used for IIR filter.

Step2:  Instant SRS Power cross Ports per SrsReceiveRespBmPs

In case of one port per response

rrmInstsrsPower\_Port= rrmInstsrsPower(in step1)

In case of two ports per response

IF Two Ports's SRS power are both valid

- rrmInstsrsPower\_Port(i)=(rrmInstsrsPower port-1 +  rrmInstsrsPower port-2)/2

numPorts+2

Else IF only one port is valid

- rmInstsrsPower\_port()=rmInstsrsPower with valid Port.

numPorts+1

Else no valid Port power, discarding this time's SRS power updating.

Step3,  Instant SRS Power Per UE (across all Ports).

To align with Combine covariance matrices per UE (5G\_L2\_6570\_replaced([11154821](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241ajvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) , instant SRS power shall be averaged cross all Ports.

rrmInstsrsPower\_UE= SUM[rmInstsrsPower\_port(i)]/(numPorts)

where numPorts is the number ports for received covariance matrixes.

[CB010630-D]

Based on the  rrmInstsrsPower\_UE , POWER\_TAS\_SRS\_WB\_BF\_LEVEL  and POWER\_CDBK\_SRS\_WB\_BF\_LEVEL  counter shall be updated.

The average power in UL is used for counter updation and not used for IIR filter.

[End CB010630-D]

Step4, IIR filter of srsPower\_UE  in time domain.

rrmAvgsrsPower = (1 - rrmCoMaFilterCoefficient) \* rrmAvgsrsPower + rrmCoMaFilterCoefficient \* rrmInstsrsPower\_UE

Where

- rrmAvgsrsPower is the averaged SRS power with IIR filter.

-rrmInstsrsPower is the instantaneous SRS power of valid SRS power per UE per SrsReceiveRespBmPs.

Notes:

1, osDFT beam is also called WB BF.

2, L2-Ps shall convert dbm to linear first before averaging.

3, The srsPowerThresholdForDl for DL osDFT BF.  and get from  Pcell\_CellSetupReq -> srsPowerThresholdForDlBm.

4, To align with SRS CoMa time domain average,  When rrmCoMaFilterCoefficient is less than 1.0, if the number of to-be-averaged CoMa is less than or equal to rrmNumOfCoMa (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3886\_replaced([11167293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktpR4fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the rrmAvgsrsPower shall be calculated as arithmetic average, if the number of to-be-averaged CoMa is higher than rrmNumOfCoMa, the rrmAvgCov shall be calculated according to above IIR filter equation.

Note: SW implementation is not following this EFS exactly, cross port averaging in step2 is skipped.  But averging cross SRS resources doesn' impact the correction of estimated SRS power.

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-8 SRS Covariance matrix Power estimation of SRS for SB BF (ID: 11154877)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `11154882`)

SRS Covariance matrix
If actDlSrsSubbandBm = TRUE,  5G\_L2\_PS  shall monitor radio link quality (5G\_UP\_ALG\_21355\_replaced([11157389](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks65KvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) ,  the SRS power is one factor.  For UEs under WB\_BF\_CONF (5G\_UP\_ALG\_21334\_replaced([11156985](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks5D9vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or SB\_BF\_CONF (5G\_UP\_ALG\_21336\_replaced([11157009](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks5D-vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),   5G\_L2\_PS  shall calculate the SRS power , detail Alg refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_21401\_replaced([11157103](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks5rCvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

In eCPRI7-2a (5G\_L2\_18130\_replaced([11155228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2432wvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G\_L2\_PS shall calculate the SRS power based on averaged CoMa.

[CB009527-A] In eCPRI 7-2e (5G\_L2\_18130\_replaced([11155228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2432wvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),  the SRS power based on CoMa is measured by L1, and report to 5G\_L2\_PS by ULData\_SrsReceiveRespBmPs  in unit of dbm, 5G\_L2\_PS shall convert to linnear before IIR filtering, refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_27600\_replaced([11154591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kss2tvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_L2\_21433\_replaced([11154865](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242BkPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [End CB009527-A]

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.3 Beam Selection for Dl

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.3.0-1 Beam Selection for Dl First best DL beam selection (ID: 11154893)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.3.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11154902`)

Beam Selection for Dl
When the rrmDlBeamSelectTimer of a UE is expired, [CB013710-A] or additional beam calculation is triggered(refer 5G\_L2\_21708\_replaced([11155592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r__vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))[End CB013710-A], the below steps shall be executed:

a. Restart the timer of rrmDlBeamSelectTimer.

b. Calculate the best horizontal and vertical DFT beams (hBest and vBest) according to 5G\_L2\_6664\_replaced([11154923](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242Bm_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

c. The best DL beam is the Kronecker product of DFT beams vBest and hBest.

[CB013710-A]

d. Reset hasValidCoMaUpdatedforDL to false if it is necessary, see 5G\_L2\_21704\_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End CB013710-A]

Note:

1.rrmDlBeamSelectTimer:It's a R&d parameter and it shall be maintained per UE per SRS resource set. Its slot duration shall be defined as R&D parameter(default value is 200 slot. It shall be not be smaller than SRS periodicity in slot so rrmDlCoMaFilterCoefficient in 5G\_L2\_6572\_replaced([11154853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241akPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) will not be larger than 1).

[CB013710-A]2. In case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing=true, execution of beam calculation condition shall be checked first(5G\_L2\_21704\_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB013710-A].

Note: the calculation of best Dl beams shall be implemented in a parallel thread or process such as to decouple it form the normal scheduler process.

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.3.0-2 Beam Selection for Dl Second best DL beam selection (ID: 11154908)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.3.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11154918`)

Beam Selection for Dl
When rrmDlBeamSelectTimer of a UE is expired, [CB013710-A] Or addtional beam calculation is triggered(refer 5G\_L2\_21708\_replaced([11155592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r__vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))[End CB013710-A]below steps shall be executed to obtain the second best DL beam for the UE after the first best DL beam for the UE has been got.

a. calculate the second best horizontal and vertical DFT beams (hSecondBest and vSecondBest) according to 5G\_L2\_6665\_replaced([11154934](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242BnfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

b. if the second best 2D-DFT beam is found in the configured DL beam set, the second best DL beam will be the Kronecker product of vSecondBest and hSecondBest.

Note:

rrmDlBeamSelectTimer: It's a R&D paramer, see 5G\_L2\_5821\_replaced([11183859](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27nBt_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[CB013710-A]In case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing=true, execution of beam calculation condition shall be checked first(5G\_L2\_21704\_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB013710-A]

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.3.0-3 Beam Selection for Dl Calculate the first best 2D-DFT DL beam (ID: 11154923)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.3.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11154929`)

Beam Selection for Dl
[CNI-80481]See the algorithm in 5G\_L2\_4043\_replaced([11154276](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24zlVfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for calculating the best 2D-DFT Dl beam the same as Calculate the best 2D-DFT Ul beam [END CNI-80481]

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.3.0-4 Beam Selection for Dl Calculate the second best 2D-DFT DL beam (ID: 11154934)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.3.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11154952`)

Beam Selection for Dl
[CNI-80481]See the algorithm in 5G\_L2\_4044\_replaced([11154312](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24zlV_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for calculating the best 2D-DFT Dl beam the same as Calculate the best 2D-DFT Ul beam. Additionally power balancedness between best and second best beam shall be checked as below:

assume [image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$a1 = w\_{best\_h}^H R\_{SRS\_h} w\_{best\_h}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2139.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0] in horizontal,  [image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$a2 = W\_{secondbest\_h}^H R\_{SRS\_h} W\_{secondbest\_h}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2139.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]  in horizontal, and [image-2][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in white text against a white background. The equation is:
$b1 = w\_{best\_v}^H R\_{SRS\_v} w\_{best\_v}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2139.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2]  in vertical, [image-3][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is written as:
b2 = WHsecondbest\_v RSRS\_v Wsecondbest\_v[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2139.004.png[/image\_path][/image-3] in vertical:

If (a2*b2)/(a1*b1) < a , a is a predefined threshold where a =rdPowerRatio/10,and rdPowerRatio a R&D paramer,see the difination in 5G\_L2\_6699\_replaced([11183946](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27nowvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), then the second-best beam shall not be used.

If the second best beam is not to be used due to power unbalancedness between best beam, then

 For PDSCH

o If only one best beam is needed, then the best SRS beam shall be adopted.

o else if two beams are needed, if dlMimoMode is "CL 4x4 or 4x2 MIMO" or "OL 4x4 or 4x2 MIMO" the two beams shall be SSB/refined beams defined in 5G\_L2\_3581\_replaced([11153572](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24vT4_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));  If dlMimoMode is "CL 8x4 MIMO" the two beams shall be PMI /SSB/Refined beams defined in 5G\_L2\_3581\_replaced([11153572](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24vT4_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for UEs with 8 ports cell specific CSI-RS and SSB/refined beams defined in 5G\_L2\_3581\_replaced([11153572](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24vT4_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for UEs with 4 ports UE specific CSI-RS. Note that this may lead to PDSCH and PDCCH using different beams.

 For UE specific CSI-RS

o    The two beams for 4 port CSI-RS shall be SSB/refined beams defined in 5G\_L2\_3581\_replaced([11153572](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24vT4_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));[END CNI-80481]

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.4 Beamforming data synchronization for intra-band TDD CA

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.4.0-1 Beamforming data synchronization for intra-band TDD CA SRS based DL BF for intra-band TDD CA handling on PCell (ID: 11154964)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.4.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `13377935`)

Beamforming data synchronization for intra-band TDD CA
**Create *srsBfSyncStatusForScells \**and* rrmEligibleScellsList***\*\*\*

If 5G-L2-PS instance receives PsCell\_NrRelSCellSetupReq message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2331\_replaced([10972685](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UwmcPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with *srsBfSyncIndicator IE set to* SyncDlSuMimo **or *SyncDlSuMuMimo,  then the 5G-L2-PS instance shall:***\*\*

create or update (when second SCell is adding) *srsBfSyncStatusForScells structure in cell’s database, which stores unique values of pairs:*

o *sCellNrCellIdentity IE, and,*

o *srsBfSyncIndicator IE,*

o ScellActDlMuMimoEnh IE

o ScellDlMuMimoTaperingH IE

o ScellDlMuMimoTaperingV IE

[PR870612] If online modification of beamSet parameters occurs on PCell or SCell, beamforming data synchronization is performed. 5G-L2-PS PCell instance receives PsCell\_NrRelSCellUpdateReq message (reference to new msg) with srsBfSyncIndicator IE present , then 5G-L2-PS PCell shall update srsBfSyncStatusForScells structure, which stores unique values of pairs:

o sCellNrCellIdentity IE,

o pCellNrCellIdentity IE,

o srsBfSyncIndicator IE.

Afrer the synchronization procedure 5G-L2-PS PCell instance shall reply to 5G-CP-RT with PsCell\_NrRelSCellUpdateResp. [End PR870612]

If  5G-L2-PS instance receives PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUpdateInd message (see  5G\_L2\_IF\_6858\_replaced([10979659](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vci_Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with actDlMuMimoEnh is presented (which means the Scell's feature flag actDlMuMimoEnh was changed),   Or if Pcell 5G\_L2\_PS  instance receives PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq  (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with  actDlMuMimoEnh is changed and *stucture srsBfSyncStatusForScells  is not empty* , then 5G-L2-PS instance shall :\*\*

IF  (PcelldlMuMimoTaperingH=ScelldlMuMimoTaperingH and PcelldlMuMimoTaperingV=ScelldlMuMimoTaperingV ) =true  , update IE sCellactDlMuMimoEnh in  *srsBfSyncStatusForScells structure .*

If (PcellActDlMuMimoEnh = ScellActDlMuMimoEnh)=true

then updating *srsBfSyncIndicator =SyncDlSuMuMimo*

**Else updating *srsBfSyncIndicator =SyncDlSuMimo***

**endIf**

ElSE do nothing ( note, the Scell's feature flag actDlMuMimoEnh may differ than ScellActDlMuMimoEnh, it doesn't matter).

ENDIF

Note : PcellActDlMuMimoEnh, PcellDlMuMimoTaperingH, PcellDlMuMimoTaperingV are own cell's configuration , which are configured by  message PsCell\_CellSetupReq or PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq(only actDlMuMimoEnh).

ScellActDlMuMimoEnh, ScellDlMuMimoTaperingH, ScellDlMuMimoTaperingV are related Scell's configuration , which are configured by message PsCell\_NrRelSCellSetupReq or notified by message PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUpdateInd (only actDlMuMimoEnh).

Those paramerts 's alignment between Pcell and Scell will cause some unnecessary start or stop of MU mimo data in PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingReq(5G\_L2\_IF\_656\_replaced([10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) within a short duration.

For creation or update of *rrmEligibleScellsList in UE context (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17257\_replaced([11156051](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksy9VvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the 5G-L2-PS instance shall follow the procedure according to 5G\_L2\_16748\_replaced([11146924](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24IP6_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).* rrmEligibleScellsList stores values per each SCell:\*\*

 *nrCellIdentity of SCell,*

 SCell’s energy saving state with default value equal to current PCell’s energy saving state. (Note: In case actual SCell’s energy saving state is different than PCell’s energy saving state then SCell will detect conflict and proceed according to 5G\_L2\_17814\_replaced([11155074](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_243Ps_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) what’s makes SCell’s energy saving on PCell properly updated)

 MIMO sync type for particular SCell set as:

o *suMimo, if received* srsBfSyncIndicator IE is *SyncDlSuMimo,*\*\*

o *muMimo, if received* srsBfSyncIndicator IE is *SyncDlSuMuMimo and tapering is not activated on PCell (see 5G\_L2\_4981\_replaced([11165432](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ycwPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),*\*\*

o *taperingMuMimo, if received* srsBfSyncIndicator IE is *SyncDlSuMuMimo and tapering is activated on PCell (see 5G\_L2\_4981\_replaced([11165432](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ycwPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).*\*\*

**UE database:**

In UE’s database on PCell, the following values are stored which are mandatory to maintain SRS BF sync-up from PCell to SCell:

 status of CoMa aging,

 PCell’s energy saving state set according to *energySavingState stored in cell database, received in PsCell\_PowerSavingConfigurationReq message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2735\_replaced([10973678](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U2tGfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))). If PsCell\_PowerSavingConfigurationReq was not received on that cell, then this parameter shall be set to its default value* notEnergySaving,\*\*

 *rrmEligibleScellsList*

 Synchronization beam data for SU-MIMO, which contains:

o calculated best beam factors, as:  
beam factor = *numOfDftBeamForSrsBmH \** beamV + *beamH (see 5G\_L2\_6298\_replaced([11154569](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240zcvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_L2\_IF\_4288\_replaced([10969071](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UaoOPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))),*\*\*

based on received *beamV IEs,* beamH IEs for *bestBeam IE and* pairBeams IE in PsInternal\_SrsBeamSelectionInd message (see 5G\_L2\_6518\_replaced([11243657](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3Bx7KPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_L2\_7038\_replaced([11243694](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3Bx7LfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),\*\*\*\*

o *pdschBestBeamPowerOffsetIndex IE received in PsInternal\_SrsBeamSelectionInd message,*

 Synchronization beam data for MU-MIMO, which contains:

o *gainRatioOfNonTaperingBestToWeak IE,*

o *gainRatioOfTaperingToNonTapering IE,*

o *gainRatioOfTaperingToNonTaperingOfPairBeam IE.*

**SRS BF synchronization**

SRS Beam Manager in 5G-L2-PS instance shall periodically calculate DL beam data (see 5G\_L2\_6564\_replaced([11154888](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242BlPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7000\_replaced([11156122](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kszkYvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and provide them to PCell’s DL scheduler through PsInternal\_SrsBeamSelectionInd message. When 5G-L2-PS instance receives PsInternal\_SrsBeamSelectionInd message on DL scheduler, then the 5G-L2-PS instance shall proceed with 5G\_L2\_16748\_replaced([11146924](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24IP6_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

When 5G-L2-PS instance handling PCell receives PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingResp message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_658\_replaced([10979530](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vb75Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with IE *modifType set to* dlSrsBmSyncDisabled, then the instance shall follow the procedure according to 5G\_L2\_16778\_replaced([11146971](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24I28fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).\*\*

**SCell deactivation**

When SCell deactivation procedure is triggered on PCell’s 5G-L2-PS instance (see 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_311\_replaced([11195870](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BfxrYfvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), transmission of PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingReq message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_656\_replaced([10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with *modifType IE equal to* deactivate or *ohDeactivate) and SCell is present in* srsBfSyncStatusForScells, then the 5G-L2-PS instance shall:\*\*\*\*

 remove corresponding SCell from *rrmEligibleScellsList in UE context, and,*

 stop UE PCell timer (see 5G\_L2\_16774\_replaced([11155007](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242oqPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) only if *rrmEligibleScellsList is empty. If* rrmEligibleScellsList contains *nrCellIdentity of other SCell, then the UE PCell timer shall not be stopped.*\*\*

**SCell release**

When SCell release procedure is triggered on PCell’s 5G-L2-PS instance (see 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_4522\_replaced([11182654](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BestWfvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), reception of PsUser\_UserModifyReq message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_453\_replaced([10976074](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VEvgvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with *remoteScellToReleaseList IE indicating SCell(s) to be released) and SCell is present in* srsBfSyncStatusForScells, then the 5G-L2-PS instance shall:\*\*

 remove corresponding SCell from *rrmEligibleScellsList in UE context, and,*

 stop UE PCell timer (see 5G\_L2\_16774\_replaced([11155007](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242oqPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) only if *rrmEligibleScellsList is empty. If* rrmEligibleScellsList contains *nrCellIdentity of other SCell, then the UE PCell timer shall not be stopped.*\*\*

**User Stop at PCell**

When PCell’s 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserStopReq message from 5G-CP-RT (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2569\_replaced([10976632](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VHy0fu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) to stop scheduling at PCell, then it shall:

 remove all SCell(s) from *rrmEligibleScellsList in UE context, and,*

 stop UE PCell timer (see 5G\_L2\_16774\_replaced([11155007](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242oqPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

**SRS based DL BF deactivation**

When “SRS based DL BF for intra-band TDD CA” feature is deactivated on SCell (NIDD parameter *actDlSrsForCA set to* false, see 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_10012\_replaced([11302559](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqgVc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), i.e., PCell’s 5G-L2-PS instance receives PsCell\_NrRelScellDeleteReq message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_4975\_replaced([10972888](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Ux0kfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) from 5G-CP-RT and related SCell is present in *srsBfSyncStatusForScells, then the PCell’s 5G-L2-PS instance shall delete the SCell’s record from* srsBfSyncStatusForScells structure in cell’s database.\*\*\*\*

**Handling exceptions**

When received ***srsBfSyncIndicator IE is equal to* SyncDlSuMuMimo and value of \*actDlMuMimoEnh in cell’s database is set to false, then 5G-L2-PS instance shall:**\*\*\*

 raise dedicated error log to indicate inconsistency, and

 send to CP-RT PsCell\_NrRelSCellSetupResp message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_337\_replaced([10972740](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Uwmd_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with *EStatus5G\_NotOk status, and*

 do not create srsBfSyncStatusForScells structure in cell’s database.

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.4.0-2 Beamforming data synchronization for intra-band TDD CA SRS based DL BF for intra-band TDD CA handling on SCell (ID: 11154989)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.4.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11155001`)

Beamforming data synchronization for intra-band TDD CA
When SCell’s 5G-L2-PS instance receives PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingReq message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_656\_replaced([10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with modifType IE equal to dlSrsBmSyncNotification, then the 5G-L2-PS instance shall proceed with 5G\_L2\_16750\_replaced([11146948](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24IP7vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[CB013098-C] IF PcellsrsBfSyncIndicator =1 or 2 in message  PsCell\_NrRelPCellSetupReq ( see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2539\_replaced([10972558](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UvYW_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))  and actDlMuMimoEnh was changed by cell reconfiguration (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) ) , then Scell's 5G\_L2\_PS shall notify the change of feature flag actDlMuMimoEnh  to related Pcell's 5G\_L2\_PS through message PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUpdateInd (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_6858\_replaced([10979659](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vci_Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).  [End CB013098-C]

When SCell deactivation procedure is triggered on SCell’s 5G-L2-PS instance (see 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_311\_replaced([11195870](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BfxrYfvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), reception of PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingReq message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_656\_replaced([10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with modifType IE equal to deactivate or ohDeactivate), then SCell’s 5G-L2-PS instance shall follow the procedure according to 5G\_L2\_16750\_replaced([11146948](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24IP7vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

When SCell release procedure is triggered on SCell’s 5G-L2-PS instance ( see 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_4522\_replaced([11182654](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BestWfvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), reception of PsUser\_UserDeleteReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_467\_replaced([10976708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VHy4Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))), then SCell’s 5G-L2-PS instance shall follow the procedure according to 5G\_L2\_16750\_replaced([11146948](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24IP7vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_L2\_16774\_replaced([11155007](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242oqPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.4.0-3 Beamforming data synchronization for intra-band TDD CA SRS based DL BF for intra-band TDD CA — dedicated timers (ID: 11155007)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.4.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11155019`)

Beamforming data synchronization for intra-band TDD CA
5G-L2-PS shall implement dedicated timers for each UE [CB008898-A-UPD001]on each cell when receives PsCell\_NrRelSCellSetupReq message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2331\_replaced([10972685](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UwmcPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with srsBfSyncIndicator IE set to SyncDlSuMimo [CB008898-B]or SyncDlSuMuMimo: [End CB008898-B]

 on PCell, UE PCell timer common for two SCells with duration of rdDlSrsPcellAgeTimerDuration (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25877\_replaced([11114009](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpgYyvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) according to 5G\_L2\_16748\_replaced([11146924](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24IP6_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),[End CB008898-A-UPD001]

 on SCell, UE SCell timer with duration of rdDlSrsScellAgeTimerDuration (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17503\_replaced([11114003](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpgYyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

5G-L2-PS instance on SCell shall start or restart the UE SCell timer according to 5G\_L2\_16750\_replaced([11146948](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24IP7vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). When UE SCell timer expires, then the 5G-L2-PS instance shall proceed with fallback to the legacy CSI beamforming (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17257\_replaced([11156051](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksy9VvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

When [CB008898-A-UPD001]PCell's or[End CB008898-A-UPD001] SCell's 5G-L2-PS instance receives PsUser\_UserDeleteReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_5365\_replaced([10976800](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VIZ7Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) from 5G-CP-RT, then the instance shall clear [CB008898-A-UPD001]UE PCell timer or[End CB008898-A-UPD001] UE SCell timer related events on the instance.

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.4.0-4 Beamforming data synchronization for intra-band TDD CA SRS based DL BF for intra-band TDD CA — beam data validity check on SCell (ID: 11155026)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.4.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11155033`)

Beamforming data synchronization for intra-band TDD CA
Upon reception of PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingReq message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_656\_replaced([10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with modifType IE equal to dlSrsBmSyncNotification on SCell, the SCell’s 5G-L2-PS instance shall check if all conditions below are met:

 actDlSrsBm in cell’s database is set to True,

 dlSrsBmSyncParameters IE is present in received message,

 pdschBestBeamPowerOffsetIndex IE’s value is in a valid range (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_6019\_replaced([10979489](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU3_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

 calculated DL beam pattern IDs (see 5G\_L2\_16750\_replaced([11146948](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24IP7vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) are valid (see 5G\_L2\_12949\_replaced([11155780](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_247hI_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for DL beams PatternID application),

 UE uses large BWP (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1826\_replaced([11110973](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpJMZ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) on SCell.

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.4.0-5 Beamforming data synchronization for intra-band TDD CA SRS based DL BF for intra-band TDD CA — handling of CoMa aging (ID: 11155038)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.4.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11155043`)

Beamforming data synchronization for intra-band TDD CA
When UE’s CoMa is aged (see 5G\_L2\_5831\_replaced([11183845](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27matPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), i.e., PCell’s DL scheduler receives invalid beams from SRS Beam Manager through PsInternal\_SrsBeamSelectionInd message (see 5G\_L2\_6518\_replaced([11243657](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3Bx7KPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then PCell’s 5G-L2-PS shall:

 fallback to legacy CSI beams on Pcell and stop UE PCell timer (see 5G\_L2\_16774\_replaced([11155007](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242oqPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

 set status of CoMa aging in UE context to True,

 if status of CoMa has changed, then send PsPeerCtrl\_SCellUeSchedulingReq message with modifType = dlSrsBmSyncDisabled and empty SRS beam data parameters to UE’s SCell(s) to trigger a fallback to legacy CSI beamforming on SCell(s) (see 5G\_L2\_16750\_replaced([11146948](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24IP7vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

When UE’s CoMa is not aged (see 5G\_L2\_5831\_replaced([11183845](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27matPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), i.e., PCell’s DL scheduler receives valid beams from SRS Beam Manager through PsInternal\_SrsBeamSelectionInd message (see 5G\_L2\_6518\_replaced([11243657](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3Bx7KPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then PCell’s 5G-L2-PS shall set status of CoMa aging in UE context to False (to restart SRS BF sync-up from PCell to SCell) and proceed according to 5G\_L2\_16748\_replaced([11146924](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24IP6_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.4.0-6 Beamforming data synchronization for intra-band TDD CA SRS based DL BF for intra-band TDD CA — interworking with massive MIMO muting (FR1) for energy efficiency (ID: 11155051)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.4.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11155058`)

Beamforming data synchronization for intra-band TDD CA
Handling on PCell

---

**2.4.3.3.3.3.4.0-6.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11155068`)

Beamforming data synchronization for intra-band TDD CA
When PCell’s 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_PowerSavingConfigurationReq message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2735\_replaced([10973678](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U2tGfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with energySavingState IE, then PCell’s 5G-L2-PS shall:

 set the value of PCell’s energy saving state in each UE’s database (see 5G\_L2\_16753\_replaced([11154964](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242oofvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), according to received energySavingState IE.

 [PR771476] proceed with UE PCell timer (see 5G\_L2\_16774\_replaced([11155007](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242oqPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) handling process as described in section below “UE PCell timer process”. [End PR771476]

Note: SCell will not apply SRS DL beam data if SCell’s energy saving state is different than PCell’s energy saving state (see 5G\_L2\_17814\_replaced([11155074](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_243Ps_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

When PCell’s 5G-L2-PS receives PsPeerCtrl\_ScellMeasurementRep message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2118\_replaced([10979995](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Ve_Pfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with scellEnergySavingState IE, then PCell’s 5G-L2-PS shall:

 set the value of SCell’s energy saving state in rrmEligibleScellsList (see 5G\_L2\_16753\_replaced([11154964](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242oofvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for each UE related with that SCell, according to received scellEnergySavingState IE,

 proceed with UE PCell timer (see 5G\_L2\_16774\_replaced([11155007](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242oqPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) process as described in section below “UE PCell timer process”.

UE PCell timer process

If PCell’s energy saving state and SCell’s energy saving state is different for each NrRel relation, then:

o stop UE PCell timer.

Else:

If UE PCell timer not started, then:

o start UE PCell timer.

---

**2.4.3.3.3.3.4.0-6.0-2**  (ID: `11155074`)

Beamforming data synchronization for intra-band TDD CA
Handling on SCell

---

**2.4.3.3.3.3.4.0-6.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11155078`)

Beamforming data synchronization for intra-band TDD CA
When SCell’s 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_PowerSavingConfigurationReq message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2735\_replaced([10973678](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U2tGfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with energySavingState IE, then SCell’s 5G-L2-PS shall:

 fallback to the legacy CSI beamforming (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17257\_replaced([11156051](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksy9VvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and stop UE SCell timer (see 5G\_L2\_16774\_replaced([11155007](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242oqPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

 fill optional parameter scellEnergySavingState IE in PsPeerCtrl\_ScellMeasurementRep message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2118\_replaced([10979995](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Ve_Pfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) once for each NrRel CA relation to inform PCell(s) about SCell’s energy saving state.

When SCell’s 5G-L2-PS receives PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingReq message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_656\_replaced([10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with modifType IE equal to dlSrsBmSyncNotification and received pcellEnergySavingState IE:

-  equals SCell’s energy saving state from SCell’s cell database, then SCell’s 5G-L2-PS shall

o  continue according to 5G\_L2\_16750\_replaced([11146948](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24IP7vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

-  not equals SCell’s energy saving state from SCell’s cell database, then SCell’s 5G-L2-PS shall:

o fallback to the legacy CSI beamforming (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17257\_replaced([11156051](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksy9VvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and stop UE SCell timer (see 5G\_L2\_16774\_replaced([11155007](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242oqPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

o response through PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingResp message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_658\_replaced([10979530](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vb75Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) to PCell with modifType IE equal to dlSrsBmSyncNotification,

o fill optional parameter scellEnergySavingState IE in PsPeerCtrl\_ScellMeasurementRep message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2118\_replaced([10979995](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Ve_Pfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) once to inform related PCell about SCell’s energy saving state,

o raise dedicated info log on SCell to indicate that SRS beams were not applied.

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.3.4.0-7 Beamforming data synchronization for intra-band TDD CA SRS based DL BF for intra-band TDD CA — handling of MU-MIMO on SCell (ID: 11155085)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.4.0-7.0-2**  (ID: `12498671`)

Beamforming data synchronization for intra-band TDD CA
When SCell’s 5G-L2-PS receives PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingReq message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_656\_replaced([10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with *modifType IE equal to* dlSrsBmSyncNotification and *dlSrsBmSyncParameters IE with valid* muMimoData (with or without tapering data) then SCell’s 5G-L2-PS shall:\*\*\*\*

 perform common steps with SU-MIMO according to 5G\_L2\_16750\_replaced([11146948](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24IP7vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),

 store beamforming gain data for MU-MIMO (*beamH[] and* beamV[]) in **rrmBfGainTable (see 5G\_L2\_4978\_replaced([11165354](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25x1vfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), and**\*\*

 perform DOA calculation (see 5G\_L2\_16441\_replaced([11199927](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29l-ufvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and tracing (recalculate index of beamH and beamV base of received beam factors), and

 if SCell is configured with tapering and *muMimoData contain tapering data, then:*

o calculate pattern ID for tapering according to 5G\_L2\_16750\_replaced([11146948](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24IP7vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and

o apply tapering compensation factor *rrmTaperingCompensation, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17254\_replaced([11156015](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksy9VPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).*

When SCell’s 5G-L2-PS receives PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingReq message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_656\_replaced([10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with *modifType IE equal to* dlSrsBmSyncNotification and dlSrsBmSyncParameters IE with empty *muMimoData  [Before CB013098-C]and SCell has configured MU-MIMO [End CB013098-C] it shall:*\*\*

 block paring UEs due to invalid gains (see 5G\_L2\_4196\_replaced([11165697](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25zD6PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), and

 increment PM counter M55308C34038 (see 5G\_L2\_14835\_replaced([11196353](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29ClGfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), and

 set L2 TTI *dlFdSchedData.muStatus IE (see 5G\_L2\_1637\_replaced([11201971](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29yzDPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for UE status* NOMUELIGIBLE\_BFGAININVALID\*\*

Note: When MU-MIMO is enabled on PCell, then beam manager provides to valid gain, otherwise gains are invalid.

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.4 PMI beam change procedure

###### 2.4.3.3.3.4.0-1 PMI beam change procedure Configuration (ID: 11155102)

**2.4.3.3.3.4.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `13342050`)

PMI beam change procedure
5G-L2-PS receives cell level CSI-RS resource management parameters in *PSCell\_CellSetupReq (5G\_L2\_IF ([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) message:*

* dlMimoMode
* startCsirsPmiPatternId
* cellCsiRsPeriodicity
* numCellCsiRsSetConfig
* cellCsiRsSetConfig
* N1N2
* csirsNumberWithinReportPeriod\_Set1
* beamWeightVector
* ssbGroupForSsbBasedBF
* startCsirsPmiPatternIdForNrLBmMimoRTXPowerSaving

5G-L2-PS receives UE level parameters in CellConfiguration structure of *PsUser\_UserSetupReq(5G\_L2\_IF\_389\_replaced([10974645](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U9ayPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) /* PsUser\_UserModifyReq(5G\_L2\_IF\_453\_replaced([10976074](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VEvgvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) messages:\*\*

* perCsiReportConfig.reportQuantity
* numOfPerCsiResConfig
* perCsiRsResConfig

5G-L2-PS may receive beam related parameters in PsCell\_BeamConfigUpdateReq 5G\_L2\_IF [12536044: PsCell\_BeamConfigUpdateReq](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_wLou8R9PEfCQJ5daVHVkgg) after online modification of beamset NIDD parameters

If dlMimoMode is 70 (corresponding to ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_8x4) [CB008577-B] or 80(corresponding to ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_32x4)[End CB008577-B], cell specific CSI-RS resource management mechanism is used, i.e. cell level CSI-RS resource(s) used for CSI feedback are shared by all the UEs served in this cell.

5G-L2-PS shall calculate CSI-RS time domain resource allocation based on SSB configuration, CSI-RS configuration for beam management, TRS configuration, SIB1/OSI/Paging configuration if SIB1/OSI/Paging is enabled and cell specific CSI-RS resource set configuration:  numCellCsiRsSetConfig,  cellCsiRsSetConfig,  cellCsiRsPeriodicity. See 5G\_L2\_762\_replaced([11172423](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26V2bvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for detailed reference.

Upon receive *PsUser\_UserSetupReq and* PsUser\_UserModifyReq messages, 5G-L2-PS shall get configuration set index offset, [image-0][image\_desc]The image is entirely black, with no discernible features, text, or patterns.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2166.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0] for each UE as below:\*\*

The configuration set index offset, [image-1][image\_desc]The image is entirely black, with no discernible features, text, or patterns.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2166.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]could be stored in one table for all N1N2 configurations. Then [image-2][image\_desc]The image is entirely black, with no discernible features, text, or patterns.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2166.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2]could be directly deduced from N1N2 of each configuration set and size of perCsiRsResConfig[] of each UE, see below table[CB008577-B] for dlMimoMode = 70[End CB008577-B].

|  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| size of perCsiRsResConfig[] | N1N2 |  | Number of beams |  | [image-3][image\_desc]The image is entirely black, with no discernible features, text, or patterns.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2166.004.png[/image\_path][/image-3] |
|  | configuration set 0 | configuration set 1 | configuration set 0 | configuration set 1 |  |
| 1 | (4,1) or (2,2) | (4,1) or (2,2) | 20 or 68 | 20 or 68 | 0 |
| 2 | (4,1) | (4,1) | 20 | 40 | 20 |
|  | (4,1) | (2,2) | 20 | 136 | 20 |
|  | (2,2) | (4,1) | 68 | 40 | 68 |
|  | (2,2) | (2,2) | 68 | 136 | 68 |
| 4 | (4,1) | (4,1) | 20 | 40 | 60 |
|  | (4,1) | (2,2) | 20 | 136 | 156 |
|  | (2,2) | (4,1) | 68 | 40 | 108 |
|  | (2,2) | (2,2) | 68 | 136 | 204 |

[CB008577-B] If dlMimoMode = 80, 8 port and 32 port CSI-RS can be concurrent in the cell and the N1N2 configurations and PMI beam calculation is as per [12764792: CSI Acquisition Max UCI Payload with Periodic CSI (P-CSI)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_08wlAISvEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) and [11112829: PatternIDs for PMI beams based on 8 ports CSI-RS](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpZrEfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) and [12806255: PMI beam change procedure based on 32 ports CSI-RS](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__VPh4aAxEfCkxIKMlo4L6w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), N1N2 and number of beams can be seen in bellow table:

|  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| number of CSI-RS port | size of perCsiRsResConfig[] | N1N2 |  | Number of PMI beams |  |
| 8 port | 1 | (4,1) |  | 16 |  |
| 32 port | 1 | (8,2) |  | rank1/rank2 256 beam; rank3/4 1024 beam |  |

[End CB008577-B]

If actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is false, 5G-L2-PS shall use startCsirsPmiPatternId + patternIdOffset to get pattern IDs for first and second PMI beams. If actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true, 5G-L2-PS shall use SSB beam ID to get pattern ID from beamWeightVector for first and second PMI beams. See 5G\_L2\_4068\_replaced([11155170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_243PvfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for detail.

When sending cell specific CSI-RS resource, L2PS shall inform transmit power to 5G-L1-DL (*DlData\_CsiRsSendReq) based on perCsiRsResConfig.csiTransmitPower and perCsiRsResConfig.isExtendedPrecoding, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2578\_replaced([11118639](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqEZdPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for detail**.*\*\*

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.4.0-2 PMI beam change procedure Activity Diagram (ID: 11155155)

**2.4.3.3.3.4.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11155164`)

PMI beam change procedure
[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a UML activity diagram titled "5G\_L2\_4766: PMI Beam Management". The version is 0.1 and the date is 01.16.2022.
The diagram depicts the following flow of activities:
1. **Start Node**: Represented by a filled circle.
2. **Receive UE level CSI-RS related parameters in PsUser\_UserSetupReq or PsUser\_UserModifyReq**: This is an action represented by a rounded rectangle with a jagged right edge, indicating a signal event.
3. **Handle UE level CSI-RS resources and report parameters (5G\_L2\_4347)**: This is a standard action represented by a rounded rectangle.
4. **Selects SSB beam according to the default procoder settings (5G\_UP\_ALG\_3188)**: This is another standard action represented by a rounded rectangle.
5. **Fork Node**: Represented by a thick black horizontal bar, indicating that the subsequent activities can occur in parallel.
6. **Parallel Activities**:
\* **rdDLCsiFallBackTimer expires**: This is a signal event represented by a rounded rectangle with a jagged right edge.
\* **Receive PsUser\_UserDeleteReq**: This is a signal event represented by a rounded rectangle with a jagged right edge.
\* **Receive CSI reports in UlData\_PucchReceiveRespPs / UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs**: This is a signal event represented by a rounded rectangle with a jagged right edge.
7. **Selects corresponding PMI beams (5G\_L2\_4068), starts or restarts rdDLCsiFallBackTimer.**: This is a standard action represented by a rounded rectangle.
8. **Join Node**: Implicitly, the flow converges after the parallel activities.
9. **End Node**: Represented by a filled circle within an unfilled circle.
The diagram illustrates the process of managing PMI beams in a 5G network, triggered by UE-level CSI-RS related parameters, and handling CSI reports and user delete requests. It also shows the expiration of a fallback timer and the selection of SSB beams based on default settings.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2168.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

[CNI-71924] Document: 5G\_L2\_4072\_PMI\_Beam\_Management.vsdx

link to the folder: <https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:f:/r/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Drawings%20and%20diagrams%20for%205G/User%20Plane/5G%20L2%20Entity%20Level/2%205G-L2-PS%20Component%20Requirements?csf=1&web=1&e=Y8qN0X>

Description:

Before first CSI feeback is received or CSI feedback is outdated (Timer rdDlCsiFallBackTimer expires, see 5G\_L2\_1101\_replaced([11186535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_276jsPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall choose an SSB beam according to the default precoder setings defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3188\_replaced([11139322](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krmDfPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 After continuously receive CSI report from UE, 5G-L2-PS shall select corresponding PMI beams, see 5G\_L2\_4068\_replaced([11155170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_243PvfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) in detail. [End CNI-71924]

---

###### 2.4.3.3.3.4.0-3 PMI beam change procedure PMI beam selection (ID: 11155170)

**2.4.3.3.3.4.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11155216`)

PMI beam change procedure
Below requirement works for when dlMimoMode is CL 8x4.

Input:

1. Cell level parameter :(refer to 5G\_L2\_4067\_replaced([11155102](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_243PuPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

 dlMimoMode

 startCsirsPmiPatternId

 cellCsiRsPeriodicity

 numCellCsiRsSetConfig

 cellCsiRsSetConfig

 N1N2

 csirsNumberWithinReportPeriod\_Set1

 [CB008534-A]beamWeightVector[END CB008534-A]

 [CB008534-B]ssbGroupForSsbBasedBF[END CB008534-B]

2. Ue Level parameter:(refer to 5G\_L2\_4067\_replaced([11155102](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_243PuPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

 perCsiReportConfig.reportQuantity

 numOfPerCsiResConfig

 perCsiRsResConfig

3. Decoding parameters per UE by L2 PS from the message UlData\_PucchReceiveRespPs, see 5G\_RAN\_UP\_10562:

 i: CRI reported by UE, [CB008534-B]If actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf = false, CRI [END CB008534-B] means subpanel beam index; [CB008534-B]If actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf = true, CRI means SSB group index[END CB008534-B]

 i11: subfield of PMI reported by UE, means vertical direction index,

 i12: subfield of PMI reported by UE, means horizon direction index,

 i13: subfield of PMI reported by UE, means offset of the two PMI beams;

 LI: Layer Indicator reported by UE, means which column of the precoding matrix is the strongest.

 [image-0][image\_desc]The image contains the text "bit\_{i,1,2}" in a stylized font. The letters are colored with a gradient from yellow to orange to red, and the subscripted numbers are in a similar gradient. The text is set against a black background.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2171.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]: bit number needed for i12 subfield,

 [image-1][image\_desc]The image contains the text "bit\_{i,1,1}". The text is in a stylized font with a gradient effect, transitioning from orange to yellow to purple. The letters are slightly blurred, giving them a soft appearance. The text is presented in a horizontal line.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2171.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]: bit number needed for i11subfield,

 [image-2][image\_desc]The image contains the text "COt" in a stylized font with a gradient effect. The letters are blurred, giving them a soft, almost glowing appearance. The "C" and "O" are larger and more prominent, while the "t" is smaller and positioned as a subscript. The colors in the gradient range from yellow and orange to blue and purple, creating a vibrant and eye-catching effect. The text is set against a dark background, which further enhances the luminosity of the letters.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_2171.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2]: index offset of configuration set,

[PR627736]

Note: If perCsiReportCfg was changed (by PsUser\_UserModifyReq) between sending UlData\_PucchReceiveReq and receiving corresponding UlData\_PucchReceiveRespPs, CRI report should be ignored, and PMI beams should not change. This is done to avoid reading CRI report using outdated configuration.

[End PR627736]

Algorithm:

[CB008534-A]If actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is false:[END CB008534-A]

1. Construct PatternIDoffset:

For the 1st beam and  2nd beam PatternIDoffset

Refert to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2201\_replaced([11113014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpZrGPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

2. Construct PatternID

Refert to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2201\_replaced([11113014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpZrGPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[CB008534-A]If actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true:

Construct PatternID

Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9684\_replaced([11113140](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpa5OvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).[END CB008534-A]

OutPut:

The PatternIDs of two beams and best one of the two for this UE for PDSCH/PDCCH scheduling.

Note that , here is PatternID calculation table according the 5G\_L2\_4067\_replaced([11155102](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_243PuPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for your reference:
