Buffer split evaluation Formula 1 and Formula 2 are updated with rrmAmbrRatioSplit (5G\_L2\_372\_replaced([11151301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24hRefvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))which is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10514\_replaced([11203665](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwgYo_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) when UL UE AMBR is configured (5G\_L2\_22121\_replaced([11151530](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24jGo_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

wasBufferSplitLastTime:  state variable, which is introduced to maintain buffer split condition:

By default it is FALSE;

when it is FALSE,

if buffer split is started as HIGH level threshold reached, it is set as TRUE;

when it is  TRUE,

if buffer split is Stopped when Low level Threshold reached,  it is set back to FALSE;   else, buffer split is keeping split.

Buffer split splitRatio(i, SCell) is calculated according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9591\_replaced([11122888](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqhFYfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and the UE’s UL eTh of PCell is done by Pcell for every UL scheduling in a case  UL UE AMBR is configured (5G\_L2\_22121\_replaced([11151530](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24jGo_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) eThav  of PCell (the cumulated estimated average throughput of PCell) shall be calculated as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9492\_replaced([11204535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwlRIfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), UE’s UL eTh of SCell is reported by the latest PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd 5G\_L2\_IF\_2366\_replaced([10980622](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vj3t_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) from SCell.

Buffer split evaluation Formula 1 and 2 updated with NIDD parameter sCellActivationLevelUL and R&D parameter rdUlCaBsrSplitMinDataThreshold, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9496\_replaced([11122831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqgeXfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Where splitRatio(i, SCell) is calculated according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9591\_replaced([11122888](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqhFYfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and the UE’s UL eTh in PCell is done by every scheduling, UE’s UL eTh in SCell is received by the latest PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd 5G\_L2\_IF\_2366\_replaced([10980622](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vj3t_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) from SCell.

For buffer split handling per different trigger , refer to 5G\_L2\_9232\_replaced([11161035](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25Y0JfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Every buffer split trigger except trigger-7 as 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10281\_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), detail as 5G\_UP\_ALG\_14522\_replaced([11122787](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqgeWPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), Pcell need to update wasBufferSplitLastTime if it changed.

Every buffer split, Pcell/Scell need do housekeeping as 5G\_L2\_7630\_replaced([11161327](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25apU_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If no buffer split to SCell after trigger, there is always a PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with zero buffer to SCell.

All the buffer split mentioned in 5G\_L2\_9232\_replaced([11161035](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25Y0JfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for data volume do not impact the harq retransmission of SCell when ifHarqNeedClear = false in PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd, else Scell should stop Harq retransmission when ifHarqNeedClear = true.

PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd to SCell is also used for buffer control refer to 5G\_L2\_7784\_replaced([11161228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25aCSfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

And to avoid corner case when housekeeping as 5G\_L2\_7632\_replaced([11161348](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25apV_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), after every buffer split trigger, do bufferSplitProcessSN++ and send it in PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd. bufferSplitProcessSN for the UE should be reset when UE is UL deactivated or the UE's UL SCell is released.

5G-L2-PS shall not trigger transmission buffer split (or stop it if it has already been started) when UL UE AMBR is configured (5G\_L2\_22121\_replaced([11151530](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24jGo_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and avgAmbrPerUlSlot\_bits (5G\_L2\_18349\_replaced([11151581](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24jGq_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) exceeds ulAmbrPerSlot\_bits (5G\_L2\_18288\_replaced([11151564](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24jGqfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[CB012810-D] 5G-L2-PS shall not trigger transmission buffer split (or stop it if it has already been started) when fake data in transmission buffer is filled by DRB priority PUG (5G\_UP\_ALG\_10281\_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End CB012810-D]

---

##### 2.4.7.12.5.0-2 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) Buffer Split Triggers (ID: 11161035)

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11161041`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
SCell activation triggerred

---

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-2.0-4**  (ID: `11161064`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
For SCell activation triggerred buffer split, as Trigger-2 in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10281\_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), before PHR report based on a reference PUSCH transmission for SCell is received, transmission buffer split shall not be started.

the process should be as:

1.   Check if VPHR for Scell received in PHR processing module:

If (VPHR for scell received)

VphrReportedForScell = true;

else

VphrReportedForScell = false;

end

2. PCell UL scheduler receive information that UE’s UL SCell is activated and ready to be scheduled[CB006139-AA] and the UE is not in step-wise SCell addition procedure(between PsUser\_UserModifyReq and PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq for step-wise SCell addition)[End CB006139-AA];

3. As the wasBufferSplitLastTime is initilized false when SCell activation, so need to check conditions:

If buffered UL CA eligible data volume > top level and splitRatio(i, SCell) !=0 and (VphrReportedForScell == true) ;

do case1 initialSplitTxPower calculation for Pcell and Scell as 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10879\_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

send power split, buffer split to SCell  by PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G\_L2\_IF\_2140\_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

wasBufferSplitLastTime = true;

else

split zero buffer to SCell by PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G\_L2\_IF\_2140\_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

wasBufferSplitLastTime = false;

initialPowerSplitForScellActivition = true;

end

Note:

1. if wasBufferSplitLastTime == false and initialPowerSplitForScellActivition == true after step3, then wait for BSR triggered bufferSplit and powerSplit success, refer to 5G\_L2\_9237\_replaced([11161070](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25Y0K_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `11161070`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
BSR triggerred

---

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `11161087`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
For BSR triggerred buffer split, as Trigger-1 in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10281\_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the process should be as:

1. BSR is received in PCell UL scheduler via LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd 5G\_L2\_IF\_875\_replaced([10984687](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WBxzvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUlInfoUpdateInd 5G\_L2\_IF\_2159\_replaced([10980370](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2ViChPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

if scell is suspended due to low split Tx power, buffer split should not be triggered;

2. As the wasBufferSplitLastTime may be true or false, so need to check conditions:

If ((wasBufferSplitLastTime  and buffered [Before CB009059-BB] nonGbr [CB009059-BB] UL CA eligible [End CB009059-BB] data volume >= bottom level) or (!wasBufferSplitLastTime  and buffered [Before CB009059-BB] nonGbr [CB009059-BB] UL CA eligible [End CB009059-BB] data volume > top level)) and splitRatio(i, SCell) !=0 and (VphrReportedForScell == true);

If(initialPowerSplitForScellActivition== true)

do case1 initialSplitTxPower calculation for Pcell and Scell as 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10879\_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

initialPowerSplitForScellActivition= false;

send power split, buffer split to SCell by PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G\_L2\_IF\_2140\_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

else if(reInitialPowerSplitForBufferStop == true)

do case2 initialSplitTxPower calculation for Pcell and Scell as 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10879\_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

reInitialPowerSplitForBufferStop = false;

send power split, buffer split to SCell by PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G\_L2\_IF\_2140\_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

else if(reInitSplitTxPowerForOHResume == true)

initialize the split tx power for PCell and SCell as the formula for case5 specified by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10879\_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

reInitSplitTxPowerForOHResume = false;

send power split, buffer split to SCell via PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G\_L2\_IF\_2140\_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

else

buffer split with splitRatio to SCell by PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G\_L2\_IF\_2140\_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

end

wasBufferSplitLastTime = true;

else

split zero buffer to SCell by PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G\_L2\_IF\_2140\_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

wasBufferSplitLastTime = false;

end

Note:

1. initialPowerSplitForScellActivition refer to 5G\_L2\_9234\_replaced([11161041](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25Y0JvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
2. reInitialPowerSplitForBufferStop refer to 5G\_L2\_9210\_replaced([11161760](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25cegvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-4**  (ID: `11161093`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
Unbalanced buffer triggrred (Trigger-3 in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10281\_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

---

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-4.0-3**  (ID: `11161110`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
For buffer split triggrred by Trigger-3 in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10281\_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the process should be as:

1. Every time after UE is scheduled in PCell UL, or PCell UL receive PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd from SCell 5G\_L2\_IF\_2366\_replaced([10980622](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vj3t_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), UE check whether the trigger as 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10281\_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is valid. if scell is suspended due to low split Tx power, buffer split should not be triggered;

2. If the trigger is valid, as the wasBufferSplitLastTime may be true or false, so need to check conditions:

If (wasBufferSplitLastTime  == false)

stop buffer split and return;

else

If (buffered [Before CB009059-BB] nonGbr [CB009059-BB] UL CA eligible [End CB009059-BB] data volume >= bottom level) and splitRatio(i, SCell) !=0;

Buffer split to SCell with splitRatio by PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G\_L2\_IF\_2140\_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

wasBufferSplitLastTime = true;

else

split zero buffer to SCell by PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G\_L2\_IF\_2140\_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

wasBufferSplitLastTime = false;

end

end

---

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-5**  (ID: `11161115`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
Scell resume triggerred (Trigger-4 in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10281\_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

---

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-5.0-2**  (ID: `11161126`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
For SCell resume triggerred buffer split, as Trigger-4 in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10281\_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the process should be as:

1. when Scell resume success as 5G\_L2\_9227\_replaced([11161975](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25dsqfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),  PCell Ul will check whether the trigger is valid;

2. Since SCell Ul scheduling is suspended previously, the wasBufferSplitLastTime is false, reInitialPowerSplitForBufferStop is true, so need to check conditions:

If buffered [Before CB009059-BB] nonGbr [CB009059-BB] UL CA eligible [End CB009059-BB] data volume > top level and splitRatio(i, SCell) !=0;

do case2 initialSplitTxPower calculation for Pcell and Scell as 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10879\_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

send power split, buffer split to SCell  by PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G\_L2\_IF\_2140\_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

reInitialPowerSplitForBufferStop = false;

wasBufferSplitLastTime = true;

else

split zero buffer to SCell by PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G\_L2\_IF\_2140\_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

wasBufferSplitLastTime = false;

end

Note:

1. reInitialPowerSplitForBufferStop refer to 5G\_L2\_9210\_replaced([11161760](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25cegvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
2. if wasBufferSplitLastTime == false and reInitialPowerSplitForBufferStop ==true after step2, then wait for BSR triggered bufferSplit and powerSplit success, refer to 5G\_L2\_9237\_replaced([11161070](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25Y0K_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-6**  (ID: `11161132`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
SCell Ul RLQ resume triggered

---

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-6.0-2**  (ID: `11161143`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
For buffer split triggered by Trigger-5(Ul RLQ resume) in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10281\_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the process should be described as:

1. When PCell Ul received SCell Ul RLQ resume via PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUlControlInd(5G\_L2\_IF\_2944\_replaced([10980976](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vm7A_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), PCell Ul will check whether this trigger is valid(invalid in case SCell in overheating status, or SCell no split tx power, etc).

2. Since SCell Ul scheduling is suspended before, the wasBufferSplitLastTime is false, need to check conditions as following:

if (!wasBufferSplitLastTime and buffered [Before CB009059-BB] nonGbr [CB009059-BB] UL CA eligible [End CB009059-BB] data volume > top level) and splitRatio(i, SCell) !=0:

 if for RLQ resume after rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower expired, initialize the split tx power as the formula for case2 in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10879\_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)):

 Send buffer split with splitRatio(10%) and power split with initialSplitTxPower via PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd as specified by 5G\_L2\_IF\_2140\_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to SCell;

 wasBufferSplitLastTime = true;

 if for RLQ resume before rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower expired, no need to initialize split tx power, keep the existing split tx power for PCell and SCell as that before RLQ suspend, stop the rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower:

 Send buffer split with splitRatio(10%) via PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd as specified by 5G\_L2\_IF\_2140\_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to SCell;

 wasBufferSplitLastTime = true;

else

 Don't need to send zero buffer to SCell via PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd;

 wasBufferSplitLastTime = false;

 Wait for next PCell BSR to trigger buffer split (and power split in case rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower expired);

end

---

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-7**  (ID: `11161149`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
SCell overheating resume triggered

---

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-7.0-2**  (ID: `11161158`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
For buffer split triggered by Trigger-6(overheating resume) in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10281\_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the process should be described as:

1. When PCell Ul received overheating resume via PsPeerCtrl\_ScellStatusInd(5G\_L2\_IF\_682\_replaced([10979855](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VeYIfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), PCell Ul will check whether this trigger is valid(invalid in case SCell Ul bad RLQ status, or SCell no split tx power, etc).

2. Since SCell Ul scheduling is suspended before, the wasBufferSplitLastTime is false, need to check conditions as following:

if (!wasBufferSplitLastTime and buffered [Before CB009059-BB] nonGbr [CB009059-BB] UL CA eligible [End CB009059-BB] data volume > top level) and splitRatio(i, SCell) !=0:

 initialize the split tx power as the formula for case5 in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10879\_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

 send buffer split with splitRatio(10%) and power split with initialSplitTxPower via PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd as specified by 5G\_L2\_IF\_2140\_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to SCell;

 reInitSplitTxPowerForOHResume = false;

 wasBufferSplitLastTime = true;

else

 Don't need to send zero buffer to SCell via PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd;

 wasBufferSplitLastTime = false;

 Wait for next PCell BSR to trigger buffer split and power split

end

---

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-8**  (ID: `11161165`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
UL carrier in NACK flood state(Trigger-7 Nack Flood)

---

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-8.0-2**  (ID: `11161175`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
For buffer split triggerred by trigger-7 in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10281\_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)):

(1) When PCell enters Nack Flood state as 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4892\_replaced([11197752](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwH-JvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or exit Nack Flood state as 5G\_L2\_8747\_replaced([11163820](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25or0PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), or PCell receives SCell's NACK Flood event by PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUlInfoUpdateInd, PCell should save all the NACK Flood event, then check if UE NACK Flood state as 5G\_UP\_ALG\_14522\_replaced([11122787](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqgeWPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

(2) Every time after UE is scheduled in PCell UL, or PCell UL receive PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd from SCell 5G\_L2\_IF\_2366\_replaced([10980622](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vj3t_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), Pcell need to check if UE NACK Flood state as 5G\_UP\_ALG\_14522\_replaced([11122787](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqgeWPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Detailed handling:

1. If ONLY One UL carrier in NACK flood state:

IN 1 or 2 scenario, if buffer split can be triggered by NFD condition in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_14522\_replaced([11122787](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqgeWPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), PCell split UE's UL [Before CB009059-BB] non-GBR [CB009059-BB] UL CA eligible [End CB009059-BB] data buffer as 5G\_UP\_ALG\_14527\_replaced([11123046](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqhFZ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) directly. According to the split buffer size for scell, update wasBufferSplitLastTime .

1. IF ALL UL carrieres both in NACK Flood state, keep current buffer split;
2. When ALL UL carrieres both exit NACK Flood state, re-trigger buffer split will be along with next general triggers (i.e. trigger-2 or trigger-3 which are defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10281\_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-9**  (ID: `11161179`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
Pcell exiting the TP enabled::SAG On state resume triggered

---

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-9.0-1**  (ID: `11161185`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
When UE exits the TP enabled::SAG On state(refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_18906\_replaced([11204759](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwlRLvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and all below conditions are satisfied:

1. UL SCell is still actived.
2. if (NRCELL.sCellDeactInPoorRf = 'None') or (Scell activation method='BLIND' and NRCELL.sCellDeactInPoorRf = 'Deact\_Scells\_VoNR\_SAg')

Then PCell shall trigger normal buffer split in order to enable PUSCH scheduling on SCell. Please refer to the corresponding suspend behavior in 5G\_L2\_7784\_replaced([11161228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25aCSfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) Case9.

---

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-10**  (ID: `11161191`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
UL Tx switching UE with FDD PCell exit transient phase triggered

---

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-10.0-1**  (ID: `11161196`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
For buffer split triggered by Trigger-8(UL Tx switching UE with FDD PCell and TDD UL SCell, when FDD PCell finished the transient phase) in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10281\_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the process should be described as:

1. When FDD PCell exits the transient phase(5G\_UP\_ALG\_4816\_replaced([11194889](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4GhfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), FDD PCell Ul will check whether this trigger is valid(invalid in case SCell in overheating status, etc).

2. If yes, FDD PCell shall trigger normal buffer split in order to enable PUSCH scheduling on SCell.

---

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-11**  (ID: `11161202`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
PCell complete the step-wise SCell addition reconfiguration triggered

---

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-11.0-1**  (ID: `11161206`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
When PCell receives PsUser\_UserModifyReq to do step-wise SCell addition to a CA UE, will stop buffer split to its DL-UL SCell after NxDPA period delay. After the corresponding PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq:

1. PCell Ul will check whether this trigger is valid(invalid in case the DL-UL SCell is not active or DL-UL SCell in overheating status, etc).

2. If yes, PCell shall trigger normal buffer split in order to enable PUSCH scheduling on SCell.

---

##### 2.4.7.12.5.0-3 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) General UL Buffer Split Assist in SCell (ID: 11161211)

**2.4.7.12.5.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11161223`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
For each FR1 UL CA UE, Scell need assist and report information to Pcell, to help Pcell run buffer split control in 5G\_L2\_7625\_replaced([11161003](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25YNH_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

(1) SCell should forward BSR info to PCell and report housekeeping info to PCell after every scheduling.

BSR forwarded from SCell to PCell need inform its new transmission time to PCell, the time stamp includes hyper system frame number to differ time gap longer than 5 seconds(sfn, slot can only tell about 5 seconds time difference). And PCell should keep rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime as 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10514\_replaced([11203665](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwgYo_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) by the BSR’s first transmission on air (hfn, sfn, slot).

(2)SCell shall report PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd as 5G\_L2\_IF\_2366\_replaced([10980622](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vj3t_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to PCell after every UL scheduling.

(3) For every PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd to SCell, SCell shall do housekeeping as 5G\_L2\_7630\_replaced([11161327](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25apU_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), store bufferSplitProcessSN in local context. And to avoid corner case when housekeeping as 5G\_L2\_7632\_replaced([11161348](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25apV_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), in every PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd, SCell shall inform the current bufferSplitProcessSN  to PCell.

[CB006137-BB]

(4) SCell UL will report uplink RLQ status change(bad or good) to PCell UL via psPeerCtrl\_ScellUlControlInd as defined in 5G\_L2\_IF\_2944\_replaced([10980976](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vm7A_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), when SCell UL RLQ evaluation result is bad or when SCell UL RLQ is good after recovery from bad by DL pathloss check procedure.

(5) SCell DL will report CQI-based overheating status to PCell DL via PsPeerCtrl\_ScellStatusInd as defined in 5G\_L2\_IF\_685\_replaced([10979873](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VeYJfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), then PCell DL will forward this overheating status to PCell UL via DlToUlIntraSchedUpdate.

[End CB006137-BB]

---

##### 2.4.7.12.5.0-4 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) Speical Buffer Split Cases with Zero Buffer to Scell (ID: 11161228)

**2.4.7.12.5.0-4.0-10**  (ID: `12882326`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
In some special cases, Pcell directly interrupt UL buffer split and send PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd **with zero buffer to SCell for**procedure control(i.e Scell release, overheating,etc), and then NO buffer split condition checking in 5G\_L2\_7625\_replaced([11161003](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25YNH_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).\*\*\*\*

Special triggers as following:

Case 1: when PCell UL scheduler receive information that UE’s UL SCell is deactivated, PCell need to trigger buffer split without any condition check, merge all the non Gbr Data and send zero buffer to SCell by PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G\_L2\_IF\_2140\_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) with ifHarqNeedClear = false.

Case 2: release case, refer to 5G\_L2\_6912\_replaced([11160050](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25VJxfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Case 3: when scell suspend triggered by the split TX power is too low on SCell where there are only Ul overlapping slots in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10921\_replaced([11119951](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqMVQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) condition 1, send zero buffer to SCell by PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G\_L2\_IF\_2140\_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) with ifHarqNeedClear = false, refer to 5G\_L2\_8628\_replaced([11161959](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25dspvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Case 4: Overheating(CQI=0), PCell Ul get the overheating status of joint DL/UL scell via *DlToUlIntraSchedUpdate from PCell Dl, PCell Ul will trigger buffer split without any condition check, and send zero buffer to SCell via PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with ifHarqNeedClear =**true, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2871\_replaced([11123293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqiTgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).*\*\*

Case 5: when activated UL SCell UL scheduling need to be suspended due to measurement gap setup conflict with SCell beam as 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2878\_replaced([11123344](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqiTivvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), PCell need to trigger buffer split without any condition check, merge all the UL CA eligible Data and send zero buffer to SCell by PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G\_L2\_IF\_2140\_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) with ifHarqNeedClear = false. And stop further buffer split trigger until the measurement gap release.

Case 6: when non UL CA eligible LCG setup and UE not have lch-ToSCellRestriction capability, PCell Ul will trigger buffer split without any condition check, send zero buffer to SCell by PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G\_L2\_IF\_2140\_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) with ifHarqNeedClear = false refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10193\_replaced([11123394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqi6lfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Case 7: Ul bad RLQ status, when PCell Ul receive SCell Ul bad RLQ status, PCell Ul will trigger buffer split without any condition check, and send zero buffer to SCell via PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with ifHarqNeedClear = false, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11884\_replaced([11121639](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqZwp_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

case8: for UE with FDD + TDD R15 UL CA or FDD + FDD UL CA**or inter-band TDD FR1 + TDD FR1 UL CA UE, when pusch transform precoder is changed from disabled to enabled and [image-0][image\_desc]The image is completely black, indicating it is either an empty image or a black screen. There is no discernible content, text, or table present.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3059.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0] is equal to [image-1][image\_desc]The image is entirely black. There is no discernible content, text, or patterns within the image.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3059.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1], PCell Ul will trigger buffer split without any condition check, and send zero buffer to SCell via PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with ifHarqNeedClear = false, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10377\_replaced([11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and in terms of [image-2][image\_desc]The image is completely black, indicating it is either an empty image or a black screen. There is no discernible content, text, or table present.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3059.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2] and [image-3][image\_desc]The image is entirely black. There is no discernible content, text, or patterns within the image.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3059.004.png[/image\_path][/image-3]to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10879\_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (both shall be converted to the same unit for comparision).**

Case 9: when UE enters the TP enabled::SAG On state in Pcell if (NRCELL.sCellDeactInPoorRf = 'None' and UE's Scell activation method!='BLIND' ), please refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19252\_replaced([11205370](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwo7h_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Case10: For UL Tx switching UE with FDD PCell and TDD UL SCell, when FDD PCell decide to conduct UL scheduling using only CSS (Type3-PDCCH), DCI format 0\_0 for the transient phase according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4816\_replaced([11194889](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4GhfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) if not during step-wise SCell addition procedure, PCell Ul will trigger buffer split without any condition check, and send zero buffer to SCell via PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with ifHarqNeedClear = true, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10516\_replaced([11122476](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3RPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Case11: when step-wise Scell addition to a CA UE with already configured UL SCell, and the UL SCell is active, PCell Ul will trigger buffer split without any condition check, and send zero buffer to SCell via PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with ifHarqNeedClear = true, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10377\_replaced([11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Case 12: when Enhanced RRC Reconfiguration UL PRB Randomization is activated (i.e, isMacLayerMonitorNeeded is evaluated as ‘TRUE’ according to 5G\_L2\_22352\_replaced([11145029](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_239QxPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), UL transmission is suspended on both PCell and SCell during the MAC layer monitoring procedure (5G\_UP\_ALG\_29060\_replaced([11153872](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kspMVPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10516\_replaced([11122476](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3RPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). To suspend UL transmission on SCell side, PCell Ul will trigger buffer split without any condition check, and send zero buffer to SCell via PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with ifHarqNeedClear = false.

[CB013709-CB]

Case 13: according to [11122476: Information exchange for Transmission Buffer Split](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3RPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), when UL buffer split is triggered,  if UL SCell is overloaded as [11122821: Evaluation criteria for scheduler processing overload in any of the UL carrier](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqgeW_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), PCell shall split 0 UL buffer to the UL SCell by sending zero buffer to SCell via PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with ifHarqNeedClear = false, increase the PM counter in [12533213: Total number of times the UL countermeasure type 6 is active](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_alnzkxxAEfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

[End CB013709-CB]

When PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd to SCell for **procedure control, PCell shall do housekeeping as 5G\_L2\_7630\_replaced([11161327](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25apU_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) after every control trigger. And to avoid corner case when housekeeping as 5G\_L2\_7632\_replaced([11161348](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25apV_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), after control trigger, do bufferSplitProcessSN++ and send it in PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd. *bufferSplitProcessSN for the UE should be reset when UE is UL deactivated or the UE's UL SCell is released.***

---

##### 2.4.7.12.5.0-5 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) Do Housekeeping Based on Buffer Split (ID: 11161327)

**2.4.7.12.5.0-5.0-3**  (ID: `11161342`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
As description in 5G\_L2\_7625\_replaced([11161003](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25YNH_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), after every buffer split trigger(data trigger in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10281\_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or control trigger), there is PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd to SCell, both PCell and SCell shall do housekeeping based on the buffer split result.

After every buffer split for data or control is done(data volume to SCell or zero data to SCell), PCell and SCell need to do housekeeping based on bsr report time, which is defined as rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime.

rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime includes Xhfn (hfn/sfn/slot) and Tsc.

rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime.Tsc is corresponding local Tsc based on rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime.Xhfn.

rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime is maintained in Pcell and Scell separately but with same value.

To sync rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime between Pcell and Scell, 4 scenarios should be taken into consideration:

1.Pcell receive BSR report from L2LO:

Pcell save the rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime of BSR report first transmission on air time in bufferStatus locally.

2.Scell receive BSR report from L2LO:

Scell just forward it with on air time of BSR report to Pcell by ScellUlInfoUpdateInd.

3.Pcell do buffer split (no matter normal split or zero split):

Pcell send PcellUlBufferSplitInd with on air time of latest BSR report (hfnReport/ sfnReport/ slotReport).

4.Scell receive PcellUlBufferSplitInd:

Scell save on air time of latest BSR report (hfnReport/ sfnReport/ slotReport) as rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime locally.

When calculate the time sequence for rrmScheduledUlData\_bytes, use rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTimeas following steps:

1. diff = abs (rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime.Tsc - Tsc for scheduling) ;
2. if diff < 4 seconds

use rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime.xsfn to order the time sequence;

[PR726722] If rrmBufferSplitBaseTime.xsfn on Pcell and on air time of BSR report forwarded from Scell are the same, BSR shall also be handled if all of the following conditions are fulfilled (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_5131\_replaced([11203806](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwg_wfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

• BSR forwarded from Scell is zero BSR.

• UE has Proactive Grant Type = Skippable-Dynamic or Skippable-Dynamic-Enhanced (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4839\_replaced([11195286](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv7J1fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End PR726722]

else if Tsc for scheduling - rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime.Tsc  > 0

the scheduling is later than the rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime;

else

the scheduling is older than the rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime;

end

---

##### 2.4.7.12.5.0-6 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) Corner Cases In Housekeeping Based on Buffer Split (ID: 11161348)

**2.4.7.12.5.0-6.0-3**  (ID: `11161386`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
There are some corner cases as bellow, solutions should be done to prevent side effect.

1. To avoid housekeeping report trigger obsolete buffer split as following, bufferSplitProcessSN is introduced. For every buffer split trigger or control trigger for the UE, do bufferSplitProcessSN++ and send it in PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd, store the bufferSplitProcessSN in local UE’s context.

And on receiving PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd, SCell should store the bufferSplitProcessSN  from message in local UE’s context after validating the bufferSplitProcessSN  is 1 greater than the last one. Also, every time SCell report PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd to PCell, the message should fill its local bufferSplitProcessSN.

When PCell receive PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd from SCell, check if the bufferSplitProcessSN in message is older than PCell local bufferSplitProcessSN. If it is older, the buffer info within this PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd message is dropped by PCell, only present eTh for the UE should be used to updated SCell eTh in PCell.

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a diagram illustrating a sequence of events related to buffer status reporting (BSR) and buffer splitting in a cellular network. The diagram uses a horizontal timeline to represent the progression of time, with events marked by arrows and associated text.
Here's a breakdown of the elements:
\* **Timeline:** A horizontal black line represents the timeline.
\* **Event 1: BSR Arrival:**
\* An upward red arrow originates from the left side of the timeline.
\* The text associated with this arrow, in red, reads: "BSR from UE arrive in PCell on FDD sfn x, slot y". This indicates that a Buffer Status Report from the User Equipment arrives at the Primary Cell (PCell) on a Frequency Division Duplex (FDD) system at a specific System Frame Number (SFN) 'x' and slot 'y'.
\* **Event 2: Buffer Split Indication:**
\* A downward blue arrow points to a specific point on the timeline, slightly to the right of the first event.
\* The text associated with this arrow, in blue, reads: "PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd to SCell based on sfn x, slot y BSR buffer split". This signifies an indication from the PCell to the Secondary Cell (SCell) regarding a buffer split, triggered by the BSR received at sfn x, slot y.
\* **Event 3: Housekeeping Report and Potential Buffer Split:**
\* Below the timeline, a dashed arrow points upwards to a point on the timeline, further to the right.
\* The text associated with this dashed arrow, in black, reads: "PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd to PCell after scheduling on TDD sfn x, slot 2y". This indicates a housekeeping report from the SCell to the PCell, occurring after scheduling on a Time Division Duplex (TDD) system at sfn x, slot 2y.
\* Above and to the right of this dashed arrow, there is a block of text in black: "The Housekeeping report from SCell may trigger another buffer split based on trigger-3, but the buffer on PCell is already updated by sfn x, slot y BSR buffer split". This explains that the housekeeping report might initiate a further buffer split, but the PCell's buffer has already been updated by the earlier BSR.
\* **Timeline End:** A right-pointing arrow at the far right of the timeline indicates the continuation of the process or the end of the depicted sequence.
\* **Grid:** The diagram is overlaid on a light gray grid, which helps in visualizing the relative positions and timings of the events.
The diagram visually represents a scenario where an initial BSR triggers a buffer split indication. Later, a housekeeping report from a different cell might lead to another buffer split, but the system acknowledges that the PCell's buffer has already been updated by the initial BSR.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3067.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

[CNI-134375-M]

Link:

<https://nokia.sharepoint.com/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Forms/Tree_View.aspx?csf=1&web=1&e=V8ishU&cid=9206de7d%2Df76b%2D4167%2D95a0%2D9ed94135ffa1&FolderCTID=0x012000F0A0A3BA325F7648AD307E6959BA7376&id=%2Fsites%2F5Gdoc%2FAS%5FTech%5FSpec%2FDrawings%20and%20diagrams%20for%205G%2FUser%20Plane%2F5G%20L2%20Entity%20Level%2F2%205G%2DL2%2DPS%20Component%20Requirements%2F2%2E4%20Algorithm%2F7%2E%20Carrier%20Aggregation%20Control%2F12%2E%20CA%20UE%20Scheduling&viewid=967508b3%2D8e81%2D461c%2Db99d%2D145065cf0c1c>

[End CNI-134375-M]

2. To avoid 1 PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with 2 buffer split event for 1 UE as following, once the second buffer split is triggered by BSR within one slot in PCell, the first buffer split result should be obsoleted by the second one, also the bufferSplitProcessSN should fall back to keep as the same as the first buffer split within the slot.

[image-1][image\_desc]The image is a diagram illustrating a timeline of events related to buffer splitting in a cellular network. The timeline is represented by a horizontal line with arrows indicating the direction of time.
There are several text annotations on the diagram:
\* **Red text:** "BSR from UE arrive in PCell on the middle of FDD sfn x, slot y, trigger a second buffer split within this FDD slot" with a red upward arrow pointing to a specific point on the timeline.
\* **Black text:** "The Housekeeping report from SCell may trigger a buffer split based on trigger-3" with a black upward arrow pointing to the beginning of the timeline. Below this, it says "PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd to PCell after scheduling on TDD sfn x, slot 2y".
\* **Blue text:** "PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd for every FDD slot for one UE should include at most one buffer split" with a blue downward arrow pointing to a point further along the timeline.
The diagram uses a grid background for visual reference. The timeline extends from left to right, indicating the progression of events.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3067.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]

[CNI-134375-M]

Link:

<https://nokia.sharepoint.com/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Forms/Tree_View.aspx?csf=1&web=1&e=V8ishU&cid=9206de7d%2Df76b%2D4167%2D95a0%2D9ed94135ffa1&FolderCTID=0x012000F0A0A3BA325F7648AD307E6959BA7376&id=%2Fsites%2F5Gdoc%2FAS%5FTech%5FSpec%2FDrawings%20and%20diagrams%20for%205G%2FUser%20Plane%2F5G%20L2%20Entity%20Level%2F2%205G%2DL2%2DPS%20Component%20Requirements%2F2%2E4%20Algorithm%2F7%2E%20Carrier%20Aggregation%20Control%2F12%2E%20CA%20UE%20Scheduling&viewid=967508b3%2D8e81%2D461c%2Db99d%2D145065cf0c1c>

[End CNI-134375-M]

3. When UE’s buffer over transmission as 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9787\_replaced([11203724](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwg_sPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) happened in one CC, to keep all the data volume tracked in PCell and minimalize its effect on SCell, process the data over transmission as following with k as the index of LCG, i is the time point, the initial transmission time of receivedDataUlLcg\_bytes is later than rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime:

If buffer over transmission happens on PCell, which means in PCell rrmBufferedDataUlLcg\_bytes[k, i] – receivedDataUlLcg\_bytes[k, i] < 0, so in PCell:

Keep rrmBufferedDataUlLcg\_bytes[k]  = 0;

overReceivedBytes [k, i] = receivedDataUlLcg\_bytes[k, i] - rrmBufferedDataUlLcg\_bytes[k, i];

overReceivedBytes[k] += overTransmissionByte[k, i];

If buffer over transmission happens on SCell, which means in SCell rrmBufferedDataUlLcg\_bytes[k, i] – receivedDataUlLcg\_bytes[k, i] < 0, so in SCell:

Keep rrmBufferedDataUlLcg\_bytes[k]  = 0;

overReceivedBytes [k, i]= receivedDataUlLcg\_bytes[k, i] - rrmBufferedDataUlLcg\_bytes[k, i]; this volume should be reported to PCell by PsPeerCtrl\_ ScellUlInfoUpdateInd and then reset to 0;

Upon receiving PsPeerCtrl\_ ScellUlInfoUpdateInd, if time i is later than rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime: in PCell, PCell should do:

rrmBufferedDataUlLcg\_bytes[k] -= overReceivedBytes [k, i] ;

if rrmBufferedDataUlLcg\_bytes[k] < 0

overReceivedBytes[k] += overReceivedBytes [k, i] - rrmBufferedDataUlLcg\_bytes[k];

keep rrmBufferedDataUlLcg\_bytes[k] = 0;

end

If a buffer split triggerred not by a BSR, the overall  rrmBufferedDataUlLcg\_bytes[k] for both PCell and SCell should be rrmBufferedDataUlLcg\_bytes[k]\_PCell + rrmBufferedDataUlLcg\_bytes[k]\_SCell - overReceivedBytes[k], and if the result < 0 it should be =0.  Upon any updated BSR and after every triggered buffer split, the overReceivedBytes[k] should be reset to 0.

---

##### 2.4.7.12.5.0-7 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) Special Buffer Split Cases with UL TX switch UE (ID: 11161392)

**2.4.7.12.5.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `11161396`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
For FR1 FDD + TDD UL TX switch option1 UE:

1, When TDD UL SCell received a first non-zero UL buffer split after zero UL buffer split, TDD UL SCell shall proceed scheduling at least 5 slot later.

2, When FDD PCell send the first zero UL buffer split after non-zero UL buffer split at FDD PUSCH slot (N) and current FDD PUSCH slot (N+K2) is just after a TDD SCell UL slot, FDD PCell shall shorten the PUSCH. After that FDD PCell does not need to shorten PUSCH due to TDD SCell UL slot any more.

---

##### 2.4.7.12.5.0-8 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) Evaluate UE power for intra-band (ID: 11161402)

**2.4.7.12.5.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `11161405`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA)
For UE configured with FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA. Evaluate power state according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_28261\_replaced([11123109](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqhFavvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Rationale:

UE power state false it means that UE has not enough power for SCell.

UE power state true it means that UE has enough power for SCell.

---

#### 2.4.7.12.6 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA)

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-1 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) rdFr1UlCaDynamicPowerSplit (ID: 11161414)

**2.4.7.12.6.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `12677560`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA)
**[Before CNI-137616-A]**

**Set rdFr1UlCaDynamicPowerSplit to the default value to 0, as static power split mode, which means the UE TX power shall be not splitted dynamically in UL overlapping slots between Pcell and Scell for FDD-TDD UL CA and FDD-FDD UL CA, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10871\_replaced([11119486](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHI_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

**[End CNI-137616-A]**

---

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-2 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) Power split mode (ID: 11161436)

**2.4.7.12.6.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11161442`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA)
Determine whether dynamic power split is enabled

---

**2.4.7.12.6.0-2.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `12677443`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA)
**[Before CNI-137616-A]For a FR1 Ul inter-band CA UE, dynamic UL power split (refer to 5G\_L2\_6636\_replaced([11161410](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25apX_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is enabled if all the following condition are fulfilled, else dynamic power split is disabled:**

1. [image-0][image\_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3081.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0] based on UserSetup/UserModify (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10870\_replaced([11119474](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqKgH_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

* [image-1][image\_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3081.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]and [image-2][image\_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3081.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2]refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10873\_replaced([11119621](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHKvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and shall be converted to mW from dBm for the calculation;
* [image-3][image\_desc]The image is entirely black.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3081.004.png[/image\_path][/image-3]refers to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10879\_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

2.UE is FR1 FDD-TDD CA UE.

Note: FR1 TDD-FDD CA UE is in static power split mode because no power split on overlapping slot since no scheduling on FDD Scell overlapping slot, refers to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10871\_replaced([11119486](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHI_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

FR1 FDD-TDD UL CA UE is forced to set dynamic power split to be disabled, which means static power split mode, so above dynamic UL power split condition checking for enable/disable do not need to implementation any more, refer to definition of rdFr1UlCaDynamicPowerSplit (5G\_L2\_9282\_replaced([11161414](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25bQYPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Note: FR1 FDD-FDD, TDD-TDD UL CA UE is forced to set dynamic power split to be disabled

If dynamic power split is disabled:

**[End CNI-137616-A]**

1. **No dynamic power split:**

No initial power split (5G\_L2\_7106\_replaced([11161721](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25b3evvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

If PCell is TDD cell, then need to calculate nonPowerLimitedTxPowerPerPRB (5G\_L2\_8660\_replaced([11161551](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25b3cfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). For all other cases,no need to calculate nonPowerLimitedTxPowerPerPRB (5G\_L2\_8660\_replaced([11161551](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25b3cfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

no need to calculate efficiencyPerPRB(5G\_L2\_8663\_replaced([11161689](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25b3dPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), splitTxPowerAdjustmentStep(5G\_L2\_8698\_replaced([11161699](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25b3dvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

No splitPower and powerAdjustStep in PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd;

No Pcell increase power and power control in 5G\_L2\_8627\_replaced([11161861](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25dFlfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) by PsPeerCtrl\_ScellEfficiencyReportInd and PsPeerCtrl\_PcellPowerControlInd;

No Scell increase power scenario in 5G\_L2\_8627\_replaced([11161861](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25dFlfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

1. No **UE Over Power Status check in 5G\_L2\_8741\_replaced([11161801](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ceivvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));**
2. No **resume or suspend (5G\_L2\_8628\_replaced([11161959](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25dspvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_L2\_8629\_replaced([11161992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25dsrPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) due to no split power.**
3. No **power split IWK with buffer split, i.e:**

Power split with buffer split defind in 5G\_L2\_9232\_replaced([11161035](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25Y0JfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

Power split stop/start due to buffer split stop/start defined in 5G\_L2\_8639\_replaced([11161904](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25dFnPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**2.4.7.12.6.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11161517`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA)
MPR Applicability

---

**2.4.7.12.6.0-2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11161522`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA)
For FR1 intra-band UL CA, when there is no buffer split, then MPR is applied on the PCell, in other case MPR is not applied.

Rationale: L2-PS on one serving cell is not aware if scheduling is happening on the other serving cell.

---

**2.4.7.12.6.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `11161529`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA)
Enter power split mode

---

**2.4.7.12.6.0-2.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11161533`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA)
FR1 UL CA UE with dynamic power split enabled (refer to 5G\_L2\_9564\_replaced([11161442](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25bQZfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), enters power split mode if any of the following initialization cases for split TX power between PCell and SCell is fulfilled (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10870\_replaced([11119474](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqKgH_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
|  | PCell | SCell |
| Case1 | Trigger initialization of split TX power after SCell activation. | Triggered initialization of split TX power. |
| Case2 | Trigger initialization of split TX power after rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower milliseconds timer expired (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10919\_replaced([11119940](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). | Same as Case1. |
| Case3 | Trigger initialization of split TX power after SCell resume (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10923\_replaced([11119968](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqMVRPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). | Same as Case1. |
| Case4 | Receive psPeerCtrl\_ScellUlControlInd with powerState == Resume (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10923\_replaced([11119968](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqMVRPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). | Send psPeerCtrl\_ScellUlControlInd with powerState == Resume. |
| Case5 | Trigger initialization of split TX power after Ul SCell  recovered from overheating (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2874\_replaced([11123313](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqiThPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). | Same as Case1. |

Note:

Initialization of split TX power means PCell sends PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with initialSplitTxPower and rrmBufferedDataUlTotalBytes > 0 to SCell.

---

**2.4.7.12.6.0-2.0-4**  (ID: `11161540`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA)
Exit power split mode

---

**2.4.7.12.6.0-2.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11161546`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA)
FR1 UL CA UE exits power split mode if any of the following conditions is triggered (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10870\_replaced([11119474](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqKgH_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
|  | PCell | SCell |
| buffer split stop | Trigger buffer split stop via PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with rrmBufferedDataUlTotalBytes == 0, and (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10919\_replaced([11119940](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):   IF UL Scell release or UL Scell change or UL Scell swap or UL Scell overheating:     Exit power split mode immediately. ELSE:     Exit after rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower milliseconds timer expired. ENDIF | Receive PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with rrmBufferedDataUlTotalBytes == 0. |
| scheduling suspension on PCell | For the following PCell suspension condition (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10921\_replaced([11119951](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqMVQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):   Condition1: Receive psPeerCtrl\_ScellUlControlInd with powerState == Suspend.   Condition2: Send psPeerCtrl\_PcellUlPowerCtrlInd with pcellSuspend == true. | For the following PCell suspension conditions (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10921\_replaced([11119951](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqMVQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):   Condition1: Send psPeerCtrl\_ScellUlControlInd with powerState == Suspend.   Condition2: Receive psPeerCtrl\_PcellUlPowerCtrlInd with pcellSuspend == true. |

Note:

In the case of buffer split stop on SCell, there is no need to consider rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower milliseconds timer since only re-transmission exists on SCell, and whether it’s in power split mode does not impact re-transmission on SCell.

---

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-3 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) nonPowerLimitedTxPowePerPRB calculation (ID: 11161551)

**2.4.7.12.6.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11161682`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA)
For a CA UE with FR1 UL Scell configurated, nonPowerLimitedTxPowePerPRB is calculated in each serving Cell. After FR1 UL CA is configured, when the first valid multi PHRs including Pcell’s PHR and Scell’s PHR is received, Pcell and Scell will start calculating nonPowerLimitedTxPowePerPRB. The algorithm details of how to calculate is described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10873\_replaced([11119621](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHKvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Some points to note in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10873\_replaced([11119621](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHKvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

1. V, [image-0][image\_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible objects, text, or features.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3090.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0], [image-1][image\_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible objects, text, or features.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3090.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1] corresponds to phrVbit, pcmax, powerHeadRoomLevel respectively defined in 5G\_L2\_IF\_2682\_replaced([10980279](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vhbc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) with (v)PHR for scell receiving on Pcell, or 5G\_L2\_IF\_2165\_replaced([10980421](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VipkPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) with (v)PHR for pcell receiving on Scell.

2.[image-2][image\_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible objects, text, or features.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3090.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2] only valid in real pusch transimission, so do not care the pcmax value if phrVbit is 1 in 5G\_L2\_IF\_2682\_replaced([10980279](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vhbc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or 5G\_L2\_IF\_2165\_replaced([10980421](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VipkPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

1. For [image-3][image\_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3090.004.png[/image\_path][/image-3]that is equivalent to to MIN(minPmax, bandCombinationPowerClass). Refer to the following table for related configuration paramter.

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Parameter | IE and in which message | Description | Definition |
| Pcell’s minPmax | 1. For Pcell side, PsUser\_UserModifyReq.cellConfigurationForModification [0].PuschConfig.minPmax 2. For Scell side, PsUser\_UserSetupReq.CellConfigParam[0].PuschConfig.minPmax | The value equals to MIN(pMaxUeCapFr1, pMaxNROwnCell). pMaxUeCapFr1 means UE's PowerClass for the BandNR of a serving cell. pMaxNROwnCell is a NIDD parameter which means the maximum UL transmission power for a UE on a serving Cell. Refer to 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_1943\_replaced([11270388](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_To82QPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for more details. | 5G\_L2\_IF\_430\_replaced([10975648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VCTQPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |
| Scell’s minPmax | 1. For Pcell side, PsUser\_UserModifyReq.remoteScellToAddList[index].remoteCellConfigParam.minPmax, index refer to the Scell with FR1 UL CA configured. 2. For Scell side, PsUser\_UserSetupReq.CellConfigParam[1].PuschConfig.minPmax | same as the above row | 5G\_L2\_IF\_456\_replaced([10976239](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VFWlPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 5G\_L2\_IF\_430\_replaced([10975648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VCTQPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |
| bandCombinationPowerClass | 1. For Pcell side, PsUser\_UserModify.ueCapability.bandCombinationPowerClass 2. For Scell side, PsUser\_UserSetupReq.ueCapability.bandCombinationPowerClass | CA UE power class for inter band CA specified in 3GPP TS38.101 chapter 6.2A.1.3 without considering the tolerance | 5G\_L2\_IF\_401\_replaced([10975032](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U_P9Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |

Notes:

1. After FR1 UL CA is configured, multi PHRs including Pcell’s and Scell’s after UL CA MAC-CE activation is received on UE side.  UL CA activation time delay exists between on UE side and gNB side, so a vaild multi PHRs may be sent before UL CA is active on gNB side.
2. Refer to 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_1918\_replaced([11201901](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgUeCPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for message follow.

[image-4][image\_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3090.005.png[/image\_path][/image-4]

Where:

-  i: UE index;

-  c: cell index;

-  [image-5][image\_desc]The image is entirely black.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3090.006.png[/image\_path][/image-5]: Time the latest PHR of serving cell c is received;

-  t: Time the calculation relates to;

-  [image-6][image\_desc]The image is completely black.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3090.007.png[/image\_path][/image-6]: [image-7][image\_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3090.008.png[/image\_path][/image-7], [image-8][image\_desc]The image is entirely black.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3090.009.png[/image\_path][/image-8]see 3GPP, 38.213, Chapter7.1.1, with OLPC in use, [image-9][image\_desc]The image is completely black.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3090.010.png[/image\_path][/image-9] for UE i is always 0;

-  [image-10][image\_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3090.011.png[/image\_path][/image-10]: [image-11][image\_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3090.012.png[/image\_path][/image-11], [image-12][image\_desc]The image is entirely black.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3090.013.png[/image\_path][/image-12]see 3GPP, 38.213, Chapter7.1.1,[image-13][image\_desc]The image is completely black, with no discernible features or content.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3090.014.png[/image\_path][/image-13]for UE i is equal to 0 without deltaMCS activation.

If PUSCH closed loop power control is activated on PCell or SCell, according to the formula above the nonPowerLimitedTxPowerPerPRB calculated from PHR report should be updated based on accumulated TPC value.

Some special scenarios should be taken into account:

1). PCell or SCell’s local or forwarded PHR has re-transmission, between PHR re-transmission and initial transmission there’s TPC calculation and which is not default value, when the re-transmitted PHR was received and not discarded due to out-of-date, the nonPowerLimitedTxPowerPerPRB calculation should add the TPC value before this PHR re-transmission:

[image-14][image\_desc]The image is a flowchart illustrating a process with four steps, indicated by numbered boxes and arrows. A horizontal line represents a timeline or a decision point.
**Textual Content:**
\* **(1). PHR new tx successful local or forwarded, real or virtual calculate nonPowerLimitedTxPowerPerPRB**
\* **(2). PHR new tx failed local or forwarded, real or virtual not calculate nonPowerLimitedTxPowerPerPRB**
\* **(3). calculate TPC if CLPC enabled update nonPowerLimitedTxPowerPerPRB with TPC value based on (1)**
\* **(4). PHR retx successful local or forwarded, real or virtual calculate nonPowerLimitedTxPowerPerPRB from PHR plus TPC value in (3)**
**Visual Elements:**
\* **Horizontal Line:** A solid horizontal line runs across the middle of the image, serving as a reference point.
\* **Arrows:**
\* A green upward-pointing arrow is positioned on the left side of the horizontal line, associated with step (1).
\* A red upward-pointing arrow is positioned in the middle-left of the horizontal line, associated with step (2).
\* A blue downward-pointing arrow is positioned in the middle of the image, above the horizontal line, and appears to be related to step (3).
\* A green upward-pointing arrow is positioned on the right side of the horizontal line, associated with step (4).
**Flowchart Interpretation:**
The flowchart seems to describe a power control mechanism.
\* **Step (1)** indicates that if a new transmission (tx) is successful (local or forwarded, real or virtual), `nonPowerLimitedTxPowerPerPRB` is calculated.
\* **Step (2)** indicates that if a new transmission fails, `nonPowerLimitedTxPowerPerPRB` is not calculated.
\* **Step (3)** suggests that if CLPC (presumably Carrier Level Power Control) is enabled, TPC (Transmit Power Control) is calculated, and `nonPowerLimitedTxPowerPerPRB` is updated using this TPC value based on the outcome of step (1).
\* **Step (4)** indicates that if a retransmission (retx) is successful (local or forwarded, real or virtual), `nonPowerLimitedTxPowerPerPRB` is calculated by adding the PHR (presumably Power Headroom) to the TPC value determined in step (3).
The arrows visually represent the progression or conditions within the process. The upward arrows might signify successful events or calculations, while the downward arrow could represent a control or update action.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3090.015.png[/image\_path][/image-14]

[CNI-134375-M]

<https://nokia.sharepoint.com/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Forms/Tree_View.aspx?csf=1&web=1&e=V8ishU&cid=9206de7d%2Df76b%2D4167%2D95a0%2D9ed94135ffa1&FolderCTID=0x012000F0A0A3BA325F7648AD307E6959BA7376&id=%2Fsites%2F5Gdoc%2FAS%5FTech%5FSpec%2FDrawings%20and%20diagrams%20for%205G%2FUser%20Plane%2F5G%20L2%20Entity%20Level%2F2%205G%2DL2%2DPS%20Component%20Requirements%2F2%2E4%20Algorithm%2F7%2E%20Carrier%20Aggregation%20Control%2F12%2E%20CA%20UE%20Scheduling&viewid=967508b3%2D8e81%2D461c%2Db99d%2D145065cf0c1c>

[End CNI-134375-M]

2). Since TPC is calculated during Ul scheduling slot and sent via DCI, but it will take effect after K2 slots. If new PHR received in K2 range after scheduling Ul with non-default TPC value, the nonPowerLimitedTxPowerPerPRB calculation should add the TPC values before this PHR:

[image-15][image\_desc]The image is a flowchart illustrating a process related to power control in a telecommunications system. It depicts a timeline with several steps indicated by text boxes and arrows.
Here's a breakdown of the elements:
**Timeline:** A horizontal line represents a timeline.
**Steps:**
1. **Box (1) at the bottom left:** "PHR new tx successful local or forwarded, real or virtual calculate nonPowerLimitedTxPowerPerPRB"
\* An upward-pointing green arrow originates from this box and points to the timeline, indicating the start of a process or an event.
2. **Box (2) at the top left:** "(2). calculate TPC if CLPC enabled update nonPowerLimitedTxPowerPerPRB with TPC value based on (1)"
\* A downward-pointing blue arrow originates from this box and points to the timeline, indicating an action or calculation that affects the timeline.
3. **Box (3) at the bottom right:** "(3). PHR new tx successful local or forwarded, real or virtual calculate nonPowerLimitedTxPowerPerPRB and update with TPC value base on (2)"
\* An upward-pointing green arrow originates from this box and points to the timeline, indicating another event or action.
4. **Box (4) at the top right:** "(4). TPC take effect on PUSCH after K2 slots"
\* This box is positioned above the timeline and to the right.
**Timeline Markers:**
\* A point on the timeline where the blue arrow lands.
\* A bracket labeled "K2" extending from the point where the blue arrow lands to a point further along the timeline.
\* A red star symbol located on the timeline after the "K2" bracket.
The flowchart suggests a sequence of operations:
\* Step (1) initiates a calculation.
\* Step (2) uses the result of (1) to calculate a TPC value.
\* Step (3) uses the result of (2) to perform another calculation and update.
\* Step (4) indicates that the TPC takes effect after a delay of "K2" slots, as marked on the timeline, with the red star potentially representing the point of effect.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3090.016.png[/image\_path][/image-15]
