##### 2.4.7.12.11.0-2 A-SRS for TDD PCell (T+T FR1 UL CA) Number of PUSCH symbols for initial and re-transmissions (ID: 12721161)

**2.4.7.12.11.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12721168`)

A-SRS for TDD PCell (T+T FR1 UL CA)
Based on [11202027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwbgJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9), for FR1 TDD + TDD intra-band contiguous UL CA UE indicating pa-PhaseDiscontinuityImpacts (see [11371714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wao0y_vjEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) SCell shall inform PCell when all pending/ongoing retransmissions at SCell have ended after a buffer split stop.

After buffer split stop, PCell shall start a timer (200ms). During this time PCell still transmits PUSCH with SLIV 41 (S=0, L=13) or 55 (S=0, L=12).

When PCell receives an indication from SCell that there are no pending retransmissions or timer expires, then PCell shall stop the timer (if still running) and start transmitting PUSCH with symbols required after buffer split stop.

When buffer is stopped with harq clear info (ifHarqNeedClear set to true - no-retransmissions), then PCell will not start the timer, and will not wait for any indication from the SCell – SCell will not send an indication.

Note: This timer is for robustness purposes, for the case when msg from SCell with indication that there are no retransmissions get lost.

---

#### 2.4.7.12.12 Scheduling of CA UE with NBR bearer(s)

##### 2.4.7.12.12.0-1 Scheduling of CA UE with NBR bearer(s) SCell Status change or PsUser_UserModifyReq with nbrEnabledDrbScelllist (ID: 11162344)

**2.4.7.12.12.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11162351`)

Scheduling of CA UE with NBR bearer(s)
On reception of PsUser\_UserModifyReq with nbrEnabledDrbScelllist or when SCell activation or deactivation or any serving cell overheating status change, L2-PS shall

1. Calculate rrmNbrPbr\_kbp split as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22691\_replaced([11123418](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqi6mvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
2. Inform rrmNbrPbr\_kbp information to S-cell

Note:

1. CP-RT shall send latest information about the NBR DRBs admission status to L2-PS except when last S-cell or all S-cell are released L2-PS shall take care of updating the stored information
2. Due to intermessaging delay or around S-cell activation/de-activation there can be delay in communicating calculated rrmNbrPbr\_kbp to S-cell and can cause overall NBR rate reduction for small time. Till new value is received S-cell shall continue to use default values configured at S-cell

---

### 2.4.7.13 Carrier Aggregation Counters(don't add new requirement here, moved to 2.8 PM Counters)

#### 2.4.7.13.0-1 Carrier Aggregation Counters(don't add new requirement here, moved to 2.8 PM Counters) SCell Overheating Counters (ID: 11162489)

**2.4.7.13.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11162495`)

Carrier Aggregation Counters(don't add new requirement here, moved to 2.8 PM Counters)
[Before 5GC001390-D-UPD009]

5G-L2-PS shall maintain the following internal counters for the PM counter report. The internal counter shall be saved in cell database.

instantNumOfUEInOverheating

instantNumOfUEWithSCellInOverheating[1..7], this is an array of 7 elements, while the counter with certain index number refer to the number of Scell in overheating status.

Initial value of all instant counters and all elements of the instant counter arrays are set to 0.

With first Scell of UE run into overheating status according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2871\_replaced([11123293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqiTgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), instantNumOfUEInOverheating is increased by 1, instantNumOfUEWithSCellInOverheating[1] is also increased by 1. When one more UE Scell run into overheating status, L2-PS shall record the number of Scell in overheating status before, the number indicate as Y, and check the number of Scell in overheating status after, indicate as X. 5G-L2-PS shall decrease instantNumOfUEWithSCellInOverheating[Y] for PCell by 1, and increase instantNumOfUEWithSCellInOverheating[X] for PCell by 1.

Note: In 5GC001390, only one Scell will be considered. The overheating counters for FR2 shall be covered by separate CR or feature.

[End 5GC001390-D-UPD009]

Note: Based on discussion, there is no overheating counters to be supported based on CQI0 report, the counters shall be supported based on overheating assistance information according to TS38.331 later.

---

#### 2.4.7.13.0-2 Carrier Aggregation Counters(don't add new requirement here, moved to 2.8 PM Counters) UL RLC PDU Counters for FR1 UL CA (ID: 11162526)

**2.4.7.13.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11162538`)

Carrier Aggregation Counters(don't add new requirement here, moved to 2.8 PM Counters)
5G-L2-LO shall maintain UL RLC PDU counters (M55316C14001), ulCaRlcDataPduVolSecPathReceived (M55316C14002), ulCaRlcDataPduPriPathReceived (M55316C14003) and ulCaRlcDataPduSecPathReceived (M55316C14004) for all the CA UEs' for the PM counter report. The counters shall be saved in cell database, and the initial value of the counter is set to 0.

The counters ulCaRlcDataPduVolPriPathReceived and ulCaRlcDataPduVolSecPathReceived will be increased by the UL RLC PDU bytes received on PCell and SCell separately.

The counters ulCaRlcDataPduPriPathReceived and ulCaRlcDataPduSecPathReceived will be increased by the number of UL RLC PDUs received on PCell and SCell separately.

For all the counters update, the counters will be updated every time UL RLC PDU received no matter it's a complete or segmented PDU. Only DRB type RLC PDUs are considered to be consistent with DL CA after confirm with SFS.

For counters ulCaRlcDataPduVolPriPathReceived and ulCaRlcDataPduPriPathReceived on PCell, their values are only updated if a UL SCell is activated. If SCell change or SCell release occurs before de-activation proceduer and no activated UL SCell exists any more, L2-PS need to inform L2-LO that CA UE changes from activation to de-activation, and related counters should not be updated on PCell.  A new message [Before CNI-122708]LoCtrl\_UlCaActivationStatusInd (5G\_L2\_IF\_3492\_replaced([10985387](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WHRXPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))[CNI-122708]LoCtrl\_UlCaActivationStatusReq (5G\_L2\_IF\_7900\_replaced([10985402](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WHRX_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))[End CNI-122708] is introduced to inform Pcell L2-LO if CA UEs' activation or de-activation changes.

---

### 2.4.7.14 Xp-U link status detection

#### 2.4.7.14.0-1 Xp-U link status detection Xp-U link unavailable detection evaluation (ID: 11162563)

**2.4.7.14.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `13426729`)

Xp-U link status detection
5G-L2-PS shall monitor Xp-U link on PCell and ext-SCells as described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_12814\_replaced([11121981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqbl4PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) based on time margin calculation (see [12689345](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_j6YrU1ZbEfC45IKMrv0u7Q)). [CB014119-E] The monitoring shall be maintained per each PCell - ext-SCell pair, i.e. separate state machine for each Xp Link. One or more ext-SCell(s) can be deployed on one external-gNB or multiple external-gNB(s). [End CB014119-E]

5G-L2-PS should keep track of number of delayed/lost messages detected as described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_12814\_replaced([11121981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqbl4PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), in each DPA scheduling period (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2888\_replaced([11123467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqjhpPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) as the percentage of correctly received messages as follow:

percentageRcvMsgsInDpaCycle = numRecivedMsg \*100 / numExpectedMsgs

where:

* numExpectedMsgs for PsPeerCtrl\_ScellMeasurementRep equlas to 1
* numExpectedMsgs for PsPeerCtrl\_PcellPucchPreAllocationInd depends on number of allocated slots, it could be extracted from IE numOfPucchAllocationSlot (see. 5G\_L2\_IF\_2119\_replaced([10980042](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VfmRfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* If no messages is received in DPA scheduling period percentageRcvMsgsInDpaCycle should be set to 0 for given cycle.

5G-L2-PS should keep track of each percentageRcvMsgsInDpaCycle for all DPA scheduling cycles in rdLnkDelayMonitorPeriod (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_12827\_replaced([11124183](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqoaLPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). After rdLnkDelayMonitorPeriod end 5G-L2-PS should calculate average percentage from all DPA scheduling cycles:

avgPercentageRcvInMonitorPeriod = SUM(percentageRcvMsgsInDpaCycle from each DPA scheduling cycle in given monitor period) / rdLnkDelayMonitorPeriod

Then 5G-L2-PS should check avgPercentageRcvInMonitorPeriod against rdMsgDelayedCntThresh (see 5G\_L2\_8644\_replaced([11184805](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27tvZ_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

IF (avgPercentageRcvInMonitorPeriod < rdMsgDelayedCntThresh)

Set status of Xp-U link as unavailable

END

---

#### 2.4.7.14.0-2 Xp-U link status detection Time margin calculation (ID: 12689345)

**2.4.7.14.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12689346`)

Xp-U link status detection
For Xp-U link status monitoring, 5G-L2-PS shall calculate a time margin as described in [11121981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_wN5_IPvJEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

For the time margin calculation, PCell and ext-SCell shall use input data received from ext-SCell or Pcell correspondingly:

* ext-SCell’s front haul type received at PCell as sCellFHT IE in PsPeerCtrl\_DlNrRelPCellUpdateResp (see [10979313](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VaGu_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)),
* PCell’s margin threshold (rdP2SmarginThreshFddPCell for FDD PCell (see [11124409](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqqPbfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) or rdP2SmarginThreshTddPCell for TDD PCell (see [11124417](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqqPb_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))) received at ext-SCell as msgDelayThreshSCell IE in PsPeerCtrl\_DlNrRelPCellUpdateReq (see [10979279](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VaGtfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

For Xp-U link monitoring in Pcell, a threshold which is a sum of marginThreshold + corresponding marginOffset shall be used (see [11121985](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcM4PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for more details, table ‘Actual threshold for Xp-U link monitoring in PCell in each case’):

* When intra-gNB DL&UL SCell is suspended, then marginOffset w/o UL CA (inter-gNB DL CA only) shall be used.
* When intra-gNB DL&UL SCell is resumed or continues UL scheduling, then marginOffset with UL CA (inter-gNB DL CA + intra-gNB UL CA) shall be used.

---

#### 2.4.7.14.0-3 Xp-U link status detection Xp-U link unavailability detection on ext-SCell 5G-L2-PS (ID: 11162575)

**2.4.7.14.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11162580`)

Xp-U link status detection
Notification to primary 5G-L2-PS

---

**2.4.7.14.0-3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11162586`)

Xp-U link status detection
When Xp-U link unavailability is detected by ext-SCell 5G-L2-PS (according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_12816\_replaced([11122039](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcM5vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), ext-SCell 5G-L2-PS shall inform primary 5G-L2-PS about Xp-U link status using PsPeerCtrl\_ScellMeasurementRep (see. 5G\_L2\_IF\_2118\_replaced([10979995](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Ve_Pfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) by setting IE xpLinkStatus to unavailable

---

**2.4.7.14.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11162593`)

Xp-U link status detection
ext-SCell deactivation

---

**2.4.7.14.0-3.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11162597`)

Xp-U link status detection
When Xp-U link unavailability is detected by ext-Scell 5G-L2-PS (according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_12816\_replaced([11122039](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcM5vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), ext-SCell 5G-L2-PS should trigger immediate SCell deactivation, irrespective of receiving request for deactivation from primary 5G-L2-PS, for every UE with that ext-SCell as described in 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_311\_replaced([11195870](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BfxrYfvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

SCell deactivation should be handled as PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeScheduleReq, with IE modifType set to deactivateExtScellXpLinkUnaval (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_656\_replaced([10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), was received.

PM counter: IGNB\_SCELL\_DEACT\_XPU\_LNK\_UUSBL shall be pegged, in ext-SCell 5G-L2-PS, for each ext-SCell deactivated as described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_12817\_replaced([11122057](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcM6vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

#### 2.4.7.14.0-4 Xp-U link status detection Xp-U link availability detection on ext-SCell 5G-L2-PS (ID: 11162602)

**2.4.7.14.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11162609`)

Xp-U link status detection
Notification to primary 5G-L2-PS

---

**2.4.7.14.0-4.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11162613`)

Xp-U link status detection
When Xp-U link availability is detected by ext-SCell 5G-L2-PS (according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_14019\_replaced([11122072](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcM7vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), ext-SCell 5G-L2-PS shall inform primary 5G-L2-PS about Xp-U link status using PsPeerCtrl\_ScellMeasurementRep (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2118\_replaced([10979995](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Ve_Pfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) by setting IE xpLinkStatus to available.

---

#### 2.4.7.14.0-5 Xp-U link status detection Xp-U link unavailability detection on primary 5G-L2-PS (ID: 11162619)

**2.4.7.14.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11162625`)

Xp-U link status detection
Notification to primary CP-RT

---

**2.4.7.14.0-5.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11162629`)

Xp-U link status detection
When:

* primary 5G-L2-PS change Xp-U link status to unavailable by himself (as described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_12815\_replaced([11122016](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcM4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or
* receives indication from ext-SCell 5G-L2-PS in PsPeerCtrl\_ScellMeasurementRep with IE xpLinkStatus set to unavailable (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2118\_replaced([10979995](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Ve_Pfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

then primary 5G-L2-PS shall indicate status change to primary CP-RT using PsCell\_IgnbXpLinkStatusInd (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2853\_replaced([10973713](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U3UIPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) by setting IE xpLinkStatus to unavailable.

---

**2.4.7.14.0-5.0-2**  (ID: `12689384`)

Xp-U link status detection
Ext-SCell deactivation or DL&UL SCell scheduling suspend

---

**2.4.7.14.0-5.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12689385`)

Xp-U link status detection
When:

* at least one inter-gNB ext-SCell is established for related PCell (see [11316764](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tr-8JfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) or [11224644](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tlrf0PvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and no intra-gNB DL&UL SCell is established for any UE, and,
* Xp-U link unavailability is detected (see [11162563](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Au5k4PvNEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),

then PCell’s 5G-L2-PS instance shall:

* deactivate ext-SCell by sending PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingReq (see [10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to the ext-SCell with modifType IE set to deactivateExtScellXpLinkUnaval (see [11159326](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_woHukPvMEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), if the margin threshold conditions from [11122016](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcM4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) are met.

When:

* at least one intra-gNB DL&UL SCell and at least one inter-gNB ext-SCell is established for related PCell (see [11316764](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tr-8JfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) or [11224644](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tlrf0PvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and,
* fr1UlCaPreferred IE was received from 5G-CP-RT in PsCell\_CellSetupReq (see [10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) or PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq (see [10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) during cell setup or cell reconfiguration procedure, and,
* Xp-U link unavailability is detected (see [11162563](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Au5k4PvNEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),

then PCell’s 5G-L2-PS instance shall:

* if fr1UlCaPreferred is equal to dataRatePreferred, then:
* if margin threshold condition (see [11122016](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcM4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) allows for inter-gNB CA without intra-gNB UL CA, then:
  + suspend UL scheduling at intra-gNB DL&UL SCell by sending PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingReq (see [10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to the SCell with modifType IE set to suspend,
* else if margin threshold condition (see [11122016](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcM4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) allows for intra-gNB UL CA without inter-gNB CA, then:
  + deactivate ext-SCell by sending PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingReq (see [10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to the ext-SCell with modifType IE set to deactivateExtScellXpLinkUnaval (see [11159326](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_woHukPvMEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and,
  + resume scheduling at intra-gNB DL&UL SCell by sending PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingReq (see [10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to the SCell with modifType IE set to resume,
* else if fr1UlCaPreferred is equal to ulCaPreferred, then deactivate ext-SCell (see [11159326](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_woHukPvMEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), following the margin threshold conditions from [11122016](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcM4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

---

**2.4.7.14.0-5.0-3**  (ID: `13425580`)

Xp-U link status detection
SCell release triggers ext-SCell reactivation or UL SCell resume

---

**2.4.7.14.0-5.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `13425583`)

Xp-U link status detection
When:  
•   a PCell receives SCell release trigger for intra-gNB DL&UL SCell from 5G-CP-RT as per reception of PsUser\_UserModifyReq with updated SCell(s) configuration (see [11182255](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Beq4IPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ), [10976067](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VEvgfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ) and [11160050](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25VJxfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and,  
•   fr1UlCaPreferred is equal to ulCaPreferred, and,  
•   UE’s ext-SCell(s) is(are) already deactivated due to Xp-U link unavailability detected before (see [11162563](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25gv9vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),  
then PCell’s 5G-L2-PS instance shall:  
•   reactivate the ext-SCell(s) by sending PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingReq (see [10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to ext-SCell(s) with modifType IE set to start (see [11158950](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25N1B_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), regardless of the margin threshold conditions (see [11122072](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcM7vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

When:  
•  a PCell receives ext-SCell release trigger for the last UE’s ext-SCell from 5G-CP-RT as per reception of PsUser\_UserModifyReq with updated SCell(s) configuration (see [11182255](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Beq4IPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ), [10976067](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VEvgfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ) and [11160050](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25VJxfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and,  
•   fr1UlCaPreferred is equal to dataRatePreferred, and,  
•   UE’s intra-SCell is already suspended due to Xp-U link unavailability detected before (see [11162563](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25gv9vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),  
then PCell’s 5G-L2-PS instance shall:  
•   resume UL scheduling at the intra-gNB DL&UL SCell by sending PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingReq (see [10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to the SCell with modifType IE set to resume, regardless of the margin threshold conditions (see [11122072](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcM7vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

#### 2.4.7.14.0-6 Xp-U link status detection Xp-U link availability detection on primary 5G-L2-PS (ID: 11162635)

**2.4.7.14.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11162642`)

Xp-U link status detection
Notification to primary CP-RT

---

**2.4.7.14.0-6.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11162647`)

Xp-U link status detection
When:

* primary 5G-L2-PS change Xp-U link status to available by himself (as described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_14019\_replaced([11122072](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcM7vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or
* receives indication from ext-SCell 5G-L2-PS in PsPeerCtrl\_ScellMeasurementRep with IE xpLinkStatus set to available (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2118\_replaced([10979995](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Ve_Pfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

then primary 5G-L2-PS shall indicate status change to primary CP-RT using PsCell\_IgnbXpLinkStatusInd (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2853\_replaced([10973713](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U3UIPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) by setting IE xpLinkStatus to available.

---

**2.4.7.14.0-6.0-2**  (ID: `12689386`)

Xp-U link status detection
Ext-SCell reactivation or scheduling resume in DL&UL SCell

---

**2.4.7.14.0-6.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12689388`)

Xp-U link status detection
When:

* at least one inter-gNB ext-SCell is established for related PCell (see [11316764](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tr-8JfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) or [11224644](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tlrf0PvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and no intra-gNB DL&UL SCell is established for any UE, and,
* Xp-U link availability is detected (see [11162563](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Au5k4PvNEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),

then PCell’s 5G-L2-PS instance shall:

* reactivate ext-SCell by sending PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingReq (see [10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to the ext-SCell with modifType IE set to start (see [11158950](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25N1B_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), if the margin threshold conditions from [11122072](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcM7vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) are met.

When:

* at least one intra-gNB DL&UL SCell or inter-gNB ext-SCell is deactivated or suspended for related PCell (see [11122016](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcM4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), and,
* fr1UlCaPreferred IE was received from 5G-CP-RT in PsCell\_CellSetupReq (see [10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) or PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq (see [10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) during cell setup or cell reconfiguration procedure, and,
* Xp-U link availability is detected (see [11162563](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Au5k4PvNEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or time margin recovery is detected,

then PCell’s 5G-L2-PS instance shall:

* if fr1UlCaPreferred is equal to dataRatePreferred, then:
* if margin threshold condition (see [11122072](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcM7vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) allows for inter-gNB CA without intra-gNB UL CA, then:
  + reactivate ext-SCell by sending PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingReq (see [10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to the ext-SCell with modifType IE set to start (see [11158950](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25N1B_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), if the margin threshold conditions are met,
  + suspend UL scheduling at intra-gNB DL&UL SCell by sending PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingReq (see [10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to the SCell with modifType IE set to suspend,
* else if margin threshold condition (see [11122072](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcM7vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) allows for intra-gNB UL CA and inter-gNB CA coexistence, then:
  + if intra-gNB DL&UL SCell is suspended, then resume UL scheduling at this SCell by sending PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingReq (see [10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to the SCell with modifType IE set to resume, and,
  + continue inter-gNB DL ext-SCell transmission,
* else if fr1UlCaPreferred is equal to ulCaPreferred, then reactivate ext-SCell (see [11158950](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25N1B_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), following the margin threshold conditions from [11122072](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcM7vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

---

### 2.4.7.15 One Shot or step-wise SCell Addition or Upgrade

#### 2.4.7.15.1 Buffer status monitoring

##### 2.4.7.15.1.0-1 Buffer status monitoring Starting DL and/or UL buffer status monitoring (ID: 11162664)

**2.4.7.15.1.0-1.0-6**  (ID: `13241850`)

Buffer status monitoring
When 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_BufferMonitoringInd ([10978152](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VRj0Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) for UE with activate-dl OR activate-ul OR activate-dlAndul.

The following step are for starting buffer status monitoring process:

1. Update UE's bufferMonitoring status, save dlSCellConfigLevel and dlSCellConfigLevelNum at DL AND/OR [note 3]  ulSCellConfigLevel and ulSCellConfigLevelNum at UL to UE database.
2. If UE is nonCA UE without SCell configured, add UE into UE distribution table for CPU cycles balance. Check [note 2].
3. If UE was not switched to power saving BWP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1872\_replaced([11111200](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpLBnfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), **according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15831\_replaced([11120403](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqQmtvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) Start periodic bufferMonitoring checking, for CA UE with already configured SCells UE, it should not be in overheating and its all 'can be activated' SCell should be active.**
4. Start PCell radio link quality monitoring (see 5G\_L2\_13084\_replaced([11162802](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilIfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) - in 5G-L2-PS DL, if DL Buffer monitoring is activated.
5. UE was switched out of power saving BWP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1870\_replaced([11111163](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpLBlPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), if P(S)Cell 5G-L2-PS has stored information for starting buffer status monitoring process.
6. [CB014587-B] If the startDlPathloss parameter is present and set to TRUE in the message, 5G-L2-PS shall start recording or re-evaluate the DL pathloss reference for UE:
7. For bufferMonitoring set to "activate-dl": according to requirement [13241439](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Hn3aIcDFEfCnuMJFWtMTpQ) [End CB014587-B]
8. [CB014587-C] For bufferMonitoring set to "activate-ul" or "activate-dlAndul": according to requirement [13250994](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_7kJ-AcVhEfCnuMJFWtMTpQ). [End CB014587-C]
9. [CB014587-B]If the request is received when the respective buffer monitoring is already running, the 5G-L2-PS shall ignore the request about DL/UL buffer monitoring activation, but the 5G-L2-PS shall restart DL pathloss reference recording if startDlPathloss parameter is present and set to TRUE in the message. [End CB014587-B]

[Before  CB014587-B]

**Note:**

1. If the request is received when the respective monitoring is already running, the request shall be ignored.[End CB014587-B]
2. In UL Buffer monitoring case : As indicated in [12526004](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_bZZD6hrBEfC3upM2pE5-4w?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9): If any of the bearers of an LCG is CA eligible ([10974876](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U-o4vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) i.e ulCaEligible=TRUE) only then BSR of that LCG will be considered for UL non-GBR buffer monitoring. If UE does not have any CA eligible bearer configured -[Before CB014587-B]there is no need to [CB014587-B]5G-L2-PS shall not [End CB014587-B] trigger UL non-GBR buffer monitoring for this UE.
3. When PsUser\_BufferMonitoringInd : If bufferMonitoring IE = activate-dlAndul, It is to request activation of both DL and UL buffer monitoring

---

##### 2.4.7.15.1.0-2 Buffer status monitoring Conditions to trigger User Buffer Criterion Indication (ID: 11162694)

**2.4.7.15.1.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `12812059`)

Buffer status monitoring
5G-L2-PS shall trigger the transmission of User Buffer Criterion Indication (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_4540\_replaced([10978197](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VRj2vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_L2\_10994\_replaced([11146126](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24D-cfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for the given user, when all of the following conditions are passed:

[CB010741-A] For DL cases : [ End CB010741-A]

1. DL Buffer overflow criterion for SCell Addition (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15838\_replaced([11120516](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqR00fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
2. For DL 5G-L2-PS : PCell radio link quality checks (see 5G\_L2\_13090\_replaced([11162839](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilJ_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[CB010741-A]

For UL cases :

1. UL Buffer overflow criterion for SCell Addition is met ([12639251: Evaluation of Buffer Status for SCell Configuration in UL Branch](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Qc0akEC-EfCal_QUJn4xrg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))

[ End CB010741-A]

---

##### 2.4.7.15.1.0-3 Buffer status monitoring Stopping DL/UL buffer status monitoring (ID: 11162704)

**2.4.7.15.1.0-3.0-5**  (ID: `12812072`)

Buffer status monitoring
5G-L2-PS shall stop buffer monitoring and remove UeID from UE distribution table for the given UE if any of the following conditions are met:

1, After 5G-L2-PS determines that the conditions to trigger User Buffer Criterion Indication were met, as specified in 5G\_L2\_13101\_replaced([11162694](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25hXDvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Remove UeID from UE distribution table only if the UE is a nonCA UE with no SCell configured.

2, When gNB-DU U-Plane  is requested by gNB-DU C-Plane  to stop monitoring of all DL non-GBR CA eligible DRBs buffer status [CB010741-A] 5G-L2-PS DL shall [End CB010741-A] remove UeID from UE distribution table only if the UE is a nonCA UE with no SCell configured.

3, Upon reception of the PsUser\_UserDeleteReq message and the request message is valid.

4, If a CA UE in PCell is informed to release its last SCell so that the UE is changed into a non-CA UE according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29511\_replaced([11120477](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqRNyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [CB010741-A] for DL and [12639256](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tr4lUEDDEfCal_QUJn4xrg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) for UL cases [End CB010741-A]

5G-L2-PS shall stop buffer monitoring and does not remove UeID from UE distribution table for the given UE if the UE was switched to power saving BWP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1872\_replaced([11111200](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpLBnfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

**Note 1: If the request [CB010741-A] to stop DL monitoring [End CB010741-A] from gNB-DU C-Plane is received when the respective monitoring is not running, the request shall be ignored [CB010741-A] by 5G-L2-PS DL. [End CB010741-A]**

**Note 2: When buffer status monitoring is stopped, 5G-L2-PS [CB010741-A] DL [End CB010741-A] shall also stop PCell radio link quality monitoring for SCell Addition, as specified in 5G\_L2\_13084\_replaced([11162802](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilIfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

**Note3: 'Stop buffer monitoring' in this requirement is not temporary stop as 5G\_L2\_21169\_replaced([11162784](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25h-HfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [CB010741-A]  Stop buffer monitoring from CPRT is not applicable for UL buffer monitoring [End CB010741-A]**

---

##### 2.4.7.15.1.0-4 Buffer status monitoring DL/UL buffer criterion for SCell Configuration is met (ID: 11162737)

**2.4.7.15.1.0-4.0-5**  (ID: `13246053`)

Buffer status monitoring
When 5G-L2-PS determines that the conditions to trigger User Buffer Criterion Indication for either DL or UL have been met, as specified in 5G\_5G\_L2\_13101([11162694](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25hXDvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the following procedure shall be applied based on the specific data direction (DL or UL):

1. 5G-L2-PS stops buffer monitoring for SCell Addition for the corresponding data direction (DL or UL) and if the UE is a nonCA UE with no SCell configured, 5G-L2-PS shall remove UeID from UE distribution table.
2. Applicable only for DL: 5G-L2-PS DL shall stop PCell radio link quality monitoring (see 5G\_L2\_13084 ([11162802](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilIfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
3. [CB014587-B]5G-L2-PS shall evaluate the DL pathloss difference according to the procedure:
4. For DL Buffer Criterion Indication as specified in [13241441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_qYi44MDHEfCnuMJFWtMTpQ).
5. [CB014587-C] For UL Buffer Criterion Indication as specified in [13250983](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_SbaUgMVgEfCnuMJFWtMTpQ).[End CB014587-C]
6. If the evaluation is successful for DL[CB014587-C]/UL[End CB014587-C] Buffer Criterion Indication, 5G-L2-PS shall include the dlPathlossDiff in PsUser\_BufferCriterionInd message ([10978197](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VRj2vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).[End CB014587-B]
7. If an updated value of requiredPowerPerPRB is available at UL, then UL shall send this value to CPRT via the PsUser\_BufferCriterionInd message content ([10978239](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VSK4_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).
8. 5G-L2-PS sends DL or UL buffer overflow notification ([10978239](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VSK4_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) to gNB-DU C-Plane and shall indicate in the bufferCriterion parameter which data direction's (DL or UL) buffer limit[Before CB014587-B]s were[CB014587-B]was[End CB014587-B] reached.
9. 5G-L2-PS shall set UE's corresponding DL or UL bufferMonitoring status to [Before CB014587-B]deactive[CB014587-B]deactivated[End CB014587-B], and shall clean up internal counter.

---

##### 2.4.7.15.1.0-5 Buffer status monitoring Suspend DL/UL buffer status monitoring (ID: 11162761)

**2.4.7.15.1.0-5.0-2**  (ID: `12812960`)

Buffer status monitoring
When 5G L2-PS detects the CPU core which the DL [CB010741-A] /UL [End CB010741-A] scheduler running on is in high load status as described in 5G\_L2\_19967\_replaced([11213414](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-sK4PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))[CB013709-CB] if extended CA countermeasures are disabled as per [12551499: Countermeasures for CA](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_o9NFcCRJEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), or otherwise according to [11120462: Suspend/Resume DL and UL Buffer Status monitoring](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqRNxPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), if on the core , any DL/UL scheduler is overload as [11120584: CA Relationship management for FR1 due to scheduler processing overload](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqSb4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ), or the core is overload as [11122225: Core level scheduler processing load status determination for CA activation decision](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)[End CB013709-CB], L2-PS shall suspend DL [CB010741-A] /UL [End CB010741-A] buffer status monitoring with following actions if it's running[PR873300]and it is on the scheduler which shall implement the suspension as per [11120462: Suspend/Resume DL and UL Buffer Status monitoring](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqRNxPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)[End PR873300]:

[CB010741-A] When DL buffer status monitoring being suspended: [End CB010741-A]

* Keep UE's status in database;
* Keep UE in UE distribution table;
* Suspend buffer check for Scell addition;
* Suspend PCell radio link quality monitoring;
* If the [Before CB010741-A] PsUser\_UserDlBufferMonitoringInd [CB010741-A] PsUser\_BufferMonitoringInd [End CB010741-A] with start buffer status monitoring was received. The request shall be ignored as described in 5G\_L2\_11062\_replaced([11162664](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25hXCfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));
* If the [Before CB010741-A] PsUser\_UserDlBufferMonitoringInd [CB010741-A] PsUser\_BufferMonitoringInd [End CB010741-A] with stop buffer status monitoring was received. It shall follow the procedure of stop buffer status monitoring as described in 5G\_L2\_11063\_replaced([11162704](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25h-EPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

[CB010741-A] When UL buffer status monitoring being suspended:

* Keep UE's status in database;
* Keep UE in UE distribution table;
* Suspend buffer check for Scell addition;
* If the PsUser\_UserBufferMonitoringInd with start buffer status monitoring was received. The request shall be ignored as described in 5G\_L2\_11062\_replaced([11162664](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25hXCfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

[End CB010741-A]

---

##### 2.4.7.15.1.0-6 Buffer status monitoring Resume DL/UL buffer status monitoring (ID: 11162772)

**2.4.7.15.1.0-6.0-2**  (ID: `12813463`)

Buffer status monitoring
When 5G L2-PS detects the CPU core which the DL [CB010741-A] / UL [End CB010741-A] scheduler running on getting recovered from high load status as described in 5G\_L2\_19967\_replaced([11213414](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-sK4PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and DL [CB010741-A] / UL [End CB010741-A] buffer status monitoring is still in suspending state, then L2-PS shall resume DL [CB010741-A] / UL [End CB010741-A] buffer status monitoring with following actions:

* Start buffer check for Scell addition;
* [CB010741-A] At DL (Note 1), [End CB010741-A] Start PCell radio link quality monitoring;

Note 1: Radio link quality monitoring is not connected with UL Buffer monitoring

---

##### 2.4.7.15.1.0-7 Buffer status monitoring Stop and restart DL buffer monitoring temporarily due to UE's condition change in L2 (ID: 11162784)

**2.4.7.15.1.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `11162790`)

Buffer status monitoring
According to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15831\_replaced([11120403](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqQmtvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), when PsUser\_DlBufferMonitoringInd informs L2PS start DL buffer monitoring for a UE's SCell addition, the DL buffer monitoring for SCell addition can be stopped temporarily and restarted if the UE's status change or UE's SCell status change. When the buffer monitoring for SCell addition is stopped internally, the buffer check counter should be reset.

---

##### 2.4.7.15.1.0-8 Buffer status monitoring Initialization of Reference DL Pathloss for DL Buffer Monitoring for SCell Configuration (ID: 13241439)

**2.4.7.15.1.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `13241440`)

Buffer status monitoring
When 5G-L2-PS DL receives the PsUser\_BufferMonitoringInd ([10978152](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VRj0Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) message for a UE on the FR1 PCell with the following parameters:

1. The bufferMonitoring parameter is set to "activate-dl",
2. the startDlPathloss parameter is set to TRUE,
3. and 5G-L2-PS DL received valid (greater than or equal to 0) DL pathloss value in the phrPathlossData structure from the PsInternal\_UlToDlIntraSchedUpdate ([11242413](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3BqmbfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) message:

Then, as per [12774706](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_T4Ns4YrMEfCrqOdGJPoCRA), 5G-L2-PS DL shall set this DL pathloss to the referenceDlPathloss parameter in the common UE context, overriding any existing value. Otherwise, 5G-L2-PS DL shall set the referenceDlPathloss parameter to -1 (invalid).

---

##### 2.4.7.15.1.0-9 Buffer status monitoring Initialization of Reference DL Pathloss for UL or DL&amp;UL Buffer Monitoring for SCell Configuration (ID: 13250994)

**2.4.7.15.1.0-9.0-1**  (ID: `13251001`)

Buffer status monitoring
When 5G-L2-PS UL receives the PsUser\_BufferMonitoringInd ([10978152](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VRj0Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) message for a UE on the FR1 PCell with the following parameters:

1. The bufferMonitoring parameter is set to "activate-ul" or "activate-dlAndul",
2. and the startDlPathloss parameter is set to TRUE,
3. and latest DL pathloss, calculated based on the last valid PHR for the PCell, is valid (greater than or equal to 0):

Then, as per [12774706](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_T4Ns4YrMEfCrqOdGJPoCRA), 5G-L2-PS UL shall use this DL pathloss to set the referenceDlPathloss parameter in the common UE context, overriding any existing value. Otherwise, 5G-L2-PS UL shall set the referenceDlPathloss parameter to -1 (invalid).

---

##### 2.4.7.15.1.0-10 Buffer status monitoring Evaluation of DL Pathloss Difference when DL Buffer Criterion for SCell Configuration is Met (ID: 13241441)

**2.4.7.15.1.0-10.0-1**  (ID: `13245964`)

Buffer status monitoring
When following conditions are fulfilled:

1. the DL buffer overflow criterion for SCell Configuration is met for UE ([11162694](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25hXDvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),
2. and the referenceDlPathloss value in common UE context is valid (greater than or equal to 0),
3. and 5G-L2-PS DL received valid (greater than or equal to 0) DL pathloss value in the phrPathlossData structure from the PsInternal\_UlToDlIntraSchedUpdate ([11242413](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3BqmbfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) message:

Then, as per [12739482](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_KDZqsHlDEfCiUemk-K-C4g), 5G-L2-PS DL shall perform the pathloss difference evaluation as follows:

1. Determine criteria-met pathloss:
2. 5G-L2-PS DL shall set the temporary criteriaMetDlPathloss parameter with the DL pathloss value.
3. Calculate and report pathloss difference:
4. 5G-L2-PS DL shall calculate the dlPathlossDiff as the criteriaMetDlPathloss minus the referenceDlPathloss.
5. 5G-L2-PS DL shall round the calculated dlPathlossDiff to the nearest integer.
6. 5G-L2-PS DL shall clip the rounded dlPathlossDiff to the range of -127 dB to 127 dB. Values above 127 dB shall be set to 127 dB, and values below -127 dB shall be set to -127 dB.
7. 5G-L2-PS DL shall include the calculated dlPathlossDiff in the PsUser\_BufferCriterionInd ([10978197](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VRj2vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) message.

Otherwise, 5G-L2-PS DL shall not include the dlPathlossDiff in the PsUser\_BufferCriterionInd ([10978197](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VRj2vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) message.

---

##### 2.4.7.15.1.0-11 Buffer status monitoring Evaluation of DL Pathloss Difference when UL Buffer Criterion for SCell Configuration is Met (ID: 13250983)

**2.4.7.15.1.0-11.0-1**  (ID: `13250992`)

Buffer status monitoring
When following conditions are fulfilled:

1. the UL buffer overflow criterion for SCell Configuration ([11162694](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25hXDvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is met for UE,
2. and the referenceDlPathloss value in common UE context is valid (greater than or equal to 0),
3. and latest DL pathloss, calculated based on the last valid PHR for the PCell, is valid (greater than or equal to 0):

Then, as per [12765367](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NATSkYUpEfCOGMMH109ICw), 5G-L2-PS UL shall perform the pathloss difference evaluation as follows:

1. Determine criteria-met pathloss:
2. 5G-L2-PS UL shall set the temporary criteriaMetDlPathloss parameter with the latest DL pathloss value.
3. Calculate and report pathloss difference:
4. 5G-L2-PS UL shall calculate the dlPathlossDiff as the criteriaMetDlPathloss minus the referenceDlPathloss.
5. 5G-L2-PS UL shall round the calculated dlPathlossDiff to the nearest integer.
6. 5G-L2-PS UL shall clip the rounded dlPathlossDiff to the range of -127 dB to 127 dB. Values above 127 dB shall be set to 127 dB, and values below -127 dB shall be set to -127 dB.
7. 5G-L2-PS UL shall include the calculated dlPathlossDiff in the PsUser\_BufferCriterionInd ([10978197](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VRj2vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) message.

Otherwise, 5G-L2-PS UL shall not include the dlPathlossDiff in the PsUser\_BufferCriterionInd ([10978197](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VRj2vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) message.

---

#### 2.4.7.15.2 PCell radio link quality checks for SCell Addition

##### 2.4.7.15.2.0-1 PCell radio link quality checks for SCell Addition PCell radio link quality monitoring for SCell Addition (ID: 11162802)

**2.4.7.15.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11162807`)

PCell radio link quality checks for SCell Addition
When buffer status monitoring is active (see 5G\_L2\_11062\_replaced([11162664](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25hXCfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall monitor:

* PCell CQI, as specified in 5G\_L2\_13086\_replaced([11162814](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilI_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),
* PCell UL SINR, as specified in 5G\_L2\_13088\_replaced([11162826](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilJfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.7.15.2.0-2 PCell radio link quality checks for SCell Addition PCell CQI monitoring for SCell Addition (ID: 11162814)

**2.4.7.15.2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11162821`)

PCell radio link quality checks for SCell Addition
For each UE with valid rrmCorrAvgCqi (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7557\_replaced([11125689](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqvu6fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall monitor:

* timeWithGoodCqi\_mSec - time during which rrmCorrAvgCqi is greater than or equal to dlCaMinPcellCqi (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_5193\_replaced([10969647](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Udrjfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))),
* timeWithGoodCqi5qi1\_mSec - time during which rrmCorrAvgCqi is greater than or equal to dlCaMinPcellCqi5qi1 (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_5193\_replaced([10969647](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Udrjfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

##### 2.4.7.15.2.0-3 PCell radio link quality checks for SCell Addition PCell UL SINR monitoring for SCell Addition (ID: 11162826)

**2.4.7.15.2.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11162832`)

PCell radio link quality checks for SCell Addition
For each UE with valid rrmCorrAvgSinr (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3087\_replaced([11130243](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq_mhPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall monitor:

* timeWithGoodSinr\_mSec - time during which rrmCorrAvgSinrUl is greater than or equal to ulCaMinPcellSinr (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_5193\_replaced([10969647](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Udrjfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))),
* timeWithGoodSinr5qi1\_mSec - time during which rrmCorrAvgSinrUl is greater than or equal to ulCaMinPcellSinr5qi1 (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_5193\_replaced([10969647](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Udrjfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

##### 2.4.7.15.2.0-4 PCell radio link quality checks for SCell Addition (ID: 11162839)

**2.4.7.15.2.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11162846`)

PCell radio link quality checks for SCell Addition
When DL Buffer overflow criterion for SCell Addition (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15838\_replaced([11120516](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqR00fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is passed, 5G-L2-PS shall perform:

1. PCell CQI check for SCell Addition, as specified in 5G\_L2\_13092\_replaced([11162850](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilKfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_L2\_13096\_replaced([11162881](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilLfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
2. PCell UL SINR check for SCell Addition, as specified in 5G\_L2\_13094\_replaced([11162866](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilK_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_L2\_13096\_replaced([11162881](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilLfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

When both PCell radio link quality checks are passed, 5G-L2-PS shall move forward with the SCell Addition procedure.

If any of the PCell radio link quality checks was configured to be skipped, as specified in 5G\_L2\_13098\_replaced([11162897](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25jMMPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G-L2-PS shall consider this check passed immediately.

Rationale: When the PCell radio link quality checks are configured, UEs with unsatisfying radio conditions shall not be considered as Carrier Aggregation candidates. As a result, other UEs with better radio conditions can take advantage of the additional resources.

CP2 Reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22735\_replaced([11120536](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqR01vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

##### 2.4.7.15.2.0-5 PCell radio link quality checks for SCell Addition PCell CQI check for SCell Addition (ID: 11162850)

**2.4.7.15.2.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11162862`)

PCell radio link quality checks for SCell Addition
5G-L2-PS shall consider the PCell CQI check for SCell Addition passed if timeWithGoodCqi\_mSec (see 5G\_L2\_13086\_replaced([11162814](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilI_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is greater than or equal to dlCaCqiWindow (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_5193\_replaced([10969647](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Udrjfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a diagram illustrating a "PCell CQI check". The diagram shows a graph with time on the x-axis and a CQI value on the y-axis. A horizontal dotted blue line represents a threshold labeled "dlCaMinPcellCqi". A gray line represents the measured CQI over time.
Initially, the CQI is below the threshold. At a certain point, the CQI rises above the threshold. A blue diamond marker indicates the point where the PCell CQI exceeds the defined threshold, and a text box below it states: "PCell CQI exceeds defined threshold (The message transmission is still not allowed)".
A shaded region labeled "dlCaCqiWindow" spans a period of time where the CQI is above the threshold. A blue circle marker is placed at the end of this window. A text box below this marker reads: "PCell CQI check passed (CQI above threshold for defined time period)". The x-axis is labeled "time [mSec]".[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3263.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

File: 5G\_L2\_13092\_replaced([11162850](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilKfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),5G\_L2\_13094\_replaced([11162866](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilK_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).pptx

Folder: <https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:f:/r/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Drawings%20and%20diagrams%20for%205G/User%20Plane/5G%20L2%20Entity%20Level/2%205G-L2-PS%20Component%20Requirements/2.4%20Algorithm/7.%20Carrier%20Aggregation%20Control/16.%20One%20Shot%20SCell%20Addition>

##### 2.4.7.15.2.0-6 PCell radio link quality checks for SCell Addition PCell UL SINR check for SCell Addition (ID: 11162866)

**2.4.7.15.2.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11162876`)

PCell radio link quality checks for SCell Addition
5G-L2-PS shall consider the PCell UL SINR check for SCell Addition passed if timeWithGoodSinr\_mSec (see 5G\_L2\_13088\_replaced([11162826](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilJfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is greater than or equal to ulCaSinrWindow (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_5193\_replaced([10969647](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Udrjfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a graph illustrating a "PCell UL SINR check". The x-axis represents time in milliseconds, and the y-axis implicitly represents the SINR (Signal-to-Interference-plus-Noise Ratio). A grey line plots the SINR over time. A dotted blue line labeled "ulCaMinPcellSinr" indicates a minimum threshold.
The graph shows that initially, the SINR is below the threshold. At a certain point, marked by a blue diamond, the SINR exceeds the defined threshold. An arrow points to this diamond with the text "PCell UL SINR exceeds defined threshold (The message transmission is still not allowed)".
Further along the time axis, a shaded blue region indicates a window labeled "ulCaSinrWindow". Within this window, the SINR remains above the threshold. A blue circle marks the end of this window, and an arrow points to it with the text "PCell UL SINR check check passed (UL SINR above threshold for defined time period)".[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3265.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

File: 5G\_L2\_13092\_replaced([11162850](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilKfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),5G\_L2\_13094\_replaced([11162866](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilK_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).pptx

##### 2.4.7.15.2.0-7 PCell radio link quality checks for SCell Addition PCell radio link quality checks for UEs with an established 5QI1/QCI1 DRB (ID: 11162881)

**2.4.7.15.2.0-7.0-2**  (ID: `11162892`)

PCell radio link quality checks for SCell Addition
While performing PCell radio link quality checks (see 5G\_L2\_13090\_replaced([11162839](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilJ_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall check if the given UE has an established 5QI1[CB008118-A]/5QI65/5QI66[End CB008118-A]/QCI1 DRB.

5G-L2-PS shall access cell configuration parameter qosId:

* received within PsUser\_DrbModifyReq message content (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_4782\_replaced([10977913](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VPHn_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) - if the DRB was modified,
* or received within PsUser\_BearerSetupReq message content (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_496\_replaced([10977222](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VLdMvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_L2\_IF\_397\_replaced([10974876](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U-o4vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) - otherwise.

If for any DRB qosId IE was set to 1, 5G-L2-PS shall:

1. use timeWithGoodCqi5qi1\_mSec (see 5G\_L2\_13086\_replaced([11162814](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilI_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) instead of timeWithGoodCqi\_mSec during the PCell CQI check for SCell Addition specified in 5G\_L2\_13092\_replaced([11162850](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilKfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),
2. use timeWithGoodSinr5qi1\_mSec (see 5G\_L2\_13088\_replaced([11162826](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilJfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) instead of timeWithGoodSinr\_mSec during the PCell UL SINR check for SCell Addition specified in 5G\_L2\_13094\_replaced([11162866](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilK_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.7.15.2.0-8 PCell radio link quality checks for SCell Addition Skipping PCell radio link quality checks for SCell Addition (ID: 11162897)

**2.4.7.15.2.0-8.0-2**  (ID: `11162910`)

PCell radio link quality checks for SCell Addition
1. If pcellRadioLinkQualityChecks IE was not present in caConfig structure content (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_140\_replaced([10969601](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Udrh_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall skip the PCell radio link quality checks (see 5G\_L2\_13090\_replaced([11162839](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilJ_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and consider them passed.
2. If dlCaMinPcellCqi IE was set to 0 in pcellRadioLinkQualityChecks structure content (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_5193\_replaced([10969647](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Udrjfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall skip the PCell CQI check for UEs with no established [Before CB008118-A]5QI1/QCI1[CB008118-A] 5QI1/5QI65/5QI66/QCI1 [End CB008118-A] DRB (see 5G\_L2\_13092\_replaced([11162850](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilKfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and consider it passed.
3. If dlCaMinPcellCqi5qi1 IE was set to 0 in pcellRadioLinkQualityChecks structure content (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_5193\_replaced([10969647](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Udrjfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall skip the PCell CQI check for UEs with an established [Before CB008118-A]5QI1/QCI1[CB008118-A] 5QI1/5QI65/5QI66/QCI1 [End CB008118-A] DRB (see 5G\_L2\_13096\_replaced([11162881](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilLfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and consider it passed.
4. If ulCaMinPcellSinr IE was set to 0 in pcellRadioLinkQualityChecks structure content (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_5193\_replaced([10969647](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Udrjfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall skip the PCell UL SINR check for UEs with no established [Before CB008118-A] 5QI1/QCI1[CB008118-A] 5QI1/5QI65/5QI66/QCI1 [End CB008118-A] DRB (see 5G\_L2\_13094\_replaced([11162866](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilK_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and consider it passed.
5. If ulCaMinPcellSinr5qi1 IE set to 0 present in pcellRadioLinkQualityChecks structure content (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_5193\_replaced([10969647](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Udrjfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall skip the PCell UL SINR check for UEs with an established [Before CB008118-A] 5QI1/QCI1[CB008118-A] 5QI1/5QI65/5QI66/QCI1 [End CB008118-A] DRB (see 5G\_L2\_13096\_replaced([11162881](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilLfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and consider it passed.

---

### 2.4.7.16 SCell Release due to inactivity or SCell RLQ

#### 2.4.7.16.0-1 SCell Release due to inactivity or SCell RLQ SCell Inactivity Release Timer Start (ID: 11162921)

**2.4.7.16.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11162939`)

SCell Release due to inactivity or SCell RLQ
Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_18265\_replaced([11120682](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqTDAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If NRBTS/NRCELL.sCellInactivityReleaseTimer != infinity and UE is not in the TPenabled::SAG ON state(see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_18906\_replaced([11204759](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwlRLvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) , SCell 5G-L2-PS starts SCell Inactivity Release Timer For a given UE’s SCell:

Case1,  SCell addition and activation phase (refer to 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_290\_replaced([11195606](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Bfv2PfvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

if NRBTS.sCellActivationMethod != blind:

The SCell Inactivity Release Time starts in SCell DL 5G-L2-PS only after SCell PsUser\_UserSetupResp sent to 5G-CP-RT.

if NRBTS.sCellActivationMethod == blind and DL only SCell:

The SCell Inactivity Release Time starts in SCell DL 5G-L2-PS after PsPeerCtrl\_SCellUeSchedulingReq with Start is received by SCell 5G-L2-PS.

if NRBTS.sCellActivationMethod == blind and DL + UL SCell:

The SCell Inactivity Release Time starts in both SCell DL 5G-L2-PS and SCell UL 5G-L2-PS after PsPeerCtrl\_SCellUeSchedulingReq with Start is received by SCell 5G-L2-PS.

Case2,  NRBTS.NRCELL.sCellDeactivationTimerGNB != infinity(refer to 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_2938\_replaced([11183714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Beyz9fvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

The SCell Inactivity Release Time starts in SCell DL 5G-L2-PS after PsPeerCtrl\_SCellUeSchedulingReq with Deactivate is received by SCell 5G-L2-PS Or after PsPeerCtrl\_SCellUeSchedulingReq with sagOffNotification is received by SCell 5G-L2-PS and SCell is in deactivated state.

Case3,  NRBTS.NRCELL.sCellDeactivationTimerGNB == infinity:

if [PR767881] when gNB-DU does not receive from UE CSI report containing CQI = 0, and [End PR767881] DL scheduling of the UE in the DL only or DL+UL SCell is stopped, i.e. SCell’s buffer level for all DL non-GBR CA eligible DRBs reaches ‘0’ (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4561\_replaced([11186983](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvXwMvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

The SCell Inactivity Release Timer starts in SCell DL 5G-L2-PS (refer to 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_2939\_replaced([11183809](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BezbA_vREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

if [PR767881] when gNB-DU does not receive from UE CSI report containing CQI = 0, and [End PR767881] UL scheduling of the UE in the DL+UL SCell is stopped, i.e. BSR split from P(S)Cell UL 5G-L2-PS indicates a ‘0’ split for all non-GBR LCGs (5G\_UP\_ALG\_9496\_replaced([11122831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqgeXfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or once the uplink housekeeping buffer data rrmBufferedDataUlTotal\_bytes become ‘0’ (5G\_UP\_ALG\_5118\_replaced([11203660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwgYovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

The SCell Inactivity Release Timer starts in SCell UL 5G-L2-PS (refer to 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_2940\_replaced([11183904](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Be0CEvvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

if SCell is deactivated due to UE overheating (PsPeerCtrl\_SCellUeSchedulingReq with Deactivate is received.)

The SCell Inactivity Release Timer starts in SCell DL 5G-L2-PS only.

[PR767881]

if CQI in CSI report received by gNB-DU for the SCell is changed from CQI = 0 to CQI > 0:

The SCell Inactivity Release Timer starts in SCell DL 5G-L2-PS and, in case of DL+UL SCell, in SCell UL 5G-L2-PS

[End PR767881]

If NRBTS/NRCELL.sCellInactivityReleaseTimer == infinity, SCell 5G-L2-PS shall never start/stop the SCell Inactivity Release Timer and the SCell will be never released due to data inactivity

---

#### 2.4.7.16.0-2 SCell Release due to inactivity or SCell RLQ SCell Inactivity Release Timer Stop (ID: 11162945)

**2.4.7.16.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `11162964`)

SCell Release due to inactivity or SCell RLQ
Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_18265\_replaced([11120682](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqTDAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The SCell Inactivity Release Timer is stopped and cleared in SCell 5G-L2-PS in DL or UL branch at any of the following events:

Case1,  NRBTS.NRCELL.sCellDeactivationTimerGNB != infinity(refer to 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_2938\_replaced([11183714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Beyz9fvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

The SCell Inactivity Release Timer stops in SCell DL 5G-L2-PS after PsPeerCtrl\_SCellUeSchedulingReq with Start is received by SCell 5G-L2-PS Or after PsPeerCtrl\_SCellUeSchedulingReq with sagOnNotification is received by SCell 5G-L2-PS.

Exception:  if NRBTS.sCellActivationMethod = blind and SCell in SCell addition phase, The SCell Inactivity Release Time keep running.

Case3,  NRBTS.NRCELL.sCellDeactivationTimerGNB == infinity:

1,  if DL scheduling of UE in the (DL only or DL+UL) SCell is started, i.e. SCell’s buffer level for all DL non-GBR CA eligible DRBs becomes greater than ‘0’ (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4561\_replaced([11186983](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvXwMvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

The SCell Inactivity Release Timer is stopped in SCell DL 5G-L2-PS(refer to 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_2939\_replaced([11183809](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BezbA_vREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

2,  if UL scheduling of the UE in the DL+UL SCell is started, i.e. BSR split from P(S)Cell UL 5G-L2-PS indicates a buffer size greater than ‘0’ for all non-GBR LCGs (5G\_UP\_ALG\_9496\_replaced([11122831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqgeXfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

The SCell Inactivity Release Timer stops in SCell UL 5G-L2-PS(refer to 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_2940\_replaced([11183904](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Be0CEvvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

3, The SCell Inactivity Release Timer stops in SCell DL 5G-L2-PS after PsPeerCtrl\_SCellUeSchedulingReq with Start is received by SCell 5G-L2-PS.

4. The SCell Inactivity Release Timer stops in SCell DL 5G-L2-PS after PsPeerCtrl\_SCellUeSchedulingReq with sagOnNotification is received by SCell 5G-L2-PS.

[PR767881]

5.  The SCell Inactivity Release Timer stops in SCell DL 5G-L2-PS and in case of DL+UL SCell, in SCell UL 5G-L2-PS when gNB-DU receives from UE CSI report containing CQI = 0 for the SCell.

[End PR767881]

Exception:  if NRBTS.sCellActivationMethod = blind and SCell in SCell addition phase, The SCell Inactivity Release Time keep running.

---

#### 2.4.7.16.0-3 SCell Release due to inactivity or SCell RLQ SCell Inactivity Release Timer Expiration (ID: 11162969)

**2.4.7.16.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11162976`)

SCell Release due to inactivity or SCell RLQ
Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_18265\_replaced([11120682](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqTDAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The SCell Inactivity Release Timer is considered as expired at any of the following events:

1. If the SCell Inactivity Release Timer running only in SCell DL 5G-L2-PS expires, SCell DL 5G-L2-PS reports it to P(S)Cell 5G-L2-PS(refer to 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_2938\_replaced([11183714](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Beyz9fvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

2. If the SCell Inactivity Release Timer running in SCell DL 5G-L2-PS and SCell UL 5G-L2-PS(refer to 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_2940\_replaced([11183904](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Be0CEvvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

a.  when timer is expired in uplink branch, SCell UL 5G-L2-PS will notify the SCell Inactivity Release Timer expiration to SCell DL 5G-L2-PS

b. in case SCell DL 5G-L2-PS received the uplink SCell Inactivity Release Timer expiration notification, SCell DL 5G-L2-PS checks whether downlink SCell Inactivity Release Timer is expired or not:

if yes, SCell DL 5G-L2-PS reports it to P(S)Cell – for details see description in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_18266\_replaced([11120707](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqTDBfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

if no, SCell DL 5G-L2-PS waits for downlink SCell Inactivity Release Timer expiration.

---

#### 2.4.7.16.0-4 SCell Release due to inactivity or SCell RLQ Indication of expiration of SCell Inactivity Release Timer to C-Plane (ID: 11162982)

**2.4.7.16.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11162988`)

SCell Release due to inactivity or SCell RLQ
Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_18266\_replaced([11120707](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqTDBfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If the SCell Inactivity Release Timer is considered as expired (see point III in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_18265\_replaced([11120682](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqTDAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), SCell DL 5G-L2-PS shall report it to P(S)Cell 5G-L2-PS.

Then, [CB008311-E] PCell DL 5G-L2-PS shall check if NRBTS.actSCellReleaseForInactiveSCell is set to any value other than ‘disabled’ [End CB008311-E], P(S)Cell 5G-L2-PS will indicate expiration of the SCell Inactivity Release Timer to gNB-DU C-Plane via PsUser\_SCellReleaseConditionMetInd with the sCellIndex and the SCell Inactive Reason.

PCell 5G-L2-PS selects the SCell Inactivity Reason as follows:

1, For DL only SCell:

If number of configured DL SCells > AllowedNoOfActSCellsDL:

then SCell Inactive Reason = 'ue-overheating'

else  SCell Inactive Reason = ‘inactivity-timer’

2, For DL＋UL SCell:

if (number of configured DL SCells > AllowedNoOfActSCellsDL) || (number of configured UL SCells > AllowedNoOfActSCellsUL) :

then SCell Inactive Reason = 'ue-overheating'

else  SCell Inactive Reason = ‘inactivity-timer’

---

#### 2.4.7.16.0-5 SCell Release due to inactivity or SCell RLQ Concurrency handling of different reasons triggering SCell Release (ID: 11162992)

**2.4.7.16.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11162997`)

SCell Release due to inactivity or SCell RLQ
Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_16462\_replaced([11120771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqTqD_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If the following concurrent events are detected in SCell 5G-L2-PS:

1. bad SCell RLQ, and

2. expiration of SCell Inactivity Release Timer due to prolonged UE data inactivity or UE overheating (see Note) in this SCell

When SCell Inactivity Release Timer expired, the first check if bad SCell RLQ occur, if yes, expiration of SCell Inactivity Release Timer shall be ignore. SCell 5G-L2-PS shall report to P(S)Cell 5G-L2-PS SCell’s state: ‘bad RLQ’.

Note 1:

Overheating protection based on UE overheating assistance information (CB008697) is applicable for Stand Alone (SA) Architecture Option 2 only.

---

#### 2.4.7.16.0-6 SCell Release due to inactivity or SCell RLQ SCell Release due to bad SCell RLQ (ID: 11163004)

**2.4.7.16.0-6.0-2**  (ID: `11163015`)

SCell Release due to inactivity or SCell RLQ
Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_16283\_replaced([11120751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqTqCvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If PCell received ps\_peerCtrl\_SCellStatusInd with 'PERSISTENTDEACTIVATEREQ', and NRBTS.actSCellReleaseBadSCellRlq is set to ‘enabled\_Fr1’ in PCell:

5G-L2-PS will immediately indicate it along with sCellIndex to gNB-DU C-Plane of PCell as a trigger to release the respective SCell at the UE with SCell Inactive Reason ‘bad RLQ’(refer to 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_406\_replaced([11196587](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Bf1VzfvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[03599183]

if NRBTS.actSCellReleaseBadSCellRlq is set to ‘enabled\_Fr1’ and NRBTS.sCellDeactivationBadRlqCount is set to value other than '0' in the PCell,

5G-L2-PS shall check PsPeerCtrl\_ScellStatusInd with cqiStateIndications (refer to 5G\_L2\_IF\_682\_replaced([10979855](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VeYIfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

if cqiStateIndications == false and SCellbadRlqreleaseTimer is not started

Starting SCellbadRlqreleaseTimer with time out period defined by (NRBTS.sCellDeactivationBadRlqCount \* NRBTS/NRCELL.sCellChannelEstimationPeriod)

else if cqiStateIndications  == false  and SCellbadRlqreleaseTimer is started

return

else

Stop SCellbadRlqreleaseTimer

When SCellbadRlqreleaseTimer timeout, PCell send PsUser\_SCellReleaseConditionMetInd with SCell Inactive Reason ‘bad RLQ’ to CP-RT as a trigger to release the respective SCell at the UE, and 5G-L2-PS shall not send to UE SCell Activation/Deactivation MAC CE for this SCell before releasing the SCell.

Note:

1, SCellbadRlqreleaseTimer is a per SCell timer at the UE.

[End 03599183]

---

#### 2.4.7.16.0-7 SCell Release due to inactivity or SCell RLQ Online reconfiguration and Prime-gNB and ext-gNB parameters synchronization (ID: 11163022)

**2.4.7.16.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `11163025`)

SCell Release due to inactivity or SCell RLQ
In case NRBTS.actSCellReleaseForInactiveSCell, NRBTS/NRCELL.sCellInactivityReleaseTimer and NRBTS.actSCellReleaseBadSCellRlq is online reconfigured during cell reconfiguration procedure, 5G-L2-PS instances of P(S)Cell and SCell are provided with the new setting by gNB-DU C-Plane when the SCell is configured in the U-Plane for the UE (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_3111\_replaced([11315716](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tr4Of_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).  SCell 5G-L2-PS shall update the UE context with new value of this parameter and use:

P(S)Cell:  5G-L2-PS shall update the UE context with new value of this parameter from cell DB context and use when PsUser\_UserSetupReq or PsUser\_UserModifyReq with remoteSCellToAddList not empty is received.

SCell:  5G-L2-PS shall update the UE context with new value of this parameter from cell DB context and use when PsUser\_UserSetupReq with ueAddCause =='SCellAddition' is received.

---

### 2.4.7.17 Supplemental DL Cell FR1

#### 2.4.7.17.0-1 Supplemental DL Cell FR1 Ignoring UL parameters for Supplemental DL Cell FR1 on Cell Setup Request (ID: 11163037)

**2.4.7.17.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11163042`)

Supplemental DL Cell FR1
If the given cell is a Supplemental DL Cell FR1 (see 5G\_L2\_14855\_replaced([11141639](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23puzPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall ignore the following information elements when PsCell\_CellSetupReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is received:

* cellANPucchPool
* clpcPucch
* clpcPusch
* l1ProcessingCapacityLimits
* maxBeamsPerSymbolUl
* maxSectionsPerSymbolUl
* oneWayHwDelayUl
* pucchConfigCommon
* pucchModeSelect
* puschMappingType
* raMsg2TargetRateIndex
* rachConfig
* systemInformationTargetRate
* ulBandwidth
* ulCgMaxNumUeUl
* ulCgResourceType2
* ulHrLinkAdaptation
* ulLinkAdaptation
* ulMimoMode
* ulProGrantPayloadSize
* ulProGrantPayloadSizeDrx
* ulProGrantPayloadSizeTxSkip
* ulProGrantTimer
* ulProGrantTimerTxSkip
* ulRankThresh
* ulSchedTimeInterval
* ulSchedTimeIntervalTxSkip
* ulSinrSourceForRank1SUMimo
* ulTdPrio
* ulTransPrecoder
* rbgSizePusch from cellBwp structure (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_95\_replaced([10968336](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UXk5_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Rationale: As uplink shall not be scheduled over Supplemental DL Cell FR1, there is no need to have the uplink IEs filled.

---

#### 2.4.7.17.0-2 Supplemental DL Cell FR1 Ignoring UL parameters for Supplemental DL Cell FR1 on Cell Reconfiguration Request (ID: 11163048)

**2.4.7.17.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11163053`)

Supplemental DL Cell FR1
If the given cell is a Supplemental DL Cell FR1 (see 5G\_L2\_14855\_replaced([11141639](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23puzPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall ignore the following information elements when PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is received:

* actDisableMinPuschUciPrbsUpd
* badUplinkRadioRedirectConfig
* clpcPucch
* clpcPusch
* maxNumPuschAllocationPerSlot
* raConfiguration
* ulCgMaxNumUeUl
* ulDataSplit
* ulHrLinkAdaptation
* ulMuMimoReConfig
* ulProGrantPayloadSize
* ulProGrantPayloadSizeDrx
* ulProGrantPayloadSizeTxSkip
* ulProGrantTimer
* ulProGrantTimerTxSkip
* ulRankThresh
* ulSchedTimeInterval
* ulSchedTimeIntervalTxSkip
* ulSrsBmReConfig
* ulTransPrecoder

Rationale: As uplink shall not be scheduled over Supplemental DL Cell FR1, there is no need to have the uplink IEs filled.

---

#### 2.4.7.17.0-3 Supplemental DL Cell FR1 Mandatory UL parameters for non-Supplemental DL Cell FR1 on Cell Setup Request (ID: 11163060)

**2.4.7.17.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11163065`)

Supplemental DL Cell FR1
If the given cell is NOT a Supplemental DL Cell FR1 (see 5G\_L2\_14855\_replaced([11141639](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23puzPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall verify if the following optional information elements are present when PsCell\_CellSetupReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is received:

* l1ProcessingCapacityLimits
* maxBeamsPerSymbolUl
* maxSectionsPerSymbolUl
* oneWayHwDelayUl
* pucchConfigCommon
* puschMappingType
* rachConfig
* systemInformationTargetRate
* ulBandwidth
* ulLinkAdaptation
* ulMimoMode
* ulProGrantPayloadSize
* ulProGrantPayloadSizeDrx
* ulProGrantPayloadSizeTxSkip
* ulProGrantTimer
* ulProGrantTimerTxSkip
* ulSchedTimeInterval
* ulSchedTimeIntervalTxSkip
* ulSinrSourceForRank1SUMimo
* ulTdPrio
* rbgSizePusch from cellBwp structure (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_95\_replaced([10968336](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UXk5_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

If any of the above information elements is not present, 5G-L2-PS shall reply with PsCell\_CellSetupResp message, set the status IE = EStatus5G\_NotOk and cause IE = InvalidParameter (see 5G\_UP\_1846\_replaced([11375790](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uePkGPvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Rationale: For a non-Supplemental DL Cell FR1, UL-related IEs are required in order to schedule uplink.

---

#### 2.4.7.17.0-4 Supplemental DL Cell FR1 Mandatory UL parameters for non-Supplemental DL Cell FR1 on Cell Setup Response (ID: 11163071)

**2.4.7.17.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `13351909`)

Supplemental DL Cell FR1
When PsCell\_CellSetupResp (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_155\_replaced([10967642](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UT6hfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is sent:

If the given cell is NOT a Supplemental DL Cell FR1 (see 5G\_L2\_14855\_replaced([11141639](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23puzPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

5G-L2-PS shall fill the following optional information elements:

* puschTimeDomainAllocationList
* puschTimeDomainAllocationListR16
* SUlSlotBitPattern
* goldenPucchResourcesForCsiReport from availablePucchAndCsiRsResources structure (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_157\_replaced([10967702](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UT6jPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* pucchResourceForCsiReport from availablePucchAndCsiRsResources structure (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_157\_replaced([10967702](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UT6jPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Otherwise:

5G-L2-PS shall NOT fill:

* the optional information elements listed above
* and also the following optional information element:
* prachOccasions

**Rationale: As uplink shall not be scheduled over Supplemental DL Cell FR1, there is no need to have the uplink IEs filled.**

[CB014301-C] Note: L2-PS may respond with new prachOccasions also via PsCell\_BeamConfigUpdateResp to CP-RT ([12772561: prachOccasionsList](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_t1xIoImbEfCrqOdGJPoCRA)) in case of beamSet NIDD parameters online modification [End CB014301-C]

---

#### 2.4.7.17.0-5 Supplemental DL Cell FR1 Mandatory UL parameters for non-Supplemental DL Cell FR1 on Cell Reconfiguration Request (ID: 11163082)

**2.4.7.17.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11163087`)
