Supplemental DL Cell FR1
If the given cell is NOT a Supplemental DL Cell FR1 (see 5G\_L2\_14855\_replaced([11141639](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23puzPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall verify if the following optional information elements are present when PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is received:

* maxNumPuschAllocationPerSlot
* raConfiguration
* ulMuMimoReConfig

If any of the above information elements is not present, 5G-L2-PS shall reply with PsCell\_CellReconfigurationResp message, set the status IE = EStatus5G\_NotOk and cause IE = InvalidParameter (see 5G\_UP\_1846\_replaced([11375790](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uePkGPvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Rationale: For a non-Supplemental DL Cell FR1, UL-related IEs are required in order to schedule uplink.

---

#### 2.4.7.17.0-6 Supplemental DL Cell FR1 Processing of PsUser events for Supplemental DL Cell FR1 (ID: 11163093)

**2.4.7.17.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11163097`)

Supplemental DL Cell FR1
When the given cell is Supplemental DL Cell FR1 (see 5G\_L2\_14855\_replaced([11141639](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23puzPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall not distribute any arriving PsUser events (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_374\_replaced([10974490](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U8Mrfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) to UL Scheduler.

Rationale: No UL user transmission shall be scheduled on Supplemental DL Cells.

---

### 2.4.7.18 Synchronization status handling

#### 2.4.7.18.1 Initial synchronization status in 5G-L2-PS

##### 2.4.7.18.1.0-1 Initial synchronization status in 5G-L2-PS Initial synchronization status set during NrRel setup (ID: 11163113)

**2.4.7.18.1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11163120`)

Initial synchronization status in 5G-L2-PS
PCell’s 5G-L2-PS stores cell’s synchronization status and ext-SCell’s synchronization status. Ext-SCell’s 5G-L2-PS stores cell’s synchronization status. Refer to 5G\_L2\_16188\_replaced([11163147](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25kaYPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_L2\_16190\_replaced([11163159](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25kaYvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

During inter-gNB CA NrRel setup (see 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_2385\_replaced([11179126](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Bebnl_vREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall:

 If PsCell\_SyncStatusInd (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_5895\_replaced([10974184](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U6Xd_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with syncStatus already received by cell’s 5G-L2-PS, then set initial cell’s synchronization status to previously received syncStatus.

 If PsCell\_SyncStatusInd not received by cell’s 5G-L2-PS, then set initial cell’s synchronization status value to InSync.

 Set initial ext-Scell’s synchronization status to InSync.

---

#### 2.4.7.18.2 Synchronization status reception on ext-SCell’s 5G-L2-PS

##### 2.4.7.18.2.0-1 Synchronization status reception on ext-SCell’s 5G-L2-PS Notification to primary 5G-L2-PS (ID: 11163130)

**2.4.7.18.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11163136`)

Synchronization status reception on ext-SCell’s 5G-L2-PS
When the valid synchronization status was received by ext-SCell’s 5G-L2-PS from CP-RT (see 5G\_L2\_16178\_replaced([11143775](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2318EPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then ext-SCell’s 5G-L2-PS shall:

1. Update cell’s synchronization status in cell’s database.

2. Determine which cells shall be notified about the synchronization status.

3. Start informing PCell’s 5G-L2-PS about it’s cell’s synchronization status in each PsPeerCtrl\_ScellMeasurementRep message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2118\_replaced([10979995](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Ve_Pfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with syncStatus IE.

---

#### 2.4.7.18.3 Synchronization status reception on PCell’s 5G-L2-PS

##### 2.4.7.18.3.0-1 Synchronization status reception on PCell’s 5G-L2-PS ext-SCell deactivation due to synchronization status change to OutOfSync (ID: 11163147)

**2.4.7.18.3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11163152`)

Synchronization status reception on PCell’s 5G-L2-PS
When PCell’s 5G-L2-PS receives syncStatus IE equal to OutOfSync from CP-RT via PsCell\_SyncStatusInd message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_5895\_replaced([10974184](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U6Xd_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

then, PCell’s 5G-L2-PS shall proceed with below steps for each inter-gNB CA relation:

 update the cell’s synchronization status in cell’s database,

 check the relation’s Xp Link Status (see 5G\_L2\_8635\_replaced([11162556](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25gv9fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and ext-SCell’s synchronization status,

 proceed with further steps only if Xp Link Status is available and ext-SCell’s synchronization status is InSync,

 for each activated inter-gNB CA UE (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22304\_replaced([11174858](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kue_YPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

o initiate ext-SCell deactivation procedure (see 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_4810\_replaced([11196908](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Bf3K__vREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) via PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingReq message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_656\_replaced([10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with modifType IE set to deactivateExtScellOutOfSync.

When PCell’s 5G-L2-PS receives syncStatus IE equal to OutOfSync from ext-SCell’s 5G-L2-PS via PsPeerCtrl\_ScellMeasurementRep message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2118\_replaced([10979995](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Ve_Pfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_L2\_16192\_replaced([11146770](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24Ho1PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for a particular inter-gNB CA NR relation,

then, PCell’s 5G-L2-PS shall:

 update ext-SCell’s synchronization status in cell’s database,

 check the relation’s Xp Link Status (see 5G\_L2\_8635\_replaced([11162556](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25gv9fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and cell’s synchronization status,

 proceed with further steps only if Xp Link Status is available and cell’s synchronization status is InSync,

 for each activated inter-gNB CA UE (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22304\_replaced([11174858](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kue_YPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

o initiate ext-SCell deactivation procedure (see 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_4810\_replaced([11196908](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Bf3K__vREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) via PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingReq message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_656\_replaced([10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with modifType IE set to deactivateExtScellOutOfSync.

---

##### 2.4.7.18.3.0-2 Synchronization status reception on PCell’s 5G-L2-PS ext-SCell reactivation due to synchronization status change to InSync (ID: 11163159)

**2.4.7.18.3.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11163164`)

Synchronization status reception on PCell’s 5G-L2-PS
When PCell’s 5G-L2-PS receives syncStatus IE equal to InSync from CP-RT via PsCell\_SyncStatusInd message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_5895\_replaced([10974184](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U6Xd_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

then, PCell’s 5G-L2-PS shall proceed with below steps for each inter-gNB CA relation:

 update the cell’s synchronization status in cell’s database,

 check the relation’s Xp Link Status (see 5G\_L2\_8635\_replaced([11162556](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25gv9fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and ext-SCell’s synchronization status,

 proceed with further steps only if Xp Link Status is available and ext-SCell’s synchronization status is InSync,

 for each deactivated inter-gNB CA UE (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22304\_replaced([11174858](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kue_YPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

o initiate ext-SCell reactivation procedure (see 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_4810\_replaced([11196908](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Bf3K__vREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) via PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingReq message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_656\_replaced([10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with modifType IE set to start.

When PCell’s 5G-L2-PS receives syncStatus IE equal to InSync from ext-SCell’s 5G-L2-PS via PsPeerCtrl\_ScellMeasurementRep message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2118\_replaced([10979995](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Ve_Pfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_L2\_16192\_replaced([11146770](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24Ho1PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for a particular inter-gNB CA NR relation,

then, PCell’s 5G-L2-PS shall:

 update ext-SCell’s synchronization status in cell’s database,

 check the relation’s Xp Link Status (see 5G\_L2\_8635\_replaced([11162556](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25gv9fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and cell’s synchronization status,

 proceed with further steps only if Xp Link Status is available and cell’s synchronization status is InSync,

 for each deactivated inter-gNB CA UE (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22304\_replaced([11174858](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kue_YPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

o initiate ext-SCell reactivation procedure (see 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_4810\_replaced([11196908](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Bf3K__vREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) via PsPeerCtrl\_ScellUeSchedulingReq message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_656\_replaced([10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with modifType IE set to start.

---

### 2.4.7.19 Allow-list of FR1 UL CA UE with TDD PCell and FDD SCell

#### 2.4.7.19.0-1 Allow-list of FR1 UL CA UE with TDD PCell and FDD SCell Handling of maxNumOfUlCaUeParallelTx configuration (ID: 11163175)

**2.4.7.19.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11163182`)

Allow-list of FR1 UL CA UE with TDD PCell and FDD SCell
maxNumOfUlCaUeParallelTx is set by NIDD NRCELL/maxNumOfUlCaUeParallelTx.

From L2PS p.o.v., maxNumOfUlCaUeParallelTx is initially configured by PsCell\_CellSetupReq and reconfigured by PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq.

1.L2PS set the number of allowList UE as the value in PsCell\_CellSetupReq or PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq if the IE is present and in valid value range.

2.L2PS set the number of allowList UE as 0 if the IE is omit in PsCell\_CellSetupReq or PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq.

3.L2PS set the number of allowList UE as 0 if the IE is preset in PsCell\_CellSetupReq or PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq, but out of valid value range.

Definition of maxNumOfUlCaUeParallelTx in PsCell\_CellSetupReq refer to 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Definition of maxNumOfUlCaUeParallelTx in PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq refer to 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

#### 2.4.7.19.0-2 Allow-list of FR1 UL CA UE with TDD PCell and FDD SCell Timing of UE selection for allow list (ID: 11163190)

**2.4.7.19.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `12505284`)

Allow-list of FR1 UL CA UE with TDD PCell and FDD SCell
UE allow list relevant algorithm refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25188\_replaced([11208767](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwwQQ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The timing of whole procedure as below:

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Item | timeslot |
| AllowList UE selection | Target overlapping slot - rdUlCaAllowlistPrepareInMs - K2 of Pcell |
| PcellUlCaUeAllowListInd from Pcell to Scell | Target overlapping slot - rdUlCaAllowlistPrepareInMs - K2 of Pcell |
| PUSCH scheduling on Pcell | Target overlapping slot - K2 of Pcell |
| PUSCH scheduling on Scell | Target overlapping slot - rdUlCaAllowlistPrepareInMs - K2 of Scell |

[CB009422-C]

Note:

For tdLteConfig0 frame structure, since the scheduling slotOffset is dynamic value for different slot as described in ([11157414](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25FSLfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the timing of UE selection for allow-list will be earlier than legacy TDD FR1 frame structure with fixed scheduling slotOffset.

[End CB009422-C]

Here is an example for the timing of TDD (1116\_3ms) +FDD UL CA.

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a diagram illustrating a scheduling process in a cellular network, likely related to uplink (UL) transmissions. It depicts different stages and decisions made by schedulers at different network entities (Pcell and Scell) over time, represented by SFNs (System Frame Numbers) and slots.
The diagram is structured into several sections:
**1. High-Level Process Descriptions:**
\* **AllowList UE selection @ UL TD Scheduler:** This section describes the initial selection of UEs based on an allow list by the UL TD Scheduler.
\* **Forcing Scheduling on Pcell @ UL TD Scheduler:** This section indicates a mechanism to force scheduling on the Pcell by the UL TD Scheduler.
\* **Indication message from Pcell to Scell:** This section shows communication from the Pcell to the Scell, specifically an indication message containing target SFN/slot and an allow list of UEs.
\* **Scheduling on Scell @ UL Pre Scheduler:** This section describes the scheduling decisions made by the UL Pre Scheduler for the Scell.
**2. Timing and Scheduling Information:**
\* **Selection sfn/slot: 1/5 (1/18 - K2 - 5ms):** This indicates a selection event occurring at SFN 1, slot 5, with a target SFN/slot of 1/18 and a K2 value of 5ms.
\* **Selection sfn/slot: 1/15 (2/8 - K2 - 5ms):** This indicates another selection event at SFN 1, slot 15, with a target SFN/slot of 2/8 and a K2 value of 5ms.
\* **Scheduling sfn/slot: 1/15 (1/18 - K2):** This shows a scheduling decision for SFN 1, slot 15, targeting SFN 1/18, with a K2 value. It specifies that this forces the PUSCH (Physical Uplink Shared Channel) of UE1 and UE2 based on a boosted PF (Proportional Fair) metric.
\* **Scheduling sfn/slot: 2/5 (2/8 - K2):** This shows a scheduling decision for SFN 2, slot 5, targeting SFN 2/8, with a K2 value. It specifies that this forces the PUSCH of UE3 and UE4 based on a boosted PF metric.
\* **rdUlCaAllowlistPrepareInMs default: 5ms:** This indicates a parameter related to the allow list preparation time.
\* **K2=3 on Pcell, K2=2 on Scell:** This specifies different K2 values for Pcell and Scell.
**3. Timeline Representation:**
The core of the diagram is a timeline represented by two rows:
\* **PCELL:** This row shows the status of the Pcell over SFNs and slots.
\* The top row indicates the SFNs (0, 1, 2).
\* The second row indicates the slots within each SFN (0 through 19).
\* The third row shows the Pcell's activity: 'D' likely represents Downlink, and 'S' likely represents a special slot or control information. 'U' likely represents Uplink.
\* **SCELL:** This row shows the status of the Scell over SFNs and slots.
\* The top row indicates the SFNs (1, 2).
\* The second row indicates the slots within each SFN (1 through 10).
\* The third row shows the Scell's activity, with colored blocks indicating scheduled transmissions. Orange blocks likely represent data transmissions, and yellow blocks likely represent control information or specific scheduling events.
**4. Communication and Scheduling Details:**
\* **PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlCaUeAllowListInd target sfn/slot: 1/18 allowList: UE1, UE2:** This message from Pcell to Scell indicates that for SFN 1, slot 18, UEs UE1 and UE2 are allowed for uplink transmission. An arrow points from this message to slot 18 in the PCELL timeline.
\* **PsPeerCtrl\_PcellUlCaUeAllowListInd target sfn/slot: 2/8 allowList: UE3, UE4:** This message from Pcell to Scell indicates that for SFN 2, slot 8, UEs UE3 and UE4 are allowed for uplink transmission. An arrow points from this message to slot 8 in the PCELL timeline.
\* **Schedule PUSCH of UE1 in case of data in buffer:** This indicates a conditional scheduling action for UE1.
\* **Schedule PUSCH of UE2 in case of data in buffer:** This indicates a conditional scheduling action for UE2.
\* **PUSCH of UE3 in case of data in buffer:** This indicates a conditional scheduling action for UE3.
\* **PUSCH of UE4 in case of data in buffer:** This indicates a conditional scheduling action for UE4.
The diagram visually represents a sequence of events where UEs are selected, scheduling is potentially forced, and specific UEs are allowed for uplink transmission on Pcell and Scell based on certain conditions and timing parameters. The colored blocks in the SCELL timeline likely correspond to the forced scheduling events described.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3321.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

5G\_L2\_16580\_Timing of UE selection for allow list.xlsx at <https://nokia.sharepoint.com/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Forms/Tree_View.aspx?id=%2Fsites%2F5Gdoc%2FAS%5FTech%5FSpec%2FDrawings%20and%20diagrams%20for%205G%2FUser%20Plane%2F5G%20L2%20Entity%20Level%2F2%205G%2DL2%2DPS%20Component%20Requirements%2F2%2E4%20Algorithm%2F7%2E%20Carrier%20Aggregation%20Control%2F20%2E%20Allow%2Dlist%20of%20FR1%20UL%20CA%20UE%20with%20TDD%20PCell%20and%20FDD%20SCell&viewid=967508b3%2D8e81%2D461c%2Db99d%2D145065cf0c1c>

---

#### 2.4.7.19.0-3 Allow-list of FR1 UL CA UE with TDD PCell and FDD SCell PUSCH scheduling on Pcell (ID: 11163204)

**2.4.7.19.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11163210`)

Allow-list of FR1 UL CA UE with TDD PCell and FDD SCell
For the FR1 UL CA UEs in allow-list in target UL slot (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25188\_replaced([11208767](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwwQQ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), to avoid UCI multiplexing over FDD SCell PUSCH, TDD PCell shall increase the probability of scheduling by multiplying a weighting factor for PF metrics of drbTraffic for UEs in the allow-list in the target UL slot, as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25306\_replaced([11195898](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv-0PvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

#### 2.4.7.19.0-4 Allow-list of FR1 UL CA UE with TDD PCell and FDD SCell PUSCH scheduling on Scell (ID: 11163217)

**2.4.7.19.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11163222`)

Allow-list of FR1 UL CA UE with TDD PCell and FDD SCell
For the FR1 UL CA UEs in allow-list in target UL slot (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25188\_replaced([11208767](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwwQQ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), if this UE can be selected into CS1 list from Priority Lists (refer to 5G\_L2\_378\_replaced([11151479](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24ifmPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), FDD SCell shall not exclude such UE from CS1 list as per 5G\_L2\_7571\_replaced([11160904](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25XmDfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

#### 2.4.7.19.0-5 Allow-list of FR1 UL CA UE with TDD PCell and FDD SCell UlCaUeAllowList design (ID: 11163229)

**2.4.7.19.0-5.0-2**  (ID: `12420597`)

Allow-list of FR1 UL CA UE with TDD PCell and FDD SCell
UlCaUeAllowList is designed to contain max 6 UE per slot and max [Before CB009422-C] 6 [CB009422-C] 8 [End CB009422-C] target overlapping slots.

Limitation:

L2PS support max 21 CA relationship, but UL CA UE is limited. AllowList is only support 3 CA relationship per slot and max 2 UE per relationship considering memory limitation.

---

### 2.4.7.20 Parallel transmission of Pcell PUCCH and Scell PUSCH

#### 2.4.7.20.0-1 Parallel transmission of Pcell PUCCH and Scell PUSCH Handling of simulPucchPuschSamePrioR17 configuration (ID: 13425818)

**2.4.7.20.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13425819`)

Parallel transmission of Pcell PUCCH and Scell PUSCH
The simulPucchPuschSamePrioR17 flag is configured by CP-RT to L2-PS in the PsUser\_UserModifyReq([13332514](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_0yD8MdXVEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) message. Its value is determined by CP-RT based on the NIDD NRCELL/actparallelTX feature activation and the UE capability parallelTxPUCCH-PUSCH-SamePriority-r17 for the specific band combination of a TDD Pcell and an FDD (DL&UL) Scell.

Upon reception of the simulPucchPuschSamePrioR17 Information Element (IE) in a PsUser\_UserModifyReq message, Pcell L2-PS shall perform validation and act as follows:  
    • If the IE is present and set to 'true', Pcell L2-PS shall decide to enable parallel transmission in overlapping UL slots after evaluating the UE power (in accordance with requirement [12882347](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ijfnALR4EfCQT7hYUxERAg)) and shall send the parallelTxForUlCa indication to the FDD (DL&UL) Scell for the UE based on the value change in psPeerCtrl\_PcellUlControlInd message ([10981215](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VowN_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Upon receiving parallelTxForUlCa on the Secondary Cell (Scell), a User Equipment (UE) is eligible for scheduling in overlapping slots if the parallelTxForUlCa is received as enabled.  
    • If the IE is present and set to 'false', Pcell L2-PS shall disable simultaneous PUCCH and PUSCH transmission in the Pcell for the UE.  
    • If the IE is absent, Pcell L2-PS shall continue to use the UE's currently configured value for simulPucchPuschSamePrioR17.

Note:  
When simultaneousPUCCH-PUSCH-SamePriority-r17 is referenced for an Scell under an SFS requirement, it is functionally equivalent to `parallelTxForUlCa` ([10981215](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VowN_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

#### 2.4.7.20.0-2 Parallel transmission of Pcell PUCCH and Scell PUSCH PUSCH scheduling on Scell (ID: 13425825)

**2.4.7.20.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `13425826`)

Parallel transmission of Pcell PUCCH and Scell PUSCH
For FR1 Uplink Carrier Aggregation (UL CA) User Equipment (UEs) with parallelTxForUlCa ([10981215](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VowN_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) received by Secondary Cell (Scell) based on the specified power calculations([12882347](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ijfnALR4EfCQT7hYUxERAg)) on Pcell,

If parallelTxForUlCa is enabled, UE shall be included in the CS1 list and subsequently scheduled on the Scell.

If parallelTxForUlCa is disabled, UE shall not be scheduled on Scell.

---

#### 2.4.7.20.0-3 Parallel transmission of Pcell PUCCH and Scell PUSCH PUCCH reception on Pcell (ID: 13425827)

**2.4.7.20.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `13425828`)

Parallel transmission of Pcell PUCCH and Scell PUSCH
For a User Equipment (UE) with simulPucchPuschSamePrioR17 enabled, Uplink Control Information (UCI) feedback on Primary Cell (Pcell) is handled as follows:

1. When the UE is not scheduled on the Primary Cell (Pcell) Physical Uplink Shared Channel (PUSCH), then the UE shall send the UCI feedback on the Pcell Physical Uplink Control Channel (PUCCH).
2. When the L2-PS Downlink (DL) component receives the UCI feedback on PUCCH, then it shall calculate the pucchRxPower and transmit it, along with the Radio Network Temporary Identifier (RNTI), to the Uplink (UL) scheduler in the DL to UL intrascheduler message [13405737](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_hE5n0Qy5EfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) .
3. When the Uplink (UL) scheduler receives the intrascheduler message [13405737](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_hE5n0Qy5EfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) , then it shall calculate power values using the equations specified in ([12882347](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ijfnALR4EfCQT7hYUxERAg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). If the condition specified in ([12882347](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ijfnALR4EfCQT7hYUxERAg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) is satisfied, the UL scheduler shall send the parallelTxForUlCa parameter to the Secondary Cell (Scell) in the XP interface message ([10981215](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VowN_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

---

#### 2.4.7.20.0-4 Parallel transmission of Pcell PUCCH and Scell PUSCH Power Evaluation (ID: 13444908)

**2.4.7.20.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `13444909`)

Parallel transmission of Pcell PUCCH and Scell PUSCH
For a User Equipment (UE) with simulPucchPuschSamePrioR17 enabled, the system shall handle UE power evaluation and parallel transmission decisions as follows:  
    1. Power Evaluation  
When a Power Headroom Report (PHR) is received on PUSCH of Pcell, OR when a PUCCH is received on Pcell for which the long-term PUCCH SINR is calculated, then UL L2-PS shall evaluate the UE power based on the power equations defined in [12882347](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ijfnALR4EfCQT7hYUxERAg?oslc.configuration=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).  
        ○ Condition 1: This evaluation shall be triggered if a received PHR or PUCCH is subject to Discontinuous Transmission (DTX) or has a CRC error.  
        ○ Condition 2: The first evaluation shall not be triggered if there is no valid PHR and no valid pucchRxPower.  
    2. Parallel Transmission Decision  
        ○ Each reception of a PUCCH message updates the long-term PUCCH SINR using a sliding averaging window ([11119377](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqJ5BPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), triggering an indication of pucchRxPower from DL L2-PS to UL L2-PS via PsInternal\_DlToUlIntraSchedUpdate([11242855](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3Btps_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).  
        ○ When a valid PHR is received on PUSCH of Pcell, OR when a PsInternal\_DlToUlIntraSchedUpdate ([11242855](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3Btps_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) message is received by UL L2-PS, then UL L2-PS shall decide on parallel transmission in overlapping UL slots ([12882347](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ijfnALR4EfCQT7hYUxERAg?oslc.configuration=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) and send the parallelTxForUlCa indication to the FDD (DL&UL) Scell in the psPeerCtrl\_PcellUlControlInd ([13396434](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_p2BIgAdxEfGozuGzRUXHpg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) message.  
    3. Parameter Source  
The M\_PUCCH value used in the power equations ([12882347](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ijfnALR4EfCQT7hYUxERAg?oslc.configuration=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) ]shall be obtained from the first index of perCsireportConfig ([10975373](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VAeHPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) as specified in a usermodify request ([13332514](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_0yD8MdXVEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

---

## 2.4.8 Link Adaptation

### 2.4.8.0-1 Link Adaptation FA: Link Adaptation + Measurement (SINR, CQI…)​ Document Owner: Patrizia Melotti (Nokia) (ID: 11163245)

### 2.4.8.1 Overview

#### 2.4.8.1.0-1 Overview Scope and Purpose of the Link Adaptation (ID: 11163256)

**2.4.8.1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11163261`)

Overview
The purpose of this algorithm is to transmit data on shared channel more efficiently by adapting the MCS (modulation and coding scheme) based on CSI report received by the user equipment. The MCS is adapted according to the BLER target configured i.e.: to achieve desired ACK to NACK ratio received as part of HARQ feedback. This algorithm is applied only on PxSCH initial transmission and not for PxSCH associated with retransmission or for Random Access.

Link adaptation algorithm operates independently per UE per carrier per direction (i.e.: Downlink and Uplink separately).

---

### 2.4.8.2 Common (between DL and UL)

#### 2.4.8.2.0-1 Common (between DL and UL) Updating of CQI to MCS mapping tables for FR1 FDD 35MHz (ID: 11163273)

**2.4.8.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11163277`)

Common (between DL and UL)
The MCS tables for various cases like 64QAM, 256QAM with PTRS ON and OFF as specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_14366\_replaced([11127755](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq2cmvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_14362\_replaced([11128386](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq4R0PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for CQI to MCS mapping in downlink and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3131\_replaced([11136212](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krTvmvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3134\_replaced([11136423](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krUWrvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for ULSINR to MCS in uplink are derived for FR1 FDD 35MHz by doing the linear interpolation of the values between 30MHz and 40MHz as specified in the above ALG requirements

---

#### 2.4.8.2.0-2 Common (between DL and UL) MCS definitions (ID: 11163284)

**2.4.8.2.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `11163301`)

Common (between DL and UL)
L2-PS defines and calculate the following 3 different MCS values:

- The Proposed MCS is the MCS selected by the Link Adaptation algorithm based on the [CB008927-C] 2 PRB's when actRat1Alloc and rdEnablePropMcsCalcBasedOn2Prbs set as 'True' otherwise [End CB008927-C] number of

if UserSetupReq.actDlOptMcsSelection is True,

rdDlPRBMcsSelection (R&D parameter defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29011\_replaced([11138974](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krjnMfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

else

PRB of the system bandwidth’s as stated in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22781\_replaced([11125340](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqt5u_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for downlink and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17281\_replaced([11131699](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krD38_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for uplink.

- The Scaled MCS is the MCS selected by the Link Adaptation algorithm taking into account the number of PRBs allocated to the UE. More information can also be found in in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22781\_replaced([11125340](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqt5u_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for downlink and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17281\_replaced([11131699](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krD38_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for uplink.

-      The Used MCS is the MCS used to grant the UE. It is based on the proposed MCS if UserSetupReq.actDlOptMcsSelection is True,otherwise the Scaled MCS [CB008927-C] Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24146\_replaced([11125436](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqugyfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) when actRat1Alloc and rdEnablePropMcsCalcBasedOn2Prbs set as 'True',  [End CB008927-C]and can be lowered due to the MCS Downgrade algorithm defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4630\_replaced([11192270](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvjWafvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for downlink and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_5102\_replaced([11203503](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwfKifvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for uplink.

---

#### 2.4.8.2.0-3 Common (between DL and UL) Online Reconfiguration of High Reliability Link Adaptation NIDD Parameters (ID: 11163308)

**2.4.8.2.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11163314`)

Common (between DL and UL)
There are three different sets of parameters that could be online modifiable wrt HR LA:

- HR LA Profile: OAM could modify the NRBTS.NRPDSCHHRLA (defined in requirement 5G\_L2\_IF\_397\_replaced([10974876](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U-o4vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), in such case CP-RT doesn’t trigger any indication to L2-PS. UE(s) which were already added prior to online modification still retains the old HR profile configuration. New UE(s) added later is configured with updated HR profile by CP-RT.

- Cell NIDD parameter: When OAM modifies NRBTS.NRCELL.pdschHrLaConfig parameters (defined in requirement 5G\_L2\_IF\_4115\_replaced([10970137](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UhV4fu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then CP-RT triggers PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq towards L2-PS with updated parameters. In such case, L2-PS shall follow steps defined in requirement 5G\_L2\_11104\_replaced([11142797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23wcfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

- Feature Activation/Deactivation: If the feature is activated/deactivated when a cell is active, then CP-RT triggers PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq towards L2-PS. In such case, L2-PS follows 5G\_L2\_11104\_replaced([11142797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23wcfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

### 2.4.8.3 DL Link Adaptation

#### 2.4.8.3.1 Overview

##### 2.4.8.3.1.0-1 Overview Downlink Link Adaptation Overview (ID: 11163332)

**2.4.8.3.1.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `11163388`)

Overview
The downlink link adaptation works according to the two main feedbacks received by UE, namely:

1. HARQ (Hybrid Automatic Repeat Request) feedback which is received for each PDSCH transmitted.

2. CQI (Channel Quality Indicator) received as part of CSI report.

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a block diagram illustrating a process related to Channel Quality Indicator (CQI) and Modulation and Coding Scheme (MCS) in a 5G system.
The diagram shows two main processing paths: "DL ILLA" and "DL OLLA".
**DL ILLA Path:**
\* Input: "UE CQI"
\* First block: "rrmAvgCqi calculation (5G\_UP\_ALG\_17186)"
\* Output of the first block: "rrmAvgCqi[k]"
\* Second block: "rrmCorrAvgCqi calculation (5G\_UP\_ALG\_17187)"
\* Output of the second block: "rrmCorrAvgCqi[k]"
**DL OLLA Path:**
\* Input: "HARQ ACK/NACK"
\* Block: "rrmDeltaCqi calculation (5G\_UP\_ALG\_17349)"
\* Output of this block: "rrmDeltaCqi[k]"
**Interconnections:**
\* "rrmAvgCqi[k]" from DL ILLA feeds into "rrmCorrAvgCqi calculation" in DL ILLA.
\* "rrmDeltaCqi[k]" from DL OLLA feeds into "rrmCorrAvgCqi calculation" in DL ILLA.
**Final Stage:**
\* Input: "rrmCorrAvgCqi[k]" from DL ILLA.
\* Block: "CQI to MCS LUT (5G\_UP\_ALG\_17188)"
\* Output: "ProposedDIMCS"
The diagram depicts a system where UE CQI and HARQ ACK/NACK are processed to calculate an average CQI and a correlated average CQI, which are then used along with a delta CQI to determine a final CQI to MCS mapping, labeled as "ProposedDIMCS".[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3349.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

The process of downlink link adaptation can be broken down into three parts, namely:

1. Outer loop link adaptation (OLLA) aims to adapt the link by evaluating the HARQ feedback provided by the UE for downlink transmission. As part of OLLA, ‘rrmDeltaCqi’ value is computed based on 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17349\_replaced([11129351](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq78KPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The OLLA could also be skipped in some scenarios according to requirement 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3060\_replaced([11129299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq78IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17364\_replaced([11129497](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq8jMfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), which specifies special corrections for OLLA offset computation.

As an output of OLLA, we receive ‘rrmDeltaCqi[k]’ where index k is used to distinguish between rrmDeltaCqi calculated for basic reliability LA (rrmDeltaCqi[k=BR]) and rrmDeltaCqi calculate for high reliability LA (rrmDeltaCqi[k=HR]), uniformly to SFS notation. Please refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15105\_replaced([11125150](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqsrnPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15603\_replaced([11125162](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqsrnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to know when one or the other LA mode is applied to a UE.

Note: L2-PS doesn't need to maintain and update two rrmDeltaCqi (rrmDeltaCqi[k=BR] and rrmDeltaCqi[k=HR]) at the same time for the same UE and carrier as the UE LA works at any time either in HR or BR mode and any switch BR<>HR will reset rrmDeltaCqi.

When the DL LA operates in HR mode, HARQ-ACK feedbacks associated to a PDSCH transmission with downgraded MCS (as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4630\_replaced([11192270](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvjWafvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) are not ignored by OLLA but considered within offset rrmDeltaCqiForMcsDowngrade (as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25831\_replaced([11129961](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq9xX_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) which will also contribute to the calculation of the corrected average CQI (5G\_UP\_ALG\_7557\_replaced([11125689](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqvu6fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Additionally to what is requested in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25831\_replaced([11129961](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq9xX_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), L2-PS shall reset rrmDeltaCqiForMcsDowngrade also when the DL LA switches from HR to BR. Reason: to be more robust when the corrected average CQI is calculated for BR and to avoid possible misunderstandings by displaying dlLaDeltaCqiArray.rrmDeltaCqiForMcsDowngrade != 0 in tti trace during BR mode.

Other responsibilities of DL OLLA:

 iniDeltaCqi: Initial delta CQI is a cell specific parameter which is assigned to each UE for when a context is setup to give a boost to get up to the right value of rrmDeltaCqi by assuming that the UE’s in the cell have similar DeltaCqi. (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17364\_replaced([11129497](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq8jMfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

 Early Dlla Mode: Is used to adapt MCS before first CQI is received from the UE. (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11046\_replaced([11125506](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqvH1fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

 HARQ NACK flood: If we start receiving continuous HARQ NACK/DTX (due to bad radio condition), in such scenario DL LA indicates such UE(s) to DL scheduler in order to reduce the resources spent for these UE(s) by following 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3068\_replaced([11129535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq8jN_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 OLLA correction in max MCS: If a UE is operating in max MCS (highest throughput), then OLLA shall neglect a single sporadic NACK reported by UE to avoid negative impact on gNB performance (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3063\_replaced([11129500](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq8jMvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

 OLLA correction wrt CQI reports: This section corrects the ’rrmDeltaCqi’ as per CQI report received and handles cases when CQI reports are missing according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3069\_replaced([11129551](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq8jOvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 OLLA correction for VoNR rank change: To reduce the VoNR packet loss, OLLA applies additional correction during rank change according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_12907\_replaced([11129575](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq8jPvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

TTI trace event “dlLaDeltaCqi” defined in 5G\_L2\_1617\_replaced([11201124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29t6i_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is traced with DL OLLA specific information.

2. Inner loop link adaptation (ILLA) aims to adapt the link based on the CQI received as part of CSI report. As part of ILLA, we compute ‘rrmAvgCqi’ (see requirement 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17186\_replaced([11125589](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqvu4fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) which is an output of exponential filter. By considering ‘rrmDeltaCqi’ (output of OLLA) and, we compute ‘rrmCorrAvgCqi’ according to requirement 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17187\_replaced([11125682](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqvu6PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If actDlCqiIncrRestriction is set to True, then restriction on UE reported CQI is performed as described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3005\_replaced([11125595](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqvu4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

As part of ILLA, L2/PS computes ‘rrmAvgCqi[k]’ and ‘rrmCorrAvgCqi[k]’ where index k is used to distinguish between rrmAvgCqi/rrmCorrAvgCqi calculated for basic reliability LA (rrmAvgCqi[k=BR] / rrmCorrAvgCqi[k=BR]) and rrmAvgCqi/rrmCorrAvgCqi calculate for high reliability LA (rrmAvgCqi[k=HR] / rrmCorrAvgCqi[k=HR]), uniformly to SFS notation. Please refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15105\_replaced([11125150](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqsrnPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15603\_replaced([11125162](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqsrnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to know when one or the other LA mode is applied to a UE.

Additionally for HR LA we compute ‘rrmCqiOffset’ according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_14545\_replaced([11126081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqwV-vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

TTI trace event dlLaAverageCqi defined in 5G\_L2\_1619\_replaced([11201165](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29uhk_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is traced with DL ILLA specific information.

3. MCS selection is done based on ‘rrmCorrAvgCqi’ (output of ILLA). We select best MCS which maximize the spectral efficiency also while fulfilling target BLER requirement (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_17188\_replaced([11126249](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqw9AvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). As an output ‘proposedDlMcs’ value is generated.

If the current DL LA mode is set to high reliability, the 'proposedDlMcs' is reduced if it is higher than a threshold, defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22782\_replaced([11125450](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqugy_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15603\_replaced([11125162](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqsrnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) specifies when high reliability or basic reliability DL LA applies for a UE.

Other DL LA related TTI trace event:

a. laIniDelta (see 5G\_L2\_1621\_replaced([11201193](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29uhmPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))): LA initial Delta CQI applied as part of initialize/reset OLLA.

b. laTimer (see 5G\_L2\_1635\_replaced([11201360](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29vvvvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))): Link adaptation timer handling.

Note 1: FD Scheduler can override the ‘proposedDlMcs’ and select a different MCS based on number of PRB allocated. Also, MCS re-determination can be triggered during:

a. DSS transient phase (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3047\_replaced([11129025](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq6G_vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

b. CSI-RS multiplexing (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3050\_replaced([11129035](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq6uAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

c. Rank change for VoNR UE (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_12909\_replaced([11129078](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq6uA_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

[CB009849-C]

d.   If actDlForceRankDowng is set to dlVoNRCtrl/dlVoNRSrbVoNRCtrl/dlSrbOnly/dlVonrSrbVonNRCtrNonGbrbr , Forced Downgrade shall be applied for either SRB or VoNRCtrl Scheduled UE's (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31381\_replaced([11125468](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqugzvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) along with that if proposedDlMcs is greater than configured value ,such case proposedDlMcs  shall be limited according to the configured value.

[End CB009849-C]

Note 2: CSI-RS periodicity change for VoNR UE (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3057\_replaced([11129187](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq6uDvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

[CB009849-C]

Note 3: If actDlForceRankDowng is set to dlVoNRSrbVoNRCtrl/dlVonrSrbVoNRCtrNonGbrBr/dlVoNROnly, If Scheduled UE has VoNR Bearer(5QI1) only , such case CQI Correction shall applied  while computing "rrmCorrAvgCqi" (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30473\_replaced([11126067](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqwV-PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and proposedDlMcs shall be calculated based on rrmCorrAvgCqi (See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_32930\_replaced([11125480](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqvH0PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Note 4: If actDlForceRankDowng is set to dlVoNRCtrl/dlVoNRSrbVoNRCtrl/dlVonrSrbVoNRCtrNonGbrBr/dlVoNROnly/dlSrbOnly , If Scheduled UE has SRB or VoNRCtrl  and/or VoNR , if either MCS Limitation or Rank Downgrade has been applied, Such Case OLLA has to be skipped ( See 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3060\_replaced([11129299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq78IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) ).

[End CB009849-C]

<https://nokia.sharepoint.com/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Forms/Tree_View.aspx?id=%2Fsites%2F5Gdoc%2FAS%5FTech%5FSpec%2FDrawings%20and%20diagrams%20for%205G%2FUser%20Plane%2F5G%20L2%20Entity%20Level%2F2%205G%2DL2%2DPS%20Component%20Requirements%2F2%2E4%20Algorithm%2F8%2E%20Link%20Adaptation&viewid=967508b3%2D8e81%2D461c%2Db99d%2D145065cf0c1c>

---

#### 2.4.8.3.2 Inner Loop DL Link Adaptation

##### 2.4.8.3.2.0-1 Inner Loop DL Link Adaptation Hanlding of invalid received WB-CQI Values (ID: 11163399)

**2.4.8.3.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11163405`)

Inner Loop DL Link Adaptation
Evaluation of WB-CQI report for values greater than maxCQI

---

**2.4.8.3.2.0-1.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `13138689`)

Inner Loop DL Link Adaptation
When WB-CQI value is greater than maxCQI (which is currently equal to value 15) L2PS shall not proceed with WB-CQI report, in this case following steps are not performed:

* WB\_CQI\_(64/256)TBL\_CQI\_00…WB\_CQI\_(64/256[CB008949-A]/1024[End CB008949-A])TBL\_CQI\_15 counters update (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), [CB008949-A], 5G\_L2\_23354\_relaced([11197366](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29LH9_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))[End CB008949-A])
* Calculation of avarage WB-CQI (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3005\_replaced([11125595](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqvu4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* Deactivation of Early DLLA for disabled ILLA (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9475\_replaced([11124506](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqrdcfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* Calculation of rrmRestrictedInstCqi (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3005\_replaced([11125595](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqvu4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Note: Proposed MCS provided by CQI report handler is equal to last proposed value

---

**2.4.8.3.2.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11163421`)

Inner Loop DL Link Adaptation
Evaluation of WB-CQI report for values smaller than 0

---

**2.4.8.3.2.0-1.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `13138808`)

Inner Loop DL Link Adaptation
When WB-CQI value is less than or equal 0, L2PS shall not proceed with WB-CQI report, in this case following steps are not performed:

* Calculation of avarage WB-CQI (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3005\_replaced([11125595](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqvu4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* Deactivation of Early DLLA for disabled ILLA (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9475\_replaced([11124506](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqrdcfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* **Calculation of rrmRestrictedInstCqi (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3005\_replaced([11125595](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqvu4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))**

Note: Proposed MCS provided by CQI report handler is equal to last propesed value and WB\_CQI\_(64/256[CB008949-A]/1024[End CB008949-A])TBL\_CQI\_00…WB\_CQI\_(64/256[CB008949-A]/1024[End CB008949-A])TBL\_CQI\_15 counters update are reported (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6272\_replaced([11230269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kytYEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), [CB008949-A], 5G\_L2\_23354\_relaced([11197366](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29LH9_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))[End CB008949-A])

---

##### 2.4.8.3.2.0-2 Inner Loop DL Link Adaptation Intra Scheduler Average CQI calculation sharing (ID: 11163437)

**2.4.8.3.2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11163443`)

Inner Loop DL Link Adaptation
DL Sheduler shall send  internal message to inform UL if CQI is above DCI Aggregation Treshold

---

##### 2.4.8.3.2.0-3 Inner Loop DL Link Adaptation CQI adjustment after rank downgrade (ID: 11163448)

**2.4.8.3.2.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11163452`)

Inner Loop DL Link Adaptation
For CQI adjustment related with forced rank downgrade mechanism, please follow 5G\_L2\_22721\_replaced([11164116](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25qg__vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or 5G\_UP\_ALG\_31666\_replaced([11126236](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqw9APvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.8.3.2.0-4 Inner Loop DL Link Adaptation MCS mapping table (ID: 11163458)

**2.4.8.3.2.0-4.0-4**  (ID: `12787036`)

Inner Loop DL Link Adaptation
Tables defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3028\_replaced([11126310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqw9C_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are used to select the proposedMcs value, as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11042\_replaced([11125333](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqt5ufvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Upon reception of PsCell\_CellSetupReq message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_ 1988) with DlLinkAdaptation structure (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_103\_replaced([10968509](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UYL_Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) containing *actDlLaEnhCqi2McsTables IE equal to* TRUE, the 5G-L2-PS instance shall:\*\*

 use 3GPP based CQI to MCS mapping tables in DL Link Adaptation for:

o [CB008949-A]1024QAM 10% BLER ([12721154](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_S9CdgG0REfCmnYHxzZN44w?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), or,[End CB008949-A]

o 256QAM 10% BLER (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29075\_replaced([11128972](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq6G-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), or,

o 64QAM 10% BLER (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29074\_replaced([11128950](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq6G9_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), or,

 if R&D parameter *rdActDlLaEnh64QamLowSeBrCqiTable (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29376\_replaced([11139009](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krjnOPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to* TRUE, then the 5G-L2-PS instance shall use 3GPP based CQI to MCS mapping tables in DL Link Adaptation for 64QAM Low-SE 10% BLER (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29076\_replaced([11128995](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq6G-_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),\*\*

 else if R&D parameter *rdActDlLaEnh64QamLowSeBrCqiTable (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29376\_replaced([11139009](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krjnOPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to* FALSE, then the 5G-L2-PS instance shall use 5GMAX based CQI to MCS mapping tables in DL Link Adaptation for 64QAM Low-SE 10% BLER, as described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3029\_replaced([11126315](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqw9DPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).\*\*

Upon reception of PsCell\_CellSetupReq message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq message (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_ 1988) with DlLinkAdaptation structure (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_103\_replaced([10968509](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UYL_Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) containing *actDlLaEnhCqi2McsTables IE equal to* FALSE, the 5G-L2-PS instance shall use\*\*

* [CB008949-A] 3GPP based CQI to MCS mapping tables in DL Link Adaptation for the case of 1024QAM 10% BLER, [End CB008949-A]
* 5GMAX based CQI to MCS mapping tables in DL Link Adaptation [CB008949-A] for all other cases. [End CB008949-A]

as described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3029\_replaced([11126315](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqw9DPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For the conditions of use of 3GPP based CQI to MCS mapping tables in DL Link Adaptation, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3029\_replaced([11126315](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqw9DPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The tables shall be implemented with all PRBs listed in the tables found in requirement 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3028\_replaced([11126310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqw9C_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), plus all PRBs listed in requirement 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1794\_replaced([11110605](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpGJHPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). If some PRBs are not listed in the tables in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3028\_replaced([11126310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqw9C_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the table shall be implemented using interpolated valued.

Rational:

The full list of Prbs is required to calculate the proposed Mcs,

if UserSetupReq.actDlOptMcsSelection is Ture,

based on rdDlPRBMcsSelection (R&D parameter defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29011\_replaced([11138974](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krjnMfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

If NIDD parameter NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = True And rdEnablePropMcsCalcBasedOn2Prbs is set to True

based on 2 PRB's

else

based on system bandwidth, defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11042\_replaced([11125333](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqt5ufvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

if UserSetupReq.actDlOptMcsSelection is Ture,

The proposedMcs will be same as the scaled MCS

else

The proposedMcs will be used to calculate the scaled MCS, based on used bandwidth. Interpolation is only used to calculate the scaled MCS.

The definition of proposedMcs and scaledMcs can be found in 5G\_L2\_13540\_replaced([11163284](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25loevvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note 1: For Scalaed MCS, This is the rationale for the need for upsizing when proposed mcs is based on 2 PRBs. Because in this case, unlike in legacy proposedMcs always upsizing instead of downsizing. The 2 PRBs is used to get the strict SINR requirement, while selecting proposedMcs, move from left to right in the MCS table as long as the SINR req is fulfilled and code rate and upscale the MCS ,Refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24146\_replaced([11125436](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqugyfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Note 2: New R&D(rdEnablePropMcsCalcBasedOn2Prbs) parameter shall create and used for 2 PRB's based calculation ,Refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24185\_replaced([11138819](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kriZEfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.8.3.2.0-5 Inner Loop DL Link Adaptation Calculation of the alternateMcs to determine the number of DMRS CDM group(s) without data (ID: 11163480)

**2.4.8.3.2.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11163486`)

Inner Loop DL Link Adaptation
The 'proposedDlMcs', defined in 5G\_L2\_11111\_replaced([11163332](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25logvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), is calculated with 2 DMRS CDM groups without data. An alternative MCS is calculated with 1 DMRS CDM group without data. This alternative MCS is used to determine the number of DMRS CDM group(s) without data to use, defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3054\_replaced([11129150](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq6uCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If the selected number of DMRS group(s) witout data is 1, the proposedDlMcs shall be replaced by the alternative MCS.

The alternative MCS shall also be limited as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22782\_replaced([11125450](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqugy_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

##### 2.4.8.3.2.0-6 Inner Loop DL Link Adaptation Calculation of the DL proposed MCS before the FD Resource Allocation (ID: 12762923)

**2.4.8.3.2.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `12762929`)

Inner Loop DL Link Adaptation
**Calculation of the DL proposed MCS in FDM**

---

**2.4.8.3.2.0-6.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12762930`)

Inner Loop DL Link Adaptation
If link Adaptation Enhancements for Efficiency and Latency for DL is enabled ([12472235](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_OeKtoA1aEfCuhewgqkUVKQ)), in FR1 gNB-DU calculates the proposed MCS before the FD resources' allocation, such that the MCS utilized in FDM to estimate the number of required PRBs to drain the UE's buffer and the MCS used to calculate the TBS are (as much as possible) aligned.

For a UE i in the to-be-scheduled UE list (that is: selected to be scheduled), if all the following conditions are true:

* NRCELL.actLaEnhanceEfficiencyLatency == ‘DL’/‘DL\_UL’
* The cell's technology is FR1 TDD/FDD;
* The UE is candidate for a new transmission except RA Msg2, RA Msg4, SRB0;

the proposed MCS (rrmDlProposedMcs) shall be calculated before the FDM resources distribution, following the requirement [11125402](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqugxfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), with the consideration that:

* When NRCELL.actLaEnhanceEfficiencyLatency == ‘DL’/‘DL\_UL’, it is always NRCELL.actDlOptMcsSelection == true, that is: in the cqi2mcs table the single PRB number defined by rdDlPRBMcsSelection is used;
* The correction of the proposed MCS triggered by percRedSEDlRat1VoNR > 0 for a VoNR transmission in RAT1 is not part of the calculation done at this point as it is already done in a later phase of the FDM, on the basis of the latest available proposed MCS;
* MCS restrictions for SRB and VoNR-signalling ([11125468](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqugzvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) as well as MCS restrictions for VoNR ([11125480](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqvH0PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), shall be also considered in the calculation;

L2-PS shall correct the cqi as specified in [11125689](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqvu6fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) [CB014045-C-UPD002] considering that rrmDeltaAvgCqiMuMimo and rrmDeltaCqiDlMuZf shall be not applied (or shall be set to 0) as MU-MIMO pairing has not taken place at this point. [Editor's note: discussed in DFMEA-lite and to be implemented]. [End CB014045-C-UPD002]

---

**2.4.8.3.2.0-6.0-2**  (ID: `12762936`)

Inner Loop DL Link Adaptation
Possible Adaptations of the DL proposed MCS after the allocation of the FD Resources

---

**2.4.8.3.2.0-6.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12762924`)

Inner Loop DL Link Adaptation
[CB014045-C-UPD002] Before the FD resource's allocation, it has not been decided yet if the UE will be MU-MIMO paired or not in the current slot. After the FD resource's allocation, if the UE has been paired, the proposed MCS needs to be re-calculated to take rrmDeltaAvgCqiMuMimo and rrmDeltaCqiDlMuZf cqi correction into account ([11125689](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqvu6fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)). [End CB014045-C-UPD002]

The check if the proposed MCS fulfills the code rate limitation ([11132055](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krEfB_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) must also be performed after the FD resources allocation, as it depends on the number of allocated PRBs. This can lead to a further reduction of the proposed MCS.

---

##### 2.4.8.3.2.0-7 Inner Loop DL Link Adaptation Downgrade MCS for pending buffer (ID: 13336091)

**2.4.8.3.2.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `13336092`)

Inner Loop DL Link Adaptation
To correct the MCS for DL scheduling, L2-PS shall try to find out the smallest MCS value which maps to a DL TB size larger than or equal to the pending buffer size plus the size of MAC CE header, see [11192270](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvjWafvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for detail. To find out the final MCS value satisfying this need - let’s call it ‘Target MCS’, L2-PS has to check the TB size of zero, one or more intermediate MCS(s) – let’s call it ‘Tested MCS’. Depending on the number of Tested MCSs, Target MCS finding procedure may turn to be quite CPU consuming. To save the CPU resources used on TB size calculation, L2-PS may select to calculate Tested MCS’s TB size via below formula:

tbs (testedMcs) = tbs (testedMcs + 1) \* mcsDowngradingRatio (testedMcs +1)

where

* tbs (testedMcs) is the TB size of Tested MCS
* tbs (testedMcs + 1) is the TB size of Tested MCS + 1
* mcsDowngradingRatio (testedMcs +1) is the MCS downgrading ratio of Tested MCS + 1

For DL 256Qam, mcsDowngradingRatio is defined by below table:

Table 1 for TBS> 4000

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a table with two rows and multiple columns. The first row contains headers "MCS0" through "MCS12". The second row starts with "Ratio" and then contains numerical values corresponding to the headers above. The third row contains headers "MCS13" through "MCS27". The fourth row contains numerical values corresponding to the headers in the third row.

|  | MCS0 | MCS1 | MCS2 | MCS3 | MCS4 | MCS5 | MCS6 | MCS7 | MCS8 | MCS9 | MCS10 | MCS11 | MCS12 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Ratio |  | 0.61 | 0.62 | 0.67 | 0.748 | 0.785 | 0.86 | 0.875 | 0.89 | 0.88 | 0.93 | 0.94 | 0.894 |
|  | MCS13 | MCS14 | MCS15 | MCS16 | MCS17 | MCS18 | MCS19 | MCS20 | MCS21 | MCS22 | MCS23 | MCS24 | MCS25 |
| ------- | ------- | ------- | ------- | ------- | ------- | ------- | ------- | ------- | ------- | ------- | ------- | ------- | ------- |
|  | 0.9 | 0.91 | 0.92 | 0.91 | 0.93 | 0.922 | 0.933 | 0.95 | 0.952 | 0.924 | 0.94 | 0.94 | 0.945 |

Table 2 for TBS< 4000

[image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a table with two rows and multiple columns. The first row contains headers labeled "MCS0" through "MCS12". The second row starts with the label "Ratio" and then contains numerical values corresponding to the headers in the first row. The third row contains headers labeled "MCS13" through "MCS27". The fourth row contains numerical values corresponding to the headers in the third row.
```md

|  | MCS0 | MCS1 | MCS2 | MCS3 | MCS4 | MCS5 | MCS6 | MCS7 | MCS8 | MCS9 | MCS10 | MCS11 | MCS12 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Ratio |  | 0.63 | 0.6 | 0.66 | 0.748 | 0.8 | 0.87 | 0.86 | 0.89 | 0.88 | 0.92 | 0.948 | 0.88 |
|  | MCS13 | MCS14 | MCS15 | MCS16 | MCS17 | MCS18 | MCS19 | MCS20 | MCS21 | MCS22 | MCS23 | MCS24 | MCS25 |
|  | 0.91 | 0.92 | 0.89 | 0.95 | 0.93 | 0.88 | 0.96 | 0.97 | 0.94 | 0.93 | 0.95 | 0.9 | 0.95 |

Note:

mcsDowngradingRatio(x) is the minimum tbs(x-1)/tbs(x) value among all nb\_data\_symbols, nb\_rb, nb\_layers, where x refers to MCS value (testedMcs + 1).

[CB008949-WA]

For DL 1024Qam, mcsDowngradingRatio is defined by below table:

#### 2.4.8.3.3 Outer Loop DL Link Adaptation

##### 2.4.8.3.3.0-1 Outer Loop DL Link Adaptation Interaction with DPA (ID: 11163495)

**2.4.8.3.3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11163501`)

Outer Loop DL Link Adaptation
Handling fake NACKs

---

**2.4.8.3.3.0-1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11163507`)

Outer Loop DL Link Adaptation
In DPA algorithm(5G\_L2\_589), there maybe some NACK(no real DL scheduler) from UE since DPA allocaiton Cdai/Tdai mismatch with real DL scheduler result.

Pcell should discard fake NACKs and exclude such NACK from LA algorithm

refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2941\_replaced([11123890](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqmk9_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (his would result in fake c-dai/t-dai, which could result in more NACKs from UE (in UL logs). It is expected that there will not be any Link Adaptation or RLF triggering because of these NACKs.

---

##### 2.4.8.3.3.0-2 Outer Loop DL Link Adaptation service aware BLER target (ID: 11163512)

**2.4.8.3.3.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11163517`)

Outer Loop DL Link Adaptation
DL service aware BLER target configuration to L2PS

---

**2.4.8.3.3.0-2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11163522`)

Outer Loop DL Link Adaptation
L2PS receives the service aware(DRB specific) BLER target profile in PsUser\_UserSetupReq or PsUser\_BearerSetupReq with the presence of drbBRPdschConfig below the IE DrbAddReqPs, refer to 5G\_L2\_IF\_397\_replaced([10974876](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U-o4vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

One service aware BLER target profile contains the detail value of profile ID, Bler target and/or stepdown. When multi DRBs associated with service aware BLER target setup for the UE, there will be several service aware BLER target profiles existing in this UE. Currently there can be max two NRPDSCHBRLA profiles supported.

Note:

1. there can be several bearers associated with the same service aware BLER target profile.

[CB013303-C]2. this profile configuration also apply to DL CA SCELL. [End CB013303-C]

---

**2.4.8.3.3.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11163528`)

Outer Loop DL Link Adaptation
DL service aware BLER target profile selection

---

**2.4.8.3.3.0-2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11163534`)

Outer Loop DL Link Adaptation
As there may be max two NRPDSCHBRLA profiles configured for the UE, then it need deciding which profile takes effect for this UE, refer to case3 in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26677\_replaced([11130068](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-YbfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The selection happens when profile appears in  PsUser\_UserSetupReq or PsUser\_BearerSetupReq, meanwhile when PsUser\_BearerDeleteReq is received, it shall do profile selection among the left bearers, when none of the left bearers is associated with service aware BLER target , then refer to case4 in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26677\_replaced([11130068](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-YbfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note:

1. when the selected NRPDSCHBRLA profile does not contain the stepdown value, then cell level NRBTS/NRCELL/dllaDeltaCqiStepdown( when online change with PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq received in L2PS, new dllaDeltaCqiStepdown only takes effect for new UE) will be used.

[CB013303-C]2. this profile selection also apply to DL CA SCELL.[End CB013303-C]

---

**2.4.8.3.3.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `11163539`)

Outer Loop DL Link Adaptation
DL service aware BLER target interworking with VoNR and HR mode

---

**2.4.8.3.3.0-2.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11163550`)

Outer Loop DL Link Adaptation
Service aware BLER target cannot be configured for VoNR (5QI 1**[CB008118-CB]/5QI** 65/5QI 66**[End CB008118-CB]) bearer, refer to 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_14190\_replaced([11252212](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tngr0fvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). So for UE with 5QI1**[CB008118-CB]/5QI **65/5QI 66**[End CB008118-CB] bearer and DRB specific BLER target bearer configured, the NRBTS/NRCELL/dllaTargetBlerVoNR should be selected when NRBTS/NRCELL/actTargetBlerVoNR is set to TRUE, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26677\_replaced([11130068](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-YbfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).***\******\***

For UE work in HR(high reliability) mode, DRB specific BLER target will not be used, refer to case2 in  5G\_UP\_ALG\_26677\_replaced([11130068](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-YbfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**2.4.8.3.3.0-2.0-4**  (ID: `11163555`)

Outer Loop DL Link Adaptation
DL dynamic stepup when MAD algorithm is used

---

**2.4.8.3.3.0-2.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11163561`)

Outer Loop DL Link Adaptation
[Before CB013303-D-UPD001]

When DL dynamic stepup of MAD algorithm is applied according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_13044\_replaced([11129840](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq9KT_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), NRPDSCHBRLA profile selected according to 5G\_L2\_17995 should further pass the extra check that  the BLER target of the selected NRPDSCHBRLA profile  is in the range of [rdMinBlerTargetForMADAlgInDrBSpec, rdMaxBlerTargetForMADAlgInDrBSpec], then the NRPDSCHBRLA profile will be finally used,  otherwise cell level NRBTS/NRCELL/dllaBlerTarget and NRBTS/NRCELL/dllaDeltaCqiStepdown will be used, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_13043\_replaced([11129747](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq9KSPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[CB013303-D-UPD001]

For DL dynamic stepup of MAD algorithm, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_13043\_replaced([11129747](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq9KSPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

NRPDSCHBRLA profile selected according to 5G\_L2\_17995 should check further that if the BLER target of the selected NRPDSCHBRLA profile  is in the range of [rdMinBlerTargetForMADAlgInDrBSpec, rdMaxBlerTargetForMADAlgInDrBSpec].

if yes, then the BLER target of the selected NRPDSCHBRLA profile will be finally used in the MAD algorithm.

if no, then the MAD algorithm is not applicable for the selected NRPDSCHBRLA profile . which means the blerDistFactor is 1.

[End CB013303-D-UPD001]

Note:

1. rdMinBlerTargetForMADAlgInDrBSpec refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26741\_replaced([11138919](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krjAJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), rdMaxBlerTargetForMADAlgInDrBSpec refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26743\_replaced([11138933](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krjAKPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[CB013303-D-UPD001]

1. blerDistFactor refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_13044\_replaced([11129840](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq9KT_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End CB013303-D-UPD001]

---

**2.4.8.3.3.0-2.0-5**  (ID: `11163565`)

Outer Loop DL Link Adaptation
DL dynamic stepup when 2-region is used

---

**2.4.8.3.3.0-2.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11163570`)

Outer Loop DL Link Adaptation
For DL dynamic stepup of 2-region, the BLER target used can be DRB specific, refer to BLER target selection in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26677\_replaced([11130068](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-YbfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

#### 2.4.8.3.4 L2-PS triggered switch between High Reliability and Basic Reliability

##### 2.4.8.3.4.0-1 L2-PS triggered switch between High Reliability and Basic Reliability Overview (ID: 11163580)

**2.4.8.3.4.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11163588`)

L2-PS triggered switch between High Reliability and Basic Reliability
[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a flowchart illustrating a process with two main states: "HR OLC mode" and "BR OLC mode". The flowchart depicts the transitions between these modes based on specific input events and conditions.
The process starts with "Input Events for HR to BR". This leads to a transition from "HR OLC mode" to "BR OLC mode". The conditions for this switch are:
1. "PDSCH fallback triggered (5G\_UP\_ALG\_16320)"
OR
2. "if aISelection is set to dynamic, DL PDCCH fall back triggered (5G\_UP\_ALG\_16997)"
From "BR OLC mode", the process can transition back to "HR OLC mode". This transition is triggered by "Input Events for BR to HR". The conditions for this switch are:
1. "PDSCH recovery triggered (5G\_UP\_ALG\_16423)"
AND
2. "if aISelection is set to dynamic, DL PDCCH recovery triggered (5G\_UP\_ALG\_17138)"
The flowchart uses rectangular boxes for process steps and conditions, and oval shapes for the modes. Arrows indicate the direction of the flow and transitions. The overall diagram represents a state machine or a control flow logic.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3386.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

Event list to HR to BR evaluation:

[CB008246-H]

 dlPdcchHRBlerOutagePeriod, if alSelection is set to Dynamic: when dlPdcchHRBlerOutagePeriod timer is elapsed (5G\_UP\_ALG\_16997\_replaced([11170693](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt_3PPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

[End CB008246-H]

 dHRBlerOutagePeriod: when dHRBlerOutagePeriod timer is elapsed (5G\_UP\_ALG\_16320\_replaced([11129978](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-YYvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

 dlNackFlood: when HARQ NACK Flood even happens according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3068\_replaced([11129535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq8jN_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),

Event list to BR to HR evaluation:

 dlHRBlerRecoverPeriod: when dHRBlerOutagePeriod timer is elapsed for PDSCH(5G\_UP\_ALG\_16423\_replaced([11130006](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-YZfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [CB008246-H] and PDCCH(5G\_UP\_ALG\_17138\_replaced([11170742](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt_3QPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB008246-H]

<https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:x:/r/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Drawings%20and%20diagrams%20for%205G/User%20Plane/5G%20L2%20Entity%20Level/2%205G-L2-PS%20Component%20Requirements/CB008246%20-%205G_L2_Entity_Level%20Module%20-%20Drawings/2.4%20Algorithm/StateMachine_5G_L2_13217.xlsx?d=we04d16188c29470fbd2ed340f3aff351&csf=1&web=1&e=9fDOnR>

---

##### 2.4.8.3.4.0-2 L2-PS triggered switch between High Reliability and Basic Reliability PDSCH triggered Fallback/Recovery (ID: 11163592)

**2.4.8.3.4.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11163599`)

L2-PS triggered switch between High Reliability and Basic Reliability
Samples Collection during the Channel Monitoring

---

**2.4.8.3.4.0-2.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11163609`)

L2-PS triggered switch between High Reliability and Basic Reliability
The metric used to monitor the UE PDSCH channel of a serving cell is the wide-band proposed MCS i.e. the MCS calculated by the LA (5G\_UP\_ALG\_22781\_replaced([11125340](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqt5u_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) considering the entire cell bandwidth.

L2-PS already calculates this value when the UE is scheduled in DL (with a new transmission) and when a CQI is received. Every time it is calculated within the monitoring period, the calculated value is taken as valid sample for the purpose of the channel monitoring.

[CB008246-R]

If two consecutive samples (example: wbMcs[t] and wbMcs[t+delta]) are distant in time more than rdOversamplingInterval ms (5G\_L2\_15707), either wbMcs[t] or wbMcs[t+delta] value is taken N = delta/rdOversamplingInterval additional times (oversampling), according to the following rules:

* If wbMcs[t+delta] is calculated at CQI reception, wbMcs[t] is taken N more times as valid sample. Reason: it's not desired to consider the effect of the just received CQI backwards;
* If wbMcs[t+delta] is calculated when the UE is scheduled, wbMcs[t+delta] is taken N more times as valid sample. Reason: if wbMcs[t] is calculated when the UE is scheduled the effect of its HARQ feedback is considered earlier; if wbMcs[t] is calculated at CQI reception then wbMcs[t] is equal to wbMcs[t+delta].

Last Sample:

When the monitoring period is over (dlHRBlerOutagePeriod/dlHRBlerRecoverPeriod timer has expired or dlHRBlerOutagePeriod has been stopped due to NACK flood), if the last calculated wide-band proposed MCS (wbMcs[tlast]) is older than rdOversamplingInterval ms, a new wide-band proposed MCS is calculated and taken deltaLatestSample/rdOversamplingInterval times as valid sample, where deltaLatestSample is the difference between the time when the monitoring is stopped and tlast.

First Sample:

For the 1st wide-band proposed MCS calculated within the monitoring period it is not required to perform backwards oversampling.

The oversampling aims to find a viable solution to the case that we have few samples available because the UE is rarely scheduled (mainly due to its traffic profile). It tries to reach similar results as sampling at regular intervals the latest value stored in the UE Database, w/o increasing SW effort or CPU load too much.

Oversampling is done only if rdOversamplingInterval > 0.

[End CB008246-R]

---

##### 2.4.8.3.4.0-3 L2-PS triggered switch between High Reliability and Basic Reliability TTI trace event for switching between High Reliability and Basic Reliability (ID: 11163614)

**2.4.8.3.4.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11163630`)

L2-PS triggered switch between High Reliability and Basic Reliability
When dlHRBlerRecoverPeriod timer is elapsed, switch from BR to HR condition for PDSCH(5G\_UP\_ALG\_16423\_replaced([11130006](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-YZfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))[CB008246-H]  and for PDCCH (5G\_UP\_ALG\_17138\_replaced([11170742](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt_3QPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB008246-H]are re-evaluated and the related TTI trace event dlLaSwitchBetweenHrAndBr is called with:

 event : “dlHRBlerRecoverPeriod”

 pdschMetric:

 NbSamples = "total number of proposal MCS valid sample within the period"

 NbSamplesThreshold = "total number of proposal MCS greater than or equal to threshold within the period"

 Ratio = percentage of proposed MCS within the period

[CB008246-H]

 pdcchMetric:

 NbSamples = 0 (not filled)

 NbSamplesThreshold = 0 (not filled)

 Ratio = 0 (not filled)

[End CB008246-H]

 laMode :

 LA mode after evaluation.

[CB008246-H]

When dlPdcchHRBlerOutagePeriod timer is elapsed, switch from HR to BR condition for PCCCH(5G\_UP\_ALG\_16997\_replaced([11170693](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt_3PPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is re-evaluated and the related TTI trace event dlLaSwitchBetweenHrAndBr is called with:

 event : “dlPdcchHRBlerOutagePeriod”

 pdschMetric (5G\_UP\_ALG\_16320\_replaced([11129978](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-YYvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) current value, no switch due to this metric)

 NbSamples = 0 (not filled)

 NbSamplesThreshold = 0 (not filled)

 Ratio = 0 (not filled)

 pdcchMetric:

 NbSamples = [image-0][image\_desc]The image is completely black.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3392.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]”

 NbSamplesThreshold = " [image-1][image\_desc]The image is completely black.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3392.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]”

 Ratio = [image-2][image\_desc]The image is completely black.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3392.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2]”

 laMode :

 LA mode after evaluation.

[End CB008246-H]

When dlHRBlerOutagePeriod timer is elapsed or dlNackFlood event, switch from HR to BR condition for PDSCH(5G\_UP\_ALG\_16320\_replaced([11129978](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-YYvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is re-evaluated and the related TTI trace event dlLaSwitchBetweenHrAndBr is called with:

 event : “dHRBlerOutagePeriod” or “dlNackFlood”

 pdschMetric (5G\_UP\_ALG\_16320\_replaced([11129978](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-YYvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

 NbSamples = "total number of proposal MCS valid sample within the period"

 NbSamplesThreshold = "total number of proposal MCS less than threshold within the period"

 Ratio = percentage of proposed MCS within the period

[CB008246-H]

 pdcchMetric

 NbSamples = 0 (not filled)

 NbSamplesThreshold = 0 (not filled)

 Ratio = 0 (not filled)

[End CB008246-H]

 laMode :

 LA mode after evaluation.
