## 2.4.10 SU-MIMO Management

### 2.4.10.0-1 SU-MIMO Management FA: Beamforming/MIMO​ Document Owner: Michael 1. Wang (NSB); Michal Fiejka (Nokia) (ID: 11164129)

### 2.4.10.1 UL SU-MIMO

#### 2.4.10.1.1 Support for Transform Precoding

#### 2.4.10.1.1-1 Support for Transform Precoding

##### 2.4.10.1.1-1.0-1 Support for Transform Precoding Triggers for Changing from Slot Aggregation Disabled to Slot Aggregation Enabled (ID: 11164293)

**2.4.10.1.1-1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11164298`)

Support for Transform Precoding
In order to trigger the transition SAG disabled->enabled, L2-PS shall monitor the UL SINR according to the algorithm in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19242\_replaced([11204811](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwl4M_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), if the conditions to do so are true (the conditions are also specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19242\_replaced([11204811](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwl4M_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

If “measured SINR” < rrmThresholdSagOn

Increment rdSagHystCounter by 1

Else

Set rdSagHystCounter = 0

Where:

* rrmThresholdSagOn  is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19242\_replaced([11204811](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwl4M_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* “measured SINR” referenced above is rrmAvgSinrSagSwitch as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19242\_replaced([11204811](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwl4M_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note: if 'actUlTransPreEnhRankSwitchIwk' = true (5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) the additonal condition which has to be true in order to start the SINR monitoring is that the UE is in UL Rank 1. This condition is also mentioned in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19242\_replaced([11204811](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwl4M_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If rdSagHystCounter >= rdSagOnHystThresh(5G\_L2\_23910), L2-PS shall request CP-RT, via PsUser\_ReconfigurationRequiredInd (5G\_L2\_IF\_536\_replaced([10977582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VNSbfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), to reconfigure the UE to enable Slot Aggregation.

“User reconfiguration required indication” procedure follows the message flow described in 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_132\_replaced([11180104](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Bef5A_vREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)):

when L2-PS send PsUser\_ReconfigurationRequiredInd, start a ReconfigRequiredInd timer(defined by rdReconfigRequiredIndTimer), and stop monitoring the UL SINR for SAG off->On switch.

if rdReconfigRequiredIndTimer is expires,

- set the UE back to SAG Disabled state.

- restart to monitoring the UL SINR according to the algorithm in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19242\_replaced([11204811](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwl4M_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for SAG switch;

If CP-RT acknowledges the SAG switch request (PsUser\_UserModifyReq->l2psRequiredIndTrigger is slotAggregationSwitch), L2-PS shall:

- Start timer rdSagRrcReconfigTimer (5G\_L2\_23909);

- Enter the reconfiguration transient phase;

If CP-RT indicates that the RRC Reconfiguration has been completed succesfully (PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq->SlotAggregationInd = success) L2-PS shall:

- Set the UE to SAG Enabled state;

- stop timer rdSagRrcReconfigTimer and exit the transient phase.

else if CP-RT request to cancel the reconfiguration (PsUser\_UserModifyReq->cancellationType is slotAggregationSwitch, L2-PS shall:

- Set UE back to SAG Disabled state;

- stop timer rdSagRrcReconfigTimer and exit the transient phase;

Note : stop the DL-DCCH RRC Complete Detection for RRC Messages Requiring RRC Completion procedure in case of it is started (5G\_UP\_ALG\_29060\_replaced([11153872](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kspMVPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

If timer rdSagRrcReconfigTimer expires, L2-PS shall:

- Set UE back to SAG Disabled state;

- exit the transient phase;

Note : During transient phase, L2-PS shall also follow the DL-DCCH RRC Complete Detection for RRC Messages Requiring RRC Completion procedure specified by 5G\_L2\_22365.

In order to avoid possible conflicts between DCI 0\_0 size and DCI 0\_1 size due to the Reconfiguration, L2-PS shall manage the size of the PUSCH TDRA Table as specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7087\_replaced([11171627](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuF92vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (see also 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7115\_replaced([11171588](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuFW0vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). When the transient phase is left after a cancellation of the reconfiguration (PsUser\_UserModifyReq->slotAggregationSwitch = CANCELLATION), L2-PS shall apply the PUSCH TDRA Table which was in use before the re-configuration.

---

##### 2.4.10.1.1-1.0-2 Support for Transform Precoding Triggers for Changing from Slot Aggregation Enabled to Slot Aggregation Disabled (ID: 11164302)

**2.4.10.1.1-1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11164307`)

Support for Transform Precoding
In order to trigger the transition TP enabled->disabled, L2-PS shall monitor the UL SINR according to the algorithm in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19242\_replaced([11204811](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwl4M_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), if the conditions to do so are true (the conditions are also specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19242\_replaced([11204811](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwl4M_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

If “measured SINR” >= rrmThresholdSagOff

- Increment rdSagHystCounter by 1

Else

- Set rdSagHystCounter = 0

Where:

* rrmThresholdSagOff  is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19242\_replaced([11204811](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwl4M_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* “measured SINR” referenced above is rrmAvgSinrSagSwitch per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19242\_replaced([11204811](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwl4M_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If rdSagHystCounter >= rdSagOnHystThresh(5G\_L2\_23910), L2-PS shall request CP-RT, via PsUser\_ReconfigurationRequiredInd (5G\_L2\_IF\_536\_replaced([10977582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VNSbfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), to reconfigure the UE to disable Slot Aggregation.

“User reconfiguration required indication” procedure follows the message flow described in 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_132\_replaced([11180104](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Bef5A_vREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)):

Note : when L2-PS send PsUser\_ReconfigurationRequiredInd, start a ReconfigRequiredInd timer(defined by rdReconfigRequiredIndTimer), and stop monitoring the UL SINR for SAG On->Off switch.

if rdReconfigRequiredIndTimer is expires,

- set the UE back to Slot Aggregation Enabled state.

- restart to monitoring the UL SINR according to the algorithm in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19242\_replaced([11204811](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwl4M_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for SAG switch;

If CP-RT acknowledges the Transform Precoding switch request (PsUser\_UserModifyReq->l2psRequiredIndTrigger is slotAggregationSwitch), L2-PS shall:

- Start timer rdSagRrcReconfigTimer (5G\_L2\_23909);

- Enter the reconfiguration transient phase;

If CP-RT indicates that the RRC Reconfiguration has been completed succesfully (PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq->slotAggregationSwitch = success) L2-PS shall:

- Set the UE to Transform Precoder Disabled state;

- stop timer rdSagRrcReconfigTimer and exit the transient phase.

else if CP-RT requests to cancel the reconfiguration (PsUser\_UserModifyReq->cancellationType is slotAggregationSwitch), L2-PS shall:

- Set UE back to Transform Precoder Enabled state;

- stop timer rdSagRrcReconfigTimer and exit the transient phase;

Note : - stop the DL-DCCH RRC Complete Detection for RRC Messages Requiring RRC Completion procedure in case of it is started (5G\_UP\_ALG\_29060\_replaced([11153872](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kspMVPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

If timer rdSagRrcReconfigTimer expires, L2-PS shall:

* Set UE back to Transform Precoder Enabled state;
* exit the transient phase;

Note: During transient phase, L2-PS shall also follow the DL-DCCH RRC Complete Detection for RRC Messages Requiring RRC Completion procedure specified by 5G\_L2\_22365.

In order to avoid possible conflicts between DCI 0\_0 size and DCI 0\_1 size due to the Reconfiguration, L2-PS shall manage the size of the PUSCH TDRA Table as specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7087\_replaced([11171627](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuF92vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (see also 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7115\_replaced([11171588](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuFW0vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). When the transient phase is left after a cancellation of the reconfiguration (PsUser\_UserModifyReq->slotAggregationSwitch = CANCELLATION), L2-PS shall apply the PUSCH TDRA Table which was in use before the re-configuration.

---

#### 2.4.10.1.1-2 Support for Transform Precoding

**2.4.10.1.1-2.0-7**  (ID: `13336857`)

Support for Transform Precoding
For state machine for adaptive number of SRS port refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10760\_replaced([11157805](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks98f_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

When the L2-PS changes the UE "adaptive number of SRS ports" state to “ulRank 2” it starts the “adaptiveSrsPortsKeepRank2Timer” timer whose duration is rdTPinteractAdaptSrsPortsKeepRank2Timer (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10834\_replaced([11141214](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krxpv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) if DFT-S-OFDM is activated (NRCELL\actUlDftsOfdm = true) otherwise **rdAdaptiveSrsPortsKeepRank2Timer (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10839\_replaced([11141177](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krxpr_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**

When the “adaptiveSrsPortsKeepRank2Timer” is running, the UE is scheduled with ulRank 2, the UL rank computation 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3224\_replaced([11139906](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krqU8PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) algorithm runs meaning rrmUlRiLongTerm is updated but there will be no reconfiguration even if the rank selection for next transmission computation result is 1.

When the “adaptive number of SRS ports” state is “single Tx” and when the rank selection for the next initial transmissions changes to 2 according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3224\_replaced([11139906](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krqU8PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) algorithm, L2-PS decides to change the number of SRS ports to 2.

When the “adaptive number of SRS ports” state is “ulRank 2 ” and the “adaptiveSrsPortsKeepRank2Timer” timer is not running, L2-PS once every rdTPinteractAdaptSrsPortsRankPollingTimer (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10835\_replaced([11141230](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krxpxPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) if DFT-S-OFDM is activated (NRCELL\actUlDftsOfdm = true) otherwise rdAdaptiveSrsPortsRankPollingTimer (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10840\_replaced([11141189](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krxpsfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) checks the 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3224\_replaced([11139906](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krqU8PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) rank selection for the next transmission computation result and if the result is 1 for rdTPinteractAdaptSrsPortsNbConsecutiveForReconf (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10836\_replaced([11141242](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kryQsPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) if DFT-S-OFDM is activated (NRCELL\actUlDftsOfdm = true) or a UE has a VoNR bearer with the "actForcedDftSOfdmVonrUl" parameter set to "True otherwise rdAdaptiveSrsPortsNbConsecutiveForReconf (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10841\_replaced([11141204](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krxps_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) consecutive times L2-PS decides to change the number of SRS ports to 1.

When L2-PS decides to change the number of SRS ports, it launches the "User Reconfiguration Required" procedure (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_536\_replaced([10977582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VNSbfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and start a ReconfigRequiredInd timer(defined by rdReconfigRequiredIndTimer)

if rdReconfigRequiredIndTimer is expires

* set the UE back to original SRS ports

When in this procedure L2-PS receives the PsUser\_UserModifyReq message with l2psRequiredIndTrigger with "nrofSrsPortsChange", See 5G\_L3\_32270\_replaced([11061658](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BCiVrv_KEe-D3seUwaI0tg)) L2-PS shall changes the "adaptive number of SRS ports" state to "Reconfiguration".

When the "adaptive number of SRS ports" state moves to "Reconfiguration", L2-PS if running shall stop the timer rdUlPmiRiFallBackTimer.

When the "adaptive number of SRS ports" state moves to "single Tx", L2-PS shall reset the rrmUlRiLongTerm value to 1 (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3224\_replaced([11139906](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krqU8PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for the use of rrmUlRiLongTerm) and shall reinitialize to zero and shall restart the timer rdUlPmiRiFallBackTimer.

When in this procedure L2-PS receives the PsUser\_UserModifyReq message with cancellationType  is nrofSrsPortsChange L2-PS shall

* set the UE back to original SRS ports

When 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserModifyReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_453\_replaced([10976074](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VEvgvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with IE PsUser\_UserModifyReq.puschConfig.ulFullPowerTransmissionR16 present and set to value other than “notConfigured” while “adaptive number of SRS ports” is active for the UE with state “single Tx”, 5G-L2-PS shall perform "Reconfiguration" from 1 to 2 SRS ports and disable “adaptive number of SRS ports” for the UE (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6925\_replaced([11157717](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks9VafvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Transition shall be initiated directly by corresponding PsUser\_UserModifyResp (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_458\_replaced([10976517](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VGkxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and finished with the reception of next PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_542\_replaced([10977666](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VN5fPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

For FR1 inter-band 2CC UL CA with 3Tx for TDD PCell, when 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserModifyReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_453\_replaced([10976074](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VEvgvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with IE PsUser\_UserModifyReq.puschConfig.ulFullPowerTransmissionR16 present and set to value “notConfigured” due to SCell addition/SCell change reconfiguration to TDD Pcell when step-wise SCell addition [CB010741-C] or SCell Upgrade from DL to DL\_UL [End CB010741-C], 5G\_L2-PS shall enable “adaptive number of SRS ports” for the UE (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6925\_replaced([11157717](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks9VafvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). When 5G-L2-PS receives PsUser\_UserModifyReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_453\_replaced([10976074](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VEvgvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with IE PsUser\_UserModifyReq.puschConfig.ulFullPowerTransmissionR16 present and set to value other than “notConfigured” due to SCell release  reconfiguration to TDD Pcell when step-wise SCell addition [CB010741-C] or SCell Upgrade from DL to DL\_UL [End CB010741-C], 5G-L2-PS shall disable “adaptive number of SRS ports” for the UE (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6925\_replaced([11157717](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks9VafvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

When the UE state is either "single Tx", the value nrofSrsPorts considered in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3216\_replaced([11139853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krqU5PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is 1.

When the UE state is either "ulRank 2”, the value nrofSrsPorts considered in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3216\_replaced([11139853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krqU5PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is 2.

When the UE state is either "Reconfiguration" 2-to-1 SRS ports" or "Reconfiguration" 1-to-2 SRS ports", the value nrofSrsPorts is not significant in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3216\_replaced([11139853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krqU5PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

CP2 reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10760\_replaced([11157805](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks98f_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

#### 2.4.10.1.1-3 Support for Transform Precoding

**2.4.10.1.1-3.0-1**  (ID: `11164363`)

Support for Transform Precoding
For a UE with "adaptive number of SRS ports" (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6925\_replaced([11157717](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks9VafvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and with maxNumOfUlLayers 1 :

The UE is always in the "single Tx" state and the value nrofSrsPorts considered in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3216\_replaced([11139853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krqU5PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is 1.

[CNI-59628] CP2 reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3257\_replaced([11157706](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks9VZ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [End CNI-59628]

---

#### 2.4.10.1.1-4 Support for Transform Precoding

##### 2.4.10.1.1-4.0-1 Support for Transform Precoding Long Term UL rank computation (ID: 11164375)

**2.4.10.1.1-4.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11164381`)

Support for Transform Precoding
[CB009849-A]

During a VoNR DRB addition via User Setup or User Modify, if the "actForcedDftSOfdmVonrUl" parameter is enabled in the drbAddReqPs message, the "rrmUlRiLongTerm" value should be set according to the 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19663\_replaced([11139919](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krq78PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) specification after the Reconfig Complete Indication is triggered by the CP-RT.

Note : The "rrmUlRiLongTerm" parameter should be maintained at its current value if the transform precoding is switched from disabled to enabled by the CP-RT due to the addition of a 5QI-1 DRB and the "actForcedDftSOfdmVonrUl" parameter is set to TRUE. In this scenario, the "cancellationType" parameter should be set to "transformPrecoderSwitch" and communicated to the L2-PS via the PsUser\_UserModifyReq message..

[End CB009849-A]

5G-L2-PS shall calculate long term UL rank factor rrmUlRiLongTerm for any given UE according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19663\_replaced([11139919](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krq78PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The rrmUlRiLongTerm is used for the UL rank selection algorithm defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3226\_replaced([11139957](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krq79_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).  5G-L2-PS shall use selected rank to fill numOfLayers in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq message, see 5G\_L2\_916\_replaced([11179283](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27FdRPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

5G-L2-PS shall calculate rrmUlRiShortTerm value for rrmUlRiLongTerm determination if this value is needed according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19663\_replaced([11139919](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krq78PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). 5G-L2-PS shall derive [CB013202-B]or calculate[End CB013202-B] rrmUlRiShortTerm according to 5G\_L2\_23219\_replaced([11164387](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25sWS_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Initial value of rrmUlRiLongTerm shall be equal to rdInitialUlRi, see 5G\_L2\_3731\_replaced([11182981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27fs_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.10.1.1-4.0-2 Support for Transform Precoding Short Term UL rank computation (ID: 11164387)

**2.4.10.1.1-4.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11164392`)

Support for Transform Precoding
5G-L2-PS shall use rrmUlRiShortTerm value for the calculation of rrmUlRiLongTerm, see 5G\_L2\_23218\_replaced([11164375](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25sWP_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). 5G-L2-PS shall set rrmUlRiShortTerm for any given UE according to:

[CB009849-A]

1. During a VoNR 5QI DRB addition via User Setup or User Modify, if the "actForcedDftSOfdmVonrUl" parameter is enabled in the drbAddReqPs message, the "rrmUlRiShortTerm" value should be set according to the 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30679\_replaced([11139943](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krq79fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) specification after the Reconfig Complete Indication is triggered by the CP-RT.

Note : The "rrmUlRiShortTerm" parameter should be maintained at its current value if the transform precoding is switched from disabled to enabled by the CP-RT due to the addition of a 5QI-1 DRB and the "actForcedDftSOfdmVonrUl" parameter is set to TRUE. In this scenario, the "cancellationType" parameter should be set to "transformPrecoderSwitch" and communicated to the L2-PS via the PsUser\_UserModifyReq message.

[End CB009849-A]

2. [CB013202-B]Else If 5G-L2-PS cell is configured or reconfigured with actEnhRankSelectSe equal to TRUE, see 5G\_L2\_IF\_7837\_replaced([10968771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UZaG_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)):  
Then 5G-L2-PS shall calculate rrmUlRiShortTerm value according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30873\_replaced([11139935](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krq78_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

To determine rrmUlRiShortTerm, 5G-L2-PS shall calculate predicted MCS for spectral efficiency check algorithm according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30887\_replaced([11132172](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krFGGPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).[Before CB013202-B-UPD002] Parameters MPR (Maximum Power Reduction) and deltaMPR256QAM, used for MCS calculation, shall be set by 5G-L2-PS as in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22294\_replaced([11140393](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krt_QvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), where they were used for calculation of UnlimitedPwrSinrCorrection.[End CB013202-B-UPD002][End CB013202-B]  
Note: For UEs configured with adaptive number of SRS ports, see 5G\_L2\_656\_replaced([11164313](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25sWIvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), when PUSCH is scheduled with 1 layer, 5G-L2-PS shall calculate rrmUlRiShortTerm according to algorithm 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3232\_replaced([11140029](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krrjAvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) - based on the sinr data from UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs.

3. Else rrmUlRiShortTerm shall be equal to valid ulRank indication, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6465\_replaced([11109746](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ko7xA_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), from non-DTXed:  
- UlData\_SrsReceiveRespPs, when PUSCH scheduled number of layers is equal to 1, see 5G\_L1\_IF\_253\_replaced([11514446](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR3PcfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));  
- UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs, when PUSCH scheduled number of layers is equal to 2, see 5G\_L1\_IF\_200\_replaced([11513831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlAPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

#### 2.4.10.1.1-5 Support for Transform Precoding

##### 2.4.10.1.1-5.0-1 Support for Transform Precoding PUSCH IRC Gain computation (ID: 11164406)

**2.4.10.1.1-5.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `12884831`)

Support for Transform Precoding
At each UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs reception (5G\_L2\_13320\_replaced([11180227](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27K83_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for not fake UEs (5G\_L2\_10788\_replaced([11152464](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24omO_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall calculate *rrmPuschIrcGain to estimate IRC gain according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19665\_replaced([11140137](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krsKFvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The computation shall be done only if cell is configured with* actEnhRankSelectIrcGain equal to TRUE (5G\_L2\_IF\_7837\_replaced([10968771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UZaG_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).\*\*

5G-L2-PS shall select IRC gain calculation method based on the value of *enhRankSelectIrcGainMethod ([10968771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UZaG_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).*

If *enhRankSelectIrcGainMethod is equal to* longTermDiff, then 5G-L2-PS **shall compute *rrmPuschIrcGain according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19670\_replaced([11140163](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krsKG_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))[PR845031] and value of enhRankSelectIrcGainPerRank, see [10968771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UZaG_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)[End PR845031].  
Else If *enhRankSelectIrcGainMethod is equal to* shortTermDiff, then 5G-L2-PS shall follow 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30791\_replaced([11140190](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krsxIfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). In this method, 5G-L2-PS shall set *rrmIrcGainST to -255.0 if at least one condition from 5G\_UP\_ALG\_30787\_replaced([11140179](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krsKHvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is not met. 5G-L2-PS shall update value of* rrmIrcGainLT only for non-DTXed UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs and if value of rrmIrcGainST is not negative.*****\***\*

For both *longTermDiff  and* shortTermDiff methods, value of *actPmiSinrUlMuMimo is set according to 5G\_L2\_IF\_2296\_replaced([10968800](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UZaH_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).*\*\*

5G-L2-PS shall use *rrmPuschIrcGain for* pBoost computation (5G\_L2\_900\_replaced([11179058](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27DoHfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).\*\*

---

##### 2.4.10.1.1-5.0-2 Support for Transform Precoding SRS IRC Gain computation (ID: 11164413)

**2.4.10.1.1-5.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `12884862`)

Support for Transform Precoding
At each UlData\_SrsReceiveRespPs reception (5G\_L2\_13323\_replaced([11180938](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27P1XvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for not fake UEs (5G\_L2\_10788\_replaced([11152464](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24omO_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall calculate *rrmSrsIrcGain to compensate IRC gain according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19671\_replaced([11140233](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krsxKPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The computation shall be done only if cell is configured with* actEnhRankSelectIrcGain equal to TRUE (5G\_L2\_ IF\_7837). [PR845031]The enhRankSelectIrcGainPerRank, see [10968771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UZaG_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ), configuration determines components of SRS IRC gain computation as per [11140233](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krsxKPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).[End PR845031]\*\*

If the 5G-L2-PS cell is configured with *enhRankSelectIrcGainMethod (5G\_L2\_ IF\_7837) equal to* longTermDiff, then 5G-L2-PS shall use *rdUlIrcGainBeta (5G\_UP\_ALG\_19682\_replaced([11141320](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kryQxfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for the long term averaging (5G\_UP\_ALG\_19674\_replaced([11140254](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krsxK_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19676\_replaced([11140325](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krtYN_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19678\_replaced([11140301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krtYNPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19680\_replaced([11140371](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krtYPvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).  
Else if* enhRankSelectIrcGainMethod is equal to *shortTermDiff, 5G-L2-PS shall use* rdUlIrcGainBetaMethod2 (5G\_UP\_ALG\_30793\_replaced([11141291](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kryQwfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for long term averaging.**\***\*

5G-L2-PS shall use *rrmSrsIrcGain for* powerOffsetSrsToPuschPerAllocatedRe computation (5G\_L2\_12888\_replaced([11180728](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27OnN_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).\*\*

---

##### 2.4.10.1.1.0-1 Support for Transform Precoding Triggers for Changing from Transform Precoder Disabled to Transform Precoder Enabled (ID: 11164145)

**2.4.10.1.1.0-1.0-9**  (ID: `13400729`)

Support for Transform Precoding
In order to trigger the transition TP disabled->enabled, L2-PS shall monitor the UL SINR according to the algorithm in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3282\_replaced([11140672](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krvNZ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), if the conditions to do so are true (the conditions are also specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3282\_replaced([11140672](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krvNZ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

If “measured SINR” < rrmThresholdTpOn

Increment rdTransPrecodeHystCounter by 1

Else

Set rdTransPrecodeHystCounter = 0

Where:

-  rrmThresholdTpOn is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3282\_replaced([11140672](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krvNZ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

* “measured SINR” referenced above is rrmAvgSinrTpSwitch as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3282\_replaced([11140672](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krvNZ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note: if 'actUlTransPreEnhRankSwitchIwk' = true (5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) the additonal condition which has to be true in order to start the SINR monitoring is that the UE is in UL Rank 1. This condition is also mentioned in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3282\_replaced([11140672](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krvNZ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If **rdTransPrecodeHystCounter >= [Before CB008148-D]rdTransPrecodeHystThresh[CB008148-D]**rrmTpOnHystThreshold [End CB008148-D], L2-PS shall request CP-RT, via PsUser\_ReconfigurationRequiredInd (5G\_L2\_IF\_536\_replaced([10977582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VNSbfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), to reconfigure the UE to enable Transform Precoder.

[CB008148-D]where rrmTpOnHystThreshold  is initially set to NRCELL.ulTransPrecodeCtl.ulTpOffOnTriggerSpeedThresh[End CB008148-D]

“User reconfiguration required indication” procedure follows the message flow described in 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_132\_replaced([11180104](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Bef5A_vREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)):

when L2-PS send PsUser\_ReconfigurationRequiredInd, start a ReconfigRequiredInd timer(defined by rdReconfigRequiredIndTimer), and  stop monitoring the UL SINR for TP switch.

**if rdReconfigRequiredIndTimer is expires,**

* set the UE back to Transform Precoder Disabled state.
* restart to monitor the UL SINR according to the algorithm in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3282\_replaced([11140672](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krvNZ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for TP switch;

[CB008148-D]rrmTpOnHystThreshold = min (1000, 2 \* NRCELL.ulTransPrecodeCtl.ulTpOffOnTriggerSpeedThresh) as long as successful Transform Precoder Switch is not achieved (see [12977668](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_aIX44LX5EfCQT7hYUxERAg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))[End CB008148-D]

If CP-RT acknowledges the Transform Precoding switch request (PsUser\_UserModifyReq->l2psRequiredIndTrigger is tra nsformPrecoderSwitch), L2-PS shall:

* Start timer rdTransformPrecodeRrcReconfigTimer (5G\_L2\_1461);
* Enter the reconfiguration transient phase;

If CP-RT indicates that the RRC Reconfiguration has been completed successfully (PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq->transformPrecoderSwitchInd = success) **EFS refine**:**or upon the completion of DL-DCCH RRC Complete Detection for RRC Messages Requiring RRC Completion (5G\_UP\_ALG\_29060\_replaced([11153872](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kspMVPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),**L2-PS shall:***\****\*

* Set the UE to Transform Precoder Enabled state;
* stop timer rdTransformPrecodeRrcReconfigTimer and exit the transient phase.

[CB008148-D]rrmTpOnHystThreshold =  NRCELL.ulTransPrecodeCtl.ulTpOffOnTriggerSpeedThresh[End CB008148-D]

else if CP-RT request to cancel the reconfiguration (PsUser\_UserModifyReq->cancellationType is transformPrecoderSwitch, L2-PS shall:

* Set UE back to Transform Precoder Disabled state;
* stop timer rdTransformPrecodeRrcReconfigTimer and exit the transient phase;

[CB008148-D]rrmTpOnHystThreshold = min (1000, 2 \* NRCELL.ulTransPrecodeCtl.ulTpOffOnTriggerSpeedThresh) as long as successful Transform Precoder Switch is not achieved (see [12977668](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_aIX44LX5EfCQT7hYUxERAg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))[End CB008148-D]

* stop the DL-DCCH RRC Complete Detection for RRC Messages Requiring RRC Completion procedure in case of it is started (5G\_UP\_ALG\_29060\_replaced([11153872](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kspMVPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

If timer rdTransformPrecodeRrcReconfigTimer expires, L2-PS shall:

* Set UE back to Transform Precoder Disabled state;
* exit the transient phase;

**During transient phase, L2-PS shall also follow the DL-DCCH RRC Complete Detection for RRC Messages Requiring RRC Completion procedure specified by 5G\_L2\_22365.**

In order to avoid possible conflicts between DCI 0\_0 size and DCI 0\_1 size due to the Reconfiguration, L2-PS shall manage the size of the PUSCH TDRA Table as specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7087\_replaced([11171627](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuF92vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (see also 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7115\_replaced([11171588](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuFW0vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). When the transient phase is left after a cancellation of the reconfiguration (PsUser\_UserModifyReq->transformPrecoderSwitchAck = CANCELLATION), L2-PS shall apply the PUSCH TDRA Table which was in use before the re-configuration.

---

##### 2.4.10.1.1.0-2 Support for Transform Precoding Triggers for Changing from Transform Precoder Enabled to Transform Precoder Disabled (ID: 11164201)

**2.4.10.1.1.0-2.0-8**  (ID: `13400737`)

Support for Transform Precoding
In order to trigger the transition TP enabled->disabled, L2-PS shall monitor the UL SINR according to the algorithm in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3284\_replaced([11140751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krvNbvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), if the conditions to do so are true (the conditions are also specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3284\_replaced([11140751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krvNbvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

If “measured SINR” >= rrmThresholdTpOff

Increment rdTransPrecodeHystCounter by 1

Else

Set rdTransPrecodeHystCounter = 0

Where:

* rrmThresholdTpOff is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3284\_replaced([11140751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krvNbvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* “measured SINR” referenced above is rrmAvgSinrTpSwitch per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3284\_replaced([11140751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krvNbvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If **rdTransPrecodeHystCounter >= [Before CB008148-D]rdTransPrecodeHystThresh[CB008148-D]**rrmTpOffHystThreshold  [End CB008148-D], L2-PS shall request CP-RT, via PsUser\_ReconfigurationRequiredInd (5G\_L2\_IF\_536\_replaced([10977582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VNSbfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), to reconfigure the UE to disable Transform Precoder.

[CB008148-D]where rrmTpOffHystThreshold  is initially set to NRCELL.ulTransPrecodeCtl.ulTpOnOffTriggerSpeedThresh[End CB008148-D]

“User reconfiguration required indication” procedure follows the message flow described in 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_132\_replaced([11180104](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Bef5A_vREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)):

when L2-PS send PsUser\_ReconfigurationRequiredInd, start a ReconfigRequiredInd timer(defined by rdReconfigRequiredIndTimer), and stop monitoring the UL SINR for TP switch.

**if rdReconfigRequiredIndTimer is expires,**

* set the UE back to Transform Precoder Enabled state.
* restart to monitoring the UL SINR according to the algorithm in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3282\_replaced([11140672](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krvNZ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for TP switch;

[CB008148-D]-rrmTpOffHystThreshold  = min(1000 , 2\*NRCELL.ulTransPrecodeCtl.ulTpOnOffTriggerSpeedThresh) as long as successful Transform Precoder Switch is not achieved (see [12977668](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_aIX44LX5EfCQT7hYUxERAg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))[End CB008148-D]

If CP-RT acknowledges the Transform Precoding switch request (PsUser\_UserModifyReq->l2psRequiredIndTrigger is transformPrecoderSwitch  ), L2-PS shall:

* Start timer rdTransformPrecodeRrcReconfigTimer (5G\_L2\_1461);
* Enter the reconfiguration transient phase;

If CP-RT indicates that the RRC Reconfiguration has been completed succesfully (PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq->transformPrecoderSwitchInd = success) **EFS refine**:**or upon the completion of DL-DCCH RRC Complete Detection for RRC Messages Requiring RRC Completion (5G\_UP\_ALG\_29060\_replaced([11153872](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kspMVPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),**L2-PS shall:***\****\*

* Set the UE to Transform Precoder Disabled state;
* stop timer rdTransformPrecodeRrcReconfigTimer and exit the transient phase.

[CB008148-D]-rrmTpOffHystThreshold  = NRCELL.ulTransPrecodeCtl.ulTpOnOffTriggerSpeedThresh[End CB008148-D]

else if CP-RT requests to cancel the reconfiguration (PsUser\_UserModifyReq->cancellationType is transformPrecoderSwitch), L2-PS shall:

* Set UE back to Transform Precoder Enabled state;
* stop timer rdTransformPrecodeRrcReconfigTimer and exit the transient phase;
* stop the DL-DCCH RRC Complete Detection for RRC Messages Requiring RRC Completion procedure in case of it is started (5G\_UP\_ALG\_29060\_replaced([11153872](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kspMVPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

[CB008148-D]-rrmTpOffHystThreshold  = min(1000 , 2\*NRCELL.ulTransPrecodeCtl.ulTpOnOffTriggerSpeedThresh) as long as successful Transform Precoder Switch is not achieved (see [12977668](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_aIX44LX5EfCQT7hYUxERAg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))[End CB008148-D]

If timer rdTransformPrecodeRrcReconfigTimer expires, L2-PS shall:

* Set UE back to Transform Precoder Enabled state;
* exit the transient phase;

During transient phase, L2-PS shall also follow the DL-DCCH RRC Complete Detection for RRC Messages Requiring RRC Completion procedure specified by 5G\_L2\_22365.

In order to avoid possible conflicts between DCI 0\_0 size and DCI 0\_1 size due to the Reconfiguration, L2-PS shall manage the size of the PUSCH TDRA Table as specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7087\_replaced([11171627](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuF92vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (see also 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7115\_replaced([11171588](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuFW0vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). When the transient phase is left after a cancellation of the reconfiguration (PsUser\_UserModifyReq->transformPrecoderSwitchAck = CANCELLATION), L2-PS shall apply the PUSCH TDRA Table which was in use before the re-configuration.

---

##### 2.4.10.1.1.0-3 Support for Transform Precoding Transient phase handling for PUCCH format 3 DMRS sequence reconfiguration (ID: 11164246)

**2.4.10.1.1.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11164251`)

Support for Transform Precoding
Data Flows

---

**2.4.10.1.1.0-3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11164256`)

Support for Transform Precoding
The data flows for PUCCH format 3 DMRS reconfiguration [Before CB007103-D]with no CA [End CB007103-D]are specified in 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_4867\_replaced([11184169](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Be1QNvvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

**2.4.10.1.1.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11164260`)

Support for Transform Precoding
Finite State Machine

---

**2.4.10.1.1.0-3.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11164271`)

Support for Transform Precoding
The transient phase for PUCCH format 3 DMRS sequence reconfiguration is handled by the finite state machine below:

[Before CB007103-D]

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a flowchart illustrating a state transition process. The flowchart is divided into two main columns, representing different states or processes.
The left column starts with a state labeled "Idle". From "Idle", there are two outgoing transitions:
1. **(50) psUser\_rrcRconfCompletedReq**: This transition leads to a diamond-shaped decision box labeled "(20) is DMRS present".
\* If the condition is "false", it leads to a rectangular box labeled "(40) store PucchFormatConfigF3 struct as pending", which then transitions to the "inTransition" state.
\* If the condition is "true", it leads to another diamond-shaped decision box labeled "(30) is DMRS changed".
\* If "(30) is DMRS changed" is "false", it also leads to the "Idle" state.
\* If "(30) is DMRS changed" is "true", it leads to the "(40) store PucchFormatConfigF3 struct as pending" box, which then transitions to the "inTransition" state.
2. **(10) psUser\_userModifyReq**: This transition also leads to the "(20) is DMRS present" decision box.
The right column starts with a state labeled "inTransition". From "inTransition", there are two outgoing transitions:
1. **(60) psUser\_rrcRconfCompletedReq**: This transition leads to a rectangular box labeled "(70) commit pending PucchFormatConfigF3". This box then transitions to the "(110) clear pending Pucchformat3Config" box, which finally leads to the "Idle" state.
2. **(80) psUser\_userModifyReq**: This transition leads to a diamond-shaped decision box labeled "(90) is DMRS present".
\* If the condition is "false", it leads to a rectangular box labeled "(120) error Log".
\* If the condition is "true", it leads to another diamond-shaped decision box labeled "(100) is DMRS changed".
\* If "(100) is DMRS changed" is "false", it also leads to the "(120) error Log" box.
\* If "(100) is DMRS changed" is "true", it also leads to the "(120) error Log" box.
The flowchart uses standard flowchart symbols: rounded rectangles for states ("Idle", "inTransition"), parallelograms for requests/events ("psUser\_rrcRconfCompletedReq", "psUser\_userModifyReq"), diamonds for decisions, and rectangles for processes/actions. Arrows indicate the flow of control. Labels on the arrows represent the conditions for transitions (e.g., "true", "false").[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3497.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

Link to the "State Machine for PUCCH F3 DMRS Sequence Type transient phase" file:

<https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:u:/r/sites/5GdocRD/RD%20NPS%20documents/09%20-%20Features/24R3-SR/CB007103/Specs%20CP3/CB007103-B/State%20Machine%20for%20PUCCH%20F3%20DMRS%20Sequence%20Type%20transient%20phase.url?csf=1&web=1&e=mSMY4S>

[CB007103-D]

[image-1][image\_desc]The image is a flowchart illustrating a process with two main states: "Idle" and "in Transition". The flowchart uses rectangular boxes for states and actions, diamond shapes for decisions, and arrows to indicate the flow of control.
Here's a breakdown of the flowchart:
**Left Side (Starting from "Idle"):**
\* **Idle State:** The process begins in the "Idle" state.
\* **psUser\_rrcRconfCompletedReq (50):** An event or request triggers this path.
\* **psUser\_userModifyReq (10):** Another event or request triggers this path.
\* **is DMRS present (20):** A decision point.
\* **false:** If DMRS is not present, the flow continues downwards.
\* **true:** If DMRS is present, the flow moves to the next decision.
\* **is DMRS changed (30):** Another decision point.
\* **false:** If DMRS is not changed, the flow continues downwards.
\* **true:** If DMRS is changed, the flow moves to the next action.
\* **store PucchFormatConfigF3 struct as pending (40):** An action to store the configuration.
\* This path leads to the "in Transition" state.
**Right Side (Starting from "in Transition"):**
\* **in Transition State:** The process can also be in the "in Transition" state.
\* **psUser\_rrcRconfCompletedReq (60):** An event or request triggers this path.
\* **commit pending PucchFormatConfigF3 (70):** An action to commit the pending configuration.
\* This path leads to the next action.
\* **psUser\_userModifyReq (80):** Another event or request triggers this path.
\* **is DMRS present (90):** A decision point.
\* **false:** If DMRS is not present, the flow leads to "error Log (120)".
\* **true:** If DMRS is present, the flow moves to the next decision.
\* **is DMRS changed (100):** Another decision point.
\* **false:** If DMRS is not changed, the flow leads to "clear pending Pucchformat3Config (110)".
\* **true:** If DMRS is changed, the flow leads to "error Log (120)".
\* **error Log (120):** An action to log an error. This path appears to terminate or lead to an implicit end.
\* **clear pending Pucchformat3Config (110):** An action to clear the pending configuration.
\* **is DPA suspended for PUCCH F3 transient phase (130):** A decision point.
\* **true:** If DPA is suspended, the flow moves to "resume DPA (140)".
\* **false:** If DPA is not suspended, the flow leads to the "Idle" state.
\* **resume DPA (140):** An action to resume DPA. This path appears to terminate or lead to an implicit end.
**Transitions to States:**
\* The left side flow from action (40) leads to the "in Transition" state.
\* The flow from decision (130) with a "false" outcome leads to the "Idle" state.
The flowchart visually represents the logic for handling user requests related to RRC configuration and PUCCH format, considering the presence and changes of DMRS and the suspension status of DPA.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3497.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]

Link to the "State Machine for PUCCH F3 DMRS Sequence Type transient phase" file:

<https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:u:/r/sites/5GdocRD/RD%20NPS%20documents/09%20-%20Features/24R3-SR/CB007103/Specs%20CP3/CB007103-D/State%20Machine%20for%20PUCCH%20F3%20DMRS%20Sequence%20Type%20transient%20phase.url?csf=1&web=1&e=1YSZIZ>

[End CB007103-D]

---

**2.4.10.1.1.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `11164277`)

Support for Transform Precoding
Description

---

**2.4.10.1.1.0-3.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11164282`)

Support for Transform Precoding
[CB007103-D](10):Note: If at least one SCell is activated for DL CA and dmrsSequenceType is changed, the DPA is suspended as specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22731\_replaced([11140896](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krv0ffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) prior to enter the FSM. [End CB007103-D]

(20): check if dmrsSequenceType is present in structure pucchFormatConfigF3 of message psUSer\_userModifyReq.

if false, stay in Idle state: the transient phase is not initiated

if true, go to (30)

(30): Check if dmrsSequenceType in pucchFormatConfigF3 structure of psUser\_userModifyReq message is different from the current one for UE.

if false, stay in Idle state: the transient phase is not initiated

if true go to (40) and switch to inTransition (the transient phase is initiated)

(40): Store the whole pucchFormatConfigF3 structure of the message psUser\_userModifyReq as pending for UE.

(60): This is the SUCCESS case for the PUCCH F3 transient phase procedure.

(70): Use pending structure pucchFormatConfigF3 as current pucchFormatConfigF3 for UE.

(80): This is the ROLLBACK or error case for the PUCCH F3 transient phase procedure.

(90): check if dmrsSequenceType is present in structure pucchFormatConfigF3 of message psUSer\_userModifyReq.

- if false, this is an error from CP-RT as this should not occur in "inTransition" state.

- if true, go to (100)

(100): Check if dmrsSequenceType in the pucchFormatConfigF3 structure of psUser\_userModifyReq message is different from the current one for UE.

- if true, this is an error from CP-RT as this should not occur in "inTransition" state.

- if false, this is the ROLLBACK for PUCCH F3 dmrsSequenceType procedure.

[CB007103-D](130) Check if DPA was suspended for Scells(if any activated) for PUCCH F3 transient phase. If true, resume DPA (140) Note: This suspension was done prior to enter the FSM as stated in (10)  above.[End CB007103-D]

---

### 2.4.10.2 DL SU-MIMO

#### 2.4.10.2.1 Precoder settings and CSI handling for allowed transmission schemes

##### 2.4.10.2.1.0-1 Precoder settings and CSI handling for allowed transmission schemes Default precoder settings CL/OL (2x2 transmissions) (ID: 11164438)

**2.4.10.2.1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11164443`)

Precoder settings and CSI handling for allowed transmission schemes
The default number of layers while waiting for the first UE CSI report is 1.

[Before PR529952]

For closed loop transmissions, the default precoding matrix selected while waiting for the first UE CSI report is set to codebookIndex 0.

For open loop transmissions, the precoding matrix corresponding to the default rank is given by the selected Open Loop scheme at 5G-L1-UL. Thus, codebookIndex is not filled by 5G-L2-PS in DlData\_PdschSendReq .

[PR529952]

The default precoding and spatial mode parameters are set according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3171\_replaced([11139234](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krlca_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End PR529952]

These default settings also applies in case of outdated CSI, i.e. timer rdDlCsiFallBackTimer (cf. 5G\_L2\_1101\_replaced([11186535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_276jsPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) expires.

[CNI-59628] CP2 reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3178\_replaced([11139281](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krmDdPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [End CNI-59628]

---

##### 2.4.10.2.1.0-2 Precoder settings and CSI handling for allowed transmission schemes Default precoder settings CL/OL (4Tx transmissions) (ID: 11164450)

**2.4.10.2.1.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11164466`)

Precoder settings and CSI handling for allowed transmission schemes
The default number of layers while waiting for the first UE CSI report is 1.

[CB013440-A]

If enhCtrlChannelTransMode is different than 'disabled' (see PsCell\_CellSetupReq, PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq) then follow 5G\_L2\_23660\_replaced([11178739](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27By5PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End CB013440-A]

The default precoding and spatial mode parameters are set according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3171\_replaced([11139234](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krlca_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

These default settings (except pdschPrecodingOption4x4) also applies in case of outdated CSI, i.e. timer rdDlCsiFallBackTimer (cf. 5G\_L2\_1101\_replaced([11186535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_276jsPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) expires.

CP2 reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3183\_replaced([11139297](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krmDd_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.10.2.1.0-3 Precoder settings and CSI handling for allowed transmission schemes Reinitialization of the beam and CSI after MACCE CRNTI in RACH MSG3 (ID: 13251255)

**2.4.10.2.1.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `13251301`)

Precoder settings and CSI handling for allowed transmission schemes
**Reinitialization of the DL precoder settings and number of layers after a beamforming recovery procedure**[CB008577-D]**or MACCE CRNTI known by L2PS in RACH MSG3**[End CB008577-D]***\****\*

Reinitialize the DL precoder settings and number of layers by selecting the initialization procedure corresponding to the parameter dlMimoMode , as follows:

o For CL/OL 2x2 transmissions, run the initialization procedure in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3178\_replaced([11139281](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krmDdPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

o For CL/OL 4x4 or 4x2 transmissions, run the initialization procedure in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3183\_replaced([11139297](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krmDd_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). If UE reported valid CSI for retrieved 2nd beam (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1921\_replaced([11111597](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpOr_fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), L2PS will apply the new rank/PMI immediately.

o For CL 8Tx transmissions, run the initialization procedure in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3188\_replaced([11139322](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krmDfPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[CB008577-D]

o For CL 8Tx or 32Tx  transmissions when FDD actBeamforming = TRUE, run the initialization procedure as [11152927: Reception of MAC CE CRNTI inside a RACH MSG3 with a permanent context attached to the CRNTI](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksjFs_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), the UE's beam shall be re-initialized as per [11152417: SS/PBCH Index identification and association to an internal Beam ID in the gNB](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksgCZPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

[End CB008577-D]

o Stop rdDlCsiFallBackTimer, in case that it is running

---

##### 2.4.10.2.1.0-4 Precoder settings and CSI handling for allowed transmission schemes UCI bits for RI reporting (ID: 11164479)

**2.4.10.2.1.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `13247165`)

Precoder settings and CSI handling for allowed transmission schemes
5G-L2-PS shall calculate UCI bits for RI reporting provided by the UE within CSI report using following parameters:

* PsUser\_UserSetupReq/PsUser\_UserModifyReq.pdschConfig.maxNumOfDlLayers later reffered as "maxNumOfDlLayers",
* PsUser\_UserSetupReq/PsUser\_UserModifyReq.perCsiReportConfig[x].reportQuantity for cell which UCI is decoded with values "cri-RI-PMI-CQI" or "cri-RI-CQI" [CB008577-B] or "cri-RI-LI-PMI-CQI" [End CB0008577-B]later reffered as "reportQuantity",
* PsCell\_CellSetupReq.dlMimoMode later reffered as "dlMimoMode".

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **dlMimoMode** | **maxNumOfDlLayers** | **reportQuantity** | **Bit Width of RI** |
| "SingleAntennaTransmission\_1x1" | 1 | Any | 0 |
| "OpenLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_2x2", "ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_2x2", | 2 or 4 | Any | 1 |
| "OpenLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_4x4", "ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_4x4" | NA | cri-RI-CQI | 2 |
| "OpenLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_4x4", "ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_4x4" | 2 | cri-RI-PMI-CQI | 1 |
| "OpenLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_4x4", "ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_4x4" | >=4 | cri-RI-PMI-CQI | 2 |
| Any value | 1 | Any | 0 |
| [CB008577-B] "ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_32x4" [End CB008577-B] | <=4 | cri-RI-PMI-CQI or  cri-RI-LI-PMI-CQI | <=2 |

**Note: "OpenLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_4x4", "ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_4x4" corresponds to both 4x4 and 4x2 configuration.**

---

#### 2.4.10.2.2 Low PAPR optimized precoding activation per UE

**2.4.10.2.2.0-2**  (ID: `11164500`)

Low PAPR optimized precoding activation per UE
If NIDD parameter actDlLowPAPRoptimizedPrecoding received in PsCell\_CellSetupReq is TRUE and

* If rdDlLowPAPRoptimizedPrecodingWithPdschRateMatching (5G\_L2\_1458\_replaced([11186448](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2758oPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is 1 then set the bundle size as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3208\_replaced([11139675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krpGw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (with condition as "Low PAPR optimized precoding enabled")

and set "isLowPaprOptimizedPrecoding" as TRUE in the DlData\_PdschSendReq towards L1

* If rdDlLowPAPRoptimizedPrecodingWithPdschRateMatching (5G\_L2\_1458\_replaced([11186448](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2758oPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is 0 and if lteCrsOption (Ref 5G\_L1\_5359\_replaced([11436240](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e_PeefvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) has rate matching or[Before CB008370-AA] isCsirsRateMatching [CB008370-AA]rateMatchingOption[End CB008370-AA] is [Before CB008370-AA]TRUE[CB008370-AA]greater than zero [End CB008370-AA] then L2-PS shall set the bundle size as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3208\_replaced([11139675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krpGw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (with condition as "Low PAPR optimized precoding enabled") and set "isLowPaprOptimizedPrecoding" as FALSE in the DlData\_PdschSendReq towards L1.

L2-PS shall set default value of isLowPaprOptimizedPrecoding as FALSE in DlData\_PdschSendReq

Note:

1. NIDD parameter actDlLowPAPRoptimizedPrecoding is enabled/disabled with locking of the cell (UEs are released and have to re-attach hence L2-RT changes are not needed for online user modification related to feature activation/deactivation)
2. For values of lteCrsOption applicable in release refer 5G\_L1\_5359\_replaced([11436240](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e_PeefvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
3. In 22R1, lteCrsOption rate matching values are 1,4,5,6

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| actDlLowPAPRoptimizedPrecoding | rdDlLowPAPRoptimizedPrecodingWithPdschRateMatching | Values in DlData\_PdschSendReq |  |
| isLowPaprOptimizedPrecoding | pdschBundleSize |  |  |
| TRUE | 1 | TRUE | 4 from CP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_3208\_replaced([11139675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krpGw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) |
| TRUE | 0 | FALSE if  lteCrsOption (Ref 5G\_L1\_5359\_replaced([11436240](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e_PeefvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) has rate matching  or isCsirsRateMatching is TRUE | 4 from CP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_3208\_replaced([11139675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krpGw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) |
| TRUE | 0 | TRUE if lteCrsOption (Ref 5G\_L1\_5359\_replaced([11436240](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e_PeefvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) has NOT rate matching and [Before CB008370-AA] isCsirsRateMatching [CB008370-AA]rateMatchingOption[End CB008370-AA] is set to 0: NO\_RATE\_MATCHING | 4 from CP (5G\_UP\_ALG\_3208\_replaced([11139675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krpGw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) |
| FALSE | 0 or 1 | FALSE | 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3208\_replaced([11139675](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krpGw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |

S
