#### 2.4.10.2.3 Load based MIMO muting for Energy Efficiency

##### 2.4.10.2.3.1 MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio

###### 2.4.10.2.3.1.0-1 MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio Cell load measurement reports for power saving management (ID: 11164518)

**2.4.10.2.3.1.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `12763417`)

MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio
When PsCell\_CellSetupReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_61\_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) message is received, 5G-L2-PS shall store actNrLBRTXPowerSaving and actNrLBmMimoRTXPowerSaving parameters in cell configuration database.

When actNrLBRTXPowerSaving == TRUE or actNrLBmMimoRTXPowerSaving == TRUE, 5G-L2-PS shall periodically report cell load measurements to 5G-CP-RT by sending PsCell\_PowerSavingLoadMeasurementInd as described in 5G\_L2\_IF\_300\_replaced([10972216](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Us8H_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[Before CB014095-B] Note: PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq.actNrLBmMimoRTXPowerSaving IE is set up to FALSE only. [End CB014095-B]

---

###### 2.4.10.2.3.1.0-2 MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio Online Activate Cell Load Measurement for mMIMO TX Power Saving (ID: 12763413)

**2.4.10.2.3.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12742240`)

MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio
[Before PR867026] For FR1 TDD [End PR867026] To configure online NR load-based mMIMO TX power saving, 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq with:

* [PR867026] cellTechnology = TDD [End PR867026]
* actBeamforming = TRUE
* isCellMassiveMimo=TRUE
* actExternalAntennaBF = FALSE
* actNrLBmMimoRTXPowerSaving= FALSE

with pattern ids for power saving filled depending on beamforming method is used:

* For SSB/refined (CSI-RS) with bfSetup.mMimoPSBeamWeightVector.patternId AND/OR
* For PMI with startCsirsPmiPatternIdForNrLBmMimoRTXPowerSaving AND/OR
* For SRS based DFT with:
* bfSetup.dftBeamSetList.dftBeamSetId and
* bfSetup.fr1Fr2Combined.fr1Freq.dftBeamSetList.dftBeamStartPatternId

which are used in pattern id power saving calculation algorithm. 5G-L2-PS shall store all values of pattern ids for power saving.

Additionally, 5G-L2-PS shall receive and store below PMI configuration from PsCell\_CellPmiBeamDataSetReq. At least one of the below conditions are met:

* eirpControlConfigExt.dftBeamResponseNrLBmMimoRTXPowerSaving
* dlMimoMode = ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_8x4 and
* actEirpControl= TRUE
* eirpControlConfigExt.beamWeightNrLBmMimoRTXPowerSaving if in PsCell\_CellSetupReq
* dlMimoMode = ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_8x4
* eirpControlForSrsDftBeam if in PsCell\_CellSetupReq
* actDlSrsBm = TRUE and
* actEirpControl= TRUE

Then:

To activate online NR load-based mMIMO TX power saving, 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq with actNrLBmMimoRTXPowerSaving has changed to TRUE.

Additionally, at the reception of PsCell\_CellPmiBeamDataSetReq after PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq, 5G-L2-PS may receive and store below PMI configuration. When at least one of the below conditions are met:

* eirpControlConfigExt.dftBeamResponseNrLBmMimoRTXPowerSaving if:
* dlMimoMode = ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_8x4  in PsCell\_CellSetupReq  AND
* actEirpControl= TRUE from the last stored value (PsCell\_CellSetupReq OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq)
* eirpControlForSrsDftBeam if:
* actDlSrsBm = TRUE in PsCell\_CellSetupReq AND
* actEirpControl= TRUE from the last stored value  (PsCell\_CellSetupReq OR PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq)

5G-L2-PS  shall periodically report cell load measurements to 5G-CP-RT by sending PsCell\_PowerSavingLoadMeasurementInd as described in ([10972248](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UtjJfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?vvc.configuration=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/cm/stream/_CqlKNu3yEe-rL47x_rCCmw)).

**Relevant UP MSCs: [12770633:](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Z6kEi4iVEfCrqOdGJPoCRA) Cell Power Saving Load Measurement**

---

###### 2.4.10.2.3.1.0-3 MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio Cell load measurement reports for power saving management in overload state (ID: 12709792)

**2.4.10.2.3.1.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `12709793`)

MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio
When (actNrLBPowerSaving is set to TRUE or actNrLBRTXPowerSaving is set to TRUE or actNrLBmMimoRTXPowerSaving is set to TRUE or actLbpsCtrlLogicEnh is set to TRUE (see [10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and overload countermeasure for power saving features is active (see [11203944](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29-ZNfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) and [11193031](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvo1-_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)):

Then:  
5G-L2-PS shall send atificial traffic load measurements indicating 100% traffic load to CP-RT as described in [11193031](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvo1-_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ), [11193073](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvpdBfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ), [11193094](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvpdCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ), [11193142](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvqEEvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) and [11193157](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvqEFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

---

###### 2.4.10.2.3.1.0-4 MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio mMIMO cell indication (ID: 11164535)

**2.4.10.2.3.1.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11164541`)

MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio
When PsCell\_CellSetupReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_61\_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) message is received, 5G-L2-PS shall store isCellMassiveMimo parameter in the cell configuration database.

---

###### 2.4.10.2.3.1.0-5 MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio Beam control information for mMIMO cell in reducedEnergySaving state (ID: 11164548)

**2.4.10.2.3.1.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11164553`)

MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio
When PsCell\_CellSetupReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_61\_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) message is received, 5G-L2-PS shall store:​​​​​​​

* For SSB/refined (CSI-RS) with bfSetup.mMimoPSBeamWeightVector.patternId
* For PMI with startCsirsPmiPatternIdForNrLBmMimoRTXPowerSaving
* For SRS based DFT with:
* bfSetup.dftBeamSetList.dftBeamSetId and
* bfSetup.fr1Fr2Combined.fr1Freq.dftBeamSetList.dftBeamStartPatternId

in the cell configuration database.

---

###### 2.4.10.2.3.1.0-6 MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio Energy Saving State (ID: 11164560)

**2.4.10.2.3.1.0-6.0-2**  (ID: `11164569`)

MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio
When PsCell\_PowerSavingConfigurationReq (see [Before CB008133-A]5G\_L2\_IF\_2726\_replaced([10973613](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U2GC_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))[CB008133-A]5G\_L2\_IF\_2735\_replaced([10973678](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U2tGfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))[End CB008133-A]) message is received, 5G-L2-PS shall store parameter energySavingState in cell configuration database, so that it could be accessed on DL[CB008133-A] and UL[EndCB008133-A] scheduler level.

[CB008133-A]If received energySavingState == reducedEnergySaving and isCellMassiveMimo == TRUE (see 5G\_L2\_10418\_replaced([11164535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25tkSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

Then:

mMimoPsBeamWeightVector (see 5G\_L2\_10420\_replaced([11164548](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25tkSvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) length must be equal to numberOfBeams (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_115\_replaced([10968891](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UaBKvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

[PR685917]Additionally If actDlSrsBm (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_115\_replaced([10968891](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UaBKvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to TRUE:

Then:

dftBeamSetList (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_115\_replaced([10968891](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UaBKvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) must contain normal DL DFT beam set for mMIMO cell in the reducedEnergySaving state[End PR685917]

Else:

Cell does not go into power saving state. 5G-L2-PS responds to L3 with status EStatus5G\_NotOk and cause InvalidParameter (2) (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2737\_replaced([10973702](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U2tHfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).[End CB008133-A]

[PR698526]If received energySavingState is set to reducedEnergySaving:

Then:

If isCellMassiveMimo is set to TRUE (see 5G\_L2\_10418\_replaced([11164535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25tkSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and actNrLBmMimoRTXPowerSaving is set to TRUE (see 5G\_L2\_7369\_replaced([11164518](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25tkRfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and actEirpControl is set to TRUE (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

Then:

5G-L2-PS shall validate if maxBeamGainForNrLBmMimoRTXPowerSaving (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_118\_replaced([10969144](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UbPQvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and normalizedBeamGainForNrLBmMimoRTXPowerSaving (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_118\_replaced([10969144](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UbPQvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) parameters are present in cell configuration database.[End PR698526]

---

###### 2.4.10.2.3.1.0-7 MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio PDSCH Rank reduction (ID: 11164573)

**2.4.10.2.3.1.0-7.0-2**  (ID: `11164586`)

MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio
When a new PDSCH transmission with C-RNTI is scheduled, DL FD Scheduler shall access parameter energySavingState from cell configuration database.

If energySavingState == [Before CB008133-A]TRUE[CB008133-A]reducedEnergySaving[End CB008133-A] (see 5G\_L2\_7371\_replaced([11164560](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25tkTPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))[CB008133-A] and isCellMassiveMimo == FALSE (see 5G\_L2\_10418\_replaced([11164535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25tkSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))[End CB008133-A]:

DL FD Scheduler shall determine maximum rank in reducedEnergySaving state (maxRankInReducedEnergySavingState) as specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3165\_replaced([11139212](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krlcZvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), with the following remarks:

* The cell is in "non-beamforming mode" when parameter actBeamforming (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) from cell configuration database is equal to FALSE.
* The cell is in "digital beamforming mode" when parameter actBeamforming (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) from cell configuration database is equal to TRUE and parameter numOfSubSectors (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) from cell configuration database is equal to 0.
* The cell is in "sub-sectorization mode" when parameter actBeamforming (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) from cell configuration database is equal to TRUE and parameter numOfSubSectors (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) from cell configuration database is greater than 0.
* DL FD Scheduler shall calculate PdschPrecodingOption4x4 as specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9659\_replaced([11139560](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krn4q_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* If required, DL FD Scheduler shall access PMI coefficient i13 from CSI database of the UE for the given carrier.
* DL FD Scheduler shall apply rank reduction for all new initial transmissions and their corresponding retransmissions.
* DL FD Scheduler shall not update rank for retransmissions already awaiting in the HARQ buffers when PsCell\_PowerSavingConfigurationReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2726\_replaced([10973613](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U2GC_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) message is received.
* DL FD Scheduler shall apply rank reduction only for PDSCH transmissions. The overall carrier rank shall remain unchanged.

If rank reduction is applied:

* DL FD Scheduler shall fill the following message fields based on the original value of rank:

codebookIndex, i1Codebook4AntPorts and i2Codebook4AntPorts (see 5G\_L1\_IF\_92\_replaced([11512828](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRsQSvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) fields of DlData\_PdschSendReq message.

* DL FD Scheduler shall fill the following message fields based on the reduced value of rank:
* antPort (see 5G\_L1\_IF\_89\_replaced([11512781](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRrpQ_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and numOfLayers (see 5G\_L1\_IF\_95\_replaced([11512891](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRs3VfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) fields of DlData\_PdschSendReq message,
* Antenna port (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10502\_replaced([11171547](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuFWwvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) field of DCI Format 1\_1 carried within DlData\_PdcchSendReq message.

---

###### 2.4.10.2.3.1.0-8 MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio Maximum rank in reducedEnergySaving state for beamforming configuration (ID: 11164592)

**2.4.10.2.3.1.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `11164597`)

MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio
[Before PR673168]

To determine maxRankInReducedEnergySavingState, DL FD Scheduler shall access parameter dlMimoMode (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) from cell configuration database. Optionally, DL FD Scheduler shall access R&D parameter rdPdschPrecodingOption4X4 (see 5G\_L2\_6956\_replaced([11186551](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_276js_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and PMI coefficient i13 from CSI database of the UE for the given carrier.

If dlMimoMode == OpenLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_2x2 or dlMimoMode == ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_2x2 or (dlMimoMode == ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_4x4 and rdPdschPrecodingOption4X4 != 0) [PR669482] or (dlMimoMode == OpenLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_4x4 and rdPdschPrecodingOption4X4 != 0) [End PR669482]:

maxRankInReducedEnergySavingState shall be set to 1.

Otherwise, if dlMimoMode == OpenLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_4x4:

maxRankInReducedEnergySavingState shall be set to 2.

Otherwise:

If i13 == 0:

maxRankInReducedEnergySavingState shall be set to 1.

Otherwise:

maxRankInReducedEnergySavingState shall be set to 2.

[End PR673168]

---

###### 2.4.10.2.3.1.0-9 MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio SSB/refined beams selection in reducedEnergySaving state for mMIMO cell (ID: 11164604)

**2.4.10.2.3.1.0-9.0-1**  (ID: `11164609`)

MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio
If energySavingState == reducedEnergySaving (see 5G\_L2\_7371\_replaced([11164560](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25tkTPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and isCellMassiveMimo == TRUE (see 5G\_L2\_10418\_replaced([11164535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25tkSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

Then:

Pattern ids related with SSB/refined beams contained in the DlData\_PdcchSendReq (see 5G\_L1\_IF\_70\_replaced([11512527](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRqbEfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), DlData\_PdschSendReq (see 5G\_L1\_IF\_79\_replaced([11512684](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRrpMfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and DlData\_CsiRsSendReq (see 5G\_L1\_IF\_98\_replaced([11513023](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRtecvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) messages must be selected from the mMimoPsBeamWeightVector (see 5G\_L2\_10420\_replaced([11164548](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25tkSvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

###### 2.4.10.2.3.1.0-10 MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio SRS based 2D-DFT beams selection in reducedEnergySaving state for mMIMO cell (ID: 11164616)

**2.4.10.2.3.1.0-10.0-1**  (ID: `11164620`)

MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio
If energySavingState == reducedEnergySaving (see 5G\_L2\_7371\_replaced([11164560](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25tkTPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and isCellMassiveMimo == TRUE (see 5G\_L2\_10418\_replaced([11164535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25tkSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

Then:

Pattern ids related with SRS based 2D-DFT beams contained in the DlData\_PdcchSendReq (see 5G\_L1\_IF\_70\_replaced([11512527](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRqbEfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), DlData\_PdschSendReq (see 5G\_L1\_IF\_79\_replaced([11512684](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRrpMfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and DlData\_CsiRsSendReq (see 5G\_L1\_IF\_98\_replaced([11513023](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRtecvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) messages must be calculated based on the dedicated DL DFT beam set dedicated for mMIMO cell in reducedEnergySaving state from dftBeamSetList (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_115\_replaced([10968891](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UaBKvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

###### 2.4.10.2.3.1.0-11 MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio SRS based 2D-DFT beam mapping between standard DL DFT beam set and DL DFT beam set dedicated for mMIMO cell in reducedEnergySaving state (ID: 11164625)

**2.4.10.2.3.1.0-11.0-2**  (ID: `13395222`)

MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio
If isCellMassiveMimo == TRUE (see 5G\_L2\_10418\_replaced([11164535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25tkSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

Then:

SRS based 2D-DFT beams between standard DL DFT beam set and DL DFT beam set dedicated for mMIMO cell in reducedEnergySaving state from dftBeamSetList (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_115\_replaced([10968891](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UaBKvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) can be mapped according to the following formulas:

[Before PR871768]

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a serif font. The equation is:
`dftBeamIndexH_ps = round(dftBeamIndexH_st * (numOfDftBeamForSrsBnH_ps / numOfDftBeamForSrsBnH_st))`[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3559.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

[image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a serif font. The equation is:
`dftBeamIndexV_ps = round(dftBeamIndexV_st * (num0fDftBeamForSrsBmV_ps / num0fDftBeamForSrsBmV_st))`[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3559.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]

[PR871768]

[image-2][image\_desc]The image contains two mathematical equations written in a sans-serif font.
The first equation is:
`dftBeamIndexH_ps = floor (dftBeamIndexH_st * (numOfDftBeamForSrsBmH_ps / numOfDftBeamForSrsBmH_st))`
The second equation is:
`dftBeamIndexV_ps = floor (dftBeamIndexV_st * (numOfDftBeamForSrsBmV_ps / numOfDftBeamForSrsBmV_st))`[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-02111344.png[/image\_path][/image-2]

[End PR871768]

where:

\*\_ps - parameter related with DL DFT beam set dedicated for mMIMO cell in reducedEnergySaving state

\*\_st - parameter related with standard DL DFT beam set

---

###### 2.4.10.2.3.1.0-12 MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio Beam selection on reducedEnergySaving state change for mMIMO cell (ID: 11164645)

**2.4.10.2.3.1.0-12.0-2**  (ID: `11164654`)

MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio
If isCellMassiveMimo == TRUE (see 5G\_L2\_10418\_replaced([11164535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25tkSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

Then:

If energySavingState (see 5G\_L2\_7371\_replaced([11164560](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25tkTPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) changes from notEnergySaving to reducedEnergySaving:

Then:

5G-L2-PS must send update of pattern ids to L1 based on 5G\_L2\_10425\_replaced([11164604](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25uLV_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or 5G\_L2\_10427\_replaced([11164616](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25uLWfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) accordingly (depending on currently used beamforming method).

Note: pattern ids of SRS based 2D-DFT beams shall be mapped according to 5G\_L2\_10429\_replaced([11164625](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25uLW_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) until next SRS based 2D-DFT beams selection is triggered (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6998\_replaced([11156071](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksy9WfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[CB012170-A]Note: 5G-L2-PS shall schedule SSB [Before PR810911]based on the value of actSSBBoostInmMIMOMuting, see[PR810911]according to[End PR810911] 5G\_L2\_21729\_replaced([11164694](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25uyY_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).[End CB012170-A]

If energySavingState changes from reducedEnergySaving to notEnergySaving:

Then:

5G-L2-PS must send update of pattern ids to L1 based on the standard (non energy saving) way of choosing / calculating pattern ids.

---

###### 2.4.10.2.3.1.0-13 MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio EIRP information for mMIMO cell in reducedEnergySaving state (ID: 11164660)

**2.4.10.2.3.1.0-13.0-2**  (ID: `11164671`)

MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio
When a 5G-L2-PS instance needs to execute the EIRP calculations (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8084\_replaced([11118921](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqG1uPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and value of isCellMassiveMimo stored in the instance’s cell database is set to TRUE (see 5G\_L2\_10418\_replaced([11164535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25tkSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and energySavingState is present in the instance’s cell database and value of energySavingState stored in the instance’s cell database is set to reducedEnergySaving (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2735\_replaced([10973678](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U2tGfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))),  
then:

If SRS based 2D-DFT beams are in use (see 5G\_L2\_9624\_replaced([11155663](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_246TDvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),   
then:

- EIRP related calculations shall use normalizedBeamGains related with DL DFT beam set dedicated for mMIMO cell in reducedEnergySaving state (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2353\_replaced([10972452](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UuxSPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

else if dlMimoMode stored in the instance’s cell database is set to 70 and PMI beams are in use (see 5G\_L2\_9624\_replaced([11155663](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_246TDvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),  
then:

- EIRP related calculations shall use normalizedBeamGains calculated by 5G-L2-PS according to 5G\_L2\_581\_replaced([11157877](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25IVd_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) based on the data received in PMI beam set dedicated for mMIMO cell in reducedEnergySaving state (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_315\_replaced([10972389](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UuKV_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

else if actBeamforming stored in the instance’s cell database is set to TRUE and GoB beams are in use (see 5G\_L2\_9624\_replaced([11155663](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_246TDvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),  
then:

- EIRP related calculations shall use normalizedBeamGainForNrLBmMimoRTXPowerSaving stored in the instance’s cell database (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_118\_replaced([10969144](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UbPQvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[CB012170-B]If [Before PR810911]the value[PR810911]values[End PR810911] of actSSBBoostInmMIMOMuting[PR810911] and ssbBoostingAllowed [End PR810911], stored in 5G-L2-PS cell database, [Before PR810911]is [PR810911]are both[End PR810911] equal to True, then for scheduled SSB:

- EIRP related calculations shall use normalizedBeamGain, see 5G\_L2\_IF\_118\_replaced([10969144](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UbPQvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), corresponded to unmuted SSB beams and do not use for them normalizedBeamGainForNrLBmMimoRTXPowerSaving;

- transmitted power for SSB shall be the same as in energySavingState state set to notEnergySaving. ACTUAL\_TX\_POWER\_CELL, see 5G\_L2\_21943\_replaced([11157807](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25HuafvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and related ACTUAL\_TX\_POWER\_BEAM counters shall not be reduced for SSB, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2550\_replaced([11118320](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqB9PfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [End CB012170-B]

---

###### 2.4.10.2.3.1.0-14 MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio Dummy PDCCH transmission for mMIMO cell in reducedEnergySaving state (ID: 11164677)

**2.4.10.2.3.1.0-14.0-1**  (ID: `11164682`)

MIMO muting for 4T4R, 6T6R and 8T8R radio, mMIMO muting for 32T32R and 64T64R radio
If energySavingState is set to reducedEnergySaving (see 5G\_L2\_7371\_replaced([11164560](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25tkTPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and isCellMassiveMimo is set to TRUE (see 5G\_L2\_10418\_replaced([11164535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25tkSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

Then:

5G-L2-PS shall use fixedly configured patternId of the SSB beam from beam set #1 with 90 degree (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1941\_replaced([11111798](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpQhJPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) taking into account PowerSavingBeamOffset (see RFREQ\_5235) for dummy PDCCH transmission (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7117\_replaced([11171730](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuGk6fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), CB010359).

---

##### 2.4.10.2.3.2 Boosting DL coverage for mMIMO cells in MIMO muting

###### 2.4.10.2.3.2.0-1 Boosting DL coverage for mMIMO cells in MIMO muting SSB power boosting state indication (ID: 11164694)

**2.4.10.2.3.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11164699`)

Boosting DL coverage for mMIMO cells in MIMO muting
When 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_CellSetupReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_61\_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), it shall store parameter actSSBBoostInmMIMOMuting in cell configuration database.

[PR810911] When 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell\_PowerSavingConfigurationReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2735\_replaced([10973678](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U2tGfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), it shall store parameter ssbBoostingAllowed in cell configuration database.[End PR810911]

5G-L2-PS shall apply or disable SSB power boosting in mMIMO muting mode, according to 5G\_L2\_21730\_replaced([11164705](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25uyZfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

###### 2.4.10.2.3.2.0-2 Boosting DL coverage for mMIMO cells in MIMO muting Scheduling SSB in reducedEnergySaving state (ID: 11164705)

**2.4.10.2.3.2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11164710`)

Boosting DL coverage for mMIMO cells in MIMO muting
If 5G-L2-PS cell is configured with energySavingState equal to reducedEnergySaving (see 5G\_L2\_7371\_replaced([11164560](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25tkTPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and isCellMassiveMimo equal to True (see 5G\_L2\_10418\_replaced([11164535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25tkSPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

then:

If [PR810911]both[End PR810911] actSSBBoostInmMIMOMuting [Before PR810911]is[PR810911]and ssbBoostingAllowed are[End PR810911] equal to True (see 5G\_L2\_21729\_replaced([11164694](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25uyY_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

then:

5G-L2-PS shall use pattern IDs [CB012170-B]of beams that are not muted, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2237\_replaced([11113810](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpd8j_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), [End CB012170-B]from non-energy saving beamset for SSB scheduling, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_20161\_replaced([11113367](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpbgSvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

else:

5G-L2-PS shall use pattern IDs from corresponding power saving beamset for SSB scheduling as for energySavingState changing from notEnergySaving to reducedEnergySaving, see 5G\_L2\_10431\_replaced([11164645](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25uLXfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_20161\_replaced([11113367](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpbgSvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

#### 2.4.10.2.4 Block of Unnecessary Inter Rank Switch

##### 2.4.10.2.4.1 Basic procedures

###### 2.4.10.2.4.1.0-1 Basic procedures Background of RANK switch blocking (ID: 11164728)

**2.4.10.2.4.1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11164732`)

Basic procedures
The background of RANK switch blocking algorithm is stated in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23883\_replaced([11139737](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krpG0PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Basic idea is to block the new reported RANK from UE, which is 1 step lower than current RANK, in case of high MCS for a while, until gNB confirm the current RANK leads to high BLER.

Note:

The algorithm only blocks RANK switch from 4 to 3.

5 basic procedures of RANK switch blocking listed below.

 Case1: NACK storm leads to continuous deltaCQI stepdown and cause RANK switch

 Case2: high BLER cause RANK switch

 Case3: less initTx leads to RANK switch directly after hysteresis timer expiry (hysteresis timer is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23887\_replaced([11139769](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krpt1PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

 Case4: new CSI report (with same RANK, i.e. report RANK 3) handling during the hysteresis timer

 Case5: new CSI report (with different RANK, e.g. 2) handling during the hysteresis timer

Note:

1. The 5 procedures are same for low risk scenarios and high risk scenarios.
2. Low risk scenarios: triggered by proposedMCS > rankSwitchBlockMcsThres1 and BLER determination threshold rankSwitchBlockBlerHighThres.
3. High risk scenario: triggered by rankSwitchBlockMcsThres1 > proposedMCS > rankSwitchBlockMcsThres2 and BLER determination threshold rankSwitchBlockBlerLowThres.
4. rankSwitchBlockMcsThres1 and rankSwitchBlockMcsThre2 are defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23885\_replaced([11139757](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krpt0vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rankSwitchBlockBlerHighThres and rankSwitchBlockBlerLowThres are defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23891\_replaced([11139800](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krpt2fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

###### 2.4.10.2.4.1.0-2 Basic procedures Switching determination rule (ID: 11164736)

**2.4.10.2.4.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11164744`)

Basic procedures
During RANK switch blocking, gNB continously check if the blocking can be stopped. There are 2 rules to determine it.

· Rule 1:

For every NACK of DL initial transmission, if DeltaCqi + rrmAvgCqi < cqiThreshold (cqiThreshold is calculated based on rankSwitchBlockMcsThres2, which are defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23885\_replaced([11139757](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krpt0vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

· Rule 2:

After gNB receives the 15th (which is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23910\_replaced([11141708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr0s-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) initial transmission, gNB calculates short term BLER based on the 15 harq feedbacks [PR751342](Note: which are scheduled with RANK4 only)[End PR751342]. If BLER > rankSwitchBlockBlerHighThres or rankSwitchBlockBlerLowThres (which is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23891\_replaced([11139800](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krpt2fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

---

###### 2.4.10.2.4.1.0-3 Basic procedures Case1: NACK storm leads to continuous deltaCQI stepdown and cause RANK switch (ID: 11164751)

**2.4.10.2.4.1.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11164758`)

Basic procedures
Case 1:

Before hysteresis timer expiry, continuous NACK leads to deltaCqi + rrmAvgCqi < cqiThreshold. gNB stop the blocking procedure and apply RANK 3 in following grants.

Note: cqiThreshold is calculated based on rankSwitchBlockMcsThres1.

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a diagram illustrating a process flow with text annotations and graphical elements. The background is black.
There is a horizontal line representing a timeline. Several events are marked on this timeline.
At the beginning of the timeline, there is a vertical arrow pointing downwards, labeled "Start Hysteresis timer". To the left of this arrow, there is text "proposedMCS > rankSwithBlockMosTires 1".
Following the initial arrow, there are three rectangular boxes aligned horizontally on the timeline, each labeled "rule 1".
Above the timeline, there are text annotations:
- "RANK still use 4" is positioned above the second "rule 1" box.
- To the right of the third "rule 1" box, there is a vertical arrow pointing upwards.
- Further to the right, there is a block of text: "■If deltaCql+rmAvgCol<cqlThreshold, stop Hysteresis timer and apply RANK 3 to following grants".
There are two vertical arrows pointing upwards from the bottom of the image, indicating specific points in time on the timeline. The first arrow is aligned with the start of the "rule 1" boxes, and the second arrow is positioned further to the right, aligned with the end of the diagram's depicted events.
The diagram appears to represent a conditional logic or a state machine where certain rules are applied based on specific conditions and timers.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3580.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

---

###### 2.4.10.2.4.1.0-4 Basic procedures Case2: high BLER cause RANK switch (ID: 11164763)

**2.4.10.2.4.1.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11164770`)

Basic procedures
Case 2:

Before hysteresis timer expiry, there are enough initTx ( number of initTx is larger than rdInterRankSwitchBlockMinInitTx ). The short term BLER is calclulated based on these initTx: numOfNack/numOfinitTx.

If the BLER > rankSwitchBlockBlerHighThres, gNB stop the blocking procedure and apply RANK 3 to following grants.

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a diagram illustrating a process involving "rules" and "RANK" values over time. A horizontal line represents time, with events marked by vertical arrows and labeled boxes.
At the beginning of the timeline, an arrow points down from the text "Start Hysteresis timer" and the condition "proposed MCS > rankSwithBlockMcs Thres 1". This indicates the initiation of a hysteresis timer based on a condition related to "proposed MCS" and a threshold.
Following this, there are three boxes labeled "rule 1" placed sequentially along the timeline. Above these, the text "RANK still use 4" suggests that the RANK value remains at 4 during this period.
Further along the timeline, there is a box labeled "rule 2", which is visually distinct (lighter shade of blue) from the "rule 1" boxes. An upward arrow originates from the end of the "rule 1" sequence and points towards the "rule 2" box.
To the right of the diagram, there are two bullet points providing conditional logic:
\* "If InitTx > rdInterRankSwitchBlock MininitTx, then check rule 2"
\* "If rule 2 determine BLER is high, stop Hysteresis timer and apply RANK 3 to following grants."
Finally, there is a vertical arrow pointing upwards from the timeline near the end of the diagram, indicating a point in time or an event.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3582.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

---

###### 2.4.10.2.4.1.0-5 Basic procedures Case3: less initTx leads to RANK switch directly after hysteresis timer expiry (ID: 11164777)

**2.4.10.2.4.1.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11164783`)

Basic procedures
Case 3:

Since very few initTx during the hysteresis timer, change RANK to 3 directly.

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a diagram illustrating a timeline of events related to a system's rank and hysteresis timer. The timeline progresses from left to right.
At the beginning of the timeline, there is a condition stated as "proposed MCS > rankSwithBlockMosTires 1". This event triggers the "Start Hysteresis timer".
Following the start of the hysteresis timer, there are two instances labeled "rule1" occurring sequentially. During this period, the system is described as "RANK still use 4".
An upward arrow indicates a transition. The text associated with this transition states "Hysteresis timer expiry and RANK switch to 3 directly". This suggests that after the hysteresis timer expires, the RANK value changes from 4 to 3.
The timeline is marked with vertical lines indicating specific points in time, with arrows pointing upwards from the timeline to denote events or states. ###### 2.4.10.2.4.1.0-6 Basic procedures Case4: new CSI report (with same RANK, i.e. report RANK 3) handling, either PCSI or ACSI,  during the hysteresis timer (ID: 11164787)

**2.4.10.2.4.1.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11164797`)

Basic procedures
Case 4:

If PCSI period < Hysteresis timer period, there may be PCSI report before Hysteresis timer expiry.

If ACSI enable, there may be ACSI report before Hysteresis timer expiry.

##### 2.4.11.1.1.0-2 Overview Scheduling Procedure (ID: 11164889)

**2.4.11.1.1.0-2.0-5**  (ID: `13467427`)

Overview
if NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = False, The MU scheduling is controlled by NIDD parameter actDlMuMimoEnh, which is received in PsCell\_CellSetupReq.

The MU scheduling procedure refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7518\_replaced([11142428](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr4XV_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a flowchart illustrating a process. The flowchart consists of several rectangular boxes representing steps and a diamond shape representing a decision point. Arrows connect the boxes, indicating the flow of the process.
Here is the text extracted from the flowchart:
\* Build MU candidate list (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7454)
\* Calculate max DL MU layers (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7446)
\* Virtual UE construction and RBG allocation with re-Tx UEs as root (5G\_UP\_ALG\_7430 and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7431)
\* Execute WRR algorithm to distribute FD resource to UEs with non-GBR InitTx (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4504)
\* Virtual UE construction and RBG allocation with initial-Tx UEs as root (5G\_UP\_ALG\_7430 and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7431)
\* Remaining RBG allocation (5G\_UP\_ALG\_7530)
\* Calculate Tx Power (5G\_UP\_ALG\_7434)
\* Calculate final MCS (5G\_UP\_ALG\_7435)
\* Fill FD scheduling info[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3602.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

Else **[CB015010-A]  If NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = True and NRCELL.actExhaustiveScheduling is set to a value other than 1**[End CB015010-A]\*\*\*\*

\* Pair UE Selection (5G\_L2\_5464)

The flowchart starts with a "Start" oval, followed by "TD Scheduling" which then branches into FDM Scheduling and MU Scheduling. An arrow connects the MU Scheduling process to the FD Scheduling section. A blue circle at the bottom of the FD Scheduling section likely represents an end point or a continuation of the process.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3602.003.png[/image\_path][/image-1]**

**[CB015010-A]**

Else

If NRCELL.actExhaustiveScheduling and NRCELL.actCarPoolLaneMuPairingES is set to DL or DLAndUL , then

[image-2][image\_desc]The image is a flowchart depicting a process. The flowchart starts with an oval labeled "Start". From "Start", an arrow points to a diamond shape with the text "actDlExhaustive Scheduling?".
There are two branches from this diamond. The left branch leads to a rectangular box containing the text "11142428". The right branch leads to another diamond shape with the text "Per-slot CPL DL enabled?".
From the "Per-slot CPL DL enabled?" diamond, there are two branches. The left branch leads to a rectangular box containing the text "12436592: Restriction due to overload control". The right branch leads to a sequence of rectangular boxes connected by arrows.
The first rectangular box in this sequence is empty. The second box contains the text "13343587: Initial virtual UE construction". The third box contains the text "13347880: TD metric of a virtual UE". The fourth box is also empty. The final rectangular box in this sequence contains the text "12560768". An arrow from this last box points back to the "12436592: Restriction due to overload control" box.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-04151110.png[/image\_path][/image-2]

**[End CB015010-A]**

Note: Dynamic switch functionaity support for Mu-MIMO new Tx users. Refer 5G\_L2\_15012\_replaced([11177333](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_266eKPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_L2\_16525\_replaced([11177632](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_267sR_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for more details.

Note:

1) The muPairForInitTxAreForbidden operation should not be executed at the pdsch subarea level; rather, it is carried out for the Cell BWP.

2) Needed Resources shall be used instead of Allowed Resources and computation shall be performed only for New Tx UEs.

3) Remaining Needed Resources are used in computation to handle NBR New TX UEs which has partially reserved the resources

The formula would be

*muPairForInitTxAreForbidden = totalRemainingNeededResources \* ampliFactor < availableResource* dlMuPairingPrbRatio;\*

Here,

*availableResource: This would be the available resources for MUMIMO UEs participating in WRR.*

This shall exclude

1) SU reserved and distributed resources

2) MU Retx Reserved resources

3) MU NBR and MAC CE Reserved resources

*totalRemainingNeededResources: This would be the sum of remainingNeededResources of MUMIMO UEs participating in WRR.*

*dlMuPairingPrbRatio: Configurable NIDD Param*

*ampliFactor:  constant value 100*

please refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_26472\_replaced([11142525](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr4XXfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Note : If there is no MU Eligible UEs are present in a slot then skip the MU MIMO schedule functionality

Adding parameter dlMuPairingPrbRatio(see 5G\_L2\_IF\_1871\_replaced([10968710](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UZaE_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))/5G\_L2\_IF\_2026\_replaced([10971449](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UoDnfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) to control initTx UE pairing decision, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_7518\_replaced([11142428](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr4XV_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for details.

---

#### 2.4.11.1.2 FDM Interwork

##### 2.4.11.1.2.1 Interaction with DL Slice Aware Scheduler

###### 2.4.11.1.2.1.0-1 Interaction with DL Slice Aware Scheduler Interaction overview of DL Slice Aware Scheduler and DL MU-MIMO Enhanced (ID: 11164957)

**2.4.11.1.2.1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11164969`)

Interaction with DL Slice Aware Scheduler
[Before 03806289]

If rdEnableSliceAwareWrr (see 5G\_L2\_20326\_replaced([11188504](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28JNMPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to 1 (TRUE), then:

When DL Slice Aware Scheduler (sliceAwareSchedulerCellActivation is set to true, see 5G\_L2\_IF\_61\_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and DL MU-MIMO Enhaced (actDlMuMimoEnh is set to true, see 5G\_L2\_IF\_1871\_replaced([10968710](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UZaE_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) are activated, additional steps need to be executed in 5G-L2-PS in order to estimate resource usage for the SVC algorithm (5G\_UP\_ALG\_7388\_replaced([11188793](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kved7PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) so that the MU-allocated resources are counted only once.

These steps include:

- Distribution of resources before creation of MU candidate list (5G\_L2\_15302\_replaced([11164976](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25wAi_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

- Allocation data update for MU eligible ReTx performed after MU pairing (5G\_L2\_15305\_replaced([11164991](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25wAjvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

SFS reference:  5G\_UP\_ALG\_23738\_replaced([11191972](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kviISvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[End 03806289]

---

###### 2.4.11.1.2.1.0-2 Interaction with DL Slice Aware Scheduler Distribution of resources before creation of MU candidate list (ID: 11164976)

**2.4.11.1.2.1.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11164986`)

Interaction with DL Slice Aware Scheduler
[Before 03806289]

If rdEnableSliceAwareWrr (see 5G\_L2\_20326\_replaced([11188504](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28JNMPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to 1 (TRUE), then:

Let allocableUesSasWrr be list of UEs computed for further resources distribution by a weighted round robin algorithm (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4504\_replaced([11179776](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku7ESfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_L2\_5529\_replaced([11165243](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25xOrvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

For each UE in the to-be-scheduled list (after the passed schedulability check - see FD UE selection procedure overview: 5G\_L2\_4282\_replaced([11165013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25wnk_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

5G-L2-PS shall add this UE to the allocableUesSasWrr list if all conditions are fulfilled:

- UE must have initTx data which belongs to slices of a non zero slice weight.

- UE has resources scheduled for a transmission considered as low priority traffic class (5G\_UP\_ALG\_7577\_replaced([11190661](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6K_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

if the UE has resources reserved in a slot for a transmission or a retransmission that is considered as high priority traffic class (5G\_UP\_ALG\_7577\_replaced([11190661](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6K_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall store the amount of PRBs, that belongs to this transmission or retransmission, as rrmInstUeHighPrbAlloc (5G\_UP\_ALG\_23256\_replaced([11207913](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwt0AvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). For a MU eligible UE (5G\_UP\_ALG\_7454\_replaced([11142605](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr4-afvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) number of PRBs for a retransmission needs to be derived from reserveRbg (5G\_L2\_5527\_replaced([11165197](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25xOp_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). How to determine number of PRBs for a retransmission or a GBR transmission is described in 5G\_L2\_4282\_replaced([11165013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25wnk_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

After iterating over the to-be-scheduled list, 5G-L2-PS shall run weighted round robin algorithm on the allocableUesSasWrr list. For each UE in the list, rrmInstUeLowPrbAlloc (5G\_UP\_ALG\_23256\_replaced([11207913](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwt0AvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) of this UE shall be equal to the number of PRBs that is derived from the amount of RBGs distributed to this UE by the WRR. All values of rrmInstUeLowPrbAlloc in the allocableUesSasWrr list shall be multiplied by a scaling factor rrmPartialRbgFactor (due to different possible RBG sizes in a BWP) under conditions specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_23738\_replaced([11191972](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kviISvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

If there are any available resources left not distributed by the weighted round robin algorithm, those shall be also transformed into the amount of PRBs, and then saved as rrmInstPrbFree (5G\_UP\_ALG\_7577\_replaced([11190661](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvg6K_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). If allocableUesSasWrr list is empty, then all resources available for WRR distribution shall be considered as free

[End 03806289]

---

###### 2.4.11.1.2.1.0-3 Interaction with DL Slice Aware Scheduler Calculations for MU eligible reTx performed after MU pairing (ID: 11164991)

**2.4.11.1.2.1.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11165002`)

Interaction with DL Slice Aware Scheduler
[Before 03806289]

If rdEnableSliceAwareWrr (see 5G\_L2\_20326\_replaced([11188504](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28JNMPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to 1 (TRUE), then:

After MU pairing is completed, L2-PS shall update rrmInstUeHighPrbAlloc values for the MU eligible (5G\_UP\_ALG\_7454\_replaced([11142605](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr4-afvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) ReTx UEs, so that each MU-shared resource is counted to the ReTx UE with the highest priority within the virtual UE.

Let muUeData be a list of MU eligible UEs sorted in a priority descending order.

for each scheduled UE with a ReTx u in the muUeData list:

rrmInstUeHighPrbAlloc(u) = min(totalInstHighPrbAlloc - totalHighAllocHigherPrioUes(u), numOfPrb(u))

where

totalInstHighPrbAlloc = sum(rrmInstUeHighPrbAlloc) of all scheduled UEs with ReTx in the muUeData list.

totalHighAllocHigherPrioUes = sum(rrmInstUeHighPrbAlloc) of all scheduled UE with ReTx in the muUeData list that have higher priority than UE u

numOfPrb = amount of resources allocated for the UE u in the MU-MIMO schedule

[End 03806289]

---

##### 2.4.11.1.2.2 FD UE Selection

###### 2.4.11.1.2.2.0-1 FD UE Selection FD UE selection (selectUes) procedure (ID: 11165013)

**2.4.11.1.2.2.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11165059`)

FD UE Selection
The UE selection is to selecte cs2List|toBeScheduledList UEs from cs2CandidateList in FDM for FD scheduling, the cs2CandidateList include all UEs after TD scheduleing.

During the cs2 UE selection, for the step of resource availability check and resource reservation/allocation,

when actDlMuMimoEnh=False, the BWP resource is SU only and one resource can not be duplicate used.

when actDlMuMimoEnh=True, the BWP resource can be MU and duplicate use is allowed.

**[CB008927-P] If NRCELL.actRat1Alloc = False** [End CB008927]\*\*\*\*

Following diagram describe the overall cs2List UE selection procedure:

[xlsx\_desc]--- Sheet3 ---
Empty DataFrame
Columns: []
Index: [][/xlsx\_desc][xlsx\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/attachments/m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file3618\_0.xlsx[/xlsx\_path]

**[CB008927-P] Else**

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a flowchart illustrating a process related to UE scheduling and resource allocation in a cellular network. The flowchart starts with a "start" node and proceeds through various decision points and actions.
Here's a breakdown of the key sections and their content:
**Top Section: Initial UE Selection and Scheduling Check**
\* **Start Node:** Initiates the process.
\* **"If numberOfScheduled Ues < rrmMaxNumUesFDM: Select a UE from cs2Candidate Uelist according to priority"**: This is the first decision point, checking if the number of scheduled UEs is below a maximum limit. If true, a UE is selected based on priority.
\* **"is UeSchedulable"**: A decision node checking if the selected UE is schedulable.
\* **Yes**: Proceeds to "IsLimitation Reached ".
\* **No**: The flow seems to terminate or go to an unillustrated path.
\* **"IsLimitation Reached "**: Checks for resource limitations.
\* **No**: Proceeds to "isResourceAvailableForCurrent Ue".
\* **Yes**: The flow seems to terminate or go to an unillustrated path.
\* **"isResourceAvailableForCurrent Ue"**: Checks resource availability for the current UE.
\* **No**: The flow seems to terminate or go to an unillustrated path.
\* **Yes**: Proceeds to "isResourceAvailableForPdcch".
\* **"isResourceAvailableForPdcch"**: Checks resource availability for PDCCH.
\* **Yes**: Proceeds to "isResourceAvailableForPxsch".
\* **No**: The flow seems to terminate or go to an unillustrated path.
\* **"isResourceAvailableForPxsch"**: Checks resource availability for Pxsch.
\* **Yes**: Proceeds to "isSelectSubarea '?' Success?".
\* **No**: The flow seems to terminate or go to an unillustrated path.
\* **"isSelectSubarea '?' Success?"**: Checks if subarea selection was successful.
\* **Yes**: Proceeds to "isRat0SchedulableCheck".
\* **No**: Proceeds to "isRat0SchedulableCheck".
\* **"isRat0SchedulableCheck"**: Checks if RAT0 schedulability is met.
\* **Yes**: Proceeds to "allocatePucchResource".
\* **No**: The flow seems to terminate or go to an unillustrated path.
\* **"allocatePucchResource"**: Action to allocate Pucch resources.
**Middle Section: Resource Allocation and Processing**
\* **"numberofScheduledUes++"**: Increments the count of scheduled UEs.
\* **"allocatePdcchResource"**: Action to allocate Pdcch resources.
\* **"processSchedulabele"**: A main process block.
\* **"reservePxschResourcesForInitialBwp"**: Action to reserve Pxsch resources for initial BWP.
\* **"IsInitial BwpUe"**: Decision node.
\* **Yes**: Proceeds to "reservePxschResourceForInitialBwpUe".
\* **No**: Proceeds to "reservePxschResourcesForDedicatedBwp".
\* **"reservePxschResourceForInitialBwpUe"**: Action to reserve Pxsch resources for initial BWP UE.
\* **"reservePxschResourcesForDedicatedBwp"**: Action to reserve Pxsch resources for dedicated BWP.
\* **"isReTxUe or SrbUe"**: Decision node.
\* **Yes**: Proceeds to "isMuEligibleUe".
\* **No**: Proceeds to "isMuEligibleUe".
\* **"isMuEligibleUe"**: Decision node.
\* **Yes**: Proceeds to "reserveFixedPxschResource (PRB)".
\* **No**: Proceeds to "isRatoReTxUe".
\* **"isRatoReTxUe"**: Decision node.
\* **Yes**: Proceeds to "reserveFixedPxschResource(RBG)".
\* **No**: Proceeds to "reserveNewTxPxsch Resources (PRB)".
\* **"reserveFixedPxsch Resource (PRB)"**: Action to reserve fixed Pxsch resources.
\* **"reserveFixed PxschResource(RBG)"**: Action to reserve fixed Pxsch resources (RBG).
\* **"reserveNewTxPxsch Resources (PRB)"**: Action to reserve new Tx Pxsch resources.
\* **"reserveResources For PriorBearers"**: Action to reserve resources for prior bearers.
\* **"prepareDistrbuitionUes For NormalBearer"**: Action to prepare distribution for normal bearers.
**Right Section: Resource Availability Checks and Updates**
This section contains three distinct blocks, each with a visual representation of resource allocation over time and corresponding text descriptions.
\* **Top Right Block:**
\* **Visual:** A timeline showing "Coreset0 SA#1", "Allocated", and "Coreset0 SA#0".
\* **Text:**
\* "1. Check Resource Availability in all Subarea's"
\* "If isInitialBwp or DCI 1 0 UE"
\* "Else Calculate Available RBs are in CoresetO SA's"
\* "Calculate Available RBs are in Dedicated SA's"
\* "2. Select Subarea 'i' For Msg2/Retx/Msg4/SRB's/MacCe/GBR"
\* "3. If isMuEligibleUe = True then update the muDatalist and Ue Scheduling Weight"
\* **Middle Right Block:**
\* **Visual:** A timeline showing "DCI 1 0", "Non-Distributable(DQ11)", "Distributable(SU-WRR)", "MuEligible", and "Free Prbs". Arrows indicate the start and end of these segments.
\* **Text:** "Check Resource Availability in all Subarea's"
\* "If isMuEligible Ue = True :"
\* "minRequest[prb] <= free[prb]+rserved [prb]MuEligible"
\* "Else"
\* "minRequest[prb] <= free[prb]"
\* **Bottom Right Block (Two sub-blocks):**
\* **Sub-block 1 (Connected to "reservePxschResourcesForInitialBwp"):**
\* **Text:** "For Initial BWP', Update Reserved Non-Distributable Resource"
\* "Selected SubArea 'i'within Initial BWP"
\* "Calculate Free(PRB) based in 5G L2 16241"
\* "Reserve [prb] = min(free(PRB), request(PRB])"
\* "Reserved [PRB] Non Distributable += Reserve[prb]"
\* "Update Remaining PRB's Selected SA ''"
\* **Sub-block 2 (Connected to "reservePxschResourcesForDedicatedBwp"):**
\* **Text:** "Update distributable Prbs for SU or MU eligible(NBR/Non GBR):"
\* "If isMuEligible Ue = True:"
\* "rserved[prb]MuEligible +=rserved [prb];"
\* "Else"
\* "rserved[prb]= min(free[prb],request(prb])"
\* "reserved[prb]Distributable += reserve[prb]"
\* **Sub-block 3 (Connected to "reservePxschResourcesForDedicatedBwp"):**
\* **Text:** "For Selected SA'', SRB/GBR Bearer/NBR,"
\* "Update Reserved Non-Distributable Resource"
\* "Calculate Free (PRB) based in 5G\_L2\_16241"
\* "Reserve[prb] = min(free (PRB), request(PRB])"
\* "Reserved [PRB] Non Distributable += Reserve[prb]"
\* "Update Remaining PRB's Selected SA ''"
The flowchart uses standard flowchart symbols like rectangles for actions, diamonds for decisions, and arrows to indicate the flow of control. The text within the shapes describes the specific operations or conditions. The right side of the diagram provides more detailed explanations and calculations related to resource management.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3618.002.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

**[End CB008927-P]**

In case of multiple BWP enabled(actMultipleDedicatedBWPs=True or/and actPowerSavingBWP=True), the muEligible UE is only in dediated large BWP(refer to 5G\_L2\_4196\_replaced([11165697](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25zD6PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Following is example:

Index: [][/xlsx\_desc][xlsx\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/attachments/m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file3618\_2.xlsx[/xlsx\_path]

Note, actMultipleDedicatedBWPs and actPowerSavingBWP are OAM parameters received in PsCell\_CellSetupReq.

Note : NBR resources are allocated as part of reserveResourcesForPriorAndNbrBearers
