**2.4.11.2.2.0-8.0-9**  (ID: `11168170`)

Virtual UE Construction
Skipping Correlation Check for Pusch 8Rx or 16Rx

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-8.0-9.0-1**  (ID: `11168177`)

Virtual UE Construction
L2PS shall skip the correlation check and select the first UE in list if following condition is met:

 ulMuMimoCorrThd = 0

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-8.0-10**  (ID: `11168182`)

Virtual UE Construction
Correlation Thresholds Check for Pusch 8Rx or 16Rx

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-8.0-10.0-1**  (ID: `11168186`)

Virtual UE Construction
L2PS shall check if current candidate IA (preselected according to 5G\_L2\_14333\_replaced([11168099](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25801PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), shall be rejected or is eligible for pairing with virtualUE(A), using below algorithm. Result of this algorithm can be one of two:

 candidate IA can be selected

 candidate IA shall be rejected, and no other candidate can be selected

IF correlation between the candidate IA and virtualUE(A) is smaller than or equal to selectedUlMuMimoCorrThd.

candidate IA can be selected

ELSE

 candidate IA shall be rejected, and no other candidate can be selected

Note:

 ulMuMimoCorrThd and ulMuMimoCorrThd2 are OAM parameters received in PsCell\_CellSetupReq/PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq from L3.

 If first candidate (besides root) is considered selectedUlMuMimoCorrThd = ulMuMimoCorrThd, else, selectedUlMuMimoCorrThd = ulMuMimoCorrThd2.

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-8.0-11**  (ID: `11168192`)

Virtual UE Construction
Simplified Correlation Thresholds Check for Pusch 8Rx or 16Rx

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-8.0-11.0-1**  (ID: `11168224`)

Virtual UE Construction
L2PS shall check if current candidate IA, shall be rejected or is eligible for pairing with virtualUE(A), using below simplified algorithm. Result of this algorithm can be one of two:

 candidate IA can be selected

 candidate IA shall be rejected, and other candidate shall be considered

Step 1:

For candidate IA from list L2-PS shall calculate separation degree of that candidate from all UE(j) already included in virtualUE(A) in horizontal and vertical direction using following formulas:

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a light gray font on a white background. The equation is:
$S\_{j,horizontal} = abs(horizontalDegree(I\_A) - horizontalDegree(UE(i)))$
The equation defines $S\_{j,horizontal}$ as the absolute difference between two values: $horizontalDegree(I\_A)$ and $horizontalDegree(UE(i))$.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3944.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

[image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in white text against a black background. The equation is:
$S\_{j,vertical} = abs(verticalDegree(I\_A) - verticalDegree(UE(j)))$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3944.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]

Where:

[image-2][image\_desc]Sj,horizontal[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3944.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2] is separation of candidate UE and UE(j) belonging to virtualUE(A) in horizontal direction

[image-3][image\_desc]The image contains the text "Sj,vertical". The text is blurry and appears to be in a sans-serif font. The color of the text is dark gray. The background is white.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3944.004.png[/image\_path][/image-3] is separation of candidate UE and UE(j) belonging to virtualUE(A) in vertical direction

[image-4][image\_desc]The image contains the text "horizontalDegree(UE)". The text is blurry and appears to be in a light color against a white background.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3944.005.png[/image\_path][/image-4] is the DOA of the 1st best oversampled DFT beams on horizontal direction for UE (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_5955\_replaced([11296085](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqFesPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

[image-5][image\_desc]The image contains the text "verticalDegree(UE)" in a blurry, light-colored font against a white background. The text is horizontally oriented.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3944.006.png[/image\_path][/image-5] is the DOA of the 1st best oversampled DFT beams on horizontal direction for UE (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_5955\_replaced([11296085](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqFesPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Step 2:

L2PS shall compare separation degrees with configured thresholds as follows:

IF IA is first candidate (besides root)

L2-PS shall check if following condition is met for each {Sj, horizontal, Sj, vertical} pair calculated in step 1:

 [image-6][image\_desc]Sj,horizontal ≥ degreeSeparationThdHP1 OR Sj,vertical ≥ degreeSeparationThdVP1[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3944.007.png[/image\_path][/image-6]

IF so

candidate IA can be selected

ELSE

candidate IA shall be rejected, and other candidate shall be considered

ELSE

L2-PS shall check if following condition is met for each {Sj, horizontal, Sj, vertical} pair calculated in step 1:

 [image-7][image\_desc]Sj,horizontal ≥ degreeSeparationThdHP2 OR Sj,vertical ≥ degreeSeparationThdVP2[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3944.008.png[/image\_path][/image-7]

IF so

candidate IA can be selected

ELSE

candidate IA shall be rejected, and other candidate shall be considered

Note:

 degreeSeparationThdHP1, degreeSeparationThdVP1, degreeSeparationThdHP2, degreeSeparationThdVP2 are OAM parameters received in PsCell\_CellSetupReq/PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq from L3

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-8.0-12**  (ID: `11168232`)

Virtual UE Construction
Sinr Check for Pusch 8Rx or 16Rx

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-8.0-12.0-2**  (ID: `11168244`)

Virtual UE Construction
L2PS shall execute additional check if current candidate IA (preselected according to 5G\_L2\_14337\_replaced([11168182](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_259b4fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), shall be rejected or is eligible for pairing with virtualUE(A), using [Before PR763741] simplified [End PR763741] sinr diff check ([Before PR763741] 5G\_L2\_14340\_replaced([11168249](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_259b6fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [PR763741] 5G\_L2\_6269\_replaced([11167746](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_257m0_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [End PR763741]) within below algorithm. Result of this algorithm can be one of [Before PR763741] two [PR763741] three [End PR763741]:

 candidate IA can be selected

 [PR763741] candidate IA can be selected and no other candidate can be selected [End PR763741]

 candidate IA shall be rejected and no other candidate can be selected

[Before PR763741]

IF simplified sinr diff check failed

candidate IA can be rejected and no other candidate can be selected

ELSE

candidate IA can be selected

[PR763741]

IF sinr diff check succeded

candidate IA can be selected

ELSE

IF candidate IA is first to be added to virtualUE(A) (besides root UE)

candidate IA can be selected and no other candidate can be selected

this event shall be reported for all remaining candidate UEs in ulMuUeData (see 5G\_L2\_9251\_replaced([11205121](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-Ef1fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) as ulMuStatus  = muNonPaired\_sinrDiffInPairedUes

ELSE

candidate IA shall be rejected and no other candidate can be selected

[End PR763741]

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-8.0-13**  (ID: `11168249`)

Virtual UE Construction
Simplified Sinr Check for Pusch 8Rx or 16Rx

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-8.0-13.0-1**  (ID: `11168272`)

Virtual UE Construction
The simplified sinr diff requirement of candidate UE to be added in virtualUE is checked as following.

L2PS shall calculate for current candidate IA (preselected according to 5G\_L2\_14338\_replaced([11168192](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_259b4_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) sinr differences [image-0][image\_desc]The image contains the text "SimrDiff". The text is blurry and appears to be in a light color against a white background.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3949.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0] between candidate UE and each UE(j) from virtualUE using formula:

[image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a blurry, light-colored font against a white background. The equation is:
$SinrDiff\_j = abs(Sinr\_A - Sinr\_{UE}(j))$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3949.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]

Where:

[image-2][image\_desc]The image contains the text "Sfmr₁₄" in a blurry, stylized font. The letters are colored with a gradient of blue, purple, and orange, and the numbers "₁₄" are in a lighter shade of orange. The background is white.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3949.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2] is sinr of candidate UE

[image-3][image\_desc]The image contains blurry text that appears to be "Simr u g(h)".[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3949.004.png[/image\_path][/image-3] is sinr of UE(j)

L2PS shall check if all calculated sinr differences satisfies [image-4][image\_desc]The image contains the text "SinrDiff < ulSinrDiffThreshold". The text is slightly blurry and appears to be in a programming or mathematical context.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3949.005.png[/image\_path][/image-4]

Note:

 sinr values used are rescaledSinr defined in 5G\_L2\_6239\_replaced([11167494](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_256YlvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

 ulSinrDiffThreshold is NIDD parameter received in PsCell\_CellSetupReq(5G\_L2\_IF\_2296\_replaced([10968800](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UZaH_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))/PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq(5G\_L2\_IF\_2299\_replaced([10971564](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UpRsPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

---

##### 2.4.11.2.2.0-9 Virtual UE Construction Spectrum Efficiency Check (ID: 11168277)

**2.4.11.2.2.0-9.0-1**  (ID: `11168281`)

Virtual UE Construction
SU-MCS Decision

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-9.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11168287`)

Virtual UE Construction
Compensation algorithm

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-9.0-1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `12560702`)

Virtual UE Construction
If [Before **CNI-137616-B]  rdPrbCompensation = true or [End**CNI-137616-B]ulMuMimoSpectralEffThd !=0, L2RT should calculate SU-MCS for SE and prb compensation according to the OAM parameter ulMuMimoLinkAdaptionSwitch for initial transmission UEs. **For re-transmission UEs, the SU-MCS shall be the same as the value in initial transmission traffic.**\*\*\*\*

If ulMuMimoLinkAdaptionSwitch = 0, MU-SINR estimation algorithm is active.

Else if ulMuMimoLinkAdaptionSwitch = 1, MCS compensation is used.

ulMuMimoLinkAdaptionSwitch is OAM parameter received in PsCell\_CellSetupReq/PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq.

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-9.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11168297`)

Virtual UE Construction
MU-SINR Based

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-9.0-1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11168301`)

Virtual UE Construction
If ulMuMimoLinkAdaptionSwitch = 0, L2RT convert the rescaledSinr based on required PRB(refer to 5G\_L2\_6239\_replaced([11167494](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_256YlvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) to mcs(refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3090\_replaced([11131515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ5fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) as SU-MCS.

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-9.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11168307`)

Virtual UE Construction
MCS Compensation Based

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-9.0-1.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11168312`)

Virtual UE Construction
If ulMuMimoLinkAdaptionSwitch = 1,

1) L2RT convert the rescaledSinr based on required PRB(refer to 5G\_L2\_6239\_replaced([11167494](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_256YlvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) to mcs(refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3090\_replaced([11131515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ5fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) as current mcs before adjusting.

2) Set current pair size as 0 since SU-MCS is calculated.

3) Get lastPairSize according to 5G\_L2\_7017\_replaced([11169493](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26CUavvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

4) Adjust MCS to SU-MCS according to 5G\_L2\_7015\_replaced([11169434](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26CUZvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

An example can be found in 5G\_L2\_6271\_replaced([11168344](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25-DAPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-9.0-2**  (ID: `11168318`)

Virtual UE Construction
MU-MCS Decision

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-9.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11168322`)

Virtual UE Construction
Compensation algorithm

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-9.0-2.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `12560791`)

Virtual UE Construction
IF ulMaxMuMimoLayer(see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2296\_replaced([10968800](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UZaH_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is larger than 4.

Only MCS compensation is used.

ELSE

If [Before **CNI-137616-B]rdPrbCompensation = true or[End**CNI-137616-B] ulMuMimoSpectralEffThd !=0, L2RT should calculate MU-MCS for SE and prb compensation according to the OAM parameter ulMuMimoLinkAdaptionSwitchfor initial transmission UEs. **For re-transmission UEs, the MU-MCS shall be the same as the value in initial transmission traffic.**\*\*\*\*

If ulMuMimoLinkAdaptionSwitch = 0, MU-SINR estimation algorithm is active.

Else if ulMuMimoLinkAdaptionSwitch = 1, MCS compensation is used.

END IF

ulMuMimoLinkAdaptionSwitch is OAM parameter received in PsCell\_CellSetupReq/PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq.

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-9.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11168337`)

Virtual UE Construction
MU-SINR Based

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-9.0-2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11168339`)

Virtual UE Construction
If ulMuMimoLinkAdaptionSwitch = 0,

1) Get the rescaledSinr in dB based on required PRB. Refer to 5G\_L2\_6239\_replaced([11167494](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_256YlvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[PR665241]

2) Use the correlation based on tapered beam or non-tapered beam according to isUsingTaperedBeam(5G\_L2\_8061\_replaced([11169121](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26BtUfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) which is calculated in correlation check.

[End PR665241]

3) Convert the SU-SINR to MU-SINR according to  5G\_L2\_6712\_replaced([11169176](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26BtWfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

4) Find the MU-MCS according to MU-SINR. . Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3090\_replaced([11131515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ5fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

CP2 reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8350\_replaced([11148506](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksKrMPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-9.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `11168344`)

Virtual UE Construction
MCS Compensation Based

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-9.0-2.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11168350`)

Virtual UE Construction
If ulMuMimoLinkAdaptionSwitch = 1,

1) Use MCS converted by the rescaledSinr based on required PRB(refer to 5G\_L2\_6239\_replaced([11167494](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_256YlvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) as current mcs before adjusting. Refer to 5G\_L2\_7024\_replaced([11168307](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25-C8PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

2) Get lastPairSize according to 5G\_L2\_7017\_replaced([11169493](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26CUavvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

3) Adjust MCS according to 5G\_L2\_7015\_replaced([11169434](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26CUZvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

An example for MU-MCS calculation for SE based on mcs compensation.

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a table with three columns labeled "UE1", "UE2", and "UE3", and several rows describing different parameters related to these UEs.

| Parameter | UE1 | UE2 | UE3 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| numOfLayer of UE | 1 | 2 | 1 |
| lastPairSize | 0 | 1 | 2 |
| mcs calculated by rrmRescaledCorrAvgSinr (based on requirePRB) | mcs1 | mcs2 | mcs3 |
| SU-MCS | mcs1 | mcs2+1 | mcs3+2 |
| MU-MCS{UE1,UE2} | mcs1-2 | mcs2 |  |
| MU-MCS{UE1,UE2,UE3} | mcs1-3 | mcs2-1 | mcs3-1 |

Note: mcsOffsetLayerDiffZero = 0, mcsOffsetLayerDiffOne = -1, mcsOffsetLayerDiffTwo = -2, mcsOffsetLayerDiffThree = -2 in the example.

CP2 reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8349\_replaced([11148930](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksLSS_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

The editable file for the table is in link: <https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:x:/r/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Drawings%20and%20diagrams%20for%205G/User%20Plane/5G%20L2%20Entity%20Level/2%205G-L2-PS%20Component%20Requirements/2.4%20Algorithm/11.%20MU-MIMO/5G_L2_7020_MCS%20Compensation%20Based.xlsx?d=wcfcb48b1e77442738ec3c11706b4c9d0&csf=1&web=1&e=G8aHUl>

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-9.0-3**  (ID: `11168355`)

Virtual UE Construction
SE Calculation

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-9.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11168395`)

Virtual UE Construction
The normalized spectrum efficiency for UE(i) in virtualUE(A) at stage N is defined as below :

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$\epsilon\_{i,N} = R\_{i,N} \* Qm\_{i,N} \* Layer\_i$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3968.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

- N is the size of virtual UE. If N = 1, it represents the su SE for UE(i), [image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a blurry, close-up view of text. The text appears to be "Bi, su". The colors are distorted and blended, making it difficult to discern the exact characters.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3968.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1].

- [image-2][image\_desc]The image contains the text "R.i.N" in a stylized font with a chromatic aberration effect, giving it a slightly blurred and colorful appearance. The letters are large and prominent, with the "R" being the largest, followed by "i" and then "N". The background is white, and the text is framed by a black border.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3968.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2] and [image-3][image\_desc]The image contains the text "Qm₁,N" in a blurry, colorful font. The letters are distorted and have a rainbow-like effect, making them difficult to read clearly.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3968.004.png[/image\_path][/image-3] are coding rate and modulation order of UE(i) according to selected MCS.

o If N = 1, get SU-MCS according to 5G\_L2\_6448\_replaced([11168281](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_259b7fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

o If N > 1, get MU-MCS according to 5G\_L2\_6445\_replaced([11168318](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25-C8vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

- [image-4][image\_desc]The image contains the word "Layer" written in a stylized font. The letters are colorful, with shades of blue, purple, and yellow. The word is centered in the image and appears to be on a white background. There is a black border around the image.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3968.005.png[/image\_path][/image-4] is the rank of UE(i).

CP2 reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9529\_replaced([11147182](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksFyvfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[CB010659-B]

For a reTx UE scheduled with adaptive retransmission, the normalized spectrum efficiency for UE(i) in virtualUE(A) at stage N is defined by 5G\_UP\_ALG\_18303\_replaced([11147209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksFyv_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End CB010659-B]

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-9.0-4**  (ID: `11168401`)

Virtual UE Construction
SE Check if root UE paired with candidate UEs

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-9.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11168424`)

Virtual UE Construction
[Before CNI-109641 #UL MU-MIMO]

If ulMuMimoSpectralEffThd = 0, SE check will be set as pass immediately.

Else, SE need to be checked as follows.

- ulMuMimoSpectralEffThd is OAM parameter received in PsCell\_CellSetupReq/PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq.

When add one UE(i) at stage N+1 into virtualUE(A), SE check is pass if following conditions all be met.

1) For each existing UE in stage N

[image-0][image\_desc]$\forall j \in A\_N, \epsilon\_{j,N+1} > \frac{rdSpectralEfficiency \* \epsilon\_{j,N} \* N}{N+1}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3970.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

o N is the size of virtualUE(A).

o [image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a blurry close-up of the letters "A" and "N". The letters are colored with a gradient of blues, purples, and yellows, giving them a somewhat iridescent appearance. The background is white.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3970.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1] is the virtualUE(A) at stage N.

o [image-2][image\_desc]The image contains a blurry, abstract representation of text. The visible characters appear to be "FI.W". The colors are a mix of blues, yellows, oranges, and purples, with a gradient effect. The background is white, and the text is positioned in the lower left quadrant of the image.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3970.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2] is the normalized spectrum efficiency of UE(j) in virtualUE(A) at stage N. Refer to 5G\_L2\_6446\_replaced([11168355](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25-DAvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

o rdSpectralEfficiency is a R&D parameter. The default value shall be 1. Refer to 5G\_L2\_6384\_replaced([11186950](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_279ABfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

2) For the new UE(i) to be added at stage N+1

[image-3][image\_desc]$\epsilon\_{i,N+1} > \frac{rdSpectralEfficiency \* \epsilon\_{i,SU}}{N+1}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3970.004.png[/image\_path][/image-3]

o [image-4][image\_desc]The image contains a blurry, pixelated close-up of text. The visible text appears to be "ei,su". The colors are distorted, with yellow, blue, and orange hues bleeding into the letters. The background is white.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3970.005.png[/image\_path][/image-4] is the normalized spectrum efficiency of UE(i) at SU state. Refer to 5G\_L2\_6446\_replaced([11168355](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25-DAvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

3) An additional checking shall be done as below:

[image-5][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is presented as a fraction. The numerator is a summation of a product. The summation is over the index $j$ belonging to the set $A\_{N+1}$. The term being summed is $\epsilon\_{j,N+1}$ multiplied by `ulMuMimoSpectralEffThd` and then multiplied by a term in parentheses. The term in parentheses is $(\epsilon\_{i,su} + N \* \sum\_{j \in A\_N} \epsilon\_{j,N})$. The denominator of the fraction is $N+1$. There is also a greater than symbol to the left of the fraction.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3970.006.png[/image\_path][/image-5]

CP2 reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10481\_replaced([11147281](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksGZwfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[CNI-109641 #UL MU-MIMO]

Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10481\_replaced([11147281](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksGZwfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End CNI-109641 #UL MU-MIMO]

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-9.0-5**  (ID: `11168429`)

Virtual UE Construction
SE Check if root UE paired with candidate UE group

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-9.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11168458`)

Virtual UE Construction
[Before CNI-109641 #UL MU-MIMO]

If ulMuMimoSpectralEffThd = 0, SE check will be set as pass immediately.

Else, SE need to be checked as follows.

- ulMuMimoSpectralEffThd is OAM parameter received in PsCell\_CellSetupReq/PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq.

When add one candidate UE group Z into virtualUE(A) at stage N+1, SE check is pass if following conditions all be met.

1) For each existing UE in stage N, that is to say root UE(j)

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical inequality. On the left side of the inequality symbol ">" is $\epsilon\_{j,N+1}$. On the right side of the inequality symbol is a fraction. The numerator of the fraction is $rdSpectralEfficiency \* \epsilon\_{j,N} \* N$. The denominator of the fraction is $N+1$.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3972.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

o N is the size of virtualUE(A), N=1 here.

o [image-1][image\_desc]The image is a close-up, blurry, and pixelated shot of text. The text appears to be "e.i.w" with some colorful, abstract shapes behind it. The colors are muted and blend together, making it difficult to discern any specific details. The overall impression is one of a distorted or abstract representation of text.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3972.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1] is the normalized spectrum efficiency of UE(j) in virtualUE(A) at stage N. Refer to 5G\_L2\_6446\_replaced([11168355](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25-DAvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

o rdSpectralEfficiency is a R&D parameter. The default value shall be 1. Refer to 5G\_L2\_6384\_replaced([11186950](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_279ABfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

2) For the candidate UE group Z

[image-2][image\_desc]$\epsilon\_{z,N+1} > \frac{rdSpectralEfficiency \* \epsilon\_{z,SU}}{N+1}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3972.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2]

o [image-3][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$$ \xi\_{z, SU} = \frac{\sum\_{UE \in \mathcal{D}(z)} x^{\epsilon\_{l, SU}}}{M} $$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3972.004.png[/image\_path][/image-3]

o [image-4][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$\xi\_{z,N+1} = \frac{\sum\_{i=1}^{N} z^i \xi\_{z,N+1}}{M}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3972.005.png[/image\_path][/image-4]

o [image-5][image\_desc]The image contains a blurry, pixelated close-up of text. The visible text appears to be "ci.su". The colors are distorted and blended, making it difficult to discern individual letters clearly.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3972.006.png[/image\_path][/image-5] is the normalized spectrum efficiency of UE(i) at SU state. Refer to 5G\_L2\_6446\_replaced([11168355](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25-DAvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

o M is the UE number in candidate UE group Z.

3) An additional checking shall be done as below:

[image-6][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical inequality. On the left side of the inequality, there is a summation symbol (Σ) with the index 'j' belonging to the set 'AN+1' below it. To the right of the summation symbol, there is a term 'Ej,N+1' followed by a greater than symbol '>'.
The right side of the inequality is a fraction. The numerator is 'ulMuMimoSpectralEffThd \* (Ez,su + N \* Ej,N)'. The denominator is 'N+1'.
The overall inequality can be read as: the sum of Ej,N+1 for all j in AN+1 is greater than the expression (ulMuMimoSpectralEffThd \* (Ez,su + N \* Ej,N)) / (N+1).[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3972.007.png[/image\_path][/image-6]

o [image-7][image\_desc]The image contains a blurry, close-up view of the text "A N+1". The letters and numbers are distorted and have a chromatic aberration effect, with red, green, and blue fringes visible around the edges. The background is dark, and the text is light-colored.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3972.008.png[/image\_path][/image-7] contain the root UE(j) and UE group(Z).

Note: In the case root UE paired with UE group, there can only be one root UE and one UE group.

CP2 reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10482\_replaced([11147328](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksGZw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[CNI-109641 #UL MU-MIMO]

Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10482\_replaced([11147328](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksGZw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End CNI-109641 #UL MU-MIMO]

**2.4.11.2.2.0-9.0-6**  (ID: `11168464`)

Virtual UE Construction
Skipping SE Check

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-9.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11168467`)

Virtual UE Construction
If ulMaxMuMimoLayer(see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2296\_replaced([10968800](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UZaH_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is larger than 4, SE check(5G\_L2\_6446\_replaced([11168355](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25-DAvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_L2\_6447\_replaced([11168401](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25-DBfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_L2\_8167\_replaced([11168429](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25-qAPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))shall be skipped.

##### 2.4.11.2.2.0-10 Virtual UE Construction Prb Compensation Factor (ID: 11168472)

Virtual UE Construction
[Before CNI-109641 #UL MU-MIMO]

Prb compensation factor is used for required prb compensation for the UEs in virtual UE.

IF ((rdPrbCompensation==true) AND (UE(i) in virtual UE) AND  (UE(i) is NOT a power litmit UE ))

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$\alpha\_i = \frac{R\_i^{su} \* Qm\_i^{su}}{R\_i^{mu} \* Qm\_i^{mu}}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3976.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

ELSE

The letter "α" is a Greek letter, and the subscript "i" is a small letter "i". The equals sign is centered between "αᵢ" and "1". The number "1" is a standard Arabic numeral. The overall image is clear and legible.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3976.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]

where

- [image-2][image\_desc]The image is too blurry to describe in detail.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3976.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2] : Prb compensation factor of UE(i)

- rdPrbCompensation : see 5G\_L2\_6386\_replaced([11186959](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_279nAfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

- [image-3][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is "Qm\_i^su \* R\_i^su". The characters are blurred and difficult to read.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3976.004.png[/image\_path][/image-3]:  Modulation order multiplied by the coding rate according to Su-Mcs of UE(i)

The "m" and "u" are superscripts to "Q" and "R" respectively, and "i" is a subscript to "Q" and "R". The asterisk symbol is in the middle of the expression.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3976.005.png[/image\_path][/image-4]: Modulation order multiplied by the coding rate according to Mu-Mcs of UE(i).

##### 2.4.11.2.2.0-11 Virtual UE Construction Virtual UE Information Updating (ID: 11168500)

**2.4.11.2.2.0-11.0-1**  (ID: `11168503`)

Virtual UE Construction
Information Updating During and After Virtual Construction

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-11.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11168650`)

Virtual UE Construction
Each time a new Ue(i) is added in a virtual UE, the following information should be updated.

1. Required PRB of both the Ue(i) in virtual Ue and virtual Ue

IF (there is one or more re-transmission UEs in virtual UE)

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$N\_{vUE}^{req} = \max\_{retx UE(i) \in vUE} N\_{retx UE(i)}^{req}$
The equation defines $N\_{vUE}^{req}$ as the maximum of $N\_{retx UE(i)}^{req}$ over all $retx UE(i)$ in $vUE$.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3981.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

ELSE IF (there is one or more MPR aware UEs (5G\_L2\_5038\_replaced([11170086](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26HM5PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) in virtual UE)

[image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$N\_{vUe}^{req} = \max\_{MprUe(i) \in vUe} N\_{MprUe(i)}^{req}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3981.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]

ELSE

[image-2][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$N\_{ue(i)}^{reqNew} = \alpha \* N\_{ue(i)}^{reqOrig}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3981.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2]

[image-3][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$N\_{vUe}^{req} = \max\_{Ue(i) \in vUe} N\_{Ue(i)}^{reqNew}$
This equation defines the required number of virtual User Equipment ($N\_{vUe}^{req}$) as the maximum of the required new number of User Equipment ($N\_{Ue(i)}^{reqNew}$) for all User Equipment ($Ue(i)$) belonging to the virtual User Equipment ($vUe$).[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3981.004.png[/image\_path][/image-3]

For the root Ue paired with Ue group(5G\_L2\_7326\_replaced([11169781](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26EwqPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), required PRB of virtual UE should be updated as below.

[image-4][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in a small font. The equation is:
$N\_{rootUe}^{reqNew} = \alpha \* N\_{rootUe}^{reqOrig}$
The equation shows a relationship between a new requirement ($N\_{rootUe}^{reqNew}$) and an original requirement ($N\_{rootUe}^{reqOrig}$), scaled by a factor $\alpha$. The text is in a dark color against a white background. The image is slightly blurry, but the text is still legible.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3981.005.png[/image\_path][/image-4]

[image-5][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$N\_{UeGroup}^{req} = \sum\_{Ue(i) \in UeGroup} N\_{Ue(i)}^{reqNew}$
This equation states that the total number of requests for a group of users ($N\_{UeGroup}^{req}$) is equal to the sum of the new requests from each individual user ($N\_{Ue(i)}^{reqNew}$) within that group.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3981.006.png[/image\_path][/image-5]

[image-6][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
$N\_{vUe}^{req} = Max(N\_{UeGroup}^{req}, N\_{rootUe}^{reqNew})$
The equation states that the required number of virtual UEs ($N\_{vUe}^{req}$) is the maximum of the required number of UEs in a group ($N\_{UeGroup}^{req}$) and the new required number of root UEs ($N\_{rootUe}^{reqNew}$).[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3981.007.png[/image\_path][/image-6]

Where,

- [image-7][image\_desc]The image contains the text "N req retxUe (i)". The text is in a dark color against a white background. The letters are slightly blurred.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3981.008.png[/image\_path][/image-7]: required PRB of re-transmission Ue(i) in virtual UE, which shall be the same as the one in the initial transmission, if the adaptive retransmission is deactivated (actAdaptiveReTxResMcsEnh is set to FALSE). If the adaptive retransmission is activated (actAdaptiveReTxResMcsEnh is set to TRUE), the number of required PRBs for re- transmission Ue(i) shall be calculated by adaptive retransmission as give in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11970\_replaced([11202476](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwdVX_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). actAdaptiveReTxResMcsEnh is NIDD parameter received from PsCell\_CellSetupReq(5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

- [image-8][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is "N req MprUa(i)". The "req" is a superscript to the "N". The "MprUa(i)" is a subscript to the "N".[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3981.009.png[/image\_path][/image-8]: required PRB of MPR aware Ue(i) in virtual UE

-  [image-9][image\_desc]The image contains the mathematical expression $N\_{Ue(i)}^{reqOrig}$. The expression is written in a mathematical notation with a subscript and a superscript. The subscript is "Ue(i)" and the superscript is "reqOrig". The letter "N" is the main variable.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3981.010.png[/image\_path][/image-9] :  original required PRB of Ue(i) in virtual UE, see note of 5G\_L2\_6239\_replaced([11167494](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_256YlvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

-  [image-10][image\_desc]The image is a blurry, close-up shot of a logo. The logo appears to be circular or oval in shape and features a colorful design with shades of blue, orange, and purple. The center of the logo has a lighter, almost white area with some subtle color variations. The overall impression is of a vibrant and modern design, but the blurriness makes it difficult to discern specific details or any text that might be present.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3981.011.png[/image\_path][/image-10] : Prb compensation factor of Ue(i), see 5G\_L2\_6260\_replaced([11168472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25-qBPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

- [image-11][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is written in a subscript format. The main character is "N". Below "N", there is a subscript "Ue(i)". To the right of "N", there is a superscript "reqNew". The text is blurry and difficult to read clearly.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3981.012.png[/image\_path][/image-11] : required PRB of Ue(i) in virtual UE with Prb compensation

- [image-12][image\_desc]The image contains the text "N reqNew rootue". The text is in a dark color against a white background. The letters are slightly blurred.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3981.013.png[/image\_path][/image-12]: required PRB of root Ue with Prb compensation

- [image-13][image\_desc]The image contains the text "Nreq UeGroup". The text is in a dark color against a white background. The text is slightly blurry.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3981.014.png[/image\_path][/image-13] : required PRB of Ue group with Prb compensation

- [image-14][image\_desc]The image contains the text "Nreq" and "vua" in a stylized font with a rainbow gradient effect. The letters are slightly blurred, giving them a soft, glowing appearance. The background is white.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3981.015.png[/image\_path][/image-14] : required PRB of a virtual Ue

1. Layers of the virtual UE

Layers of the virtual UE = sum of layers of Ue in the virtual UE

[CB008235-A]

If ulMaxMuMimoLayer(see 5G\_L2\_IF\_2296\_replaced([10968800](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UZaH_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is larger than 4 and one or more UEs in the virtual UE only support one DMRS front-load symbol in uplink(refer to twoFlDmrs in 5G\_L2\_IF\_401\_replaced([10975032](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U_P9Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_13432\_replaced([11282087](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tpcli_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),max Ul MuMimo Layer for this vUE shall set as min(rrmMaxUlMuMimoLayer, 4), rrmMaxUlMuMimoLayer see 5G\_L2\_6255\_replaced([11167631](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_256_v_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End CB008235-A]

CP2 reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9548\_replaced([11147793](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksHn8PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-11.0-2**  (ID: `11168656`)

Virtual UE Construction
Information Updating After Virtual Construction

---

**2.4.11.2.2.0-11.0-2.0-4**  (ID: `12563572`)

Virtual UE Construction
After a virtual UE construction is completed, the following information should be updated.

1.  Virtual Ue schedule weight

**[Before CNI-137616-B]   IF (rdScheduleWeight == false)**[End CNI-137616-B]\*\*\*\*

[image-0][image\_desc]ScheduleWeight\_{vUe}[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3985.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0] = [image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is a summation. The summation is over the variable $u\_e(t)$ where $u\_e(t)$ is an element of $U\_e$. The term being summed is $ScheduleWeight\_{u\_e(t)}$. The expression is written as:
$\sum\_{u\_e(t) \in U\_e} ScheduleWeight\_{u\_e(t)}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3985.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]

For the root Ue paired with Ue group(5G\_L2\_7326\_replaced([11169781](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26EwqPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), schedule weight of virtual UE should be updated as below**.**

[image-2][image\_desc]ScheduleWeight$*{v \cup e}$ = ScheduleWeight$*{v \cup e}$ + max$*{u \in U\_e(i) \in U*{eGroup}}$ ScheduleWeight$\_{u \in U\_e(i)}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3985.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2]

**[Before CNI-137616-B]    ELSE**

[image-3][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
ScheduleWeight$*{v,e}$ = Max$*{u \in V \setminus {v}}$ (ScheduleWeight$\_{u,e}$)
The equation defines the "ScheduleWeight" for an edge (v, e) as the maximum "ScheduleWeight" among all other vertices (u) in the set V, excluding vertex v, for the same edge e.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3985.004.png[/image\_path][/image-3]  **[End CNI-137616-B]**

where,

[image-4][image\_desc]The image contains the text "ScheduleWeightue(t)". The text is blurry and difficult to read.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_3985.005.png[/image\_path][/image-4] :  schedule weight of Ue(i), see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4851\_replaced([11195815](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv-0NPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

2.  MPR aware flag

The virtual UE should be marked as MPR aware Ue in case one or more Ue(s) in virtual UE is/are MPR aware Ue(s).

Please refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_5038\_replaced([11201808](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwZq8vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))  for MPR aware UE.

1. eCpriSectionId

refer to 5G\_L2\_7076\_replaced([11179800](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27IgmPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

1. Priority(for -B afterwards)

The priority/sub-priority of a virtual UE should be set as the maximum priority/sub-priority of the Ue in virtual UE.

Please refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4769\_replaced([11194310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvz1JPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for **UL traffic prioritization concept.**

1. Number of DMRS front-load symbols to be used

If virtual UE layer(5G\_UP\_ALG\_29199\_replaced([11147973](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksIO-vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is larger than 4, all UEs in the virtual UE shall use 2 DMRS front-load symbols.

If virtual UE layer(5G\_UP\_ALG\_29199\_replaced([11147973](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksIO-vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is equal to or less than 4, all UEs in the virtual UE shall use 1 DMRS front-load symbols.

When slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is equal to true, the layer PRB consumed by the virtual UE are the sum of the layer PRBs consumed by every UE in the virtual UE.

CP2 reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9548\_replaced([11147793](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksHn8PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

maxLength of DMRS symbols is not sent to L2Ps, L2PS shall determine DMRS-config-max-len as 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_14617\_replaced([11308051](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TrBS4_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| PUSCH-tp | DMRS-config-type | DMRS-config-max-len | Rank | Bit Lenth | Table in 38.212 |
| Disabled | 1 | 1 | 1 | 3 | 7.3.1.1.2-8 |
| 1 | 1 | 2 | 3 | 7.3.1.1.2-9 |  |
| Disabled | 1 | 2 | 1 | 4 | 7.3.1.1.2-12 |
| 1 | 2 | 2 | 4 | 7.3.1.1.2-13 |  |

Note:

For MU case PUSCH-tp is always disabled and only DMRS configure type1 is supported.

**[CB008148-E]**

maxLength of DMRS symbols is not sent to L2Ps, L2PS shall determine DMRS-config-max-len as 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_14617\_replaced([11308051](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TrBS4_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| PUSCH-tp | DMRS-config-type | DMRS-config-max-len | Rank | Bit Lenth | Table in 38.212 |

| 1 | 1 | 2 | 3 | 7.3.1.1.2-9 |  |

| Enabled | 1 | 2 | 1 | 4 | 7.3.1.1.2-7 |

#### 2.4.11.2.3 FDM Interworking

##### 2.4.11.2.3.0-1 FDM Interworking update Remainning Prbs Before WRR (ID: 11168778)

**2.4.11.2.3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11168782`)

FDM Interworking
Each initTx UE in virtual UE has reserved numberOfDistributedResources prbs, but vUE will distribute/allocate Prbs as a whole, so the overlap reserved prbs should be reverted.

* For initTx virtual UEs(all UEs in the virtual are initTx UE)

a) update vUe's numberOfDistributedResources:

vUe's numberOfDistributedResources = (max of numberOfDistributedResources UEs in vUE)

[CB008360-B]

For a root UE paired with a ue group:

uegroupReservedPrb = (sum numberOfDistributedResources all UEs in uegroup)

vUe's numberOfDistributedResources = max (numberOfDistributedResources of root ue , uegroupReservedPrb)

[End CB008360-B]

b) update numberOfRemainingPrbsForDistribution:

numberOfRemainingPrbsForDistribution += (sum numberOfDistributedResources all UEs in vUE -  vUe's numberOfDistributedResources)

[CB008360-D]

Since the UEs in Virtual UE only reserved maximum of numberOfDistributedResources of UEs in Virtual UE(5G\_L2\_8263\_replaced([11169746](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26EwoPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), there is no overlap reserved prbs, so reverting process in no need.

[End CB008360-D]

---

##### 2.4.11.2.3.0-2 FDM Interworking RemainingSubcellResourcesForDistribution (ID: 11168787)

**2.4.11.2.3.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11168792`)

FDM Interworking
Overview

---

**2.4.11.2.3.0-2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11168794`)

FDM Interworking
If multiple UL subcells with ulSubcellType C4 configured AND slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed = TRUE, remainingSubcellResourcesForDistribution should be initialized at the beginning of FDM and updated according to 5G\_L2\_11716\_replaced([11168807](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25_4IfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

RemainingSubcellResourcesForDistribution updated after all virtual UEs(including reTx UEs pairing and initial UEs pairing) will be used as input of WRR algorithm(5G\_L2\_4538\_replaced([11152170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24mxDPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

**2.4.11.2.3.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11168798`)

FDM Interworking
RemainingSubcellResourcesForDistribution Initialization

---

**2.4.11.2.3.0-2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11168803`)

FDM Interworking
RemainingSubcellResourcesForDistribution should be initialized as numAllocCellPrb, which is the UL cell PRB amount allocated by baseband resource manager (BBRM). Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6500\_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**2.4.11.2.3.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `11168807`)

FDM Interworking
RemainingSubcellResourcesForDistribution Update

---

**2.4.11.2.3.0-2.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11168811`)

FDM Interworking
RemainingSubcellResourcesForDistribution should be updated for PUCCH, PRACH and/or common PUCCH(as described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4876\_replaced([11196884](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwGI9vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), FD resources allocated in the steps before WRR algorithm of 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4988\_replaced([11199729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwPS7PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

1.Subcell PRB updated for PUCCH should be the numPrbToBeUsedForPucch. Refer to 5G\_L2\_11505\_replaced([11151739](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24kUxfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

2.Subcell PRB updated for simple reTX virtual UEs = beta \* rrmPRBNumForReTxMu. beta is equal to two if the above virtual UEs are scheduled on two sub-cells, otherwise, beta should be equal to one. rrmPRBNumForReTxMu should be the PRBs allocated to virtual UE paired according to 5G\_L2\_7317\_replaced([11169583](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26C7e_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

3.Subcell PRB updated for other virtual UEs according to 5G\_L2\_8263\_replaced([11169746](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26EwoPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**2.4.11.2.3.0-2.0-4**  (ID: `11168815`)

FDM Interworking
RemainingSubcellResourcesForDistribution Check

---

**2.4.11.2.3.0-2.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11168820`)

FDM Interworking
During the every step in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4988\_replaced([11199729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwPS7PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), L2PS should both check physical PRBs and subcell PRBs.

##### 2.4.11.2.3.0-3 FDM Interworking WRR For Non-Paired UEs and Virtual UEs (ID: 11168825)

**2.4.11.2.3.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11168828`)

FDM Interworking
Virtual UEs distribute PRBs using a weighted round robin algorithm (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4994\_replaced([11199854](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwQhB_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) along with Non-Paired UEs in toBeDistributedUes list.

A virtual UE has requiredPrb(see 5G\_L2\_6478\_replaced([11168503](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25-qB_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and scheduleWeight(see 5G\_L2\_6480\_replaced([11168656](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25-qC_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) same as a normal UE.

##### 2.4.11.2.3.0-4 FDM Interworking PRB Distribution for UEs in a Virtual UE (ID: 11168833)

**2.4.11.2.3.0-4.0-3**  (ID: `13373469`)

FDM Interworking
Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9064\_replaced([11200416](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwSWPPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

Note: For MPR aware UE, it's distributed PRBs number and location should be limited in inner PRB.

[PR861028]

The LayerPrb consumption of beamGroups is calculated using the same layerPrb distribution as UeGroups (refer to: [11200416](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwSWPPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

[End PR861028]

The UEs in a virtual UE should be allocated the same start Prb.
