**2.4.17.1.2.0-6.0-18**  (ID: `12442984`)

Periodic SRS for SU-MIMO
Long-term correlation table with APS

---

**2.4.17.1.2.0-6.0-18.0-1**  (ID: `12444668`)

Periodic SRS for SU-MIMO
Scheduling of APS calculation

---

**2.4.17.1.2.0-6.0-18.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12444701`)

Periodic SRS for SU-MIMO
IF  APS based correlation estimation algorithem  for subband beamforming UEs is enabled (see SFS  [11143715: APS based correlation (for SB BF UEs)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr6zlfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) ) 5G-L2-PS shall indicate the L1 to calculate  APS correlation between two subband BF UEs.  APS (rtBfUeIndex\_2 , rtBfUeIndex\_9), this means the UE9 is selected to calculate APS correlation with UE2.

Step0, During cell setup, 5G\_L2\_PS shall create this table like below. Table size = 16\*16, This is because current maximum of maxNumUeSrs=16.

Per element , with  APS\_corrSubbandId=0,  APS\_XSFN= 0xFFFFFFFF as initial value.

Step1, When an UE is assigned with rtBfUeIndex\_A  (see [11184661: RT BF UE MSG flow in eCPRI7-2e](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Be3sdPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)),  then rtBfUeIndex\_A  is added to rtBfUelist: (0 - NRCELL.srsForSubbandBm.maxNumUeSrs).

IF there are more than 1 UE  in rtBfUelist , Then 5G\_L2\_PS shall prepare APS calculation, APS(A,B).

5G\_L2\_PS shall select UE\_B to calculate correlation with UE\_A . Note, UEs' srs scheduling status are not initial. Initial means rt bf UE's srs hasn't been scheduled since it's configured as subband  beamforming srs ( The first time of subband beamfroming srs refer  [11180919: Setting IEs of structure srsRtBf](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27P1W_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) ) .

Step2, During per subband beamforming rtBfUeIndex\_A' SRS scheduling occasion, 5G\_L2\_PS shall check all elements in this row of rtBfUeIndex\_A .

The current SRS over the air XSFN (SRS\_XSFN),  5G\_L2-PS shall find all rtBfIndex assigned UE  as  potential UE for calculating APS  correlation with UE\_A,

IF APS\_XSFN is valid , {

APS\_Age= SRS\_XSFN -  APS\_XSFN.

if APS\_Age >= [11149984: rdDlMuCorrelationAgingTime](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksRY5fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9),    Select  most aged UEs that it is required to calculate APS with current this UE one by one. Until the Radio's capability is reached or  the UEs  with APS\_Age >= [11149984: rdDlMuCorrelationAgingTime](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksRY5fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) are all selected.

Else , Skip this UE

}

ELSE  APS\_XSFN=0xFFFFFFFF,  It  means this is first time scheduling  of  rtBfUeIndex\_A '  APS calculation.  Random select  UE to calculate APS,  Until the Radio's capability is reached or  UEs in rtBfUelist  are all selected.

Due to the Radio's capability, the total maximum number of user's correlation per SRS symbol is defined in [11107660: Angular Power Spectrum (APS) algorithm](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/web#action=com.ibm.rdm.web.pages.showArtifactPage&artifactURI=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fresources%2FMD_taUaAPvFEe-AqvopbP1qhQ&oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9&artifactInModule=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fresources%2FBI_kohhY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ&componentURI=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Frm-projects%2F_T-lVkJ5EEe2A-5U7tzedRA%2Fcomponents%2F_UBjxEJ5EEe2A-5U7tzedRA) .

Step3, When rtBfUeIndex\_B is selected, APS (A, B),  to calculate APS correlation successful , L2\_PS shall set the APS\_corrSubbandId=MOD (APS\_corrSubbandId++, numSrsSb ), APS\_XSFN=SRS\_XSFN,

in elements row\_A*column\_B,  and row\_B*column\_A.   where numSrsSb is from PsCell\_CellSetupReq.

Step4, If rtBfUeindex\_A has been released, then rtBfUeindex\_A shall be removed from rtBfUelist, and set    APS\_corrSubbandId=0,  APS\_XSFN= 0xFFFFFFFF  to initial value in all elements in row\_A or column\_A.

Note: Due to the information in element (row\_A*column\_B ) are same with in element  (row\_B*column\_A ) are same, then only up or off diagonal elements are stored, SW implementation decides.

The APS means angular power spectrum.  Algorithm detail information can refer [RAN A&S- 5G-CB & 2/3/4G Spec. Repository of Architecture and Specification - APS - All Documents](https://nokia.sharepoint.com/sites/ASCOP/AS%20Documents/Forms/AllItems.aspx?csf=1&web=1&e=zWrQrh%2E&CID=f3b76c1c%2Dbe85%2D4bcd%2D86a4%2Dfcf08aa92693&FolderCTID=0x012000D96F54C70C4C3547AE19DA5D399C6414&id=%2Fsites%2FASCOP%2FAS%20Documents%2FFS1TAs%2DCFAMs%2FCB%2FCB012500%20%2D%20CB012999%2FCFAM%2FCB012971%20Dual%20Boost%20Zero%2Dforcing%20MU%20MIMO%2FReferences%2FAPS)

---

**2.4.17.1.2.0-6.0-18.0-2**  (ID: `12444681`)

Periodic SRS for SU-MIMO
Maintaining of Long-term APS based correlation

---

**2.4.17.1.2.0-6.0-18.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12444682`)

Periodic SRS for SU-MIMO
IF  APS based correlation estimation algorithem for subband Bf UEs is enabled (see SFS  [11143715: APS based correlation (for SB BF UEs)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr6zlfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) ) , To pair of  subband  beamforming UEs, gNB shall utilize APS algorithm to estimate correlation value between each two SB BF UEs. L2-PS shall average correlation values in time and frequency domain and store them in a long-term correlation table. L2-PS will utilize correlation values in long-term table to make DL pairing decisions for SB BF UEs.

Step0, During cell setup, 5G\_L2\_PS shall create this table like below.

With avgCorr =1.0  , numOfInvalid=0 as initial value.

Step1,

IF numOfInvalid=5,  reset avgCorr=1.0 and numOfInvalid=0.

Else {

IF with received instant valid correlation value, 5G\_L2\_PS shall fill  instant valid correlation value to long term averaging, and set numOfInvalid=0.

Else with received invalid correlation value , 5G\_L2\_PS shall discard this time instant correlation value , and numOfInvalid=numOfInvalid++.

correlation Value defination see [11514515: UlData\_SrsReceiveRespRtBfPs message](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR32evvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

}

Step2, IF rtBfUeindex is released (see [11184661: RT BF UE MSG flow in eCPRI7-2e](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Be3sdPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), then reset all elements in this rtBfUeindex\_Row and rtBfUeindex\_column to initial value , avgCorr =1.0  , numOfInvalid=0.

Note, The information in element rtBfUeIndex\_2&9 (row2*column9 ) are same with in element rtBfUeIndex\_9&2 (row9*column2 ). Then only up or off diagonal elements are stored ,SW implementation decides.

---

##### 2.4.17.1.2.0-7 Periodic SRS for SU-MIMO Reuse positioning srs for UL SU-MIMO (ID: 11171505)

**2.4.17.1.2.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `11171509`)

Periodic SRS for SU-MIMO
When a periodic srs resource with usage “codebook” configured in PsUser\_UserModifyReq message, and below conditions are met:

- value of parameter "actSrsPositioning" stored in cell context is True.

- cell configured with non-beamforming deployment.

- number of srs ports is not less than 2.

This srs resource will be used for UL SU-MIMO measurement for the ue.

The configuration of periodic srs used for positioning measurement please refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_27482\_replaced([11157910](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks-jk_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

UlData\_SrsReceiveReq message will include srs receiving request for su-mimo when current rank is 1, parameters of "srsSuMimo" structure shall be set according to 5G\_L1\_IF\_244\_replaced([11514390](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR3PZvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The su-mimo measurement result will be included in UlData\_SrsReceiveResp message send from L1.

---

##### 2.4.17.1.2.0-8 Periodic SRS for SU-MIMO Skipping SRS BM decoding(CoMA calculation)request in order to reduce SRS EO load (ID: 11171513)

**2.4.17.1.2.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `11171516`)

Periodic SRS for SU-MIMO
**Overview**

---

**2.4.17.1.2.0-8.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `13457065`)

Periodic SRS for SU-MIMO
When the function of reduced periodic SRS processing is enabled (5G\_UP\_543\_replaced([11351277](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubsma_vkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), gNB selects UEs that have no data in buffer(refer 5G\_L2\_21650\_replaced([11171546](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26PIsPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or UEs that are configured as FWA UE (refer 5G\_L2\_21647\_replaced([11171532](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26OhrfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with isPeriodDoubledForSrs( see [10975247: bwpConfig structure content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U_3Dfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) = FALSE then skips some SRS BM processing of the selected UEs.  UEs that are defined in excluded category (refer 5G\_L2\_21652\_replaced([11171525](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26Ohq_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) shall not be selected for skipping SRS decoding request.

where  the function of reduced periodic SRS processing is enabled with all below condiitons are met:

- actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing= true in PsCell\_CellSetupReq or  PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq.

- number of UEs with p-SRS configured for wideband BF ([Before CB015122-A]isWBTasConfigured[CB015122-A]isTasSrsForSubbandBmConfigured[End CB015122-A]=false) is larger than 20 within the cell (when cell pSRS symbol position is reconfigured, the UE counter accuracy is not guaranteed because the UE on the legacy cell pSRS symbol is counted but may not do real WB BF anymore, see also [11351277: SRS for beam management](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubsma_vkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

If the functionality is triggered and number of UEs with p-SRS configured for wideband BF is reduced to less than 10 within the cell, the functionality is disabled.

The goal is to reduce SRS processing, however, L1 still requires the SRS configuration for all the scheduled UE’s to determine *multiUeMode (5G\_L1\_16716\_replaced([11461388](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_fBAZBfvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), L2 will use parameter* ignoreBm  in UlData\_SrsReceiveReq.srsBmStruct to inform L1 ignore CoMa calculation.\*\*

This helps L2-PS avioding to introduce internal message to sync SkippingSrsBmReqlist(5G\_L2\_21716\_replaced([11171554](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26PIsvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) between UL\_Sch EO  and SRS\_EO to skip related UEs' BM calculation also, L1 shall also response UE's ignoreBM status to L2-PS in UlData\_SrsReceiveRespBmPs.

Note:

If CA is configured, the number of UEs with p-SRS configured for wideband BF ([Before CB015122-A]isWBTasConfigured[CB015122-A]isTasSrsForSubbandBmConfigured[End CB015122-A]=false) shall be counted  of the relavant cell (where the P-Srs is configured).

IWK with CB008898 , even when Scell needs sync up SRS beamforming information from Pcell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2683\_replaced([11120559](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqR03PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), gNB-DU still only consider  the UE number of  of Pcell for which p-SRS for wideband BF is configured.

IWK with CB008625,  the p-SRS configured for wideband BF ([Before CB015122-A]isWBTasConfigured[CB015122-A]isTasSrsForSubbandBmConfigured[End CB015122-A]=false) of it's own cell shall be counted.

---

**2.4.17.1.2.0-8.0-2**  (ID: `11171525`)

Periodic SRS for SU-MIMO
Excluded category UE

---

**2.4.17.1.2.0-8.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `13457067`)

Periodic SRS for SU-MIMO
Refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29611\_replaced([11158133](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks_xq_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

UEs with the following configuration shall be excluded from the load-based reduction.

1) With subband BF SRS configured, or

2) With DRX configured or measurement gap configured and skipped ratio by configuration is larger than or equal to 0.5  .

ratio=NumSrsOccasionDropped/TotalNumSrsOccasions

3) or static UE with isPeriodDoubledForSrs( see [10975247](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U_3Dfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) = TRUE

Where

NumSrsOccasionDropped is the number of SRS occasions allocated in DRX\_sleep and Measurement gap in duration of  LCM (srsUePeriodicity, drxLongCycle,mgrp).

TotalNumSrsOccasions is the number of SRS occasions allocated in duration of  LCM (srsUePeriodicity, drxLongCycle,mgrp).

LCM (srsUePeriodicity, drxLongCycle,mgrp) is the least common multiple in slots. All parameters shall be converted to slots before calculation of LCM.

Through message **PsUser\_UserSetupReq,****PsUser\_UserModifyReq**\*\*\*\*

1. The UE is subband BF SRS configured if the UE with [Before CB015122-A]isWBTasConfigured[CB015122-A]isTasSrsForSubbandBmConfigured[End CB015122-A]=true.
2. The UE 's DRX or/and Measurement GAP's configuration can be setup/changed.
3. If the UE's TAS and codebook SRS is reused, it shall aviod duplicated calculation of of SRS occasion.

---

**2.4.17.1.2.0-8.0-3**  (ID: `11171532`)

Periodic SRS for SU-MIMO
FWA UE determination

---

**2.4.17.1.2.0-8.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11171541`)

Periodic SRS for SU-MIMO
Refer 5G\_L2\_IF\_397\_replaced([10974876](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U-o4vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Basic rule of determine of  FWA UE:

It is a UE has a DRB with staticUE=true, without a bearer with staticUE=ExclIncRBearer.

DRB type of staticUE is configured to L2Ps through message PsUser\_UserSetupReq and PsUser\_BearerSetupReq.

where ExclIncRBearer is excluded increased reliability bearer.

Note:

1,  staticUE is supporting online modification, but the modified value in taken into use for new bearer (new and existing users), 5G\_L2\_PS doesn't expect PsUser\_DrbModifyReq or PsUser\_UserModifyReq to change staticUE type,  Also online modification of actDlVoNrLimMaxMcsAndLayer also only affect new 5QI1[CB008118-A]/5QI65/66[End CB008118-A]  bearer's (new and existing users) staticUE type to avoid message flood.

2, with PsUser\_UserSetupReq, PsUser\_BearerSetupReq and PsUser\_BearerDeleteReq , UE's FWA status shall be checked based on all DRBs' status.

CP2 refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29613\_replaced([11158141](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks_xrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**2.4.17.1.2.0-8.0-4**  (ID: `11171546`)

Periodic SRS for SU-MIMO
No data in buffer UE determination

---

**2.4.17.1.2.0-8.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11171549`)

Periodic SRS for SU-MIMO
Refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29613\_replaced([11158141](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks_xrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Basic rule of  no data in buffer UE:

For DL: the UE that has zero data buffered on all DL DRB bearers for continous 2 seconds or longer.

For UL: the UE that has zero data buffered on all UL DRB bearers for continous 2 seconds or longer.

If only NRCELL/actDlSrsBm is set as enabled, then only DL traffic shall be checked.

If only NRCELL/actUlSrsBm is set as enabled, then only UL traffic shall be checked.

If both NRCELL/actDlSrsBm and NRCELL/actUlSrsBm are enabled, then both DL and UL traffic are checked.

If CA is configured, the buffer shall be monitored of the relavant cell (where the P-Srs is configured).

IWK with CB008898 , even when Scell needs sync up SRS beamforming information from Pcell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2683\_replaced([11120559](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqR03PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), gNB-DU still only consider traffic of Pcell for which p-SRS for wideband BF is configured for simplicity, instead of considering both Pcell and Scell.

IWK with CB008625,  the buffer shall only consider  it is own cell's which the wideband beamforming SRS UE is configured .

1, DL buffer is monitered When actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing= true in PsCell\_CellSetupReq or  PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq, and RRC connection UEs number is equal or bigger than 20,

For UE, if it is neither FWA UE (5G\_L2\_21647\_replaced([11171532](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26OhrfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) nor excluded category defined ue (refer 5G\_L2\_21652\_replaced([11171525](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26Ohq_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) , checking the DRB buffer status (refer 5G\_L2\_22162\_replaced([11173142](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26ZgwvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

IF DRB data buffer is non-Zero, DLZeroBufferStatus=0,

Else

if  duration >=2 seconds, then update DL buffer status of DLZeroBufferStatus=1.

else duration <2 seconds, DLZeroBufferStatus=0.

endIF

EndIF

The changed of UE's DL buffer status shall be synced to UL\_sch.  DLZeroBufferStatus from 1 to 0 or from 0 to 1, default value of  DLZeroBufferStatus=0.

2, UL buffer is monitored  When the function of reduced periodic SRS processing is enabled (refer 5G\_L2\_21643\_replaced([11171516](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26OhqfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

Same mechanism as DL, L2Ps shall record UL buffer status. The buffer change is recorded with receiving of LoCtrl\_UlMacPduReceiveInd(5G\_L2\_IF\_875\_replaced([10984687](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WBxzvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), it is changed from Zero to non-zero. The buffer change is also recored after PUSCH scheduling is changed from non-zero to zero.

For UE if it is neither FWA UE (5G\_L2\_21647\_replaced([11171532](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26OhrfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))  nor excluded category defined ue (refer 5G\_L2\_21652\_replaced([11171525](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26Ohq_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) , per SRS scheduling occasion, checking the DRB buffer status ,

IF  DRB data buffer is non-Zero, ULZeroBufferStatus=0,

Else

if  duration >=2 seconds, then update UL buffer status of DLZeroBufferStatus=1.

else duration <2 seconds, ULZeroBufferStatus=0.

endif

EndIf

where DLZeroBufferStatus is DL with zero data in buffer,  0 means false, 1 means true.  default value is 0.

ULZeroBufferStatus is UL with zero data in buffer,  0 means false, 1 means true.  default value is 0.

duration is the on air timing between receiving of SRS or CSI/BM and DRB data buffer is Zero.

Note:

1, To avoid to sync P-SRS configured for Wideband BF UEs number from UL\_Sch to DL\_Sch,  DL uses RRC connection UEs' number as a condition to trigger DL buffer monitoring and Sync.

---

**2.4.17.1.2.0-8.0-5**  (ID: `11171554`)

Periodic SRS for SU-MIMO
Skipping SRS BM candidate UE list determination

---

**2.4.17.1.2.0-8.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11171557`)

Periodic SRS for SU-MIMO
step1, During cell setup phase, if actDlSrsBm=true or actUlSrsBm=true,  initialize SkippingSrsBmReqlist.

step2,Counting the number of UE with periodic SRS configured for WB BF if actDlSrsBm=true or actUlSrsBm=true.

step3, Manage SkippingSrsBmReqlist, if actDlSrsBm=true or actUlSrsBm=true.

If this UE is excluded category defined ue (refer 5G\_L2\_21652\_replaced([11171525](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26Ohq_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), this UE shall not be added to SkippingSrsBmReqlist, if already in SkippingSrsBmReqlist, this UE shall be removed from SkippingSrsBmReqlist.

Else

If this UE is FWA ue(refer 5G\_L2\_21647\_replaced([11171532](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26OhrfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), this ue is added to SkippingSrsBmReqlist directly.

Else this UE is non-FWA UE,  no data in buffer status shall be check first, And if a UE is determined as no data in buffer (refer 5G\_L2\_21650\_replaced([11171546](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26PIsPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), this UE shall be added to SkippingSrsBmReqlist.

EndIf

step4,   When the function of reduced periodic SRS processing is enabled (refer 5G\_L2\_21643\_replaced([11171516](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26OhqfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), and UE is neither FWA UE (5G\_L2\_21647\_replaced([11171532](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26OhrfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))or excluded category defined ue (refer 5G\_L2\_21652\_replaced([11171525](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26Ohq_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

If  actDlSrsBm=true and actUlSrsBm=false,

The UE with DLZeroBufferStatus changed from 0 to 1 shall be added to SkippingSrsBmReqlist.

The UE with DLZeroBufferStatus changed from 1 to 0  shall be removed from SkippingSrsBmReqlist

If  actDlSrsBm=false and actUlSrsBm=true,

The UE with ULZeroBufferStatus changed from 0 to 1 shall be added to SkippingSrsBmReqlist.

The UE with ULZeroBufferStatus changed from 1 to 0  shall be removed from SkippingSrsBmReqlist

If  actDlSrsBm=true and actUlSrsBm=true,

The UE with DLZeroBufferStatus changed from 0 to 1  and  ULZeroBufferStatus changed from 0 to 1,  the UE shall be added to SkippingSrsBmReqlist.

The UE with DLZeroBufferStatus changed from 1 to 0  or ULZeroBufferStatus changed from 1 to 0, the UE shall be removed from SkippingSrsBmReqlist

step5, when the function of reduced periodic SRS processing is enabled (refer 5G\_L2\_21643\_replaced([11171516](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26OhqfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), and SkippingSrsBmReqlist is not empty,

L2\_PS shall send SrsReceiveReq  with parameter ignoreBM to inform L1 to skip related BM calculation.

where

SkippingSrsBmReqList  is skipping Srs BM decoding request UEs' list.

CP2 refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29611\_replaced([11158133](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks_xq_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

**2.4.17.1.2.0-8.0-6**  (ID: `11171562`)

Periodic SRS for SU-MIMO
Skippping SRS BM decoding

---

**2.4.17.1.2.0-8.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11171566`)

Periodic SRS for SU-MIMO
When the function of reduced periodic SRS processing is enabled (refer 5G\_L2\_21643\_replaced([11171516](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26OhqfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G\_L2\_PS shall maintain a normal process  & skipping process pattern per UE which in the SkippingSrsBmReqlist(5G\_L2\_21716\_replaced([11171554](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26PIsvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).   The switching between normal process and  skipping process is per length of rdDlBeamSelectTimer.

For easy implementation , Per periodic SRS for wideband BF scheduling occasion, the SRS's over the air  SFN/Slot.

value=rounddown[(SFN\*20+Slot)/rdDlBeamSelectTimer]mod2

If value=0,  this SRS occasion is in normal process duration.  The Srs BM calculation shall be scheduled normally.

Else value=1, this SRS occasion is in skipping process duration. The Srs BM calculation shall be skipped.

Note:

The normal Process and skipping process function shall work together with legacy scheduling of  periodic SRS for wideband beamforming which defined in 5G\_L2\_13081\_replaced([11180683](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27OALvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

IF SRS scheduling occasion is conflicted in DRX\_sleep or meaurement gap which in normal & skipping process duration,it is handled same as legacy which is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2151\_replaced([11154219](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksrolPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note: IWK with CB009058 , SRS EO congestion state handling  triggered beam selection timer scaling doesn't impact the length of rdDlBeamSelectTimer (5G\_L2\_10294\_replaced([11214341](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-yRgfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), which is configured by RD parameter(5G\_L2\_5821\_replaced([11183859](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27nBt_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Default CB009058 configuration is supported (5G\_L2\_10225\_replaced([11183873](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27nBwPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the scalar of multiplier is 2. Then the beam selection period  shall be same of CB009058 triggered enlarging and CB013710.

CP2 refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_29538\_replaced([11158109](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks_xqPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

#### 2.4.17.1.3 Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning

##### 2.4.17.1.3.0-1 Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning Overview (ID: 11171573)

**2.4.17.1.3.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11171584`)

Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning
Positioning srs reception request shall be send to L1 in dedicated message UlData\_SrsPosReceiveReq(5G\_L1\_IF\_15340\_replaced([11514526](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR32fPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), and measurement result shall be included in message UlData\_SrsPosReceiveResp(5G\_L1\_IF\_15344\_replaced([11514545](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR32gPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) from L1.

For each cell identified by parameter "nrPosCellIdentity" of posCellMeas list included in received positioning messages (PsPos\_MeasSetupReq), UlData\_SrsPosReceiveReq shall be sent for every subcell configured in the above message belongs to the cell.

Parameter[Before CB007880-A] "RNTI" [CB007880-A] "measId"[End CB007880-A] in positioning srs receiving request is filled with "ranMeasId" get from the measurement context where the srs configuration stored.

Parameter related to srs physical resource will be derived from srsConfig(refer to 5G\_L2\_IF\_411\_replaced([10975309](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VAeFfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) stored in the measurement context, the configuration of periodic srs used for positioning measurement please refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_27482\_replaced([11157910](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks-jk_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

UlData\_SrsPosReceiveReq message includes all positioning srs receive requests on same ul subcell in one slot.5G-L2\_Ps shall guarantees that more than 16 measIds in one subcell can be configured in one SRS slot. (Note here the number of measIds  is based on L1 capicity)

Note: If 5G-L2\_PS starts to schedule positioning srs before receive PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq message, then the srs transmitted on air is not determined, the value of parameter "result" in UlData\_SrsPosReceiveResp message may be set to 0(unreliable) or the value of parameter "timeOffsetPos" may be invalid.

---

##### 2.4.17.1.3.0-2 Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning Configuration (ID: 11171589)

**2.4.17.1.3.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11171594`)

Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning
Refer to 5G\_L2\_IF\_6512\_replaced([10982522](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vx6MPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)): Pos SRS configration come from the message of PsPos\_MeasSetupReq

---

##### 2.4.17.1.3.0-3 Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning Execution in positioning and non-positioning dedicated deployments (ID: 11171599)

**2.4.17.1.3.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11171601`)

Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning
5G-L2-PS shall execute the periodic SRS precise positioning procedure (5G\_L1\_IF\_15346\_replaced([11514362](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR3PYPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_L2\_18754\_replaced([11171606](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26PIv_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for measurement contexts in the context of:

* Positioning cells set up in non-positioning dedicated deployment,

[CB010680-G]

* Positioning cells set up in positioning dedicated deployment

For details on configuring positioning cell contexts in both deployment types, refer to 5G\_L2\_20157\_replaced([11147159](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24JeDPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Further specifics on positioning dedicated deployments are provided in 5G\_L2\_19071\_replaced([11140277](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23iaCPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note: In positioning dedicated deployment, 5G-L2-PS is not aware of access cells (NRCELL) and UEs operating in the access cell (see 5G\_L2\_19071\_replaced([11140277](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23iaCPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Therefore any SRS reconfigurations or interactions which may occur for UEs are not explicitly managed in positioning cells and measurement contexts. Consequently, during such operations, the received response (UlData\_SrsPosReceiveRespPs) may contain invalid data.

[End CB010680-G]

---

##### 2.4.17.1.3.0-4 Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning Message flow and process (ID: 11171606)

**2.4.17.1.3.0-4.0-3**  (ID: `11171621`)

Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning
Description

---

**2.4.17.1.3.0-4.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11171625`)

Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning
1.PsPos\_MeasSetupReq/PsPos\_MeasSetupResp

---

**2.4.17.1.3.0-4.0-3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11171629`)

Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning
Refer to 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_5658\_replaced([11185764](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Be9MA_vREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)): Positioning measurement Setup in gNB-DU and 5G\_L2\_IF\_6781\_replaced([10982425](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VxTHvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

**2.4.17.1.3.0-4.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11171634`)

Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning
2.UlData\_SrsPosReceiveReq

---

**2.4.17.1.3.0-4.0-3.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `12701036`)

Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning
5G-L2-PS shall schedule 2 slots in advance related to SRS slot offset for the pos period SRS configured in PsPos\_MeasSetupReq **refer to 5G\_L2\_IF\_6551\_replaced([10982516](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vx6L_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and then**

a. fill the parameters  into the message UlData\_SrsPosReceiveReq(5G\_L1\_IF\_15340\_replaced([11514526](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR32fPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) as the below:

 subcellId,

 The srsPos structure  shall be set and the numSrsPosReportRequest IE is the number of Pos SRS that are scheduled in current slot.Note numSrsPosReportRequest shall be guaranteed by 5G-L2-PS as max 16 based on L1 capacity.

 Below parameters in srsPos shall be set per SrsPosReportRequest

 measId, it’s Pos Measurement ID defined in 5G\_\_L1\_IF\_15342

 sequenceId, startPrb, numPrb, symbolPosition, transmissionComb, transmissionCombId, cyclicShift, numSrsPorts shall be filled with the values according to PsPos\_MeasSetupReq. srsConfig , refer to 5G\_L2\_IF\_6512\_replaced([10982522](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vx6MPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 Measurements,

 map indicating measurements for Positioning report, L2 PS shall fill this field into the corresponding bit position( based 5G\_L1\_IF\_15343\_replaced([11514538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR32f_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) on the configuration of PsPos\_MeasSetupReq. posMeasType (SRS-RSRP , UL-RTOA), refer to 5G\_L2\_IF\_6512\_replaced([10982522](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vx6MPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Note :

1.The bit of sinr just only shall be used as the debuggability, refer to 5G\_L2\_IF\_6512\_replaced([10982522](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vx6MPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))

2.Only the most two element are supported in PsPos\_MeasSetupReq. posMeasType[]  (SRS-RSRP , UL-RTOA) for this feature.

 sfnInitTimeOffset : it's from with the value by PsPos\_MeasSetupReq.posCellMeas[].posCellMeasReq**.sfnInitTimeOffset ,refer to 5G\_L2\_IF\_7251\_replaced([10982540](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VyhMvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)),**

measTrps , the bitmap indicating which TRPs are measured for RSRP and SINR, Refer to 5G\_L1\_IF\_15342\_replaced([11514534](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR32fvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). **[Before CB013273-A]  When ulSubcellType is set to C4S**[CB013273-A] Based on SubcellType, refer to [11374827](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ueKEh_vkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) [**CB013273-A] , 5G-L2-PS shall fill this bitmap according to trpInfos as configured in PsPos\_MeasSetupReq.posCellMeasReq[].trpsInSubcellInfoList[].trpsInSubcell. Refer to 5G\_L2\_IF\_7398\_replaced([10982601](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VyhOvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))**\*\*\*\*

 expectedPropagationDelay,it's from the value by PsPos\_MeasSetupReq.posCellMeas[].posCellMeasReq**.trpsInSubcellInfoList[].trpsInSubcell**.trpInfos[].trpInfo.searchWindow.expectedPropagationDelay, refer to 5G\_L2\_IF\_7425\_replaced([10982619](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VyhPfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))\*\*\*\*

 delayUncertainty, it's from the value by PsPos\_MeasSetupReq.posCellMeas[].posCellMeasReq**.trpsInSubcellInfoList[].trpsInSubcell**.trpInfos[].trpInfo.searchWindow.delayUncertainty, refer to 5G\_L2\_IF\_7425\_replaced([10982619](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VyhPfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))\*\*\*\*

b.send UlData\_SrsPosReceiveReq *message to trigger SRS decoding UL-SRS-RSRP , UL-RTOA based on the posMeasType defined in the field of posMeasType by the message of PsPos\_MeasSetupReq**, refer to 5G\_L2\_IF\_6551\_replaced([10982516](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vx6L_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))*\*\*

c.interwork with RIM RS , refer to 5G\_L2\_20954\_replaced([11171680](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26Pv5PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

**2.4.17.1.3.0-4.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `11171647`)

Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning
3.UlData\_SrsPosReceiveRespPs

---

**2.4.17.1.3.0-4.0-3.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11171652`)

Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning
5G-L2-PS shall receive UlData\_SrsPosReceiveRespPs message from 5G-L1-UL after L1 Pos SRS decode result is completed.

After having received the UlData\_SrsPosReceiveRespPs message, 5G-L2-PS shall store the feedback of SrsPosReport if the ‘status’ IE of the UlData\_SrsPosReceiveRespPs message is ‘NoError’, else the whole result of the feedback of SrsPosReport shall be discard.

Note that , the values per per TRP index can be obtained in timeOffsetPos, rsrp, sinr, and about their validity ,refer to the field of ‘result’ defined in UlData\_SrsPosReceiveRespPs

---

**2.4.17.1.3.0-4.0-3.0-4**  (ID: `11171656`)

Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning
4.PsPos\_MeasAbortReq/PsPos\_MeasAbortResp

---

**2.4.17.1.3.0-4.0-3.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11171660`)

Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning
refer to 5G\_L1L2\_FLOW\_5738\_replaced([11186013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Be-aJvvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)): Positioning measurement abort in gNB-DU and 5G\_IF\_6570

---

**2.4.17.1.3.0-4.0-3.0-5**  (ID: `11171665`)

Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning
5.PsPos\_BundledMeasReport

---

**2.4.17.1.3.0-4.0-3.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11171674`)

Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning
L2 Ps shall report the result to L3 as the bellow:

a. Build the first PsPos\_BundledMeasReport at the slot where all measurement result for RTOA and /or RSRSP shall be received once at least and schedule the Pos Srs of UlData\_SrsPosReceiveReq next time

b.Then PsPos\_BundledMeasReport based on the measPeriodicity configurated in the message of PsPos\_MeasSetupReq , refer to 5G\_L2\_IF\_6512\_replaced([10982522](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vx6MPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))

c. Fill the PsPos\_BundledMeasReport according to the result from L1 through UlData\_SrsPosReceiveRespPs as the bellow:

 timeStamp: equals to the latest sfn,slot defined in UlData\_SrsPosReceiveRespPs corresponding to PsPos\_BundledMeasReport. refer to 5G\_L2\_IF\_7288\_replaced([10982968](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2V09fvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))

 Below parameters shall be set per posMeasResultPerSubcell :

o posSubcellId, refer to 5G\_L2\_IF\_7458\_replaced([10982975](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2V09gPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))

o posMeasResultPerTrpList, refer to 5G\_L2\_IF\_7290\_replaced([10982986](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2V09gvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))

 ulRtoa

 ulSrsRsrp

Regarding ulRtoa and UlSrsRsrp , three cases are listed as the bellow, only case 3 and case1 can happen in this feature, L2 Ps shall fill them based on posMeasType configrated by L3 according the follow table

[Before PR825728]

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a spreadsheet with two main sections, "L2->L3" and "L1->L2". Each section is a table with columns for "posMeasType", "Case", "Config", "L1 result", "RTOA", and "RSRP".
The "L2->L3" section has three cases: case 1, case 2, and case 3.
- Case 1 has "UL-RTOA" as config, "unreliable" and "reliable" as L1 result, "Not filled" and "filled" as RTOA, and "not Filled" and "not filled" as RSRP.
- Case 2 has "UL-SRS-RSRP" as config and "filled" as RSRP.
- Case 3 has "UL-RTOA" and "UL-SRS-RSRP" as config. For "UL-RTOA", the L1 result is "unreliable" and "reliable", RTOA is "Not filled" and "filled", and RSRP is "filled".
The "L1->L2" section also has three cases: case 1, case 2, and case 3.
- Case 1 has "UL-RTOA" as config, "unreliable" and "reliable" as L1 result, "filled" as RTOA, and "filled(-140)" as RSRP.
- Case 2 has "UL-SRS-RSRP" as config, "unreliable" and "reliable" as L1 result, "filled(-32768)" as RTOA, and "filled" as RSRP.
- Case 3 has "UL-RTOA" and "UL-SRS-RSRP" as config. For "UL-RTOA", the L1 result is "unreliable" and "reliable", and RTOA is "filled". For "UL-SRS-RSRP", RSRP is "filled".

|  |  |  |  | reliable | filled | filled |

[PR825728]

Both tables have columns for "posMeasType", "Case", "Config", "L1 result", "RTOA", and "RSRP". The "L2->L3" table has rows for "case 1", "case 2", and "case 3" under "posMeasType". The "L1->L2" table also has rows for "case 1", "case 2", and "case 3" under "posMeasType". There is a note at the bottom stating "invaild means -157 provided by L1".

1.When receive the UlData\_SrsPosReceiveRespPs from L1, L2 PS shall store the result of  RTOA from L1 according to UlData\_SrsPosReceiveRespPs.srsPosReports.result per TRP  per ue

2.When L2 PS send out the message of PsPos\_BundledMeasReport, it shall fill the field of RTOA  SRS positioning (RTOA, AoA)  referred to the above table

the follow is the algorithm for the scheduling point of PsPos\_BundledMeasReport

[image-2][image\_desc]The image displays a spreadsheet-like visualization illustrating a scheduling mechanism, likely for wireless communication. The top section shows a timeline divided into slots, labeled from 0 to 19, and repeating. A bracket indicates a "measPeriodicity" which spans across two such timeline segments. The "slot" row contains entries like 'D', 'S', and 'U', colored green, yellow, and orange respectively, indicating different slot types or statuses.
Below this schedule, colored blocks represent events: a black block for "UIData\_SrsPosReceiveReq", a blue block for "UIData\_SrsPosReceiveRespPs", and a red block for "PsPos\_BundledMeasReport". Arrows connect these blocks to specific points in the timeline, illustrating the flow of events.

\* "a. when last UIData\_SrsPosReceiveReq to L1 during the measPeriodicity"
\* "b. fill the N-1 result request from UIData\_SrsPosReceiveRespPs"

<https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:x:/r/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Drawings%20and%20diagrams%20for%205G/User%20Plane/5G%20L2%20Entity%20Level/2%205G-L2-PS%20Component%20Requirements/2.4%20Algorithm/17.%20SRS,%20CSI-RS%20and%20CSI%20Framework/5G_L2_23065.xlsx?d=we997ddffeccb49849084c53c1b04284c&csf=1&web=1&e=W2S1z3>

d.interwork with RIM RS , refer to 5G\_L2\_20954

Note:

1.Due to NDM delay in L1 , UlData\_SrsPosReceiveRespPs shall be send out to L2 Ps at least by the end of the special slot after reception of the NDM SRS streams, refer to 5G\_L1\_IF\_14291\_replaced([11514861](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR5rrvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

2.Due to the report result to L3 by PsPos\_BundledMeasReport based on scheduling time of UlData\_SrsPosReceiveReq, the worst case of the arrival time for the result from UlData\_SrsPosReceiveRespPs shall be later about 2560 slots (max SRS period)

---

##### 2.4.17.1.3.0-5 Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning Interwork with Remote Interference Management (ID: 11171680)

**2.4.17.1.3.0-5.0-2**  (ID: `11171688`)

Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning
When cell enter into remote interference detected state and start detect RIM-RS , L2PS shall [Before CB007880-C]not send [CB007880-C] send [End CB007880-C]UlData\_SrsPosReceiveReq message to L1 if positioning srs configured in special slots, please refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_13520\_replaced([11162042](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktW-APvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

When cell enter remote interference detected state and mitigation mode is activated, L2PS shall [Before CB007880-C]discard [CB007880-C] store [End CB007880-C] UlData\_SrsPosReceiveResp message send from L1 if positioning srs configured in special slots, please refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9172\_replaced([11163373](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktYzNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[CB007880-C]

When UlData\_SrsPosReceiveRespPs.status is equal to "DiscardByRimRs" ,L2 ps shall

a.discard the result for the srsPosReports in this message

b.fill last result for the PsPos\_BundledMeasReport of the subcell indicated in the UlData\_SrsPosReceiveRespPs if there are MeasReports to L3 after receiving UlData\_SrsPosReceiveRespPs

Note the timestamp for those trps indicated in PsPos\_BundledMeasReport shall be not aligned with other trps indicated in PsPos\_BundledMeasReport because of using the last measure result for them.

[End CB007880-C]

---

##### 2.4.17.1.3.0-6 Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning Interwork with Measurement Gap (ID: 11171692)

**2.4.17.1.3.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11171696`)

Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning
L2PS shall send positioning srs reception request to L1 regardless whether UE is in measurement gap state.

During the measurement gap, the positioning srs scheduled at L2PS may mismatch with srs transmitted by UE, then the value of parameter "result" in UlData\_SrsPosReceiveResp message may be set to 1(DTX),or the value of parameter "timeOffsetPos" may be inavlid.

---

##### 2.4.17.1.3.0-7 Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning Interwork with srs port switch for non-coherent UL SU-MIMO (ID: 11171700)

**2.4.17.1.3.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `11171705`)

Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning
If ue can switch port number of periodic srs resource adaptively in non-beamforming deployment(5G\_UP\_ALG\_3250\_replaced([11157701](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks9VZvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the port number of srs resource used for positioning shall be switched accordingly(5G\_UP\_ALG\_27467\_replaced([11157876](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks-jh_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), L2PS will update srs resource for positioning when receive PsPos\_MeasUpdateReq message.

Note: During the time gap between L2PS receiving PsPos\_MeasUpdateReq and srs resource in RRCReconfiguration message taking effect, the positioning srs scheduled at L2PS may mismatch with srs transmitted by UE, then the value of parameter "result" in UlData\_SrsPosReceiveResp message may be set to 1(DTX) or the value of parameter "timeOffsetPos" may be inavlid.

---

##### 2.4.17.1.3.0-10 Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning Interwork with BWP (ID: 11171717)

**2.4.17.1.3.0-10.0-2**  (ID: `11171724`)

Periodic codebook SRS for Positioning
Based on 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1870\_replaced([11111163](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpLBlPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G-L2-PS shall take as the bellow:

a.If pSRS is allocated in dedicated BWP but not power Saving BWP, block UE switch to power saving BWP

[CB007880-C]

b.When 5G-L2-PS receive PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq with posPsrsChangeInd,it start to switch from power saving BWP to large BWP accroding to the condition as the reference of 5G-L2-13720

[End CB007880-C]

### 2.4.17.2 CSI Framework

#### 2.4.17.2.1 Periodic CSI handling

##### 2.4.17.2.1.1 Triggering the Reception of the periodic UE CSI-Report (Implementation Proposal)

##### 2.4.17.2.1.1-1 Triggering the Reception of the periodic UE CSI-Report (Implementation Proposal)

##### 2.4.17.2.1.1-2 Triggering the Reception of the periodic UE CSI-Report (Implementation Proposal)

##### 2.4.17.2.1.1-3 Triggering the Reception of the periodic UE CSI-Report (Implementation Proposal)

###### 2.4.17.2.1.1-3.0-1 Triggering the Reception of the periodic UE CSI-Report (Implementation Proposal) According to 3GPP 38.214, the UE reports a CSI report only after receiving at least one CSI-RS transmission occasion for channel measurement and CSI-RS and/or CSI-IM occasion for interference measurement no later than CSI reference resource and drops the report otherwise. For CSI bundling slot, L2 PS calculate the UCI bit for CSI reporting for beam management and channel measurement , it shall check if one CSI-RS occassion happen between active MacCE sending and the perCsiReport slot, the following are possible scenario for DRX off/on, for delay calculation ,pls refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2791_replaced( 11121812 ) [image-0][image_desc]The image is a diagram illustrating different scenarios of Scell CSI-RS (Cell-specific Channel State Information Reference Signal) transmission in a cellular network, likely 5G NR. The diagram is structured into eight scenarios, each presented as a row. Each scenario depicts a timeline divided into slots, labeled K, K+1, K+2, and K+3, representing consecutive time intervals. Within each scenario, there are several horizontal tracks representing different events or states: - gNB: This track shows a sequence of numbered slots (0-9) and hash symbols (#) indicating the availability of resources. Some slots are highlighted in orange, indicating "CSI-RS occasion" or "CSI-RS transmission." - Scenario Description: A text box on the left describes the specific conditions of each scenario, including whether Scell CSI-RS is on or off, DRX (Discontinuous Reception) status, and the timing of Scell CSI-RS sending relative to Scell addition or receiving the first beam. - Scell Bundling: This track indicates when Scell bundling occurs. - UCI bit(Pcell CSI-RS Resource / Pcell SSB / Refined beam switch): This track details the type of information being transmitted, such as UCI (Uplink Control Information) bits, Pcell CSI-RS Resource, Pcell SSB (Synchronization Signal Block), or Refined beam switch. - Pcell Scell: This track indicates the state of Pcell and Scell. - Active MACE: This track shows when Active MACE (Measurement and Channel Estimation) occurs. - delay: A blue bar indicates a delay in a process. - BEAM / BEAM+CQI: These indicate beamforming or beamforming with Channel Quality Indicator reporting. - DRX in inactive / DRX in active state: These indicate the DRX state. - DRX should not start: This indicates a condition where DRX should not be initiated. The scenarios differ in their configurations of these elements, exploring various combinations of network conditions and operational parameters. Here is the extracted text from the image: Scenario #1 2200 off, Scell CSI-RS sending after Scell receive first beam Scell bundling Pcell SSB / Refined beam Scell addition Scell addition Pcell Scell K CSI-RS occasion Active MACE delay K+1 CSI-RS transmission BEAM+CQI K+2 CSI-RS transmission K+3 Scenario #2 2200 off, Scell CSI-RS sending after Scell receive first beam Scell bundling Pcell SSB / Refined beam Scell addition Pcell Scell K CSI-RS occasion Active MACE delay K+1 CSI-RS transmission BEAM K+2 CSI-RS transmission BEAM+CQI K+3 Scenario #3 2200 on, Scell CSI-RS sending after Scell addition Scell bundling UCI bit(Pcell CSI-RS Resource) Pcell Scell Scell addition K CSI-RS transmission Active MACE delay K+1 CSI-RS transmission BEAM+CQI K+2 CSI-RS transmission K+3 Scenario #4 2200 on, Scell CSI-RS sending after Scell addition Scell bundling UCI bit(Pcell CSI-RS Resource) Pcell Scell Scell addition K CSI-RS transmission Active MACE delay K+1 CSI-RS transmission BEAM K+2 CSI-RS transmission BEAM+CQI K+3 Scenario #5 2200 off, DRX on, Scell CSI-RS sending after Scell receive first beam Scell bundling UCI bit(Pcell SSB / Refined beam switch) Pcell Scell Scell addition K Active MACE delay K+1 BEAM+CQI CSI-RS transmission K+2 CSI-RS transmission DRX in active state K+3 Scenario #6 2200 off, DRX on, Scell CSI-RS sending after Scell receive first beam Scell bundling UCI bit(Pcell SSB / Refined beam) Pcell Scell Scell addition K Active MACE delay K+1 BEAM DRX in inactive state K+2 CSI-RS transmission DRX in active state BEAM+CQI K+3 Scenario #7 2200 on, DRX on, Scell CSI-RS sending after Scell addition Scell bundling UCI bit(Pcell CSI-RS Resource) Pcell Scell DRX should not start Scell addition K CSI-RS transmission Active MACE delay K+1 CSI-RS transmission ##### 2.4.17.2.1.1-4 Triggering the Reception of the periodic UE CSI-Report (Implementation Proposal)

**2.4.17.2.1.1-4.0-3**  (ID: `11171823`)

Triggering the Reception of the periodic UE CSI-Report (Implementation Proposal)
[5GC001167-I] This requirement version generalizes the scope for multiple SCells i.e. SCell -> SCells(s) [End 5GC001167-I]

When CP RT allocates the CSI-RS resource and PUCCH resource for CSI reporting for beam management and channel state feedback, and sent to L2 PS DL via UserSetup.

If FDD and FR1-TDD [5GC001167-H] or FDD-FDD [End 5GC001167-H] carrier aggregation feature is activated according to 5G\_UP\_1273\_replaced([11357240](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucbmNfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), during the SCell(s) addition procedure:

-  SCell(s) 5G-L2-PS shall receive perCsiRsResConfig(CSI-RS resource) and perCsiReportConfig(periodic PUCCH resource) for SCell beam management[5GC001167-H](not applicable for FDD-FDD CA UE) [End 5GC001167-H]  and channel state feedback from 5G-CP-RT within PsUser\_UserSetupReq;

* PCell (FDD) 5G-L2-PS shall receive perCsiReportConfig(periodic PUCCH resource) of SCell(s) configuration in PsUser\_UserModifyReq from 5G-CP-RT.

For CSI resource sending and CSI PUCCH receiving, the general processing is described in the following steps:

Step 1: When L2 PS receives the perCsiReportConfig and its perCsiRsResConfig for PCell and entire Scell list, L2 PS store the related configuration data into UE context (UE db).

If FDD and FR1 TDD [5GC001167-H] or FDD-FDD [End 5GC001167-H] carrier aggregation feature is activated according to 5G\_UP\_1273\_replaced([11357240](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucbmNfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and during the SCell(s) addition procedure:

* SCell(s) 5G-L2-PS shall receive perCsiRsResConfig for SCell(s) from 5G-CP-RT through PsUser\_UserSetupReq according to 5G\_L2\_IF\_392\_replaced([10974781](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U-B1fu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G-L2-PS shall store the related configuration data to respective 5G-L2-PS UE context(UE DB) according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2670\_replaced([11120289](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqPYmfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* PCell 5G-L2-PS shall receive perCsiReportConfig for entire SCell list from 5G-CP-RT through cellConfigurationForModification in PsUser\_UserModifyReq according to 5G\_L2\_IF\_453\_replaced([10976074](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VEvgvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G-L2-PS shall store the related configuration data to PCell 5G-L2-PS UE context (UE DB) according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2667\_replaced([11120269](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqPYlPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

But DL L2 PS only add:

1. the period CSI resource for PSCell into per slot CSI sending queue
2. the period PUCCH resource for PScell into per slot PUCCH receiving queue

Notes: for the period resource, there is a working queue record which RNTI and its target resource should be handled in every slot, this working queue is sub-cell specific.

For the Scell, related period resource should not be added. The procedure is described in the following figure:

[image-0][image\_desc]The image depicts a flowchart illustrating a process within a telecommunications system, likely related to Long-Term Evolution (LTE) or 5G New Radio (NR). The main components are "L2 DL PS" (Layer 2 Downlink Power Saving or similar), "UE Context (RNTI X)", and several queues or buffers represented by arrays of colored squares.
The process begins with a "User Setup Req" signal, which triggers an action labeled "Insert Pscell CSI resource and CSI report information to per TTI processing queue". This action feeds into a dotted yellow arrow pointing towards the "UE Context (RNTI X)" block.
Inside the "UE Context (RNTI X)" block, there are two sub-sections: "PSCell" and "Scell". Each sub-section contains configuration parameters.
- "PSCell" contains:
- "perCsReportConfig (ForPscell report)"
- "perCsReportConfig (for Scell report)"
- "perCsRsResConfig"
- "Scell" contains:
- "perCsRsResConfig"
From the "PSCell" and "Scell" sections, two dashed blue arrows labeled "Insert" originate. These arrows point to two separate rows of colored squares, representing buffers or queues. The top row consists of light blue squares, and the bottom row consists of light orange squares. These "Insert" actions suggest that CSI (Channel State Information) report configurations and resource information are being placed into these buffers.
Finally, a large light green arrow points from the right side of the diagram (from the buffers) towards a yellow box on the left, labeled "Fetch the CSI report and CSI resource TX base on current slot, sent to L1". This indicates that the system retrieves CSI reports and transmission bases from the buffers and sends them to Layer 1 (L1).
The overall diagram illustrates the flow of CSI reporting configuration and data within a UE context, involving the configuration of Primary Cell (PSCell) and Secondary Cell (Scell), and their subsequent processing and transmission.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_4449.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

The step 1 is related to and also implemented in feature 5GC000523-D, the step 1 procedure described here just for the CA related resource allocation/management procedure is completed described.

Step 2: Periodic PUCCH reception and CSI-RS transmission handling when SCell(s) is activated

After the reception of HARQ-ACK for the TB carrying SCell(s) activation MAC CE, P(S)Cell DL L2 PS shall add:

1: the period CSI resource for the target Scell(s) into per slot CSI sending queue. If FDD and FR1 TDD [5GC001167-H] or FDD-FDD [End 5GC001167-H] carrier aggregation feature is activated according to 5G\_UP\_1273\_replaced([11357240](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucbmNfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and UE with CA combination of FDD + FR1 TDD [5GC001167-H] or FDD + FDD [End 5GC001167-H], Scell(s) 5G-L2-PS shall add the periodic CSI-RS resource into per slot CSI-RS sending queue.

2: the period PUCCH resource for the target Scell(s) into per slot PUCCH receiving queue. If FDD and FR1 TDD [5GC001167-H] or FDD-FDD [End 5GC001167-H] carrier aggregation feature is activated according to 5G\_UP\_1273\_replaced([11357240](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucbmNfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and UE with CA combination of FDD + FR1 TDD [5GC001167-H] or FDD + FDD [End 5GC001167-H], Pcell 5G-L2-PS shall add the period PUCCH resource for the target Scell(s) into per slot PUCCH receiving queue.

Then the period CSI RS signal should be sent and related PUCCH receive request should be sent to L1 SW.

The procedure is described in the following figure:

[image-1][image\_desc]The image is a diagram illustrating a process related to cellular network communication, specifically focusing on CSI (Channel State Information) reporting within a UE (User Equipment) context. The diagram depicts different components and their interactions.
At the top, there are three boxes labeled "UE", "L2 LO/L1", and "L2 DL PS". Below "L2 DL PS", there is a yellow box with the text "Decide active one Scell".
A central element is a pink box labeled "UE Context (RNTI X)". Inside this box, there are two sub-boxes: "PSCell" and "Scell". The "PSCell" box contains three smaller boxes with text: "per CsıReportConfig (For PSCell report)", "per CsıReportConfig (for Scell report)", and "per CsıRaResConfig". The "Scell" box contains one smaller box with text: "per CsıRaResConfig".
Arrows indicate the flow of information and actions. A yellow dotted arrow originates from a yellow box on the left, labeled "Insert target Scell CSI resource and CSI report information to per TTI processing queue", and points towards the "UE Context (RNTI X)" box.
Two blue dashed arrows, labeled "Insert", originate from the "PSCell" and "Scell" sub-boxes within the "UE Context (RNTI X)" and point towards two rows of light blue squares. These rows of squares appear to represent a timeline or a buffer.
Below the "UE Context (RNTI X)" box, there is a large grey arrow pointing from right to left, originating from the rows of squares and leading to a yellow box on the left. This yellow box is labeled "Fetch the CSI report and CSI resource TX base on current slot, sent to L1".
The overall diagram illustrates how CSI reporting resources and configurations are managed within a UE's context, involving decisions about active cells, insertion of reporting information into processing queues, and fetching this information for transmission.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_4449.002.png[/image\_path][/image-1]

Because the Scell(s) active confirm (HARQ ACK for CA MAC CE) can happen on any slots.

The following checking should be done, before first period CsiRs Send Request is triggered, period PUCCH receive request cannot be sent, must wait till the first period CSIRS signal has been sent to L1. The principle is described in the following figure:

[image-2][image\_desc]The image depicts a diagram illustrating a communication scenario, likely within a cellular network context, focusing on the timing of measurements and reporting by a User Equipment (UE). The diagram uses colored blocks to represent time slots or Transmission Time Intervals (TTIs) and arrows to indicate signals or events.
There are two horizontal rows of blocks, one colored blue and the other orange, representing two different communication channels or cells. Each row contains a series of small rectangular blocks, suggesting discrete time units.
In the blue row, an orange arrow points upwards from one of the blocks, indicating a transmission or event occurring at that time. Further to the right, a blue arrow points upwards from a later block. A text box with a light blue background and a speech bubble pointing to this blue arrow contains the following text: "UE can not measure the CSI RS, because after Scell active, no CSI RS TX". This suggests that the UE is unable to measure Channel State Information Reference Signals (CSI RS) at this point due to the secondary cell (Scell) being active and no CSI RS being transmitted.
In the orange row, an orange arrow points downwards from an early block, indicating a reception or event. Further to the right, a smaller orange block is shown, and a downward-pointing orange arrow originates from it. A text box with a light blue background and a speech bubble pointing to this arrow contains the text: "UE can report measurement result after this TTI". This implies that after this specific TTI, the UE is capable of reporting its measurement results.
The overall diagram visually contrasts two different situations regarding the UE's ability to measure and report, highlighting the impact of cell activation and signal transmission timing on these processes.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_4449.003.png[/image\_path][/image-2]

Step 3: Period PUCCH receiving and CSI resource step sending when Scell(s) decide to de-active.

When the CA SCell Activation/Deactivation manager (handle the state machine of the Scell Activation/Deactivation) decide de-active the Scell(s),

DL L2 PS should remove:

1. the period CSI resource for the target Scell(s) from per slot CSI sending queue. If FDD and FR1 TDD [5GC001167-H] or FDD-FDD [End 5GC001167-H] carrier aggregation feature is activated according to 5G\_UP\_1273\_replaced([11357240](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucbmNfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and UE with CA combination of FDD + FR1 TDD [5GC001167-H] or FDD + FDD [End 5GC001167-H] , Scell(s) 5G-L2-PS shall remove the period CSI resource from per slot CSI sending queue.
2. the period PUCCH resource for the target Scell(s) from per slot PUCCH receiving queue. If FDD and FR1 TDD [5GC001167-H] or FDD-FDD [End 5GC001167-H] carrier aggregation feature is activated according to 5G\_UP\_1273\_replaced([11357240](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucbmNfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and UE with CA combination of FDD + FR1 TDD [5GC001167-H] or FDD + FDD [End 5GC001167-H], Pcell 5G-L2-PS shall remove the period PUCCH resource for the target Scell(s) from per slot PUCCH receiving queue.

Its means even before the MAC CE (for CA de-activation) has been sent to the UE, the CSI RS for the target Scell(s) has been stopped. The whole procedure is described in the following figure:

[image-3][image\_desc]The image is a flowchart illustrating a process related to a User Equipment (UE) context in a cellular network. The flowchart depicts interactions between different network entities: UE, L2 LO/L1, L2 DL PS, and UE Context (RNTI X).
The process begins with "L2 DL PS" deciding to deactivate one "Scell". Following this decision, a yellow box indicates the action: "Remove target Scell CSI resource and CSI report Information to per TTI processing queue". A dotted arrow connects this action to the "UE Context (RNTI X)".
The "UE Context (RNTI X)" is a larger box containing two sub-sections: "PS Cell" and "Scell".
Within the "PS Cell" section, there are three configuration items:
- "perCsiReportConfig (For Pscell report)"
- "perCsiReportConfig (for Scell report)"
- "perCsiRsResConfig"
Within the "Scell" section, there is one configuration item:
- "perCsiRsResConfig"
Two dashed blue arrows originate from the "PS Cell" section, pointing towards a series of light blue rectangles. One arrow originates from "perCsiReportConfig (for Scell report)" and is labeled "remove". The other arrow originates from "perCsiRsResConfig" within the "PS Cell" section and is also labeled "remove".
A similar dashed blue arrow originates from the "Scell" section, specifically from "perCsiRsResConfig", and is also labeled "remove". This arrow points towards a series of light orange rectangles.
The light blue and light orange rectangles appear to represent queues or processing units, with the "remove" arrows indicating the removal of CSI resources and reports from these queues.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file\_4449.004.png[/image\_path][/image-3]

Step 4: during the UE delete procedure. For the period CSI and PUCCH resource already been added per slot PUCCH receiving queue.

The above resource should be removed from the per slot CSI queue. If FDD and FR1 TDD [5GC001167-H] or FDD-FDD [End 5GC001167-H] carrier aggregation feature is activated according to 5G\_UP\_1273\_replaced([11357240](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucbmNfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and UE with CA combination of FDD + FR1 TDD [5GC001167-H] or FDD+FDD [End 5GC001167-H], Pcell 5G-L2-PS and Scell(s) 5G-L2-PS shall remove the respective period PUCCH resource and period CSI resource from respective queue.

###### 2.4.17.2.1.1.0-2 Triggering the Reception of the periodic UE CSI-Report (Implementation Proposal) MeasurementGap interaction with Periodic CSI Reports(Implementation Proposal for 5G_UP_ALG_2292_replaced( 11114634 )) (ID: 11171745)

**2.4.17.2.1.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11171750`)

Triggering the Reception of the periodic UE CSI-Report (Implementation Proposal)
1)L2-PS DL Scheduler skips sending the Periodic CSI Decode request to L1-UL if the XSFN (extended SFN) of the last Periodic CSI-RS overlaps with measurement Gap ON  period.

"xsfnOfLastPeriodicCsiRsRequest" i.e XSFN of last Periodic CSI-RS shall be re-used from 5GC000523-H feature(5G\_UP\_ALG\_3617\_replaced([11160013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktNNC_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

2)L2-PS DL Scheduler skips sending the Periodic CSI Decode request to L1-UL if the UE is in measurement Gap ON period in the current XSFN.

Implementation Proposal for checking the overlap in the given XSFN:

a)Maintain a bit map with bit set to 1 for the slot positions in “mgl” period and bits set to 0 for rest of the slot positions.

Length of the bit map = number of slots in MGRP(MesurementGapRepetetionPeriod)

b)Verify the bit value at position [“XSFN” MOD (MGRP Length)] and check if there is an overlap

---

##### 2.4.17.2.1.2 Transient phase for Periodic CSI Report on PUCCH

###### 2.4.17.2.1.2.1 UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase

###### 2.4.17.2.1.2.1.0-1 UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase General description (ID: 11171836)

**2.4.17.2.1.2.1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11171840`)

UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase
To decode UCI report correctly, gNb and UE must have the exact same understanding with UCI bit formatting which includes,

 number of total UCI bits reported, and

 bit composition manner of all these UCI bits reported

UCI report is used to report 3 types of information:

 HARQ A/N feedback of DL scheduling

 SR

 CSI

Per high level configuration of gNB, per reporting channel being used (i.e. PUCCH or PUSCH) and per runtime needs, UE may report part or all 3 information types listed above at the UCI reporting slot. In other words, UCI bits are composed by one or two or all following parts:

 A/N bits: hold HARQ A/N feedback of DL scheduling

 SR bits: to hold SR report

 CSI bits: to hold CSI report

In case of CL 8x4 MIMO, only PUCCH format 2 based periodic UCI reporting is supported. Per 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_1134, only following information type combinations are supported for PUCCH format 2 based UCI report:

 A/N + SR

 A/N + SR + CSI

 SR + CSI

Such information type combination is still followed in CL 8x4 MIMO but CSI bit formatting is extended. In CL 8x4 MIMO, CSI bits are composed by:

 CRI bits: 0,1 or 2 bits per number of CSI-RS resources configuration (within the same CSI-RS resource set)

 Rank Indicator (RI) bits: 0, 1, or 2 bits per Max Rank limitation configuration

 Layer Indicator (LI) bits: 0, 1, or 2 bits per reported Rank Indicator (RI)

 PMI bits: 6-9 bits per N1N2 setting configuration and reported Rank Indicator (RI)

For detail about Periodic CSI Reporting on PUCCH of CL 8x4 MIMO, please refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3185\_replaced([11139392](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krmqi_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Following CSI-RS resource settings are informed to UE via RRC signaling:

 number of CSI-RS resources

 Max Rank limitation

 N1N2 setting

Whenever any setting is changed, there is a short time period that gNB and UE may have different understanding about whether elder configuration or new configuration shall be used to determine the bit format of the coming CSI report, we use **UCI ambiguity** CSI report transient phase to indicate this short time period and also the special processing of it.\*\*\*\*

Following considerations shall be taken into consideration for UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase:

 transient phase start

 transient phase stop

 Special DL/UL scheduling considerations within transient phase

CP2 references: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3185\_replaced([11139392](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krmqi_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3490\_replaced([11159137](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktHtc_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

###### 2.4.17.2.1.2.1.0-2 UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase Transient phase start (ID: 11171845)

**2.4.17.2.1.2.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11171849`)

UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase
**Transient phase start when CL 8x4 or 32x4 MIMO is enabled**

---

**2.4.17.2.1.2.1.0-2.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `13343266`)

UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase
If CL 8x4 MIMO is enabled (i.e. dlMimoMode is set to ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing\_8x4) [CB008577-B] or CL 32x4 MIMO is enabled[End CB008577-B], UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase shall be started upon PsUser\_UserModifyReq message reception and in case of any of following conditions are satisfied:

 If pdschConfig::maxNumOfDlLayers IE is changed from 1 to 2/4

Note: legacy DL scheduling transient phase is also started in this situation.

 **(To be determined) If perCsiReportConfig::reportQuantity IE under cellConfigurationForModification structure is set to ‘cri-RI-LI-PMI-CQI’ and following IEs under the same perCsiReportConfig structure is changed:**

o slotOffset

o startingSymbolIndex

o numOfSymbols

 If  size of  perCsiRsResConfig IE under cellConfigurationForModification structure is changed (i.e. CSI-RS Resource Set is changed)

  If size of  perCsiRsResConfig IE under cellConfigurationForModification structure is still set to 1 (i.e. keep using Resource Set #1) and any following perCsiRsResConfig structure IE is changed:

o slotOffset

o startingSymbolIndex

  **If csiRsResSet1Rank1RestrictionAck IE is present and set to TRUE**

Note: csiRsResSet1Rank1RestrictionInd IE is defined in both PsUser\_ReconfigurationRequiredInd and PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq messages (with just the same value for a certain Rank1 Restriction procedure):

1. PsUser\_ReconfigurationRequiredInd::csiRsResSet1Rank1RestrictionInd: indicates the Rank1 Restriction status (disabled or enabled) expected to be configured on UE side via RRC Reconfiguration signaling

2. PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq::csiRsResSet1Rank1RestrictionInd: indicates the Rank1 Restriction status (disabled or enabled) successfully configured on UE side

Note: there is no need to check n1n2 configuration change condition, for the only trigger condition is CSI Resource Set change and this is covered by "size of  perCsiRsResConfig IE is changed” condition[CB008577-B], also the change between 8 port CSI-RS and 32 port CSI-RS can be covered by slotOffset/startingSymbolIndex change[End CB008577-B].

CP2 reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3490\_replaced([11159137](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktHtc_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

**2.4.17.2.1.2.1.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11171866`)

UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase
Transient phase start when actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true

---

**2.4.17.2.1.2.1.0-2.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `12803007`)

UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase
If actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true and dlMimoMode is set to CL 8x4 MIMO, UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase shall be started upon PsUser\_UserModifyReq message reception, refer to 5G\_L2\_712.

If actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true and dlMimoMode is not set to CL 8x4 MIMO, UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase shall be started upon PsUser\_UserModifyReq message reception and in case of any of following conditions are satisfied:

 If **pdschConfig::maxNumOfDlLayers** IE is changed from 1 to 2/4\*\*\*\*

Note: legacy DL scheduling transient phase is also started in this situation

 If the following IEs under the same perCsiReportConfig structure is changed:

o slotOffset

**[CB012149-BB]**

o startingSymbolIndex

o numOfSymbols

**[End CB012149-BB]**

Note: If actCellCsirsTddOnSsbBf is true and dlMimoMode is not set to CL 8x4 MIMO, only Cell specific CSI-RS can be configured for UE. [Before CNI-134949-A] numOfPerCsiRsResConfig and [End CNI-134949-A] perCsiRsResConfig struction will not be changed via PsUser\_UserModifyReq in this situation.

---

###### 2.4.17.2.1.2.1.0-3 UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase Transient phase stop (ID: 11171879)

**2.4.17.2.1.2.1.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11171887`)

UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase
After UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase started, L2-PS shall stop UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase when all following conditions are satisfied:

 PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq is received **[CB013742-A] in case of** [Before CB013742-SR-C] rrmEnhRrcReconfUlPrbRandom is set to ‘FALSE’ (5G\_L2\_22348\_replaced([11142460](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23unR_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_L2\_22350\_replaced([11143101](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23yRqvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **[CB013742-SR-C] isMacLayerMonitorNeeded is evaluated as ‘FALSE’ according to 5G\_L2\_22352** [End CB013742-SR-C] or upon the completion of DL-DCCH RRC Complete Detection for RRC Messages Requiring RRC Completion (5G\_UP\_ALG\_29060\_replaced([11153872](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kspMVPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) otherwise **[End CB013742-A], and then*****\****\*

 one periodic CSI-RS for channel state feedback is sent, and then

 additionally (10 – dlulSlotDifference) slots is past, where dlulSlotDifference refers to the scheduled slot difference (i.e. slot number of air interface) between DL and UL scheduler.

After UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase started, L2-PS shall stop UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase immediately upon PsUser\_UserModifyReq reception with csiRsResSet1Rank1RestrictionAck set to CANCELLATION.

Note: UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase stop condition is different from elderly defined transient phase(s) which is/are stopped as long as PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq is received, accordingly.

CP2 reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3490\_replaced([11159137](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktHtc_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

###### 2.4.17.2.1.2.1.0-4 UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase UE scheduling within transient phase (ID: 11171892)

**2.4.17.2.1.2.1.0-4.0-3**  (ID: `11171906`)

UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase
Following DL/UL scheduling restrictions shall be applied to DL scheduler within UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase:

 bypass the periodic CSI scheduling for this UE via excluding it from UlData\_PucchReceiveReq message filling.

 bypass DL (SRB / DRB) scheduling if relevant HARQ A/N is due to be feedbacked at the same UL slot as CSI reporting. Note: this shall be done in DL pre-scheduler similar as the case of simultaneousHarqAckCsi = false specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4217\_replaced([11174808](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kueYVPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

**[CB013742-A]**

L2-PS shall also follow the DL-DCCH RRC Complete Detection for RRC Messages Requiring RRC Completion procedure specified by 5G\_L2\_22365. Especially, scheduling on both DL direction and UL direction is interrupted when MAC layer monitoring is undergoing in case of **[Before CB013742-SR-C] rrmEnhRrcReconfUlPrbRandom is set to ‘TRUE’ (5G\_L2\_22348\_replaced([11142460](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23unR_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_L2\_22350\_replaced([11143101](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23yRqvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))** [CB013742-SR-C] isMacLayerMonitorNeeded is evaluated as ‘TRUE’ according to 5G\_L2\_22352 **[End CB013742-SR-C].**\*\*\*\*

**[End CB013742-A]**

In case of pdschConfig::maxNumOfDlLayers **is changed, both “sumimo transient phase” (5G\_UP\_ALG\_3490\_replaced([11159137](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktHtc_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase shall be triggered at the same time and “sumimo transient phase” is ended earlier than UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase. In other words, “sumimo transient phase” and UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase may be overlapped with each other for a short time period.**

 Within the overlapping time period, that is, the time period between PsUser\_UserModifyReq reception and PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq reception **[CB013742-A] in case of** [Before CB013742-SR-C] rrmEnhRrcReconfUlPrbRandom is set to ‘FALSE’ (5G\_L2\_22348\_replaced([11142460](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23unR_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_L2\_22350\_replaced([11143101](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23yRqvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **[CB013742-SR-C] isMacLayerMonitorNeeded is evaluated as ‘FALSE’ according to 5G\_L2\_22352** [End CB013742-SR-C], or upon the completion of DL-DCCH RRC Complete Detection for RRC Messages Requiring RRC Completion (5G\_UP\_ALG\_29060\_replaced([11153872](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kspMVPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) otherwise **[End CB013742-A], DL/UL scheduling restrictions defined for both transient phases shall be applied.*****\****\*

 Within UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase only time period, that is, the time period between **[Before CB013742-A] PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq reception** [CB013742-A] overlapping time period ending **[End CB013742-A] and 1st periodic CSI for channel state feedback reception whose measurement is based on the 1st CSI-RS resource transmitted after PsUser\_RrcReconfCompletedReq reception), DL/UL scheduling restrictions defined for UCI ambiguity CSI report transient phase (only) shall be applied.**\*\*\*\*

Note: above CB013742-A modifications on overlapping time period ending was firstly induced by CB009915-B-UPD005, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3493\_replaced([11159183](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktHtfPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for detail.

CP2 reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3490\_replaced([11159137](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktHtc_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

###### 2.4.17.2.1.2.2.0-1 Rank1 Restriction Rank1 Restriction Finite State Machine (ID: 11171914)

**2.4.17.2.1.2.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11171932`)

Rank1 Restriction
[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains two flowcharts side-by-side, illustrating a process with decision points and actions.
The flowchart on the left starts with a "Variable initialization" block in a yellow rounded rectangle, setting `rmRank1Restriction` to `notApplicable`, `sinrLowCounter` to `0`, and `sinrHighCounter` to `0`. This is followed by a "start" oval, then a rectangular process block labeled "PsUser\_UserSetupReq". A diamond-shaped decision block follows, with a complex condition involving `ueCapability::maxNumOfDILayers`, `numPerCsiRsResConfig`, `dlMimoMode`, and `rdLowSinrCount`. The "no" branch leads to a rectangular process block setting `rmRank1Restriction` to `notApplicable`. The "yes" branch leads to a rectangular process block setting `rmRank1Restriction` to `disabled` and `sinrLowCounter` to `0`. Both branches eventually converge to a circular node labeled "1".
The flowchart on the right also starts with a circular node labeled "1". It then proceeds to a rectangular process block labeled "PsUser\_UserModifyReq" with a condition involving `csiRsResSet1Rank1RestrictionAck`, `ueCapability`, and `numPerCsiRsResConfig`. This is followed by a diamond-shaped decision block with a similar complex condition as in the left flowchart. The "no" branch leads to a rectangular process block setting `rmRank1Restriction` to `notApplicable`. The "yes" branch leads to a rectangular process block setting `rmRank1Restriction` to `disabled` and `sinrLowCounter` to `0`. Both branches then loop back to the circular node labeled "1".
