## 2.4.22 Physical Downlink Shared Channel Management

### 2.4.22.0-1 Physical Downlink Shared Channel Management Document Owner TBD (ID: 11173999)

### 2.4.22.1 Filling the DlData_PdschSendReq message

#### 2.4.22.1.0-1 Filling the DlData_PdschSendReq message CSI rate-matching setting (ID: 11174008)

**2.4.22.1.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `12650606`)

Filling the DlData\_PdschSendReq message
The *rateMatchingOption and* numRateMatchingRes*IEs in DlData\_PdschSendReq shall be set in following case:*\*\*

1) CSI-IM rate matching

For a FDD carrier sharing spectrum with LTE (DSS), if the FAF actRateMatchedCsiIm (refer 5G\_L3\_5069\_replaced([11053625](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BB2ZK__KEe-D3seUwaI0tg))) configured to L2-PS as part of PsCell\_CellSetupReq is set to True. Or

For a FDD carrier with non-DSS, if the CSI-IM is scheduled in a different symbol than CSI-RS for channel acquisition. Or For a TDD FR1 carrier, if actTddCsiImRm in PsCell\_CellSetupReq is set to True.

Then, if the scheduled PDSCH grant contains at least one RB that has the CSI-IM resource, then in the DlData\_PdschSendReq message (5G\_L1\_IF\_87\_replaced([11512751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRrpPvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) L2-PS shall set:

* The *rateMatchingOption IE to* RATE\_MATCHING\_CSIRS.\*\*
* The *numRateMatchingRes IE to the total the number of CSI-IM REs found in this PDSCH grant. There are 4 REs in each RB where CSI-IM is scheduled.*

Refer to 5G\_L1\_15169\_replaced([11438557](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e_VlF_vvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for TDD FR1

2) DCI rate matching

For a TDD FR1 carrier, if actPdcchSharingWithPdsch in PsCell\_CellSetupReq is set to True.

Then, if the scheduled PDSCH grant is overlap with PDCCH symbol, then in the DlData\_PdschSendReq message (5G\_L1\_IF\_87\_replaced([11512751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRrpPvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) L2-PS shall set:

* The *rateMatchingOption IE to* RATE\_MATCHING\_DCI.\*\*
* The *numRateMatchingRes IE is set according to 5G\_L2\_885.*

3) TRS symbol rate matching

For a TDD FR1 carrier, if actSubTrsRateMatch in PsCell\_CellSetupReq is set to True.

Then, if the scheduled PDSCH grant is in TRS slot, then in the DlData\_PdschSendReq message (5G\_L1\_IF\_87\_replaced([11512751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRrpPvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) L2-PS shall set:

* The *rateMatchingOption IE to* RATE\_MATCHING\_SYMBOL.\*\*
* The *numRateMatchingRes IE to the total the number of REs in TRS symbol found in this PDSCH grant.*

Refer to 5G\_L1\_15170\_replaced([11438961](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_e_WzMPvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

4) DCI and CSI-IM rate matching

For a TDD FR1 carrier, if actTddCsiImRm and actPdcchSharingWithPdsch in PsCell\_CellSetupReq is set to True.

Then, if the scheduled PDSCH grant contains at least one RB that has the CSI-IM resource and the PDSCH grant is overlap with PDCCH symbol too, then in the DlData\_PdschSendReq message (5G\_L1\_IF\_87\_replaced([11512751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRrpPvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) L2-PS shall set:

* The *rateMatchingOption IE to* RATE\_MATCHING\_CSIRS\_AND\_DCI.\*\*
* The *numRateMatchingRes IE is set according to 5G\_L2\_885.*

5) DCI and TRS symbol rate matching

For a TDD FR1 carrier, if actSubTrsRateMatch and actPdcchSharingWithPdsch in PsCell\_CellSetupReq is set to True.

Then, if the scheduled PDSCH grant is scheduling in TRS slot and the PDSCH grant is overlap with PDCCH symbol too, then in the DlData\_PdschSendReq message (5G\_L1\_IF\_87\_replaced([11512751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRrpPvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) L2-PS shall set:

* The *rateMatchingOption IE to* RATE\_MATCHING\_SYMBOL\_AND\_DCI.\*\*
* The *numRateMatchingRes IE is set according to 5G\_L2\_885.*

Otherwise, *rateMatchingOption is set to* NO\_RATE\_MATCHING and *numRateMatchingRes will be ignored at L1 side.*\*\*

**[CNI-147211-A]**

if slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is true and actTddCsirsOpt is true, the above algorithm shall be applicable as well in case of ecpri

**[End CNI-147211-A]**

---

#### 2.4.22.1.0-2 Filling the DlData_PdschSendReq message lteCrsOption setting for symmetric DSS (ID: 11174025)

**2.4.22.1.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `11174047`)

Filling the DlData\_PdschSendReq message
On an FDD carrier shared with LTE

If *isLteCrsMappingEnable set to True was received in  PsCell\_CellSetupReq message (5G\_L2\_IF\_61\_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), L2 PS shall provide information about CRS rate matching to L1. Thus, L2 PS shall set the parameter* lteCrsOption  to 1 (LTECRSMAPPING) in all DlData\_PdschSendReq messages (5G\_L1\_5G21A\_86) sent to 5G-L1-DL with exception of\*\*

Msg2, where the parameter lteCrsOption  is set to 2 (LTECRSPUNC);

Msg2  ischeduled using DCI format 1\_0 with coreset(0) therefore lteCrsOption 4,5,6 , 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12 shall not be applied for such transmissions.

If slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed is set 'True' **[CB013715-B-UPD001][CB013715-B] or** NSA DSS 10Mhz boths side blanking configuration is being used (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4716\_replaced([11171969](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuJBIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) **[End CB013715-B-UPD001][End CB013715-B]**\*\*\*\*

Msg2, where the parameter lteCrsOption  is set to 0.

* Msg4, where the parameter lteCrsOption  is set to 0 (NOLTECRS);
* SIB1, oSI, paging, where the parameter lteCrsOption  is set to 0 (NOLTECRS);
* PDSCH to UEs in DSS transient phase (5G\_L2\_142\_replaced([11143994](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_233KLvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), where the parameter lteCrsOption is set to 2 (LTECRSPUNC)

SIB1/OSI/Paging/Random Access  and PDSCH to UEs in DSS transient phase (5G\_L2\_142\_replaced([11143994](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_233KLvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) are scheduled using DCI format 1\_0 with coreset(0) therefore *lteCrsOption 4,5,6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12 shall not be applied for such transmissions.*

When  the DL PRB sharing in subframe 0/5/9 is enabled with the  flexible rate matching  isLteFlexibleRateMatchingEnabled set to TRUE (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4722\_replaced([11172097](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuJoPfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and UE is configured by L3 to support of Flexible Rate matching (ueCapability.lteStaticFlexibleRateMatching=TRUE, 5G\_L2\_IF\_401\_replaced([10975032](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U_P9Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

L2-PS shall set the parameter lteCrsOption according to table below if PDSCH grant is assigned for subframe 0, 5, or 9 and any of allocated PRB overlaps with ratematched areas as specified below:

[xlsx\_desc]--- Sheet1 ---
NaN NaN no non-repeated repeated
Overlap with Cat-M data no 1 \n(LTECRSMAPPING) 4 \n(LTEFLEXMATCHPBCH) 7 \n(LTEFLEXMATCHREPMPBCH)
NaN yes 8\n(LTEFLEXMATCHMPDXCH) 9\n(LTEFLEXMATCHPBCHMPDXCH) 12\n(LTEFLEXMATCHREPMPBCHMPDXCH)
NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN
SF9 NaN Overlap with MPBCH\n20 MHz: PRBs [50..56] / 15 MHz: PRBs [36..42] / 10 MHz: PRBs [23..29] NaN NaN
NaN NaN no non-repeated repeated
Overlap with Cat-M data no 1 \n(LTECRSMAPPING) NaN 7 \n(LTEFLEXMATCHREPMPBCH)
NaN yes 8\n(LTEFLEXMATCHMPDXCH) NaN 12\n(LTEFLEXMATCHREPMPBCHMPDXCH)
NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN
SF5 NaN Overlap with PSS/SSS NaN NaN
NaN NaN no yes\n(isLteFlexibleRateMatchingAltModeEnabled=false)\n20 MHz: PRBs [50..56] / 15 MHz: PRBs [36..42] / 10 MHz: PRBs [23..29] yes\n(isLteFlexibleRateMatchingAltModeEnabled=true)\n20 MHz: PRBs [50..55] / 15 MHz: PRBs [36..42] / 10 MHz: PRBs [23..28]
Overlap with Cat-M data no 1\n(LTECRSMAPPING) 5\n(LTEFLEXMATCHPSS) 6\n(LTEFLEXMATCHPSSALT)
NaN yes 8\n(LTEFLEXMATCHMPDXCH) 10\n(LTEFLEXMATCHPSSMPDXCH) 11\n(LTEFLEXMATCHPSSALTMPDXCH)[/xlsx\_desc][xlsx\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/attachments/m24dng\_5G\_L2\_Entity\_Level\_file4843\_0.xlsx[/xlsx\_path]

Furthermore, L2-PS shall fill the *numLteCrsMappingRes IE in order to provide the number of LTE CRS of this PDSCH grant (see 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_783 and 23224).*

For each PDSCH grant, L2-PS will need to know

* the number of PDSCH symbols (see *numOfPdschSymbols IE in 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_92)*
* the start symbol of PDSCH (see *startSymbol IE in 5G\_L1\_5G21A\_92)*
* the number of RBs (see  5G\_L1\_5G21A\_92*, it could be RA type 0 or type 1)*

Note1: lteCrsOption is set 1 (LTECRSMAPPING) in case PDSCH is scheduled for a UE **outside of transient phase in an MBSFN slot. There are no CRS in such slot to avoid, but the UE does not know.**

Note2: In MBSFN slots, where NOLTECRS is used, then symbols 12 and 13 are used for transmission.

---

#### 2.4.22.1.0-3 Filling the DlData_PdschSendReq message lteCrsOption setting for asymmetric DSS (ID: 12884124)

**2.4.22.1.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `13331602`)

Filling the DlData\_PdschSendReq message
When on an FDD carrier shared with LTE where actAsymmetricDss is set to true, and the PsCell\_CellSetupReq message (5G\_L2\_IF\_61\_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) was received with isLteCrsMappingEnable set to 'True', then L2 PS shall provide information about CRS rate matching to L1 by setting the parameter lteCrsOption in all DlData\_PdschSendReq messages [11512684: Physical Downlink Shared Channel Send](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRrpMfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) sent to 5G-L1-DL as follows (refer to [11125063: Filling CRS rate matching information in DlData\_PdschSendReq messages](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqsrkPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)):

* L2 PS shall set lteCrsOption to 0 (NOLTECRS) if the PDSCH is allocated PRBs within the NR dedicated area.
* L2 PS shall set lteCrsOption to 1 (LTECRSMAPPING) if the PDSCH is allocated any PRBs that overlap with the LTE shared area.

[CB007372-M]

As an exception, when the DL PRB sharing is enabled (refer to[11172097](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuJoPfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), L2-PS shall set the parameter lteCrsOption according to rule below if PDSCH grant is assigned for subframe 0 or 5 and any of allocated PRB is within the range specified by CPRT [lowestPrbOfLtePbchPss, highestPrbOfLtePbchPss] correponding to LTE Pss/Sss/Pbch (refer to [12681119: asymmetricDssConfig structure](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_VDi0IVDPEfCeeMlEb49MrQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)):

* set lteCrsOption to 4 (LTEFLEXMATCHPBCH) for slot 0
* set lteCrsOption to 5 (LTEFLEXMATCHPSS) for slot 5

[End CB007372-M]

If lteCrsOption is different from 0 (NOLTECRS) L2-PS shall fill the numLteCrsMappingRes IE in order to provide the number of LTE CRS of this PDSCH grant ([12789128: LTE CRS RE calculations in asymmetric DSS](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_bf_kcJMNEfCoxNjZXyLbRA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

[CB007372-M]

If lteCrsOption is equal to 4 or 5, additional REs should be added to numLteCrsMappingRes for each allocated PRB within the range specified by CPRT [lowestPrbOfLtePbchPss, highestPrbOfLtePbchPss].

* For slot 0/5, 24 REs (12 subcarriers x 2 symbols) corresponding to Pss/Sss should be added.
* For slot 0, 48 REs (12 subcarriers x 4 symbols) corresponding to Pbch should be added minus overlapped Lte Crs RE computed in [12789128: LTE CRS RE calculations in asymmetric DSS](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_bf_kcJMNEfCoxNjZXyLbRA?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). Pbch overlap Lte Crs of symbol 7 for numLteCrsPort 1 and 2, and symbols 7 and 8 for numLteCrsPort 4.

Note: Rate matching around LTE PSS/SSS/PBCH is done at PRB x symbol level, meaning as soon as the NR PRB is partially overlapped, 12 subcarriers (x 2 or 6 symbols) are rate matched.

[End CB007372-M]

---

## 2.4.23 Scheduling of L1 Processing Resources

### 2.4.23.0-2 Scheduling of L1 Processing Resources Overview (ID: 11174062)

**2.4.23.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11174069`)

Scheduling of L1 Processing Resources
Several features need to share or assign some resources between cells. To perform such distribution between the concerned cells, an entity named "L1 resource allocator" has been introduced.

This entity has been first created for the need of the feature 5GC001120 "Buffered UL" and has been reused for pooling features (feature 5GC002093 for subcell pooling and then for other features that allow pooling of other resources between cells).

One "L1 resource allocator" is created per L2RT instance and offers the possibility to distribute resources between the cells managed by this L2RT instance. This entity has been designed to distribute resources at a slow pace (typically at each SFN).

Note that the "L1 resources allocator" is also named "Baseband Pooling Manager" in some features.

"L1 resource allocator" is renamed by "Base Band Resource Manager" from 22R2 (feature CB007114 and 5GC001227)

[CNI-71924-A]

Further details on EO level can be found under chapter 6, 5G\_L2\_5502\_replaced([11241126](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3BjRqPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End CNI-71924-A]

---

### 2.4.23.1 Common Principles

#### 2.4.23.1.1 Pooling deployment handling

##### 2.4.23.1.1.0-1 Pooling deployment handling Address Distribution (ID: 11174081)

**2.4.23.1.1.0-1.0-11**  (ID: `12877910`)

Pooling deployment handling
When L2-PS receives AddressDistribution message, L2-PS checks the configuration of L1 pool resources.

If scheUePoolingAllowed flag is true or isAnyPrbPoolingActive flag is true

* bbPoolMode is in acceptable range described in 5G\_L2\_IF\_1555
* bbPoolPeriod  is in acceptable range described in 5G\_L2\_IF\_1555
* bbPoolInfos struture is present

-- if isAnyDlPrbPoolingActive flag is true, there is a least one L1 DL subpool

-- if SubcellDeactivationDlAllowed is set to 'true',The number of L1 pools shall be equal to 2.

-- if isAnyUlPrbPoolingActive flag is true, there is a least one L1 UL subpool

-- L1 subpool indexes are in acceptable range described in 5G\_L2\_IF\_1555

If AddressDistribution is invalid, L2-PS rejects Addressdistribution by returning an error STATUS5G\_NOTOK, cause invalidParameter, in AddressDistributionResp.

If AddressDistribution is valid, L2-PS replies AddressdistributionResp with an OK result.

BBRM stores locally the BB pooling information.

If slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed is set 'True'(5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_7785), isAnyDlPrbPoolingActive and isAnyUlPrbPoolingActive conditions are applicable for FDD Pooling Enhancement.

BBRM decides setting isInterSubPoolingActivated flag based on below conditions for both TDD and FDD

If (((slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed = TRUE (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_4283)  and rdSlowPrbPoolingRangeTddUl set to '1'(5G\_L2\_6312)) or

(slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed = TRUE (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_4283)  and rdSlowPrbPoolingRangeTddDl set to '1'(5G\_L2\_7674))  or

(slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed = TRUE (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_7785) and rdAllowInterL1SpPoolingFdd set to '1'(5G\_UP\_ALG\_19197)))  and additionally check number of L1 subpools in all the L1 pools in a single L2 pool are greater than 1 )

isInterSubPoolingActivated set as 'True'

Note : By Default , isInterSubPoolingActivated should set as 'False'

Note:

When rdActBbPoolTddFr1AlgEnh or actBbPoolTddFr1AlgEnh or slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed **is set to true , the processing of the enhanced algorithm of PRB inter and intra subpools is triggered and in this case the previous algorithm is not executed.**

In case of shared Loki for ASOE, when dlSubcellDeactForARMAllowed is true, maxNumSubcellL1Sp is 3 and maxNumDlSubcellL1Pool is 3.

In case of shared Loki for ASOE, when ulSubcellDeactForARMAllowed is true, maxNumSubcellL1Sp is 3 and maxNumUlSubcellL1Pool is 3

Refer to 5G\_L2\_IF\_14 for the definition of the prbPooling flags

Throughput pooling is enabled at L2-PS when tddInstTputPoolingAllowed is received as True in AddressDistributionReq message.

There is only one DL L1 Subpool in the second L1 Pool, InterL1subpool Pooling must be disabled on second L1 Pool.

Handling of empty UL subcell list in second L1 Pool as there are no UL subcells in second L1 Pool as per deployment.

The following parameter combination shall be followed to enabled Enhanced UE pooling feature.

|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| scheUePoolingAllowed | actSchedUePoolingEnh | Feature enable or disable |
| TRUE | TRUE | CB014542 UE pooling enabled |
| FALSE | TRUE | UE pooling disabled |
| TRUE | FALSE | Legacy UE pooling enabled |
| FALSE | FALSE | UE pooling disabled |

If scheUePoolingAllowed is 'TRUE' and actScheUePoolingEnh is 'TRUE' then following R&D parameter shall be read and store in database.

rdScheUePoolingMinResourceDL([11215358](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_ev-2EPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))  
rdScheUePoolingMinResourceUL([11215373](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_ezmKwPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))  
rdScheUePoolingTypicalUeSlotUsage([11215385](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_e3DHYPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

rdScheUePoolingTypicalUeSlotUsageFDD([12554031](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Yt-YECWZEfCNjfqfyUlvmw))  
rdScheUePoolingOverAllocFactor([11215398](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_e6hSIPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))  
rdScheUePoolingGracefulAllocFactor([11215410](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_e-BSEPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[CB014543 -A, B]

For FDD or TDD FR1, if isAnyPrbPoolingActive is TRUE then L2PS shall read the following r&d parameters if histUsageAllowed or partialZABAllowed is also TRUE. If R&D parameters are not available then L2PS shall store default values of these parameters.  
a) rdPrbPoolingOverAllocFactor ([12722865](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_Rux7wG3vEfCmnYHxzZN44w))  
b) rdPrbPoolingGracefulAllocFactor ([12722864](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_OzvG8W3vEfCmnYHxzZN44w))  
c) rdPrbPoolingTypicalUsageTdd ([12879244](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_HzalVrM8EfCQT7hYUxERAg))  
d) rdPrbPoolingTypicalUsageFdd ([12879240](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX__UDzZrM7EfCQT7hYUxERAg))  
e) rdAvgUsedPRBSlotFilterCoeff ([12723115](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_7Q5JsG3_EfCmnYHxzZN44w))

f) rdPartialZabAllocRatio ([12824452](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_JzEycKqVEfCrANRYxAlR5A) )

For FDD FR1: If histUsageAllowed is TRUE and slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed is TRUE then only historical data enhanced PRB pooling(CB014543-A) shall be enabled for non-GBR.  
For TDD FR1: If histUsageAllowed is TRUE and (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed) is TRUE then only historical data enhanced PRB pooling(CB014543-A) shall be enabled for non-GBR.

For TDD 7.2e FR1: If histUsageAllowed is TRUE and (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eUlAllowed) is TRUE then only historical data enhanced PRB pooling(CB014543-A) shall be enabled for non-GBR.

For FDD FR1: If partialZABAllowed is TRUE and slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed is TRUE then only partial ZAB PRB pooling(CB014543-B) shall be enabled.

For TDD / TDD 7.2a FR1: If partialZABAllowed is TRUE and slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is TRUE then only partial ZAB PRB pooling(CB014543-B) shall be enabled.

Note: If rdAllowZeroAllocBypass and partialZABAllowed both are true then preference shall be given to partialZABAllowed.

[End CB014543 -A, B]

---

#### 2.4.23.1.2 Cell Management

##### 2.4.23.1.2.0-1 Cell Management Cell list handling by BBRM (ID: 11174129)

**2.4.23.1.2.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `11174150`)

Cell Management
BBRM shall maintain a list of cells.

The cell list needs to be updated upon the following events:

-    Reception of a new cell setup request

-    Reception of a cell delete request

When slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed = TRUE (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_4283\_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and rdSlowPrbPoolingRangeTddUl set to '1'(5G\_L2\_6312\_replaced([11188119](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28GJ5vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or (slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed = TRUE (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_7785\_replaced([11278788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNePvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and rdAllowInterL1SpPoolingFdd set to '1'(5G\_UP\_ALG\_19197\_replaced([11215293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxSbyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))), if the address for the reconfiguration exchanges related the associated L1 pool for UL is unknown by BBRM, BBRM sends ULPool\_AddressReq to L1 UL.

When slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed = TRUE (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_4283\_replaced([11278751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNc_vcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and rdSlowPrbPoolingRangeTddDl set to '1'(5G\_L2\_6312\_replaced([11188119](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28GJ5vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or (slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed = TRUE (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_7785\_replaced([11278788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNePvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and rdAllowInterL1SpPoolingFdd set to '1'(5G\_UP\_ALG\_19197\_replaced([11215293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxSbyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))), if the address for the reconfiguration exchanges related the associated L1 pool for DL is unknown by BBRM, BBRM sends DLPool\_AddressReq to L1 DL.

[Before CB008375-E-UPD001]

L2-PS does not wait for L1 response and replies PsCell\_CellSetupResp immediately.

In case of L1 response, BBRM stores the L1 address.

In case of no L1 response, the L1 address is still unknown.

Notes:

-without the validated UL L1 address for the concerned pool, UL inter pooling algorithm is not operational for this L1 pool.

-without the validated DL L1 address for the concerned pool, DL inter pooling algorithm is not operational for this L1 pool.

[CB008375-E-UPD001]

In case of no L1 response rollback procedure is called.

[End CB008375-E-UPD001]

Note: The above information mentioned under slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed flag and DL requirement is valid for Large Baseband Pooling also.

If valid resourceRegionsForPrbFragmentation configuration is provided by CP-RT then enable ulPrbMutingCapability for that cell else disable.

---

#### 2.4.23.1.3 Pooling Mechanisms

##### 2.4.23.1.3.0-1 Pooling Mechanisms Timing Requirements (ID: 11174159)

**2.4.23.1.3.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11174172`)

Pooling Mechanisms
UL scheduler provides UL metric values to BBRM

* in FR1 with Buffered UL feature enabled: every SFN,
* in FR1 with UE pooling or Slow PRB pooling features enabled: beginning of new BB pooling period in slot 0,
* in FR2: beginning of new BB pooling period in slot 0,

DL scheduler provides DL metric values to BBRM

* in FR1 with Subcell Pooling feature enabled: every SFN fulfilling (SFN % rdSubcellPoolingPeriod) == 0 with rdSubcellPoolingPeriod defined in 5G\_L2\_1234\_replaced([11188075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28Fi3vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),
* in FR1 with UE pooling or Slow PRB pooling features enabled: beginning of new BB pooling period in slot 0,
* in FR2: beginning of new BB pooling period in slot 0,

DL and UL scheduler request BBRM to calculate new resource assignments (like numAllocCellPrbUL)

* in slot 3 in FR1 [PR772491] or in slot 4 if cellTechnology is TDD and UL grants are available in slot 3 and PUSCH can be scheduled for slot 3 + k2. [End PR772491],
* in slot 62 in FR2.

---

##### 2.4.23.1.3.1 Common pooling period

###### 2.4.23.1.3.1.0-1 Common pooling period (ID: 11174181)

**2.4.23.1.3.1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11174185`)

Common pooling period
Several features are based on a common pooling period mechanism in order to be synchronized for a correct managerment of the processing resources. To be sure they are really synchronized, they shall use the same implementation of the pooling period manager, sharing the pooling period value and the SFN start/stop of the period.

The pooling period value is the value bbPoolEvalPeriod.

The very first pooling period starts in the SFN where BBRM allocates and distributes the first resources to the DL and UL schedulers - it can be any SFN.

---

### 2.4.23.2 Buffered UL

#### 2.4.23.2.0-15 Buffered UL Buffered UL – L1 Interface (ID: 11174250)

**2.4.23.2.0-15.0-2**  (ID: `11174259`)

Buffered UL
UlData Request Messages

bufferedUlConfig (5G\_L1\_IF\_265\_replaced([11514645](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR4dj_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is a structure used in UlData\_PuschReceiveReq, UlData\_PucchReceiveReq, UlData\_PrachReceiveReq and UlData\_SrsReceiveReq messages to control buffered UL. 5G-L2-PS shall fill the structure as below:

1. If buffered UL feature is not activated (note: never activated for FDD) or if buffered UL is NOT used for a given slot for the particular subcell, processInRealTime shall be set to TRUE, and slotForProcessing and sfnForProcessing are set to the same values as slot and sfn in the main level of the same message.
2. If buffered UL is used for a given slot for the particular subcell, processInRealTime shall be set to FALSE, and slotForProcessing and sfnForProcessing with the appropriate SFN and slot numbers. The appropriate SFN and slot number is defined by "Buffered UL - Algo 3" (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_5216\_replaced([11209990](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw298_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
3. [5GC002244-C] For configuration as 2 cells with 1 UL C4 subcell per cell, in UlData\_PrachReceiveReq message, processInRealTime shall be set to TRUE, and slotForProcessing and sfnForProcessing are set to the same values as slot and sfn in the main level of the same message, regardless buffered UL feature activation or not. [End 5GC002244-C]

UlData Response Messages

bufferedUlResp (5G\_L1\_IF\_265\_replaced([11514645](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR4dj_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is a structure used in UlData\_PuschReceiveRespPs/HarqU, UlData\_PucchReceiveRespPs/HarqD, UlData\_PrachReceiveInd, UlData\_SrsReceiveRespPs messages to indicate the SFN and NR-slot index of the L1 processiong slot. There is no functional use for bufferedUlResp in 5G-L2-PS. However it shall be used for certain traces to capture the actual L1 processiong slot.

---

#### 2.4.23.2.0-16 Buffered UL TBC (ID: 11174264)

### 2.4.23.4 PRB pooling

#### 2.4.23.4.1 Cell PRB pooling

##### 2.4.23.4.1.1 Pooling Deployment

###### 2.4.23.4.1.1.0-1 Pooling Deployment Pooling deployment error cases (ID: 11174308)

**2.4.23.4.1.1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11174317`)

Pooling Deployment
[CB007112-A] when SubcellDeactivationDlAllowed = false,[End CB007112-A]

PrbPooling is not yet managed when two L1Pools are configured, the configuration should be rejected by L2-PS in that case.

So when PsCfng\_AddressDistributionReq received contained

- two L1Pool instances

- and bbPoolInfos.L1PoolLIst.L1Pool[0]. l1DlSubPoolList.slowPrbPoolingParameters

the configuration must be rejected by sending PsCfng\_AddressDistributionResp with EStatus5G\_NotOk with cause InvalidParameter (2).

[CB007112-A]

when SubcellDeactivationDlAllowed = true,The above configuration mentioned in this requirement should be accepted by sending PsCfng\_AddressDistributionResp as this Feature supports two L1 Pools. [End CB007112-A]

##### 2.4.23.4.1.2 Cell Management

###### 2.4.23.4.1.2.0-1 Cell Management Cell Setup (ID: 11174326)

**2.4.23.4.1.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11174331`)

Cell Management
Overview

---

**2.4.23.4.1.2.0-1.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `11174347`)

Cell Management
[Before CB008940-B]

If SlowPrbPoolingAllowed is true or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed is true, cellSetup contains

* l1PoolId and l1DlSubPoolId for DL subcell, handled by BBRM
* l1PoolId and l1UlSubPoolId for UL subcell, handled by BBRM
* numMinPrbAllocDl for DL subcell, handled by BBRM
* numMinPrbAllocUl for UL subcell, handled by BBRM
* csirsPoolingGroupId for DL scheduler

and

[End CB008940-B]

[CB008940-B]

if isAnyDlPrbPoolingActive flag is true, cellSetup contains:

* l1PoolId and l1DlSubPoolId for DL subcell, handled by BBRM
* numMinPrbAllocDl for DL subcell, handled by BBRM
* csirsPoolingGroupId for DL scheduler

if isAnyUlPrbPoolingActive flag is true,

* l1PoolId and l1UlSubPoolId for UL subcell, handled by BBRM
* numMinPrbAllocUl for UL subcell, handled by BBRM

[End CB008940-B]

BBRM checks the L1 pool and L1 subpool mapping and rejects cellSetup in case of error.

[Before CB008940-B]

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed is true then only UL related checks shall be done.

[CB008940-B]

Refer to 5G\_L2\_IF\_14\_replaced([10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for the definition of the prbPooling flags

[End CB008940-B]

[CB007112-A] Note: The validation and changes under isAnyDlPrbPoolingActive flag mentioned in this requirement is applicable for Large Baseband Pooling (CB007112) also [End CB007112-A]

---

**2.4.23.4.1.2.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11174352`)

Cell Management
Actions on cell setup reception - General

---

**2.4.23.4.1.2.0-1.0-2.0-5**  (ID: `11174374`)

Cell Management
For min stream PRBs determination, check 5G\_L2\_14643\_replaced([11174415](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26j41PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

When BBRM receives a cell setup, [Before CB010944-B]

if isAnyUlPrbPoolingActive set as '1' and isInterSubPoolingActivated set as '0', BBRM checks that the numMinPrbAlloc values for UL cells are available in the subpool associated to these cells. That means it has to calculate for UL:the sum of minStreamPrb values of all cells using the same L1 subpool.

Endif

if isAnyDlPrbPoolingActive set as '1' and isInterSubPoolingActivated set as '0', BBRM checks that the numMinPrbAlloc values for DL cells are available in the subpool associated to these cells. That means it has to calculate for DL:the sum of minStreamPrb values of all cells using the same L1 subpool.

Note: when subcellDeactivationDlAllowed is TRUE BBRM checks numMinPrbAlloc values for DL cells in the primary subpool only. Primary subpool is subpool on which primary subcell is deployed.

Endif

if isAnyUlPrbPoolingActive set as '1' and isInterSubPoolingActivated set as '1', BBRM checks that the numMinPrbAlloc values for UL cells are available in the L1 pool associated to these cells. That means it has to calculate for UL:the sum of minStreamPrb values of all cells using the same L1 pool.

endif

if isAnyDlPrbPoolingActive set as '1' and isInterSubPoolingActivated set as '1', BBRM checks that the numMinPrbAlloc values for DL cells are available in the L1 pool associated to these cells. That means it has to calculate for DL:the sum of minStreamPrb values of all cells using the same L1 pool.

Note: when subcellDeactivationDlAllowed is TRUE BBRM checks numMinPrbAlloc values for DL cells in the primary subpool only. Primary subpool is subpool on which primary subcell is deployed.

endif

if isAnyUlPrbPoolingActive set as '1' and isInterSubPoolingActivated set as '0',The sum of minStreamPrb values of all cells for L1 subpool associated to the added cell shall be lower or equal to l1SpMaxNumStreamPrb associated to this L1 subPool (with l1SpMaxNumStreamPrb received in poolingDeploymentReq). If the sum condition is not true, BBRM returns the error STATUS5G\_NOTOK, cause NoUserPlaneResourcesAvailable in cellSetup response, and ignores/cancels cell Setup request else BBRM returns ok in cellSetup response.

Endif

if isAnyDlPrbPoolingActive set as '1' and isInterSubPoolingActivated ser as '0',The sum of minStreamPrb values of all cells for L1 subpool associated to the added cell shall be lower or equal to l1SpMaxNumStreamPrb associated to this L1 subPool (with l1SpMaxNumStreamPrb received in poolingDeploymentReq). If the sum condition is not true, BBRM returns the error STATUS5G\_NOTOK, cause NoUserPlaneResourcesAvailable in cellSetup response, and ignores/cancels cell Setup request else BBRM returns ok in cellSetup response.

Endif

if isAnyUlPrbPoolingActive set as '1' and isInterSubPoolingActivated set as '1',the sum of minStreamPrb of all cells in L1 pool shall be lower or equal to L1MaxNumStreamPrb (sum of l1SpMaxNumStreamPrb, received in poolingDeployementReq).

endif

if isAnyDlPrbPoolingActive set as '1' and isInterSubPoolingActivated set as '1',the sum of minStreamPrb of all cells in L1 pool shall be lower or equal to L1MaxNumStreamPrb (sum of l1SpMaxNumStreamPrb, received in poolingDeployementReq).

Endif

[CB010944-B] 5G-L2-PS shall verify the minimum number of allocated stream-PRBs as specified in 5G\_L2\_18390\_replaced([11174391](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26jRzfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_L2\_18393\_replaced([11174399](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26jRz_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [End CB010944-B]

If the sum condition is not true, BBRM returns the Error STATUS5G\_NOTOK, cause NoUserPlaneResourcesAvailable in cellSetup response, and ignores/cancels cell Setup request, else BBRM return OK in cellSetup response.

In a second step, if the sum of minSteamPrb of all cells of the corresponding L1 subPool (including the added cell) is greater than its L1SpMaxNumStreamPrb, then BBRM will not consider this cell for prb allocation in intra pooling algorithm (0 PRB allocated to this new cell) until the next inter pooling algorithm allocates enough streamPrb to the concerned L1 subpool.

Note that l1SpMaxNumStreamPrb is updated after each L1 subpool reconfiguration.

Note: The information mentioned under slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed flag in this requirement is applicable for Large Baseband Pooling(CB007112) also.

If TddUlPrbMutingWorkaroundAllowed is true and if Subcell Deactivation Algorithm completed on current pooling period, disable UL subcell's if L1 Fronthaul Capacity Exceeds until next UL subcell deactivation procedure is successful.

Update PRB Muting Capability based on Received Cell Capability.

---

**2.4.23.4.1.2.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11174379`)

Cell Management
Verification of Cell Setup Request

---

**2.4.23.4.1.2.0-1.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `12679299`)

Cell Management
In L2-PS signalling, upon reception of PsCell\_CellSetupReq, the following checking shall be performed to guarantee that current configuration is supported:

|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Checking case** | **Checking description** | **Action description** |
| Check **Pooling feature flag activation** bbPoolingInfoCell>numMinPrbAllocDl | If ((If SlowPrbPoolingAllowed is true **or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true) and numMinPrbAllocDl == NOT Present)**        Reject the cell setup | When the cell setup is rejected, the following actions shall be done: · PsCell\_CellSetupResp shall be returned to CP-RT with · Status = NotOk · Cause = InvalidParameter (2) · DiagnosticInformation[0..13] = 0x00000000 · Add an ERROR log with at least the following sentence: "Cell setup rejected because bbPoolingInfoCell is not valid, numMinPrbAllocDl missing. " |
| Check **Pooling feature flag activation** bbPoolingInfoCell>numMinPrbAllocUl | If ((If SlowPrbPoolingAllowed is true **or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed is true) and numMinPrbAllocUl == NOT Present)**        Reject the cell setup | When the cell setup is rejected, the following actions shall be done: · PsCell\_CellSetupResp shall be returned to CP-RT with · Status = NotOk · Cause = InvalidParameter (2) · DiagnosticInformation[0..13] = 0x00000000 · Add an ERROR log with at least the following sentence: "Cell setup rejected because bbPoolingInfoCell is not valid, numMinPrbAllocUl missing. " |
| Check **Pooling feature flag activation** bbPoolingInfoCell>csirsPoolingGroupId | If((If SlowPrbPoolingAllowed is true **or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is true) [CNI-147211-B] or (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1Ecpri72eDlAllowed is True and actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is true ) [End CNI-147211-B] and csirsPoolingGroupId == NOT Present)**         Reject the cell setup | When the cell setup is rejected, the following actions shall be done: · PsCell\_CellSetupResp shall be returned to CP-RT with · Status = NotOk · Cause = InvalidParameter (2) · DiagnosticInformation[0..13] = 0x00000000 · Add an ERROR log with at least the following sentence: " Cell setup rejected because bbPoolingInfoCell is not valid, csirsPoolingGroupId missing " |

---

**2.4.23.4.1.2.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `11174391`)

Cell Management
Verification of minimum stream-PRBs for DL

---

**2.4.23.4.1.2.0-1.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11174395`)

Cell Management
Step 1.

If isAnyDlPrbPoolingActive set as '1' and isInterSubPoolingActivated set as '0':

5G-L2-PS shall check that the numMinPrbAlloc values for DL cells are available in the subpool associated to these cells.

That means it shall calculate for DL: the sum of minStreamPrb values of all cells using the same L1 subpool.

Note: When subcellDeactivationDlAllowed is TRUE 5G-L2-PS shall check numMinPrbAlloc values for DL cells in the primary subpool only.

Primary subpool is subpool on which primary subcell is deployed.

Step 2.

Iif isAnyDlPrbPoolingActive set as '1' and isInterSubPoolingActivated set as '1':

5G-L2-PS shall check that the numMinPrbAlloc values for DL cells are available in the L1 pool associated to these cells.

That means it shall calculate for DL: the sum of minStreamPrb values of all cells using the same L1 pool.

Note: When subcellDeactivationDlAllowed is TRUE 5G-L2-PS shall check numMinPrbAlloc values for DL cells in the primary subpool only.

Primary subpool is subpool on which primary subcell is deployed.

Step 3.

If isAnyDlPrbPoolingActive set as '1' and isInterSubPoolingActivated ser as '0':

The sum of minStreamPrb values of all cells for L1 subpool associated to the added cell shall be lower or equal to l1SpMaxNumStreamPrb associated to this L1 subPool (with l1SpMaxNumStreamPrb received in poolingDeploymentReq).

If the sum condition is not true:

5G-L2-PS shall return the error STATUS5G\_NOTOK, cause NoUserPlaneResourcesAvailable in cellSetup response, and shall ignore/cancel cell Setup request

else:

5G-L2-PS shall check ok in cellSetup response.

Step 4.

If isAnyDlPrbPoolingActive set as '1' and isInterSubPoolingActivated set as '1':

The sum of minStreamPrb of all cells in L1 pool shall be lower or equal to L1MaxNumStreamPrb (sum of l1SpMaxNumStreamPrb, received in poolingDeployementReq).

---

**2.4.23.4.1.2.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `11174399`)

Cell Management
Verification of minimum stream-PRBs for UL

---

**2.4.23.4.1.2.0-1.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11174404`)

Cell Management
Step 1.

If isAnyUlPrbPoolingActive set as '1' and isInterSubPoolingActivated set as '0':

5G-L2-PS shall check that the numMinPrbAlloc values for UL cells are available in the subpool associated to these cells.

That means it shall calculate for UL: the sum of minStreamPrb values of all cells using the same L1 subpool.

Step 2.

If isAnyUlPrbPoolingActive set as '1' and isInterSubPoolingActivated set as '1':

5G-L2-PS shall check that the numMinPrbAlloc values for UL cells are available in the L1 pool associated to these cells.

That means it shall calculate for UL: the sum of minStreamPrb values of all cells using the same L1 pool.

Step 3.

If isAnyUlPrbPoolingActive set as '1' and isInterSubPoolingActivated set as '0':

The sum of minStreamPrb values of all cells for L1 subpool associated to the added cell shall be lower or equal to l1SpMaxNumStreamPrb associated to this L1 subPool (with l1SpMaxNumStreamPrb received in poolingDeploymentReq).

If the sum condition is not true:

5G-L2-PS shall return the error STATUS5G\_NOTOK, cause NoUserPlaneResourcesAvailable in cellSetup response, and shall ignore/cancel cell Setup request

else:

5G-L2-PS shall return ok in cellSetup response.

Step 4.

If isAnyUlPrbPoolingActive set as '1' and isInterSubPoolingActivated set as '1':

The sum of minStreamPrb of all cells in L1 pool shall be lower or equal to L1MaxNumStreamPrb (sum of l1SpMaxNumStreamPrb, received in poolingDeployementReq).

---

**2.4.23.4.1.2.0-1.0-6**  (ID: `11174408`)

Cell Management
Cell Setup Reception for Supplemental DL Cell FR1

---

**2.4.23.4.1.2.0-1.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11174411`)

Cell Management
On Cell Setup reception, if the given cell is Supplemental DL Cell FR1 (see 5G\_L2\_14855\_replaced([11141639](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23puzPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall override numMinPrbAllocUl IE from bbPoolingInfoCell structure (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_1559\_replaced([10969751](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UeSpPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with 0.

Rationale: BBRM shall not allocate UL resources for Supplemental DL Cells.

CP2 Reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10411\_replaced([11213042](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxFAaPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

**2.4.23.4.1.2.0-1.0-7**  (ID: `11174415`)

Cell Management
Min stream PRBs determination

---

**2.4.23.4.1.2.0-1.0-7.0-2**  (ID: `11174424`)

Cell Management
minStreamPrb is numMinPrbAlloc\* conversionFactor.

For conversionFactor, please see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6782\_replaced([11211964](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw-SuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If actBbPoolTddFr1Enh is true, then

streamPrbDemandRim is prbDemandRimRs received in PsInternal\_DlMetricInd (see 5G\_L2\_3876\_replaced([11244253](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3B1lh_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and converted in stream PRBs (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_22727\_replaced([11212003](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw-SvvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

minStreamPrb is then calculated according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_13342\_replaced([11212500](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxB9EPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)):

minStreamPrb = max(minStreamPrb, streamPrbDemandRim)

Endif

numMinPrbAlloc is received in cellSetupReq.

[CB010944-B]

Note: If prbDemandForArtificialLoadForEmfValidation (see 5G\_L2\_4650\_replaced([11244424](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3B2zovvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) was present in PsInternal\_DlMetricInd (see 5G\_L2\_3876\_replaced([11244253](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3B1lh_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall determine the minimum number of stream PRBs, as specified in [Before PR791584] 5G\_L2\_14643\_replaced([11174415](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26j41PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and [PR791584] 5G\_L2\_18387\_replaced([11174429](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26j41_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and limit the number of stream-PRBs allocated for a cell with DL artificial load generation for EMF validation, as specified in [End PR791584] 5G\_L2\_18398\_replaced([11174436](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26j42fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End CB010944-B]

---

**2.4.23.4.1.2.0-1.0-8**  (ID: `11174429`)

Cell Management
Determination of the number of stream-PRBs allocated for a cell with DL artificial load generation for EMF validation

---

**2.4.23.4.1.2.0-1.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `11174432`)

Cell Management
If prbDemandForArtificialLoadForEmfValidation (see 5G\_L2\_4650\_replaced([11244424](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3B2zovvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) was present in PsInternal\_DlMetricInd (see 5G\_L2\_3876\_replaced([11244253](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3B1lh_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall determine the minimum number of stream-PRBs as follows:

artificialLoadForEmfValidation\_streamPrb = prbDemandForArtificialLoadForEmfValidation \* maxNumberOfStreamPerCellPrb

minStreamPrb = max(artificialLoadForEmfValidation\_streamPrb, minStreamPrb)

Where:

* artificialLoadForEmfValidation\_streamPrb - artificial load for electromagnetic field validation in stream-PRBs [Before PR791584] (defined as ConfiguredLoadInStreamPRBForEmf  in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_13342\_replaced([11212500](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxB9EPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End PR791584].
* prbDemandForArtificialLoadForEmfValidation - Requested PRB resources for DL artificial load generation for EMF validation (see 5G\_L2\_4650\_replaced([11244424](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3B2zovvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* maxNumberOfStreamPerCellPrb - see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6782\_replaced([11211964](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw-SuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* minStreamPrb - minimum resource per Cell in stream-PRBs, calculated in 5G\_L2\_14643\_replaced([11174415](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26j41PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (defined as numMinStreamPRBAlloc in [Before PR791584] 5G\_UP\_ALG\_13342\_replaced([11212500](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxB9EPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [PR791584] 5G\_UP\_ALG\_13412\_replaced([11212449](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxBWCPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [End PR791584]).

CP2 Reference: [Before PR791584] 5G\_UP\_ALG\_13342\_replaced([11212500](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxB9EPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [PR791584] 5G\_UP\_ALG\_13412\_replaced([11212449](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxBWCPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [End PR791584]

---

**2.4.23.4.1.2.0-1.0-9**  (ID: `11174436`)

Cell Management
Limitation of the number of stream-PRBs allocated for a cell with DL artificial load generation for EMF validation

---

**2.4.23.4.1.2.0-1.0-9.0-1**  (ID: `11174441`)

Cell Management
If in the given (sub)pool there is one cell with prbDemandForArtificialLoadForEmfValidation > 0 (see 5G\_L2\_4650\_replaced([11244424](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3B2zovvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall check the [Before PR791584] minimum [End PR791584] number of allocated stream-PRBs in the given (sub)pool, as specified in 5G\_L2\_18390\_replaced([11174391](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26jRzfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), for the sake of software robustness.

If the sum of the allocated [Before PR791584] minimum resources (minStreamPrb) [PR791584] stream-PRBs (numAllocCellStreamPrb, see: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_13342\_replaced([11212500](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxB9EPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_L2\_18387\_replaced([11174429](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26j41_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End PR791584] of all the cells in given L1 (sub)pool exceeds the configured limit (see 5G\_L2\_18390\_replaced([11174391](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26jRzfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G-L2-PS shall decrease  [Before PR791584] minStreamPrb [PR791584] numAllocCellStreamPrb [End PR791584] for the cell with requested PRB resources for DL artificial load generation for EMF validation: the sum of [Before PR791584] minStreamPrb [PR791584] numAllocCellStreamPrb [End PR791584] for all the cells shall match the configured limit.

Note: As specified in the NIDD definition of NRCELL.actEmfTestMode, DL artificial load generation for EMF validation can be enabled for only one cell instance of the gNb.

---

###### 2.4.23.4.1.2.0-2 Cell Management Cell lists per L1 subpool (ID: 11174446)

**2.4.23.4.1.2.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `11174458`)

Cell Management
BBRM handles the lists of the cell per L1pool/subpool/direction(DL and UL)

for each L1 subpool, the list contains all the subcell using this L1 subpool.

each element of the list contains the cell context for PRB pooling:

* numMinPrbAlloc
* numMaxPrbAlloc
* allocatedPrb
* prefered cell (in case of round Robin algorithm)
* GBR and noGBR metrics  (in case of load base algorithm)
* ulCgType2 metric
* [CB011028-B] rimRs metric [End CB011028-B]

BBRM also initialises cell context for PRB pooling algorithm:

* AllocatedPrb=0
* GBR/non-GBR metrics set to 0
* ulCgType2 metric set to 0
* [CB011028-B] rimRs metric set to 0 [End CB011028-B]

---

###### 2.4.23.4.1.2.0-3 Cell Management Cell lists per L1 pool (ID: 11174463)

**2.4.23.4.1.2.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11174466`)

Cell Management
BBRM handles the lists of the cell per L1pool in UL

For each L1 Pool, the list contains Cells which includes Configured Subcell Count given as input to SubCell Deactivation Algorithm.

---

###### 2.4.23.4.1.2.0-4 Cell Management Cell Delete (ID: 11174471)

**2.4.23.4.1.2.0-4.0-3**  (ID: `11174485`)

Cell Management
When a cell is deleted, BBRM receives cellDelete message.

the current BB pooling period is not changed.

the PRB allocated for this cell/subcells are released at next BB pooling period, as next run of pooling algorithm does not allocated any PRB for this deleted cell.

If the deleted cell is the last one, all the parameters for pooling (metricNextSfn, synchroSfn) are reinitialised to invalid.

[PR793505] If the deleted cell is the last one (that means all the cells are deleted), the sizes of all L1subpools of the L1 pool shall be set to the initial values which were received in the Pscnfg\_addressDistributionReq. Refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6850\_replaced([11212236](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH5vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [End PR793505]

---

##### 2.4.23.4.1.3 Pooling Mechanisms

###### 2.4.23.4.1.3.1 Cell Addition Handling

**2.4.23.4.1.3.1.0-1**  (ID: `11174497`)

Cell Addition Handling
BBRM has to take into account the new cell in the PRB pooling algorithm.

The PRB allocation for the current BB pooling period shall not be updated for the cells already running.

So the number of allocated PRBs for this new cell is 0 during the current pooling period.

If this new cell is added to an L1 subpool already having a cell, then BBRM shall not grant any PRB resources before next BB pooling period starts.

If instead, this new cell is the first cell of an L1 subpool, then BBRM shall grant atleast the minimum number of PRBs, unless there are not enough streamPrb available in which case no resources are granted.

---

###### 2.4.23.4.1.3.2 PRB Pooling for Supplemental DL Cell FR1

**2.4.23.4.1.3.2.0-1**  (ID: `11174505`)

PRB Pooling for Supplemental DL Cell FR1
On calculation of:

1. minimum resource reservation (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10411\_replaced([11213042](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxFAaPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),
2. resource reservation for Round Robin Based PRB Pooling Algorithm (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6787\_replaced([11212320](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAu9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),
3. resource reservation for Load Metric Based PRB Pooling Algorithm (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_13342\_replaced([11212500](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxB9EPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_20537\_replaced([11212532](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxB9FfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_13351\_replaced([11212568](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxB9G_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_24112\_replaced([11212640](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxCkJ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

BBRM shall check if the given cell is Supplemental DL Cell (SDL cell), as specified in: 5G\_L2\_14855\_replaced([11141639](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23puzPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Rationale: BBRM shall not allocate UL resources for Supplemental DL Cells.

---

###### 2.4.23.4.1.3.3 impact on frame structure configuration

###### 2.4.23.4.1.3.3.0-1 impact on frame structure configuration No PDSCH transmission when isAnyPrbPoolingActive = true (ID: 11174514)

**2.4.23.4.1.3.3.0-1.0-7**  (ID: `13382727`)

impact on frame structure configuration
For  FDD cell

If slowPrbPoolingAllowed is set to 'true' and slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed is set to 'false' (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_7785\_replaced([11278788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNePvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) ,

Selected slots without TRS in a cell with csirsPoolingGroupId shall not be used for PDSCH scheduling if these slots are in time overlap with TRS slots of the other cell of different csirsPoolingGroupId in the same L1subpool (CSI RS pool group is  defined in 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_4276\_replaced([11276704](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpKRoPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))); see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2382\_replaced([11115299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kptNEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

To determine the slots that should not be used for PDSCH scheduling, the following  is applied :

-> for  csirsPoolingGroupId =0 the  xSFN where

xSFN.SFNmod (4) = 2 and either Xsfn.slot=1 or Xsfn.slot=2

-> for  csirsPoolingGroupId =1 the  xSFN where

xSFN.SFNmod (4) = 0 and either Xsfn.slot=1 or Xsfn.slot=2

End If

If slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed is set to 'true' (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_7785\_replaced([11278788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpSNePvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

To determine the slots that should not be used for PDSCH scheduling, the following  is applied :

List of all CsiRsPoolingGroupIds : [0,1,2] -> MaxCsiRsPoolingGroups = 3

For CSI-RS for TRS Slots,

For each CsiRsPoolingGroupId != (CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell)

Calculate TRS Slot offsets as : (CsiRsTrackingSlotOffsets ) + (CsiRsPoolingGroupId \* 20) : (5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_2020\_replaced([11275658](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TpH1bPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) (for all offsets)

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| CSI Pooling Group | TRS Slot Offset's |
| 0 | 1,2 |
| 1 | 21,22 |
| 2 | 41,42 |

Note : ssBurstPeriodicty(20ms) and csirsTrackingPeriod >= 3 \* ssBurstPeriodicty (80ms : 80 slots) Refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19560\_replaced([11115160](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX7PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

For CSI-RS for Channel Measurement Slots

For each CsiRsPoolingGroupId != (CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell)

Calculate CSI-RS Slot offsets as : select the slot offset mentioned in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19561\_replaced([11115176](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpr-8vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[CB013525-D] Bellow table applies only for FDD Cell with dlMimoMode !=80:[End CB013525-D]

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| CSI Pooling Group | CSI-RS Slot Offset's |
| 0 | 3 |
| 1 | 6 |
| 2 | 18 |

Note: CSI-RS Periodicity is 20ms  [CB013525-D] with dlMimoMode != 80, CSI-RS periodicity and slot offset for dlMimoMode = 80 is as [11115109: CSI-RS/IM for Channel and Interference Measurements Slot Selection With Enhanced FDD FR1 PRB Pooling](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kprX4PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9). [End CB013525-D]

Note: Other CSI-RS Pooling Group Cell's, If the cell is not provided ZAB privilege **by the BBRM for the current pooling period (5G\_UP\_ALG\_14549\_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), CSI-RS slot offsets are taking into account for symbol restriction during while computing total number of symbols for current slot.**

Note: If slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode is set to any value other than "0:disabled", irrespective of the ZAB privilege provided by the BBRM, last symbol of the CSI-RS slots of other CSI-RS pooling groups are muted i.e. (slot-3 and 6 in even SFN, and slot-8 in odd SFN [CB013525-D] or CSI-RS slot for 8 port when dlMimoMide = 80[End CB013525-D]). If slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode is set to value "2: mute\_slot\_0\_3\_6\_8"[CB013525-D] or "4"[End CB013525-D], additionally last symbol is muted in even SFN, Slot-0. [CB013525-D]Also the 4 symbols of 32 port CSI-RS slot of other CSI-RS pooling group if cell is set dlMimoMode = 80. The slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode value shall be the value after operation in [13382491: Handling of slowPrbPoolFddFr1EnhCompMode](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ojBXsACvEfGhFrIQm2O4Ew?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9). [End CB013525-D]

Endif

For  TDD cell

If slowPrbPoolingTDDFr1DLAllowed is set to 'true' and actExplicitCsirsPoolSolution is false  and actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is false,

For each CsiRsPoolingGroupId != (CsiRsPoolingGroupId of current cell)

Calculate TRS Slot offsets as : (Offset from Table) + (CsiRsPoolingGroupId \* 40)   (for all i, i+1, j, j+1 offsets)

Where **csirsPoolingGroupId is in set {0, 1, 2}.**

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a table with two main columns: "Frame Structure" and "TRS Slot Offsets". The "Frame Structure" column is further divided into "Type" and "Variant". The "TRS Slot Offsets" column has two sub-columns: "i, i+1" and "j, j+1".
The table has the following rows:

| Type | Variant | i, i+1 | j, j+1 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  | 0ms | 20, 21 | 18, 19 |
| tdLte | 3ms | 20, 21 | 15, 16 |
|  | 3ms (Bell Canada) | 20, 21 | 22, 23 |
|  | 1:4 | 20, 21 | 16, 17 |
| Semi-Static | 3:7 | 20, 21 | 15, 16 |
|  | 4:6 | 20, 21 | 16, None |

If the cell is not provided ZAB privilege **by the BBRM for the current pooling period (5G\_UP\_ALG\_14549\_replaced([11213394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxHcoPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),  L2-PS shall not schedule any PDSCH in the slot offsets  determined above for the current cell, due to the type of slot (PDSCH) only offsets i+1 and j are taking into account for symbol restriction. End If.**

CP2 requirement(s): 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11311\_replaced([11116871](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp72kvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Else If slowPrbPoolingTDDFr1DLAllowed is true and actExplicitCsirsPoolSolution is true and actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is false,

different cell specific CSI RS period (40, 80, 160, 320 slots) can be supported in the pool and the PDSCH scheduling restriction is different according to the different CSI RS period.

refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19185\_replaced([11116886](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp72lfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) when the period is 40 or 80 slots, refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19181\_replaced([11116893](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp72l_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) when the period is 160 or 320 slots.

Note that since L2PS in one cell can't know the CSI-RS configuration of other cells, L2PS will assume the cell specific CSI RS period in othe CsiRsPoolingGroup is 40 slots and 1/2/4 CSI-RS resource set existing no matter what's the configuration in its own group.

Else If actTddCsirsAllocOptimization is true

different cell specific CSI RS period (40, 80, 160, 320 slots) can be supported in the pool and the PDSCH scheduling restriction is different according to the different CSI RS period (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25402\_replaced([11116898](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp72mfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Note that since L2PS in one cell cannot know the CSI-RS configuration of other cells, L2PS will assume the cell specific CSI RS period in othe CsiRsPoolingGroup is 40 slots and 1/2/4 CSI-RS resource set existing no matter what's the configuration in its own group.

End If

---

###### 2.4.23.4.1.3.4 UL and DL Scheduler applying numAllocCellPrb

**2.4.23.4.1.3.4.0-4**  (ID: `11174579`)

UL and DL Scheduler applying numAllocCellPrb
L2-PS will apply the granted numAllocCellPrb on the slot 0 SFN N+1 for DL and UL PRB resource allocation (5G\_UP\_ALG\_6500\_replaced([11212285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAH9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

DL and UL related actions:

* Update the total number of usable PRB (numAllocCellPrb) granted to the cell every bbPoolingPeriod if the value changed.
* Check in each slot on DL and UL the sum of the PRB resource allocation for all the UEs to-be-scheduled in the CS2 list for each cell not exceed the numAllocCellPrb, for UL the PUSCH PRB shouldn't exceed the numAllocCellPrb-LongPUCCH PRB.
* Check to-be-scheduled retransmission on DL and UL, if the number of the PRB for a retransmission exceed the total usable PRB of the cell (numAllocCellPrb, (numAllocCellPrb, for UL the PUSCH PRB shouldn't exceed the numAllocCellPrb-LongPUCCH PRB), this retransmission can't be scheduled and the HARQ process is freed, otherwise if there is insufficient PRB for a retransmission, the retransmission is skipped (5G\_UP\_ALG\_5082\_replaced([11203301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwejdPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),(5G\_UP\_ALG\_4532\_replaced([11184193](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvQbg_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),(5G\_UP\_ALG\_4311\_replaced([11177467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuveGPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* L2-PS allocators consider numAllocCellPrb is 0 PRB as long as BBRM did not grant resources
* Prepare and Update CurrentActiveSubcellCount based on Received ulSubcells [CB009890-A] and dlSubcells. [End CB009890-A] Updated value is used for UL MU MIMO Scheduling (Refer 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6959\_replaced([11213357](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxG1mfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_14781\_replaced([11146479](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksEkkfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_L2\_9652\_replaced([11167610](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_256_qfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [CB009890-A] and DL MU MIMO Scheduling. [End CB009890-A]

Only DL related actions:

* Update the number of the RBG computed by the numAllocCellPrb for the DL type0 resource allocation (5G\_UP\_ALG\_4279\_replaced([11177002](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kurzwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
* Check if using the last RBG and first RBG is possible:  The sum of the PRBs in the different RBG used should not exceed the number of usable PRB (numAllocCellPrb).

RemainPrbNum: The remaining allocatable PRB number before UE(i) scheduled

ScheduledPrbNum: The allocated PRB number before UE(i) scheduled

RemainPartialRbgNum: The remaining allocatable partial RBG number before UE(i) scheduled

RemainFullRbgNum:  The remaining allocatable full RBG number before UE(i) scheduled

P: RBG size

If RemainPrbNum + ScheduledPrbNum <= numAllocCellPrb

All RBGs can be used by the UE(i)

Else

The full RBG number which can be used by UE(i):

FullRbgUsableNum = Min((numAllocCellPrb - ScheduledPrbNum)/P, RemainPartialRbgNum)

If RemainPartialRbgNum = 2

If FullRbgUsableNum > 0 AND First Partial RBG size + Last Partial RBG size > P AND First Partial RBG size + Last Partial RBG size <= numAllocCellPrb - ScheduledPrbNum - (FullRbgUsableNum - 1) \* P

All partial RBGs can be used by UE.

The number of Full RBG which can be used by UE is FullRbgUsableNum -1.

Else if First Partial RBG size + Last Partial RBG size <= numAllocCellPrb - ScheduledPrbNum - FullRbgUsableNum \* P

All partial RBGs can be used by UE.

Else if max(First Partial RBG size, Last Partial RBG size) <= numAllocCellPrb - ScheduledPrbNum - FullRbgUsableNum \* P

The bigger partial RBG can be used by UE.

Else if min(First Partial RBG size, Last Partial RBG size) <= numAllocCellPrb - ScheduledPrbNum - FullRbgUsableNum \* P

The smaller partial RBG can be used by UE.

Else

No partial RBG can be used by UE.

End If

If RemainPartialRbgNum = 1

If Partial RBG size <= numAllocCellPrb - ScheduledPrbNum - FullRbgUsableNum \* P

Partial RBG can be used by UE.

Else

No partial RBG can be used by UE.

End If

End If

Note:          (2) Available UL PUSCH PRB is the numAllocCellPrb-LongPUCCH PRB.

* If isAnyDlPrbPoolingActive flag is true, the DL related actions are to be considered.
* If isAnyUlPrbPoolingActive flag is true, the UL related actions are to be considered.

Refer to 5G\_L2\_IF\_14\_replaced([10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for the definition of the prbPooling flags.

---

###### 2.4.23.4.1.3.5 Metric Management

###### 2.4.23.4.1.3.5.0-1 Metric Management GBR and non-GBR buffer occupancy of cell (ID: 11174588)

**2.4.23.4.1.3.5.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11174603`)

Metric Management
The buffer occupancy of the cell (5G\_UP\_ALG\_6784\_replaced([11212073](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw-5yvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is used to compute the rrmInstNewDataArrivalEst (5G\_UP\_ALG\_6785\_replaced([11212086](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw-5zPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the prbDemandGbr and prbDemandNonGbr (5G\_UP\_ALG\_6786\_replaced([11212141](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw_g1vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) separately in DL and UL.

[Before CB008940-C]

If slowPrbPoolingAllowed is set to true or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed is true,

[CB008940-C]

If isAnyPrbPoolingActive is set to true,

[End CB008940-C]

the GBR and non-GBR buffer occupancy of the cell is maintained as follow:

For DL: the gbrBufferLength (respectively nonGbrBufferLength) is updated each time the bufferedDataBytes of one GBR bearer (respectively non-GBR) of one UE in the cell is updated as described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_4561\_replaced([11186983](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvXwMvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For UL: the gbrBufferLength (respectively nonGbrBufferLength) is updated each time the rrmBufferedDataUlLcg of one GBR/non-GBR bearer of one UE in the cell is updated as described in 5G\_L2\_372\_replaced([11151301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24hRefvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Note, a bearer is considered as GBR at L2PS level if gbrQosSpecificParameters structure is present in the drbAddReqPs (5G\_L2\_IF\_397\_replaced([10974876](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U-o4vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) at the UserSetup or BearerSetup procedures.

At the reception of PsUser\_UserStopReq (During user delete procedure), the total amount of data for Gbr bearer(s) (respectively nonGbr bearer) in the associated UE buffer is decreased from gbrBufferLength (respectively nonGbrBufferLength) of the active serving cell associated to UE buffer.

[Before CB008940-C]

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed is true, only the UL related part described above is applicable.

[End CB008940-C]

---

###### 2.4.23.4.1.3.5.0-2 Metric Management New DL Data Arrival Estimation per Cell (ID: 11174607)

**2.4.23.4.1.3.5.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11174611`)

Metric Management
In order to compute the downlink rrmInstNewGbrDataArrivalEst (respectively rrmInstNewNonGbrDataArrivalEst) (5G\_UP\_ALG\_6785\_replaced([11212086](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw-5zPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), DL scheduler sum up DL TBS of all fresh transmissions of GBR traffic (respectively Non-GBR) over bbPoolingPeriod.

The scheduled DL TBS is provided per bearer as amountBytes IE in LoCtrl\_PduMuxReq (5G\_L2\_IT\_868).

---

###### 2.4.23.4.1.3.5.0-3 Metric Management New UL Data Arrival Estimation per Cell (ID: 11174616)

**2.4.23.4.1.3.5.0-3.0-4**  (ID: `11174633`)

Metric Management
In order to compute the uplink rrmInstNewGbrDataArrivalEst (respectively rrmInstNewNonGbrDataArrivalEst), UL scheduler shall sum up UL TBS of all fresh transmissions of GBR traffic (respectively Non-GBR) over bbPoolingPeriod according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6785\_replaced([11212086](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw-5zPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For TDD FR1[CB009215-H]or If slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed = TRUE in FDD FR1[End CB009215-H], UL scheduler shall sum up the receivedDataAmount of LoCtrl\_UlMaxPduReceiveInd of all GBR bearers (respectively non-GBR) received during the BB pooling period. Note, it is clear and accepted that some UL data was initially already granted in BB pooling period N-1 but received in BB pooling period N.

The rationale to consider the received data amount instead of the scheduled data amount is the consequence of following mixed DRB type traffic case: UE has constant GBR and non-GBR traffic. Injected GBR rate is multiple of Prioritized Bit Rate. Non-GBR rate is multiple of GBR rate and close to cell max rate. Total rate is exceeding cell max rate. UE is granted for each UL slot. Any TBS is filled by the UE first with GBR up to Prioritized Bit Rate, then non-GBR data such that non-GBR buffer is drained most of the time, finally with deprioritized GBR data (according to 3GPP). Consequently the UE reports high buffer size level for GBR (accumulating data) and low or zero buffer size level for non-GBR. Hence, UL scheduler sees mostly/only GBR data awaiting transmission (based on BSR) and schedules UE for GBR. But received data shows that UE fills TBS with both, GBR and non-GBR as mentioned above.

Instead,[CB009215-H] If slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed = FALSE[End CB009215-H] in FDD following is applicable:

Since the MAC-CE/PHR/BSR bytes per TBS are unknown when sending the grant to the UE, the following assumptions has been considered to compute the TBS of GBR/non-GBR traffic per UL grant:

GbrTbs = Min (tbSizeInBytes - srbBytes, gbrPendingDataBytes)

NonGbrTbs = tbSizeInBytes - GbrTbs

Where :

 srbBytes: bytes from transport block used to send SRB data.

 srbBytes=Min (tbsSizeBytes, srbPendingDataBytes) where srbPendingDataBytes is defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_5120\_replaced([11203697](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwgYqPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 gbrPendingDataBytes: L2PS assumes that the UE has UL data pending for transmission in GBR bearers if the following condition is true:

 (Sum (bufferedBytes of all GBR bearers) – Sum (scheduledBytes of all GBR bearers))>0

Note: According to this assumption, PHR/MAC-CE/BSR will be counted as non-GBR bytes (non-Gbr TBS).

If CG driver bearer priority is GBR, the CG TBS in bytes is substracted from above calculated GbrTbs.

If CG driver bearer priority is non GBR, the CG TBS in bytes is substracted from above calculated NonGbrTbs.

---

###### 2.4.23.4.1.3.5.0-4 Metric Management Historical PRB Usage Bookkeeping (ID: 12877918)

**2.4.23.4.1.3.5.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `12877919`)

Metric Management
[CB014543 -D, E, G, H]

For FDD, if (histUsageAllowed or partialZABAllowed) is TRUE and slowPrbPoolingFddFr1EnhAllowed is TRUE then calculated average of non-GBR historical usage PRB([12721304](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_10-ME20ZEfCmnYHxzZN44w) and [12721308](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_HUaecG0aEfCmnYHxzZN44w)) shall be sent dlMetricInd/ulMetricInd message, else average of non-GBR historical usage PRB shall be set to 0(zero) in dlMetricInd/ulMetricInd message.

For TDD, if (histUsageAllowed or partialZABAllowed ) is TRUE and (slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is TRUE for DL or slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed is TRUE for UL) then calculated average of non-GBR historical usage PRB([12721304](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_10-ME20ZEfCmnYHxzZN44w) and [12721308](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_HUaecG0aEfCmnYHxzZN44w)) shall be sent in dlMetricInd/ulMetricInd message, else average of non-GBR historical usage PRB shall be set to 0(zero) in dlMetricInd/ulMetricInd message.

Following table is a full picture of feature enabling.

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| histUsageAllowed | partialZABAllowed | Scheduler Bookkeeping | BBRM PRB Pooling algorithm considering | BBRM Partial ZAB algorithm considering |
| TRUE | TRUE | TRUE | TRUE | TRUE |
| TRUE | FALSE | TRUE | TRUE | FALSE |
| FALSE | TRUE | TRUE ( for DL only) | FALSE | TRUE |
| FALSE | FALSE | FALSE | FALSE | FALSE |

Note 1: In case only DL or UL PRB pooling is enabled then respective average of non-GBR historical usage PRB shall be calculated.

Note 2:To calculate non-GBR PRBs, UE priority index of all traffics shall be consider in DL and UL respectively. It might be possible that due to multiple bearers of an UE, priority index will be set as per highest data priority and UE will be chosen accordingly.

Note 3: It is clear and accepted that some UL data was initially already granted in BB pooling period N-1 but received in BB pooling period N. So counting of used PRB will be in BB pooling period N-1. Please refer [11174616](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_G2rmCfvOEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) for rationale.

Note 4: The partialZABAllowed is applicable only in Downlink, therefore bookkeeping shall be done for DL only if partialZABAllowed is True. For UL, it shall be sent as zero value but only if histUsageAllowed is false.

Note 5: In case of DL-MIMO, the calculation can be done in FDM phase as calculating in FD phase was performance heavy due to code dependencies. It is fine to count more prbs used if some paired UEs are dropped in later phase due to known block reasons as Scheduler needs to balance between performance and average PRB calculation.

[End CB014543 -D, E, G, H]

---

###### 2.4.23.4.1.3.5.0-5 Metric Management PRB Demand (ID: 11174638)

**2.4.23.4.1.3.5.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11174642`)

Metric Management
prbDemandGbr and prbDemandNonGbr (defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6786\_replaced([11212141](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw_g1vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) corresponding to the bbPoolingPeriod N are computed at the end of slot 9 of the last SFN of bbPoolingPeriod N.

They are sent in the DlMetricInd/UlMetricInd messages in slot 0 of the first SFN of bbPoolingPeriod N+1.

Note, requirement content is merged into 5G\_L2\_8952\_replaced([11174673](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26luCvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))(23R1 release version).

---

###### 2.4.23.4.1.3.5.0-6 Metric Management PRB Demand for Artificial load generation for EMF validation (ID: 11174645)

**2.4.23.4.1.3.5.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11174651`)

Metric Management
1. When 5G-L2-PS fills PsInternal\_UlMetricInd (see 5G\_L2\_11697\_replaced([11244373](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3B2MnPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) message content, 5G-L2-PS shall set prbDemandForArtificialLoadForEmfValidation (see 5G\_L2\_4650\_replaced([11244424](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3B2zovvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) as absent.

1. When 5G-L2-PS fills PsInternal\_DlMetricInd (see 5G\_L2\_3876\_replaced([11244253](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3B1lh_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) message content:

If in the given cell:

* DL artificial load generation for EMF validation is enabled, as specified in 5G\_L2\_18356\_replaced([11150050](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24Z8s_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* AND slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed is enabled (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_14\_replaced([10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

5G-L2-PS shall calculate the PRB demand for artificial load generation for EMF validation using formula:

prbDemandForArtificialLoadForEmfValidation = roundup((emfTargetTotalLoad \* dlBandwidth ) / 100)

where:

* prbDemandForArtificialLoadForEmfValidation - Requested PRB resources for DL artificial load generation for EMF validation (see 5G\_L2\_4650\_replaced([11244424](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3B2zovvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* emfTargetTotalLoad - target total load for creating artificial load in the cell for EMF test mode, received in artificialLoadInfo structure (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_111\_replaced([10968847](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UaBJPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) from the latest PsCell\_CellSetupReq/PsCell\_CellReconfigurationReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_L2\_IF\_1988\_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) message content.
* dlBandwidth - maximum number of Downlink Physical Resource Blocks received in PsCell\_CellSetupReq (see 5G\_L2\_IF\_73\_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) message content.

Otherwise:

5G-L2-PS shall set prbDemandForArtificialLoadForEmfValidation (see 5G\_L2\_4650\_replaced([11244424](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3B2zovvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) as absent.

CP2 Reference: 5G\_UP\_ALG\_13342\_replaced([11212500](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxB9EPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

###### 2.4.23.4.1.3.5.0-7 Metric Management Determining totalSlotPerPoolingPeriod for calculating PRB demands (ID: 11174655)

**2.4.23.4.1.3.5.0-7.0-2**  (ID: `11174664`)

Metric Management
Refers to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6786\_replaced([11212141](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw_g1vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1UlAllowed = TRUE, L2-PS shall determine the total number of (TDD FR1) UL slots (totalSlotPerPoolingPeriod) only once at cell setup [Before CB008940-C] and use the calculated value for each BB pooling period (bbPoolingPeriod) [CB008940-C]. If slowPrbPoolingTddFr1DlAllowed = TRUE, L2-PS shall also determine the total number of (TDD FR1) DL slots (totalSlotPerPoolingPeriod) after slot pattern definition (5G\_UP\_ALG\_2295\_replaced([11114654](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpmfbfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The calculated value of totalSlotPerPoolingPeriod is then used in corresponding DL or/and UL computation of prbDemand (5G\_UP\_ALG\_6786\_replaced([11212141](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw_g1vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) each BB pooling period (bbPoolEvalPeriod). [End CB008940-C]

Rationale is that the number of UL [CB008940-C] & DL [End CB008940-C] slots is the same or almost same in each BB pooling period because:

* the BB pooling period is an integer multiple of the frame structure pattern length (10 ms),
* with long PUCCH all UL slots are available for PUSCH, i.e. independent of PRACH occurrence/configuration,
* there is no feature changing (significantly) the number of available TDD FR1 UL [CB008940-C] & DL [End CB008940-C] slots over time for single cells of the pool, neither by cell reconfiguration nor by other dynamic handling.

[Before CB008940-C]

It is left to implementation how to determine the number of UL slots, e.g. they could be counted from the K2 slot pattern or determined directly from frame structure configuration.

[CB008940-C]

That is:

totalSlotPerPoolingPeriod = Floor (bbPoolPeriod / sfnDuration \* nbPxschSlotPerSfn)

where:

* bbPoolEvalPeriod corresponds to IE NRBTS.bbPoolEvalPeriod
* nbPxschSlotPerSfn = nbPxschSlot / nbSfnPerPattern
* nbPxschSlot (nbPdschSlot or nbPuschSlot) is number of slot available for pdsch or pusch in a slot pattern as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2295\_replaced([11114654](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpmfbfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* nbSfnPerPattern is number of sfn in a slot pattern as defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_2296\_replaced([11114662](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpmfb_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[End CB008940-C]

---

###### 2.4.23.4.1.3.5.0-8 Metric Management Load based Algorithm in BBRM (ID: 11174669)

**2.4.23.4.1.3.5.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `11174673`)

Metric Management
Load based algorithm executed by BBRM

---

**2.4.23.4.1.3.5.0-8.0-1.0-10**  (ID: `12877925`)

Metric Management
If bbPoolMode is set to "1: load based", BBRM shall apply subcell deactivation algorithm specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_18301\_replaced([11213855](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxKf8fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) in DL if dlSubcellDeactForARMAllowed is true and in UL if ulSubcellDeactForARMAllowed is true,subcell deactivation algorithm specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_15396\_replaced([11213669](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxJR0PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) if TddUlPrbMutingWorkaroundAllowed is true, and the load based algorithm specified in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_13530\_replaced([11212376](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAu_PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))(before 23R1) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_13233\_replaced([11212393](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAu_vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))(from 23R2).

The load based algorithm of PRB pooling can be described by the following steps:

1) In last slot of last SFN of bbPoolingPeriod N, DL and UL scheduler calculate the PRB demands [CB014543-D,E] and non-GBR historical load [End CB014543-D,E]:

* prbDemandGbr, prbDemandNonGbr, prbDemandRim, prbDemandUlcgType2 according to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6786\_replaced([11212141](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw_g1vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),
